E: Decaying Shadow (Bug)

C: 「所有或一无所有」
E: "All or Nothing"

C: 对冻结状态下的我方目标及相邻目标造成冰属性伤害，同时解除主目标的冻结状态。若相邻目标处于冻结状态，则再次对主目标施放本技能。
E: Deals Ice DMG to Frozen targets and units adjacent to the target. This also removes the primary target's Frozen state. If the adjacent units are frozen, then this ability is used again on the primary target.

C: 对指定我方单体造成冰属性伤害，并有大概率使受到攻击的我方目标陷入冻结状态。
E: Deals Ice DMG to a single target, with a high chance to Freeze the target.

C: 对指定我方单体造成少量冰属性伤害。
E: Deals minor Ice DMG to a single target.

C: 对指定我方单体造成冰属性伤害。
E: Deals Ice DMG to a single target.

C: 对指定我方单体造成物理属性伤害，并使受到攻击的我方目标行动延后。
E: Deals Physical DMG to a single target and delays their action.

C: 召唤2个【辅助机械臂单元】，其中一个处于过载。
E: Summons 2 Auxiliary Robot Arm Units with 1 in the Overload state.

C: 随机召唤【自动机兵•甲虫】和【自动机兵•战犬】。
E: Summons "Automaton Beetle" and "Automaton Hound" at random.

C: 对我方全体造成冰属性伤害，并有大概率使受到攻击的我方目标陷入【深寒】状态。
E: Deals Ice DMG to all targets, with a high chance to Deep Freeze the targets.

C: 对指定我方单体造成雷属性伤害，并有概率使受到攻击的我方目标陷入触电状态。
E: Deals Lightning DMG to a single target, with a chance to Shock the target.

C: 受到致命攻击时回复一定生命值。该效果无时间限制，但可以被解除。该效果在单场战斗中仅能触发1次。
E: Upon receiving a killing blow, restores a certain amount of HP. This effect does not have a time limit but can be dispelled. This effect can only trigger 1 time per battle.

C: 对我方全体造成风属性伤害。
E: Deals Wind DMG to all targets.

C: 召唤建木枝梢【繁花之杪】。
E: Summons Ambrosial Arbor branch "Twig of Glorious Blooms"

C: 召唤2个建木枝梢【肃风之杪】。
E: Summons 2 Ambrosial Arbor Branch "Twig of Wintry Wind."

C: 进入【守备】状态，弱点未被击破时受到的伤害降低，被击破时行动额外延后，被击破后受到的伤害提高。
E: Enters the Safeguard state. While not Weakness Broken, reduces DMG received. Once Weakness is Broken, action will be delayed. After Weakness is Broken, increases DMG received.

C: 进入【守备】状态，弱点未被击破时受到的伤害降低，被击破时行动额外延后，被击破后受到的伤害提高。
E: Enters the Safeguard state. While not Weakness Broken, reduces DMG received. Once Weakness is Broken, action will be delayed. After Weakness is Broken, increases DMG received.

C: 在受到一定次数攻击后，会从【课堂频道】状态转变为【课间频道】状态，并陷入弱点击破状态。
E: After being attacked for a number of times, switches the "Classroom Channel" state to the "Off-Class Channel" state and enters the Weakness Broken state.

C: 将【讥讽】状态转变为【狂乱】状态。
E: Switches "Mocked" state to "Rabid" state.

C: 自身在攻击时有大概率对目标施加减速状态。当自身受到攻击或持续伤害时，叠加1层【炉灶加温】。
E: When attacking, this unit has a high chance to Slow the target. When this unit is attacked or takes DoT, gains 1 stack of Stove Heating.

C: 使我方全体攻击力提高。只能在【讥讽】状态下使用。
E: Increases all targets' ATK. This ability can only be used while under the "Mocked" state.

C: 大概率使指定我方单体陷入【<u>荒宴醉</u>】或【<u>欢宴罪</u>】状态。
E: High chance of inflicting <u>Carousal of Wantonness</u> or <u>Carousal of Revelry</u> to a single target.

C: 在行动序列上添加一次【宣诫】。
E: Adds Commandment to the Action Order once.

C: 在行动序列上添加【宣诫】，每次【宣诫】行动时，解除场上所有「秩序的傀儡」的控制类负面状态与弱点击破状态，并释放【为同一律献舞】。每当有一名「秩序的傀儡」的弱点被击破时，【宣诫】的行动将小幅延后。
E: Adds Commandment to the Action Order. Every time Commandment acts, dispels all Crowd Control debuffs and Weakness Broken states afflicting the Puppets of the Order on the field and unleashes "Dance for Synchrony." Whenever a Puppet of the Order is Weakness Broken, Commandment will suffer a slight action delay.

C: 本次战斗中，「千面斯科特」与所有「斯科特」共享血量。
E: In this battle, "Thousand-Faced Skott" shares HP with all other "Skott" units.

C: 立即对所有被锁定的我方目标发动致命攻击，使其陷入【梦死】状态。如果没有被锁定的目标，则随机对2名我方目标发动致命攻击并使其陷入【梦死】状态。
E: Immediately launches a killing blow on all locked-on targets and inflicts Morbid Dream on them. If there are no locked-on targets, launches a killing blow on 2 random targets and inflicts Morbid Dream on them.

C: 进入蓄力状态，下回合施放【在雨中高歌】，同时恢复所有「旧梦的回声」的韧性。
E: Enters the Charging state. Uses "Singing in Rain" in the next turn, while also restoring all "Echoes of Faded Dreams"' Toughness.

C: 拥有一定层数的【战甲】，使自身受到的伤害降低。受到攻击后减少自身1层【战甲】，减少到0层时，【战甲】被破坏，对自身造成大量虚数属性伤害，并使自身行动延后，使破坏【战甲】的我方单位恢复能量。【战甲】被破坏后，自身受到攻击时额外再受到少量虚数属性伤害。【战甲】在自身回合结束时恢复到最大层数。
E: Possesses a number of "War Armor" stacks, which decreases DMG taken. Loses 1 stack of "War Armor" on this unit after being attacked. When at 0 stacks, "War Armor" will be destroyed, dealing massive Imaginary DMG to this unit and delaying their action. The target that destroyed "War Armor" will regenerate Energy. After "War Armor" is destroyed, this unit will also additionally take minor Imaginary DMG when attacked. "War Armor" will be restored to maximum stacks at the end of this unit's turn.

C: 从我方队伍左侧起横扫攻击我方3个连续目标，造成少量虚数属性伤害。
E: Starting from the leftmost target, uses a sweeping attack on 3 consecutive targets, dealing minor Imaginary DMG.

C: 对我方全体目标造成虚数属性伤害。
E: Deals Imaginary DMG to all targets.

C: 进入<u>【死亡的芬芳】</u>状态，对我方全体角色造成大量量子属性<u>【衰亡伤害】</u>，该伤害<u>【不致命】</u>，同时使我方全体角色陷入<u>【沉沦于长眠】</u>状态。在二阶段，还会使自身下次行动前，韧性无法被削减并免疫来自我方目标造成的行动延后效果。
E: Enters the <u>"Fragrance of Death"</u> state and deals massive Quantum "<u>Atrophy DMG</u>" to all target characters. This DMG is "<u>Non-fatal</u>" and inflicts all target characters with <u>"Indulging Slumber."</u> In the second phase and before this unit's next action, its Toughness cannot be reduced, and it is immune to action delay effects caused by targets.

C: 处在晴天时，战场环境拥有【<u>温度</u>】。当任意目标回合开始时，升高【<u>温度</u>】。我方目标造成的伤害将根据【<u>温度</u>】提高。使我方全体目标陷入【太阳风暴】，当我方回合开始时，将根据【<u>温度</u>】造成火属性伤害，该伤害<u>【不致命】</u>。当【阳雷之鸦】、【百眼之末】或【百眼之梢】受到致命攻击时，将会降低【<u>温度</u>】。
E: When it is sunny, the environment will have "<u>Temperature</u>." At the start of any target's turn, the "<u>Temperature</u>" rises. DMG dealt by targets will increase based on "<u>Temperature</u>." All targets enter the "Solar Storm" state. At the start of a target's turn, deals Fire DMG based on the "<u>Temperature</u>." This DMG is "<u>Non-fatal</u>." When the "Daythunder Raven," "Shoot of Hundred Eyes," and "Twig of Hundred Eyes" receive a killing blow, "<u>Temperature</u>" will be lowered.

C: 本场战斗中，【晨昏之眼，雅辛忒丝】造成的所有伤害会基于【黑潮同步率】造成固定数值伤害，我方目标攻击后，会再基于【黑潮同步率】造成<u>真实伤害</u>，该伤害<u>【不致命】</u>。当【晨昏之眼，雅辛忒丝】和【黑潮】行动时，将增加【黑潮同步率】，当【枯槁的筛骨】或【干涸的泪骨】被击杀时，会减少【黑潮同步率】。
E: During this battle, all DMG dealt by "Hyacinthia, Eye of Twilight" will deal a set amount of DMG based on "Black Tide Sync Rate." After a target uses an attack, additionally deals "<u>Non-fatal</u>" <u>True DMG</u> based on "Black Tide Sync Rate." When "Hyacinthia, Eye of Twilight" and "Black Tide" take action, increases "Black Tide Sync Rate." When "Languid Ethmoid Bone" or "Dried Lacrimal Bone" is defeated, reduces "Black Tide Sync Rate."

C: 使【残破容器】进入【共祭】状态。
E: Causes "Long-Shattered Vessel" to enter the "Mutual Sacrifice" state.

C: 扑满被惊动了，即将在2个回合后逃离。
E: The Trotter got spooked and will flee in 2 turns.

C: 进入【守备】状态，弱点未被击破时受到的伤害降低，被击破时行动额外延后，被击破后受到的伤害提高。
E: Enters the Safeguard state. When not Weakness Broken, reduces DMG received. Once Weakness is Broken, action will be delayed. After Weakness is Broken, increases DMG received.

C: 蓄力并进入【增殖】状态，持续直到下次行动。下次行动时对我方全体施放【坍星之卵】。状态持续期间受到伤害大幅降低，并且每次受到攻击时召唤【蚀蛰虫】或【次蛰虫】。【增殖】状态下被击破弱点，会对敌方全体造成等同自身韧性上限的削韧值，并使自身以外的敌方目标受到的伤害提高。
E: Starts Charging and enters the Multiply state until the next action, whereupon Ovum of Collapsed Star will be used on all targets. During the Multiply state, DMG received is greatly reduced, and each attack taken will cause a Gnaw Sting and/or Lesser Sting to be summoned. If this unit is Weakness Broken while in the Multiply state, it will reduce all friendly units' Toughness by an amount equal to this unit's Max Toughness and increase the DMG taken by all other friendly units besides the target themselves.

C: 每次施放攻击后获得1个【绩效点】。【绩效点】可在自身弱点被击破或受到致命攻击时被攻击者夺取。
E: Receives 1 Performance Point after unleashing an attack. Performance Points can be seized by the attacker when this unit's Weakness is Broken or this unit receives a killing blow.

C: 具备独立星际航行能力的星际舰船，与基座连接为一体时作为空间站控制中枢而存在。
E: The master control zone can be detached from the station, capable of traversing the Cosmos on its own. It serves as the brain of operations when attached to the main body of the space station.

C: 一艘梦境中的豪华空艇，于匹诺康尼十二时分之间的忆域空海上航行。只有受到直接邀请的贵宾方能登上它。
E: A luxurious airship sails across the seas of memory between the Twelve Hours within the Penacony's dreamscape. Only guests who receive a direct invitation can board it.

C: 绝灭大君 - 毁灭
E: Lord Ravagers — Destruction

C: 星穹列车车厢（科技）
E: Astral Express Coach (Technology)

C: 每供奉#1单位的秘酿可领取一次奖励
E: Every #1 units of ambrosia offered will net you 1 instance of reward

C: 菜鸟快让开！
E: Outta my way, rookie!

C: 默认解锁
E: Unlocked by Default

C: 瓦尔特观测到雅利洛上的裂界活动加剧，但姬子认为这是你在「开拓」之旅中必须经历的考验。必要的时候，她会给出「场外援助」。
E: Welt detected a spike in Fragmentum activity across Jarilo. Himeko saw it as another trial on your trailblazing journey. If the time came, she'd be ready to offer support from afar.

C: 你在命途狭间醒来，被周围巨大的空旷感包裹。你记得上次来到这里，是受到「毁灭」的瞥视。
E: You awoke in Path Space, an expanse of endless void stretching around you. You remembered this place, it was here that the Destruction once laid eyes on you.

C: 一位狐人少女被怪物包围，其身边的云骑军护卫陷入苦战。你与三月七、瓦尔特加入战斗，尝试为其解围。
E: A foxian girl was surrounded by monsters, with her Cloud Knight guards struggling to hold them off. You, March 7th, and Welt joined the battle in an attempt to rescue her.

C: 米沙的真实身份为<color=#f29e38ff>「钟表匠」米哈伊尔人生的一个缩影</color>，他将「开拓」精神传承予你，你在匹诺康尼的旅程进入新篇章。
E: Misha's true identity was thus revealed as <color=#f29e38ff>a fragment of Mikhail the Watchmaker's life</color>. He passed on the spirit of the Trailblaze to you, marking a new chapter in your journey through Penacony.

C: 砂金与翡翠通话博弈，暗示公司布局已成，而巡海游侠波提欧忽然现身，直指关键人物。
E: Aventurine verbally sparred with Jade and hinted that the IPC's plans have been completed. However, Boothill, the Galaxy Ranger, suddenly appeared and headed straight towards the key individual.

C: 重塑天环后，星期日请瓦尔特允其登上星穹列车，愿以同行者身份求学「开拓」之道。
E: After reforging his halo, Sunday asked Welt to allow him onto the Astral Express, willing to learn the ways of the Trailblaze as a traveling companion.

C: 遐蝶安抚苏醒的玻吕刻斯，请其带领遐蝶前往「死亡」火种的存放处。你的意识濒临消散，遐蝶拜托迷迷照顾好你，随后动身前往冥界。
E: Castorice comforted the awakened Pollux and asked it to lead her to where the Coreflame of "Death" rested. As your consciousness was on the verge of dissipating, Castorice left you in Mem's care and headed for the nether realm.

C: 在创世涡心，你将「负世」的火种归还。不过，你总感觉有些违和感——似乎无人知晓「岁月」的火种何时被归还。
E: In the Vortex of Genesis, you returned the Coreflame of Worldbearing. However, something felt off. It seemed that no one knew when the Coreflame of Time had been returned.

C: 你们从阿来和阿往口中得知，案发那天，两人落入臭水沟，罗刹不仅将人救起，还赠给他们解污水之毒的药方。
E: From Back'n and Forth's accounts, you learned that on the day of the incident, they had fallen into a sewage ditch. Luocha not only pulled them out, but also gave them a prescription to cure the sewage's poison.

C: 应星曾承受无数剑伤，却又一一复原。那些伤痕不断让他想起自己的恶孽。
E: Yingxing had endured countless sword wounds, only to heal from each one. Those scars kept reminding him of his past sins.

C: 丹恒等人在「流云渡」遭遇散落集装箱的阻拦，素裳肩负起寻找出路的向导职责。
E: In Cloudford, Dan Heng and the others encountered a blockage of scattered cargo containers, and Sushang took on the role of guide to find a way through.

C: 砂金拾起一枚饰品，回想起与姐姐相依为命的日子。姐姐称砂金是受母神赐福的孩子，她保护砂金免受侵掠，直至自己生命的最后一刻。
E: Aventurine picked up an ornament and recalled the days he and his sister relied on each other for survival. His sister called him a child blessed by Gaiathra, protecting him from harm until the last moment of her life.

C: 你重现《逐梦往事》结局，用精准情绪打动最严苛评委，成功获得最高评价。
E: You reenacted the ending of Once Upon a Time in Dreams, delivering emotions with precision and deeply moving even the harshest judge, ultimately earning the highest rating.

C: 以《银河忍法帖》为模因，「苦茶大师」向乱破刻录入「模因病毒」。「叆叇馆主」对庸俗的善恶观不屑一顾，认为这会阻碍知识进步。
E: Using Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions as a meme, Master Kucha implanted a memetic virus into Rappa. Umbra Headmistress, disdainful of simplistic moral views, believed this would only hinder the advancement of knowledge.

C: 「叆叇馆主」令乱破亲手撕毁《银河忍法帖》。乱破不愿如此，因而遭受体罚。为了不让「苦茶大师」失望，乱破最终选择服从。
E: Umbra Headmistress ordered Rappa to tear up the Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions with her own hands. When Rappa refused, she was physically punished. To avoid disappointing Master Kucha, Rappa ultimately chose to comply.

C: 研究所中遍布电子涂鸦，安全系统因此崩溃。「叆叇馆主」让「苦茶大师」尽快修复系统，巡海游侠要不了多久就会找上门来。
E: Digital graffiti was all over the research institute, causing the security system to crash. Umbra Headmistress ordered Master Kucha to fix the system ASAP, as the Galaxy Rangers would be knocking on their door any minute now.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>万敌</color>认为你与丹恒是圣城的外来者，劝你们别太信任白厄。在哈托努斯的斡旋下，内讧暂得避免。你与丹恒、白厄前去迎战尼卡多利。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Mydei</color> treated you and Dan Heng as strangers to the holy city and cautioned you against trusting Phainon completely. Chartonus stepped in to prevent conflict among you. You, Dan Heng, and Phainon then left to confront Nikador.

C: 你拿取干燥的红土，这是大地兽的饲料。小心翼翼地，你将土块递给低头觅食的大地兽。
E: You grabbed some dry redsoil, which was dromas food. Carefully, you held it out to the dromas as it bent down to feed.

C: 大黑塔带第四面镜来到「能源区」，这里以虚数态存储着整个空间站的能源。大黑塔发现一些待清理的坏死数据，顺手扫除。
E: Upon arriving at the Energy Supply Zone with the Fourth Mirror, The Herta noted the whole space station's energy core was stored here in Imaginary state. She discovered some corrupted data awaiting cleanup, and efficiently wiped it out in passing.

C: 万敌与缇宝交谈，展现出愿意接过「纷争」神权的觉悟。但想要完成试炼、战胜心中最深的恐惧，万敌还需要与悬锋族人进行更多交流。
E: Mydei spoke with Tribbie, showing his resolve to accept the divine authority of "Strife". But to complete the trial and overcome his deepest fear, he'd need to strengthen ties with his people.

C: 你与白厄、缇宁进入缇里西庇俄丝的房间。缇宁称作为「圣女」，缇里西庇俄丝自出生后的二十来年不曾离开此地。
E: You, Phainon, and Trinnon entered Tribios's room. Trinnon called Tribios a Holy Maiden who had never left this place in the twenty years that she was born.

C: 丹恒在黑潮怪物的身下发现一份关于「天空」的论辩记录。至少在树庭，谈论「天空」算不上禁忌。
E: Dan Heng found a record under a black tide monster, about a scholars' debate surrounding the Sky, and learned that the Grove did not forbid discussions on the subject.

C: 在卡吕普索的主持下，格奈乌斯将灵魂分裂为五份。观摩至此，那刻夏证实这些英雄正是泰坦成神前的模样，而玻吕茜亚即是「死亡」。
E: With Calypso's guidance, Gnaeus split his soul into five parts. Anaxa proved that these heroes were the Titans before they ascended to Titanhood, and Polyxia was the "Death" they had been seeking all along.

C: 你与遐蝶围观路人的争吵。在交谈中，你得知遐蝶曾在哀地里亚担任「督战圣女」，为死囚、战俘与英雄们带去「仁慈的死亡」。
E: When walking with Castorice, you encountered some citizens of Okhema arguing. You learned from Castorice that she once served as Aidonia's Maiden of War, and was charged with granting "merciful deaths" to war captives, prisoners bound for execution, and heroes alike.

C: 赛飞儿在黎明云崖的经历不曾向任何人提起，由此判断巴特鲁斯遭遇异常。她揭露「贼灵」实为<color=#f29e38ff>扎格列斯</color>，自己用诡计让泰坦骗过死亡。
E: Cipher had never told a soul about her history at Dawncloud, and so she felt that meeting Bartholos at all was strange. She deduced that the Spirithief following her around was, in fact, <color=#f29e38ff>Zagreus</color>, and she had used her own tricks to help a Titan cheat death.

C: 「天空」泰坦怒视晨昏后裔，「阳雷骑士」塞涅俄丝率领两位翼兽伙伴刺穿巨眼。苍穹破碎之际，塞涅俄丝与泰坦合体，再度撑起天空。
E: The Sky Titan's furious gaze once swept over the descendants of dawn and dusk, and Seliose the Daythunder Knight led two winged beast companions to pierce their eyes. With the sky shattered, Seliose fused her body with the Titan to lift the sky once more.

C: 你们抵达已经空无一人的浴场，发现此处的建筑结构也开始数据化。只要回到私人浴宫，就能通过灵水盆前往创世涡心。
E: You arrived at an empty bath. The architectures here had also begun turning into data streams. All that remained was to reach the private bath chamber and use the spirit basin to enter Vortex of Genesis.

C: 你进行整理经费报表的工作，因效率低下而屡遭呵斥。你心里升起反抗的想法，却因无法付诸实践而放弃。你平静地完成了普通工作。
E: You managed budget reports, and were constantly scolded for inefficiency. Thoughts of rebellion rose up within you, but you gave up because you could not act on them. Silently, you finished your mundane job.

C: 老奥帝以「实现愿望」为幌子重启圣杯战争，声称其目的是创造匹诺康尼新的经济增长点。你们揭穿老奥帝践踏众人愿望、利用「圣杯」敛财的阴谋，决意联手粉碎假圣杯。最终老奥帝从匹诺康尼历史中召唤自己作为从者，一场恶战在所难免。
E: Old Oti revived the Holy Grail War with promises of "granting wishes," supposedly to boost Penacony's economy. You revealed his true plan: crushing people's hopes while using the Holy Grail for personal gain. You all decided to team up and destroy the fake Holy Grail. In the end, Old Oti summoned himself as a Servant from Penacony's history, forcing you into an unavoidable battle.

C: 一股力量将你们拉回电视机前，你的耳畔传来斯科特的挑衅。电视机的屏幕上呈现出波提欧的样貌，随后将你们一行人全部吸入其中。
E: A mysterious force dragged you back to the television. Skott's taunts echoed in your ears. The screen displayed Boothill's face, and then sucked you all inside.

C: 一阵阴郁的绝望攫住你的心灵。好在Archer没有受到钟表老子情绪控制的影响，并向对方直接发起进攻。
E: A wave of grim despair gripped your heart. Thankfully, Archer wasn't affected by Old Clockie's emotional control and he directly attacked Old Clockie.

C: 代表们议论纷纷，刻律德菈以「律法」火种让众人噤声，并将你介绍给同盟各邦，宣示神谕印证。海瑟音宣布逐火军对海洋泰坦的狩猎，即日开始。拉冬代表愤然离席。
E: As the room stirred, Cerydra raised the Coreflame of "Law" and silenced them. She introduced you to the delegates and declared the prophecy fulfilled. Hysilens then announced that the Flame-Chase Army's hunt for the Ocean Titan would begin that day. The delegate from Ladon stormed out in anger.

C: 众民瞩目，众臣高颂，众旗宣展。军团乘上巨兽征服天外，一个帝国自群星间崛起。海列屈拉突然转向你，问你是否喜欢这个结局。
E: All eyes turned. All voices chanted. All banners unfurled. The legion rode the great beast and marched beyond the sky. From the stars, an empire was born. Suddenly, Helektra turned to you, asking if you liked this ending.

C: 刻律德菈来到「黑塔」空间站。昔涟请刻律德菈旁听你与黑塔的对话，看看「天才」是如何看待这个由星神和命途构建的世界的。
E: Cerydra arrived at the Herta Space Station. Cyrene invited her to observe your conversation with Herta, so she could see how a Genius views this world built by Aeons and Paths.

C: 第二枚密钥封装完成。丹恒提议继续观察，「记忆」的每一丝涟漪，都可能为你们揭示长夜月的目的。
E: The second encryption key was encapsulated. Dan Heng suggested continuing to observe the "memories," as each ripple might reveal Evernight's true motive.

C: 劝说无果后，螺丝咕姆布置识刻锚，以帮助黑塔实施备用计划。同为「智识」行者，来古士愿意亲眼见证黑塔的计划。
E: After failing to persuade Lygus, Screwllum set up the Chronocognitive Anchor to help Herta implement her backup plan. As a fellow pathstrider of Erudition, Lygus was willing to witness Herta's plan firsthand.

C: 踏出这一步，就不会再回头。昔涟请你收拾好心情，准备迈向与铁墓的决战。
E: Once you take this step, there is no turning back. Cyrene asked you to steel yourself for the final battle with Irontomb.

C: 你重返对抗「铁墓」的战场。史诗于此身成篇，逐火的命路将要改写。
E: You returned to the battlefield against Irontomb. An epic tale shall unfold here as the Flame-Chasers' path is rewritten.

C: 在车厢坠毁的瞬间，昔涟用温柔的目光托起你的形体。在你觐见欧洛尼斯的时刻，就连「岁月」泰坦也将昔涟认作「记忆」浮黎。
E: In the moment the car crashed, Cyrene lifted your body with a gentle gaze. When you appeared before Oronyx, even the Time Titan recognized Cyrene as Fuli the Remembrance.

C: 穿过神殿大门，迷迷与初入翁法罗斯的你相遇。该说是初次见面，还是，久别重逢呢？
E: Mem passed through the temple door and encountered you, who had just entered Amphoreus. Was this a first meeting, or... a long-awaited reunion?

C: 你与伦纳德来到收容舱段，却未找到新的涂鸦。伦纳德发现奇物「定分枪」有一条奇怪的访问记录，于是带你前往另一侧的奇物收藏室。
E: You and Leonard reached the storage zone but found no new graffiti. Leonard discovered an unusual access record on the Curio "Rating Pistol" and took you to the Curio Collection Room on the other side.

C: 你成功解救艾丝妲，得知她并无大碍。与此同时，在阿德勒与阿兰的努力下，失踪的科员们都安全返回。空间站的风波至此告一段落。
E: You successfully rescued Asta and learned she was unharmed. Meanwhile, through the efforts of Adler and Arlan, all the missing researchers returned safely. The crisis at the space station finally came to an end.

C: 灵火传来声音，质问你们的目的。看来这场追逐，该到头了。
E: A voice rose from the flame, demanding your intentions. It seemed this chase was finally reaching its end.

C: 你与先前救下的小男孩再次相遇，男孩的奶奶感谢你和虎克的义举。男孩对拍卖会上的大熊玩偶感兴趣，奶奶愿意尝试将其拍下。
E: You met again with the little boy you had saved earlier. The boy's grandmother thanked you and Hook for your kind deed. The boy showed interest in the teddy bear at the auction, and his grandmother was willing to try bidding for it.

C: 回到机械屋，希露瓦请杰帕德帮忙收拾行李，保证这是最后一次。希露瓦请你在机械屋随便看看，休息一下。
E: Back at the workshop, Serval asked Gepard to help pack her luggage, promising it was the last time. She invited you to look around the workshop and take a break.

C: 卢卡修炼的最后一步，是挑战史瓦罗。希儿认为卢卡异想天开，毫无胜算。在卢卡的坚持下，你和希儿同意去找史瓦罗聊聊。
E: The final step of Luka's training was to challenge Svarog. Seele thought he was being unrealistic and had no chance of winning. But with Luka's insistence, you and Seele agreed to go talk to Svarog.

C: 你收到来自谛听的呼叫。三月七却称，她能听懂谛听的语言。
E: You received a call from Diting. March 7th, however, claimed she could understand Diting's language.

C: 符玄提到，令此处失真的源头是那个<color=#f29e38ff>「不应在场但却在场」</color>的人。同时，为了不干扰三月七的判断，符玄隐去身形。
E: Fu Xuan noted that the source of distortion here was <color=#f29e38ff>"the person present who shouldn't be"</color>. Meanwhile, to avoid influencing March 7th's judgment, Fu Xuan concealed her presence.

C: 彦卿见自己的进度超过镜流，朝她出言挑衅。
E: Seeing that he was ahead of Jingliu, Yanqing couldn't resist taunting her.

C: 你们遇到落单的貊泽。貊泽认为呼雷无法战胜，提议封锁幽囚狱以与之同归于尽。寒鸦愿独自承担封锁狱门的职责，令你们保护好自己。
E: You found Moze alone. Convinced that Hoolay could not be defeated, he proposed sealing off The Shackling Prison to perish together with him. Hanya volunteered to take on the responsibility of sealing the prison gates alone, urging you all to keep yourselves safe.

C: 花火大人的独家方案，是非卖品哦~
E: This is an exclusive from Miss Sparkle and not for sale~

C: 三月七 / 赵相机
E: March 7th / Say~Cheese~

C: 争执中的广告牌建议你们参观车展…去瞧瞧吧，没准能捕捉到有趣的瞬间。
E: The billboards caught in a dispute suggest you visit the auto show... Go take a look. You might capture some interesting moments.

C: 建木玄根
E: Roots of the Arbor

C: 无人机操作玩法
E: Drone Operation

C: 差分宇宙
E: Divergent Universe

C: 模拟宇宙
E: Simulated Universe

C: 不住公寓，拿钱自力更生。
E: Give up on the apartment, take the money, and try to make it out on your own.

C: 完美的歌喉只需要简单的演绎。
E: A perfect voice requires only a simple interpretation.

C: 「欢愉」是梦的脱口秀。
E: Elation is the stand-up comedy of dreams.

C: 当然是香喷喷的糕点啦——「阮•饭」！
E: Of course, it's a delicious pastry — "Ruan Cake"!

C: 你得到了最高等级的口头表扬。
E: You received the highest form of verbal praise.

C: 贵金邀约
E: Golden Invitation

C: 狂热奔向深渊
E: Into the Yawning Chasm

C: 还有事没做完…
E: There's still more to do...

E: Wanted Poster

E: Poster

E: Blueprint

E: Piano

E: Tea Table

E: Play Lucky Wheel

E: Precious Cellar

E: World Behind the Door

E: Air Vent

E: High-Power Jade Abacus Unit

E: DIY the Origami Bird on the left machine

E: Try to attack

E: Heroic Saga of Flame-Chase

E: Cleared Apocalyptic Shadow Difficulty 4 with full stars in historical records

E: Complete all limited-time missions

E: Reach #4 in Activity

E: Log in to the game

C: 完成#4次「拟造花萼」
E: Clear Calyx #4 time(s)

C: 累计消耗#4点开拓力<color=#f29e38ff>（上限<unbreak>1400</unbreak>点开拓力）</color>
E: Consume a total of #4 Trailblaze Power <color=#f29e38ff>(<unbreak>1400</unbreak> Trailblazer Power max)</color>

C: 在「银河球棒侠传说」活动中，累计进阶#4把不同的传说武器
E: Ascend a total of #4 different legendary weapons in the "Legend of the Galactic Baseballer" event

C: 在「初花习剑录」活动中，收集完所有的结局
E: Collect all possible endings in the Saga of Primaveral Blade event

C: 在「宇宙家装指南」中，晚餐会议的最高评分达到#4
E: In the Cosmic Home Décor Guide, reach a top score of #4 for the Dinner Meeting

C: 在「末日幻影」中累计击败#4个首领
E: Defeat a total of #4 bosses in Apocalyptic Shadow

C: 累计消耗#4点开拓力
E: Consume #4 Trailblaze Power

C: 完成第二遗迹深层探索的第#1层
E: Complete Deep Exploration level #1 for ruin 2

C: 在任意轮次内完成该场表演赛
E: Clear the exhibition match within any number of cycles

C: 在本关卡中达到#1分
E: Earn #1 point(s) in this stage.

C: 在稚子的梦完成#4次「以太之蕾 • 拟造花萼（金）」
E: Clear "Calyx (Golden): Bud of Aether" #4 times in A Child's Dream

C: 触发【破谜离场】机制，将关卡增益提升至#2档
E: Trigger the "Solved Departure" mechanic and improve Stage Buff to rank #2

C: 使用自定义骰【奇物推演】通关「模拟宇宙：黄金与机械」（第四难度及以上）
E: Use Custom Dice: Curio Extrapolation and clear Simulated Universe: Gold and Gears at Difficulty 4 or higher.

C: 使用自定义骰【数据膨胀】通关「模拟宇宙：黄金与机械」（第四难度及以上）
E: Use Custom Dice: Data Inflation and clear Simulated Universe: Gold and Gears at Difficulty 4 or higher.

C: 使用自定义骰【数据膨胀】在折磨难度，难题等级大于等于#1时通关
E: Use Custom Dice: Data Inflation and clear a run at Conundrum Level #1 or higher in the Torturous Difficulty.

C: 击败第3波次首领
E: Defeat the third wave's boss

C: 完成甜梦星球的首领挑战后解锁
E: Unlock by completing the Blissdream Planet's Boss challenge

C: 完成冒险任务「折纸小鸟对对碰」
E: Complete the Adventure Mission "Origami Bird Clash"

C: 累计完成「初花剑客行」的5个结局
E: Complete a total of 5 endings in Way of Primaveral Blade

C: 在托帕训练中击败第3阶段首领
E: Defeat the 3rd phase boss in Topaz training session

C: 在「留影计划·第二日」关卡中获得1个奖杯
E: Win 1 trophy in Operation Snapshot: Day 2

C: 在「留影计划·第六日」关卡中获得3个奖杯
E: Win 3 trophies in Operation Snapshot: Day 6

E: Time-Limited Prize

C: 在「『永恒圣城』奥赫玛」使用#4次「欧洛尼斯祷言」
E: Use Oronyx's prayers #4 time(s) in "Eternal Holy City" Okhema

C: 在「降妖辑录」挑战中累计获得#4星
E: Accumulate a total of #4 stars in the "Exorcismal Chronicle" challenge

C: 在绥园，累计使用「降魔机巧鸟」收集逸散岁阳#4个
E: Collect a total of #4 dispersed heliobi using the "exorcist cycrane" in Fyxestroll Garden

C: 在梦醒时分「超巨星」模式中，击败#3波敌人
E: Eliminate #3 wave(s) of enemies in the Moment of Awakening "Supergiant Star" mode challenge

C: 在击破连环「超巨星」模式中，击败#3波敌人
E: Eliminate #3 wave(s) of enemies in the Chain Breaker "Supergiant Star" mode challenge

C: 在「C<unbreak>996</unbreak>星球」的挑战中，积分达到#2
E: Reach #2 points in Planet C<unbreak>996</unbreak>'s challenge

C: 拥有#4张#1级「餐桌」
E: Own #4 Level #1 dining table(s)

C: 营业过程中收取#4次小费
E: Receive tips #4 time(s) during business hours

E: Increase Restaurant Rating to 1-Star

E: Activate 3 IPC

E: Encourage Melancholy to cheer up

E: Old Fortress Scavenge

E: Hexanexus Hard Mode I

E: Mo Cuishle

E: Roots of the Arbor

C: 天空之眼

C:
与深陷疯狂的神明对峙，注定无人能以胜者之姿离开。尼卡多利的长锋所掠过之处，长矛折断，盾牌纷飞，战线寸寸崩溃…失去秩序的士兵们陷入前所未有的混乱与恐惧。竞技场英雄的号角声被埋没在嘶喊、哀嚎与铁器碰撞的铿锵声中，早已无力扭转溃败的结局。

「尼卡多利想要收回它许诺的胜利，而我必须以长矛与鲜血归还。」

翻滚烟尘中，残破的旗帜朝着尼卡多利不断前进。士兵们注意到，强运的英雄选择不再归去。

起初，只有四五个人跟随，而后是数十、数百人…他们紧随那宽阔的背影，朝着必死的战场发起最后的冲锋——曾经倒下的战友似乎化作英灵，在他们的耳边低语，激励生者完成这最后一搏。即便尼卡多利已然陷入疯狂，也本能地感受到了这群战士不屈决心与无畏意志。

「看啊！竞技场的英雄还在不断前进，我们必须紧紧跟随！」

鎏金的护甲在余晖映照下依旧闪耀，他带领军队迈向了体面而尊严的死亡。
E:
When confronting the god, whose mind has long been steeped in madness, it is destined that no mortal will leave the battle a victor. Spears break and shields fly where Nikador's lance sweeps past, wreaking destruction across every inch of the frontline... Disorder spreads throughout the ranks, soldiers descending into unprecedented chaos and fear. Drowned out by screams, wails, and the clanging clash of steel weapons, the trumpet calls of the coliseum hero have long since been unable to turn the tides of this defeat.

"Nikador wishes to take back the victory they promised, and I must repay it with my lance and blood."

In the roiling smoke and dust, a tattered banner advances in Nikador's direction. The soldiers notice that the hero of fortuitous fortune has chosen not to return home.

In the beginning, only four or five soldiers followed the hero. Then it turned into dozens, then hundreds... They walk behind the broad figure toward a battlefield of inevitable death to initiate their final charge — their fallen comrades seemingly turned into heroic spirits, whispering into their ears, spurring the survivors into finishing this final gambit. Even if Nikador has already descended into madness, they must have instinctively felt the resolute determination and undaunted will of this band of warriors.

"Look! The hero of the coliseum is still pushing forward! We must follow with haste!"

His gilded armor still glints in the hues of sunset's glow, as he leads the army towards a dignified and noble death.

C:
苍穹帝国格拉默享有数万光年的广大疆域，远眺银河，雄心勃勃。在帝国最强盛的纪元里，格拉默的女皇，至尊无上的泰坦尼娅陛下建立恢宏的舰队，誓将文明硕果带往所有蛮荒的边境，令其领略帝国的仁慈，归于一统。

然而远征最终折戟沉沙，自天幕彼端，虫裔汹涌而来、无穷无尽。格拉默的军队抗击，失败，抗击，再失败…殖民地尽数失散，引以为傲的钢铁舰队接连沦陷。在生有复眼与鞘翅的群魔围攻之下，格拉默子民的呼告声被绝望淹没，苍穹从此支离破碎。

直到某一日，身披机械战甲的骑士从天而降，将铺天的蠹虫歼灭殆尽。银白的铁骑从此往返于帝国各个星区，跨越满目疮痍的疆土，抵挡覆灭星系的灾厄。他们宛如为对抗虫群而生的战士，无人知晓这些铁人面具下的真容，但他们的降临有如神明垂恩，令苍穹的曙光再现人间。在女皇的统率下，格拉默的铁骑兵团驰骋天际，终于遏阻敌潮，为帝国带来片刻喘息。

但在和世仇永无休止的战斗中，帝国变得越来越像自己的敌人——越来越多的铁骑飞上高空，一如虫潮来袭的那一日，将苍天遮蔽。人们投向女皇和骑士的视线，已然和对待虫群异类的恐惧目光毫无二致。也许终有一日，帝国会获得它想要的胜利。可是那一天，格拉默是否还是人类安憩的乐园？

在战火不熄的格拉默边境，铁骑兵团构成了最后的防线。战舰之上，沉默的骑士们身负使命，承载着整个帝国的希望，迎击淹没群星的敌潮。
E:
The Welkin Empire of Glamoth enjoyed a vast territory spanning tens of thousands of light-years, ambitiously setting its sight on the cosmos. At the height of the empire's power, Her Majesty Empress Titania built a magnificent fleet, vowing to bring the fruits of civilization to all the barbaric borders, allowing them a taste of the empire's benevolence in hopes of uniting them under one rule.

However, the expedition was eventually halted by endless waves of raging insectoids coming from beyond the sky. Glamoth's armies fought and failed, again and again... Colonies were scattered, and the proud iron fleet fell one after another. Besieged by the monsters with compound eyes and sheathed wings, the cries of the people of Glamoth were drowned out by despair, and the Welkin Empire was shattered from then on.

Until one day knights clad in mechanical armor descended from the sky and wiped out the sun-swallowing Swarm. Since then, the silver-white iron knights have traveled to and from the various star systems in the empire, crossing the devastated territories and fighting back against the calamity that wiped out the galaxy. They were like warriors born to fight the Swarm. No one knew the faces lying beneath the masks of the Iron Cavalry, but their arrival was like a gift from the gods, bringing the light of day back to the human world. Under the Empress' command, Glamoth's Iron Cavalry charged across the skies, finally stemming the tide of enemies and bringing a moment of respite to the empire.

But in the never-ending battle against their archenemy, the empire started becoming more and more like its adversary — more and more Iron Cavalry flew high into the sky, blotting out the heavens just as the Swarm did on that fateful day. The look people cast on the Empress and the cavalry turned to one of fear, a fear akin to what they felt toward the Swarm. Perhaps one day the empire would attain the victory it so desired. But on that day, will Glamoth still be a paradise for humanity to rest in?

The Iron Cavalry Regiment formed the last line of defense at the border of Glamoth, where the battle raged on endlessly. Upon their warships, the silent knights bore a mission, carrying the hopes of the entire empire, and faced the tides of enemies drowning out the stars.

C:
谈及公司「市场开拓部」主管奥斯瓦尔多•施耐德，人们尤其喜欢讨论他上任时的三把火——年轻的狂信徒仅用短短两年就跨越了严寒、恶疾和死亡，解决了开拓部数个琥珀纪悬而未决的三大难题。名为茨冈尼亚-Ⅳ的荒星便是其中之一，那里死寂荒漠、氏族世仇…困境层出不穷。

茨冈尼亚-Ⅳ位于临近三大星系的交界地带，长期处于多颗恒星的星风作用下，是银河远近闻名的「暴风眼」。星球表面的生存环境极端恶劣，诸多文明因此或迁徙其他星系、或毁灭于自然灾害，如今只剩下极少量的智慧种族留存，博识学会的学者将其统称为茨冈尼亚人。

实际上茨冈尼亚人分化出诸多氏族，大多以游牧为生，其中少数还建立了颇具规模的集权政体。

他们同享一种语言，通过联觉信标的转译，你会知道「卡提卡」代表剥皮刀，是茨冈尼亚人里最嗜血的蛮族；「埃维金」的意思是蜂蜜，一些迂腐固执的人则坚称他们是窃贼。他们同享跨越琥珀纪的世仇，于无尽的荒原中上演着弱肉强食的血腥循环。直到身着黑衣的天外来客从天而降：茨冈尼亚人在琥珀的光芒下暂归一统，无休止的自然循环终于暂告一段落。

随后，在寰宇巨企的指导下，茨冈尼亚人依据《宪章》建立茨冈尼亚联合酋长国，向文明的宇宙迈出了第一步。

可惜这份团结和发展不属于埃维金人和卡提卡人。茨冈尼亚人中部分不怀好意的投机分子对前者的机敏与狡猾心怀忌惮，又将后者贬为绝无可能开化的食人野兽。尽管他们对「存护」尚且只有一知半解，但他们明白总得有人为之付出牺牲。于是，腐败者们借助一种极为先进的议事规则，将两氏族的族人放逐于漫天黄沙中。

为表歉意，他们特地在决议案中声明「埃维金人永远享有自治自决的权利」——这句话的意思是，今后两氏族人再度陷入纷争时，他们便可以合情合理合法地无动于衷了。
E:
When discussing Oswaldo Schneider, the head of the IPC's Marketing Development Department, people often focus on the decisive operations he undertook upon assuming the position. Within just two years, this young fanatic conquered the bitter cold, pestilence, and death, and managed to address three major longstanding issues that had plagued the Department for several Amber Eras. One of these challenges is the desolate planet known as Sigonia-IV, which is covered in barren deserts and scarred by clan vendettas... a place of harsh conditions and strife.

Situated near the convergence of three major star clusters, Sigonia-IV has long been subjected to stellar winds from multiple stars, earning its reputation as the "eye of the storm" throughout the Cosmos. The planet's surface environment is extremely harsh, leading many civilizations to either migrate to other celestial bodies or succumb to natural disasters. Now, only a small number of intelligent races remain there, referred to as Sigonians by scholars from the Intelligentsia Guild.

In reality, Sigonians have fragmented into numerous clans, with most adopting nomadic lifestyles, while a few have established centralized systems of governance of reasonable size.

They share a common language. Through the translation provided by the Synesthesia Beacon, you will learn that "Katica" means "shellslasher," who have a reputation of being the most ferocious clan among Sigonians. And "Avgin" means "honey," who are often accused of pilfering by those willfully ignorant. These clans share a vendetta that lasted through Amber Eras, engaged in a cycle of bloody vengeance in the boundless wilderness where only the fittest survive — until mysterious figures clad in black descended from the sky. From there, Sigonians were briefly united under the radiance of Amber, and the natural cycles that were finally reached a temporary conclusion.

Afterward, under the IPC's guidance, the Sigonians established the Sigonian Sovereignty according to the Interstellar Peace Charter and took their first steps toward the wider Cosmos.

Unfortunately, this unity and progress did not extend to the Avgins and Katicans. Some malicious opportunists among the Sigonians viewed the former's resourcefulness with suspicion, while slandering the latter as nothing more than predators with no hope of enlightenment. Although they possessed only limited knowledge about Preservation, they understood that some of them had to be sacrificed for it. Utilizing a highly advanced set of parliamentary rules, these devious and corrupt individuals banished both clans to the endless desert.

As a token of apology, they even went out of their way to declare that "the Avgins shall forever retain the right to autonomy" — In other words, should any future conflicts occur between the two clans, they could justifiably and lawfully sit back and do nothing.

C: 比起啰里啰唆的教条，赏金猎人认为实践才是最好的课本。在指导一位新人时，老猎人卡耶尔把他扔进了里德曼星的极北森林。少年凭借陷阱杀死了一只隐翅骇鸟，拔下它的骨头，在数日后带着磨砺成剑的白骨重新出现在教官面前。当卡耶尔抓来第二只隐翅骇鸟，命令他杀死对方时，先前可怕的巨兽已成了刀板上待宰的雏鸟。而多年以后，每每在私下讲起森林里的遭遇时，少年都会痛哭流涕，并对那人面兽心的卡耶尔大骂不止。
E: Rather than verbose doctrines, Bounty Hunters believe that practice is the best teacher. When guiding a newcomer, the seasoned hunter, Kayer, threw him into the northern forests of planet Reidmann. The youth, using traps, killed a hidden-winged terror bird, pulled out its bones, and reappeared many days later before the drillmaster after honing the bones into a sword. When Kayer caught a second hidden-winged terror bird and ordered him to kill it, the once fearsome beast had become a fledgling on the chopping board. Years later, whenever he spoke privately about the experiences in the forest, the youth would weep bitterly and curse the humanoid monster, Kayer.

C: 在黑塔的奇物清单里，这张羊皮卷的危害等级被标注为极高。流落到黑塔空间站之前，它曾属于一位虚构史学家。羊皮卷以人类的历史为食，贪婪的舌头搅动着文明的集体潜意识，使之支离破碎。黑塔伪造了虚假的世界记忆供它吞噬，以此满足其无止境的饕餮欲望，不过总有一天，这张羊皮卷会识破天才的诡计。
E: In Herta's Curio list, the hazard level of this parchment is marked as extremely high. It once belonged to a History Fictionologist before ending up at the space station. The parchment feeds on the history of humanity, its greedy tongue churning the collective subconscious of civilization to pieces. Herta forged false memories of the world for it to devour to satisfy its endless gluttony. But one day, this parchment will see through the genius' tricks.

C:
淬炼烈火，锻造神兵，战争烘炉的熔岩溅起，你将火炉点燃，挥下手中的重锤，精巧的暴力在痛苦中反复敲击，以青蓝的焰色烧却傲慢的反物质生灵，它们变得坚硬，变得锋利，化作军团毁灭的武器。

旧日的监牢被打碎，拖曳残躯，你斩断周身的镣铐，将代代相传的技艺全数添加进火炉里。世上从来不存在和平的知识，奴隶主渴望战争，军阀们畅饮鲜血，于是豢养工匠，熔制出刀剑，手中的技艺天生就是为了让宇宙走向毁灭！

你举起淬火的重锤，死亡的气息随炉中的毒烟飘向整个世界。
E:
The fire is quenched to forge a divine army, and lava is splashing everywhere from the Warforge. After starting a fire in the forge, you slam down the heavy hammer, using just the right amount of delicate violence to repeatedly strike amidst agony. With a greenish-blue flame, you incinerate arrogant Antimatter beings until harden and sharpen into destructive weapons for the Legion.

The old prison is broken into pieces. Dragging the marred body, you sever the chains covering your being and infuse the skills passed down through generations into the Warforge. No knowledge in this world exists to maintain peace. The slave masters long for wars, and the warlords enjoy blood. So, they hire craftsmen to forge knives and swords. The inherent purpose of such skills is to bring the universe to destruction!

As you lift the quenching hammer, the air of death wafts toward the entire world along with the toxic gas from the Warforge.

C: 你需要构建一个特殊的实验室，按质量次序分布的，十三个引力源，通过反复的挤压和拉伸，在亚空间制造出奇点，根据从核心收集的数据，虚数能量在压缩中的性质变化之谜将会被解开。\n\n你摘下玛哈卡的恒星，它的质量准确无误地锚定在中位数上，在此之后，数亿的居民将在永夜里冻结。你剥离塔拉侬的大黑洞，它在拖曳过程中不断吞没沿途的星辰，这颗即将死去的黑洞，是实验不可或缺的催化剂。最后，你锁定眼前的行星，它的体内传来微不足道的嘈杂声音，所幸，它们很快就安静了。
E: You need to create a special laboratory with thirteen sources of gravity, organized by mass. Through repeated pressurization and stretching, a singularity will be created in the subspace and the riddle of the changing properties of compressed Imaginary energy will be solved according to data collected from the core.\n\nAs you pluck the star of Mahaka, you see that its mass is fixed precisely at the median. Now, countless billions of inhabitants will freeze in eternal night. You strip the great black hole of Taranon, which continues to devour stars along the way as you drag it behind you. This nearly-expired black hole is an irreplaceable catalyst for your experiment. Finally, you lock on to the planet before you as a negligible wave of cries pours out from its body. Fortunately, they all fall silent very soon.

C:
听！是金属摩擦大地的声音，
那声音铮铮作响，令鬣狗胆寒，
却如同天籁般在我的身体里回响，
不，准确的说是我的尸体。
恶战已经结束半月，
我的肌肤溃烂，鲜血流干。
我在战场里等啊等，
期待回到名为死亡的真正故乡。
我在尸堆里等啊等，
哀地里亚的处刑人何时才能到场。
我在冥河前等啊等，
祈祷自己的灵魂安然无恙。
终于，那声音到了我耳旁，
我空洞的眼窝看见了那把象征归宿的镰刀，
和少女怜悯的目光。
塞纳托斯，我伟大的主，我已经触到了你温柔的手掌。
E:
Hark! The ground groans beneath the scratch of metal,
A clangorous sound that sends shivers down hyenas' spines.
Yet to me, it resonates like divine harmony within my very being,
Or rather, my decaying husk.
Half a month has passed since the fierce battle.
My flesh has rotted, my veins are dry.
I linger on this battlefield, waiting,
Longing to return to my ultimate resting place, the realm of death.
I lie among the mountain of corpses,
Wondering when Aidonia's executioner will make their appearance.
I stand by the River of Souls, waiting,
Praying for the safety of my soul.
And then, at long last, the voice echoes in my ears,
My hollow eye sockets see the scythe that signifies my eternal rest,
And the compassionate gaze of a maiden.
Thanatos, my great god, I have felt the gentle touch of your hand.

C: 孤独，太空美虫，模拟宇宙（其二）
E: Loneliness, Cosmic Beauty Bugs, Simulated Universe (II)

C: 混沌医师对无意义的反抗精神总令人感到十分没有意义，他们曾在混沌特效灵药中放入异问魔门牙、巴维鲁黏液、游荡恶魔的血液，最终再以心灵感应蜘蛛的额头触碰封缄瓶口。混沌医师相信该药对治疗病人的孤独有奇效，但病人服药后往往对医师的敌意更甚——它的副作用时常令自灭者望见「虚无之影」。
E: The Doctors of Chaos can't see the point when it comes to meaningless demonstrations of rebelliousness. They once placed the fang of an Inquisition Spirit, Baviru mucus, and the blood of a wandering devil within a Tonic of Efficacious Chaos before touching it to the head of a telepathic spider to seal the tonic's opening. The Doctors of Chaos believe that this tonic can work wonders when treating a patient's loneliness, but it also makes them grow increasingly hostile toward the doctors at the end of the process. Its side effects can commonly cause Self-Annihilators to behold the "Shadow of Nihility."

C: 银河浩瀚，总有人对厄兆先锋的警示不屑一顾，譬如埃顿玩具公司的老板。当「终末」的行者警告应当将一批新出厂的玩偶全数销毁时，他唯一的回应是大发雷霆。二十四个系统时后，潜伏在玩偶内的塔洛特人对玩具公司发动了袭击。这种来自边星地带的液态集群共享同一意识，并致力于邀请更多生命加入其中——埃顿很快便成为了它们的一份子。
E: There are always those in the vast Cosmos who ignored the Omen Vanguards' warning, such as the owner of the Eton Toy Factory. When the pathwalkers of Finality warned him that he should destroy an entire batch of newly manufactured toys, he only responded with thundering rage. After <unbreak>24</unbreak> system hours, the Talot race hiding within the toys launched their attack against the toy factory. This liquid-state cluster entity, which comes from the border star zones, shared their consciousness communally and eagerly invited other living beings to join them — Eton soon became one of them.

C: 关于克拉伊博士的评价，历来褒贬不一。作为著名的植物植物学家，它所研发的维生营养液，在边星贸易战争时期令超过二十个星系免于饥荒。可过度摄入营养液带来的副作用，也让数百种植物疾病跨越种族界限，间接引发了战后的大规模感染。在克拉伊枯萎后的第一百个琥珀纪，博识学会为它发行了一套纪念邮票，上面留着短短的一行字：「只是一株智能植物。」
E: People's opinions regarding Doctor Kray have always been heavily mixed. As a renowned plant botanist, the nutrient sustenance solution it developed saved over <unbreak>20</unbreak> different star systems from famine and starvation during the Borderstar Trade War. However, the secondary effects of excessive consumption caused diseases from hundreds of plant species to jump the species barrier and indirectly led to widespread infections after the war. On the <unbreak>100</unbreak>th Amber Era since the withering of Dr. Kray, the Intelligentsia Guild issued a set of commemorative stamps of it, which featured simply the words: "Just a sentient plant."
