C: 单纯热心的云骑军新人，执一柄重剑。\n憧憬着云骑军历史上的传奇，渴望成为响当当的人物。\n为此，素裳坚决恪守「急人所急，有求必应；日行一善，三省吾身」的信条，过着助人为乐的忙碌日子。
E: A naive and enthusiastic newcomer to the Cloud Knights who wields a greatsword.\nShe yearns for the historic legends of the Cloud Knights, and is eager to become such a legendary figure herself.\nAs such, Sushang firmly believes in the philosophies "be eager to help those in need," "do one good deed a day and reflect on oneself three times a day," leading her to busy days full of helping others.

C: 「丹鼎司医案治验总要 • 卷七十三 • 例五百八十二 主治医师：白露。 患者：锦余（持明），女，十三日又两个时辰。 主诉：患者不及数月便会蜕生轮回，重焕新生。其成长速度百倍于寻常持明族。 辨证：蜕生异症，世所罕有，万中无一。 处方：无药可医，多喝热水 用法：无 按语：确实是疑难杂症！还是本小姐治不好的那种！ 持明族蜕生轮回的机理至今仍是一个未被破解的谜。有医者认为持明通过轮回修复漫长生命周期中的损伤，但这位患者的情况显然有违此理。 我已化验了她的血样、髓液，也让她服下了透影虫，仔细查看了大脑，并无病变区域。唉，生命真是奇妙，即便是免于衰老、死亡，长生种也无法彻底解脱疾病的困扰啊。 本小姐的身体也是，自打长出顶角后…六七年过去了，就再也没长高过！这到底是什么问题啊。一定是因为被那些讨厌的龙师长老们整天看着的缘故！娃娃不出去跑，怎么能长高？ 看到这条医案的医士，你们什么时候才能放我出去呀！本小姐又不是什么大坏蛋，戒备得那么紧做什么！真是气死我了气死我了气死我了气死我了气死我了气死我了气死我了气死我了气死我了」 本页末尾处另附生有龙角的鬼脸一张。
E: "Alchemy Commission Collected Treatment Histories: Volume Seventy-Three, Case Study 582 Presiding Physician: Bailu. Patient: Jinyu, female Vidyadhara, aged thirteen days and two dual-hours. Complaint: Patient undergoes cycle of hatching rebirth every few months. Her growth is a hundred times faster than a normal Vidyadhara. Diagnosis: Rebirth abnormality, extremely rare, a one-in-a-million condition. Prescription: No available medicine. Drink plenty of hot water. Usage: Not applicable. Remarks: Well, this is one of those difficult cases! The sort I unfortunately am unable to treat. The mechanism underlying the hatching rebirth of Vidyadhara remains a mystery. Some healers take the view that Vidyadhara use the rebirth cycle to repair injuries sustained during their long life-cycle, but such a notion clearly does not apply to this patient's situation. I have tested her blood and marrow and had her ingest translucence worms to allow a thorough examination of her brain. But I've found no diseased parts. Ah, what a marvel life is! Even long-life species exempt from aging and death are not entirely immune to the ravages of disease. It is the same as regards my own health. It is now six or seven years since I first sprouted horns, but I have not grown taller in that time. I am sure it is because I have those horrid Preceptors watching over me all the day long. If a child does not get out to run about, how will it grow tall? Healers who read this case study, when will you release me? I am not some truly wicked ne'er-do-well. Why am I so closely guarded? It makes me so very, very, very, very, very, very, very, very angry!" A scowling horned face has been drawn at the foot of this page.

C: 仙舟「罗浮」的「十王司」判官之一，负责拘、锁、刑、问的四判官中的「拘」。\n手持铁索与破魔锥，不知疲倦地寻索重犯，将其勾摄镇伏。\n过去的肉身已灰飞烟灭，借偃偶身躯「还阳」，每缉拿一个凶徒便抵半日。
E: One of the judges of the Ten-Lords Commission on the Luofu. She is in charge of "detention" among the four judges of detention, interrogation, incarceration, and punishment.\nWith iron chain and Mara-Sunder Awl in hand in tireless pursuit of recidivists, she will forthwith ensnare and subdue them all.\nThe mortal coil of her past being has been reduced to ashes. She is reanimated via a puppet body. For each villain she captures, she gets in return half a day in the world of the living.

C: 「▇▇▇月▇▇日 『圣女呵，我们愿意倾听，在末世为我们指引方向吧，替我们祈祷战争的胜利吧。』那些王说。 王们为*我们*恢复了雅努斯圣女的身份，他们将*我们*奉上神坛，绸缎加身，以仪式遮掩*我们*的面容。 然而*我们*并未重返城中，而是居住在高高在上的王城。*我们*想替生病的农人与流离的战士祈祷，为悲伤的人排解心中的痛苦，为迷茫的人指点迷津，为新人送上祝福，看着他们围着火堆歌唱。 然而王并不愿意*我们*来到民众之中，就像在雅努萨波利斯那时一样…… 母亲啊，此刻*我们*才真正理解你当时的苦闷无助。*我们*曾相信，神谕当使那些王者尽弃前嫌，联手寻找黄金裔，如此，救世才有一线希望。可他们害怕流着黄金血的人剥夺他们的权力，他们想要的，是一场又一场以神谕为名的战争。那些来之不易的信任，那些民众期待的目光，正在一点一点消磨殆尽。 雅努斯的火种越来越灼热，金色的神谕仍旧审视着*我们*，催促着*我们*。 *我们*决定逃离。 缇▇和缇安张开百界门，约定在密林中汇合，却遭遇了如雨毒箭，缇安躲过一劫，却不幸被士兵挟持，离*我们*越来越远。 缇▇选择主动撞向敌人的长枪，死死拉住了想要抽回武器的士兵。可*我们*错估了王的残忍，即便死去，*我们*也不能被其他城邦得到。 …… 数十倍于往常的痛楚加诸于吾身。这个春天，*我们*中的大部分永远留在了鲜花尚未盛开的荒原。 再见，缇▇。 再见，缇▇。 再见，缇▇。 …… 缇安，*我们*还不想和你说再见，请一定要找到*我们*…… 今夜，*我们*就能穿过这片荒野。」 ——缇宁保存着的一篇日记 上面画着划过天空的流星
E: "Date: ▇▇▇ / ▇▇ 'Holy Maiden, we are ready to listen. Guide us through these end times and pray for our victory in battle,' said the kings. The kings restored the identity of the Holy Maiden of Janus to us, placed us on an altar, dressed us in silk, and concealed our faces with ceremony. Yet, we did not return to the city but lived in the castle. We wished to pray for the sick farmers and wandering warriors, to ease the sorrow of the grieving, to guide the lost, to bless the newly-weds, and to watch them sing around the bonfire. Yet, just as it was in Janusopolis, the kings were unwilling to see us mingle with the people... Mother, at this moment, we truly understand your helplessness and despair back then. We once believed that the prophecy would compel the kings to set aside their grievances and unite in search of the Chrysos Heirs, offering a glimmer of hope for salvation. Yet, they fear those with golden blood might strip them of their power. What they desire are wars waged in the name of prophecy. The hard-earned trust and the expectant gazes of the people are gradually being eroded. The Coreflame of Janus burns ever hotter, and the golden prophecy continues to scrutinize us, urging us onward. We decided to flee. Tri▇▇▇▇ and Trianne opened the Century Gate, planning to meet in the dense forest, but encountered a rain of poisoned arrows. Trianne dodged a disaster but was unfortunately taken hostage by soldiers, becoming increasingly distant from us. Tri▇▇▇▇ chose to charge at the enemy's spear, clinging to the soldier who tried to withdraw his weapon, but we underestimated the king's cruelty. Even in death, we could not be claimed by other city-states. ... The pain inflicted was many times greater than usual. This spring, most of us remain forever in the wilds where flowers have yet to bloom. Goodbye, Tri▇▇▇▇. Goodbye, Tri▇▇▇▇. Goodbye, Tri▇▇▇▇. ... Trianne, we are not yet ready to say goodbye to you. Please be sure to find us again... Tonight, we will be able to cross this wilderness." — A diary entry kept by Trinnon Illustrated with a meteor crossing the sky

C: 「时至今日，我也未曾认同那神神叨叨的逐火之旅。但唯有一句话令我印象深刻——逐火是不断失却的旅途。 我从来不信黄金裔拥有相同的宿命，但毫无疑问，我也同样走在失却的道路上。 只是我失去的还不够…和我追求的东西相比，远不够满足等价交换的法则。 从提出泰坦与人的灵魂本质无异，灵魂由智种构成的理论后，我一直在等待一个彻底证实它的机会… 现在，这个机会终于来了！来得有些猝不及防，却也恰如其分。 今天，我终于能弥补多年前一场相似的灾难留下的遗憾。 我从死亡中得到灵感，也该如此偿还 ——我的身躯将作熔炼神明火种的容器，我的灵魂将成逼迫神明低头的枷锁，成就吾之理论的终极证明！ 现在的我无比快乐。 第一次造出能飞上天空的机械鸟，我曾这样笑着。第一次孵化出新生命时，我的双手曾这样颤抖。 后来的学子，倘若你看到这番话语，证明我已功败垂成，倒在黎明之前。 尽情使用我的成果，把我当作研究的对象！踏过我的身体，接过我的火把，把我当作照亮真理的薪柴投入燃烧的火焰！ 不要害怕亵渎—— 跨越神明本是禁忌，成为神明那又如何！」 ——树庭沦落后那刻夏记忆的回声之一，因无人发现而消散
E: "Even up till today, I still disagree with that bizarre Flame-Chase Journey. However, there is one statement that left a deep impression — Losses are a constant on the Flame-Chase journey. I never believed that the Chrysos Heirs shared the same destiny, but I am undoubtedly also on the path of losses. Yet, I have not lost enough... In comparison to what I pursue, I have not lost enough to fulfill the law of equivalent exchange. After I had proposed the theory that the nature of souls of Titans and humans are no different, and that souls are constructed from seeds of wisdom, I have been waiting for a chance to prove it once and for all... Now, the opportunity has presented itself! It came rather unexpectedly, but also right on time. Today, I can finally make up for the regret, akin to a calamity, from numerous years ago. I gained inspiration from death, and should repay as such. My body shall become the vessel to forge the Coreflames of gods, and my soul shall become the chains that force the gods to bow. That will become the ultimate evidence for my theory! I am incredibly happy now. I once smiled like this, when I first created a mechanical bird that could fly in the sky. My hands once trembled like this, when I developed a new life through incubation. My future students, if you see these words, it proves that my endeavor has failed at the final step, falling just before the break of dawn. Use my results to the fullest extent, and make me the subject of your research! Step over my body and take the torch from my hands. Use me as the firewood to ignite the flames that will bring light to the truth! Do not fear blasphemy— It is already a sin to transcend the gods, so what if you become a god!" — One of the echoes in Anaxa's memories after the Grove had fallen, which vanished because nobody discovered it

C: 「亲爱的三月七： 天快亮了。 我很庆幸，在最接近黑暗的时刻，又看见了那缕光。 它们曾是我长眠时，如梦般的浮光掠影。 我曾在匹诺康尼光怪陆离的记忆中梦见过，在鳞渊境惊叹过，雅利洛-VI的风雪也无法阻挡它的温暖。 如今，尽管我将要沉入熟悉的夜色，也能感知到身后的视线。 他们在等待『你』。 也许我不该假意被你说服。说不担心那是骗你的。你们真的能抵御「毁灭」的浊流吗。你能照顾好自己吗。他们能守护好你吗。你会变成什么模样呢。你自己有不一样的答案吗。你会后悔吗。 我会后悔吗。 我会后悔吗。 我会后悔吗。 你早已向我摊开所有回忆，毫无保留。我知道，你们所言的『开拓』是承载过去，连接现在，并勇敢驶向未来的旅程，而非建立在一张白纸上的海市蜃楼。 我不知道你是否能成功，但也许无论结局如何，我此刻能选择的，只有现在的你。我能望向的，也只有未来的你。 我也会想，如果有一天我离开了，要留给你什么呢？ 力量。否认。身份。告诫。习惯。祝福。 可这本就是你的人生，我能留给你最好的礼物…就是待你自己描绘的一片空白。 就像『三月七』这个名字，别出心裁，又多么贴切。 更重要的是，它只属于你。 去吧，三月。 这场不期而至的相逢，就把它当成滋润你的一场细雨。 将空白的未来，染上属于你的颜色♭ 你的， 『长夜月』♭」 ——深藏心底的声音
E: "Dear March 7th, Dawn is breaking. I'm grateful that I saw that glimmer of light again in the moment closest to the darkness. They were once the fleeting glimmers of light while I was in my long slumber. I've dreamed of them in Penacony's surreal memory, marveled at them in the Scalegorge Waterscape, and even the icy storms of Jarilo-VI could not take away their warmth. Even now, even though I'm about to sink into the familiar night, I can still feel the gaze behind me. They're waiting for "you." Maybe I shouldn't have pretended to be convinced by you. Saying I wasn't worried would be a lie. Can you really stand against the tides of the Destruction? Can you take care of yourself? Can they protect you? What will you become? Do you have a different answer? Will you regret it? Will I regret it? Will I regret it? Will I regret it? You've already laid bare every memory before me, holding nothing back. I know that what you call the Trailblaze is a journey that carries the past, connects the present, and sails forward with courage. It is not a mirage built on a blank page. I don't know if you'll succeed. But maybe, no matter the end, the only one I can choose now is who you are at this very moment. And the only one I can look toward is the you in the days ahead. I've also wondered what I should leave for you if I leave you one day? Strength. Denial. Identity. Admonition. Habits. Blessing. But this has always been your life, and the best gift I can leave you... is a blank canvas for you to paint on your own. Like the name 'March 7th.' It's unique, yet so fitting. More importantly, it belongs only to you. Go forth, March. Let this unexpected encounter be like a gentle rain that nourishes you. Paint your blank future with colors that are uniquely yours ♭ Yours truly, 'Evernight' ♭" — A voice deep within

C: 星期日：循此苦旅
E: Sunday: On This Arduous Journey

C: 抵达监控室的二人面对的却是不在此处的空间站主人随手留下的迷阵。\n「用奇物来隐藏奇物，的确是那女人会干的事情。」\n但很多时候即便猜到了手法，你也猜不到故事的结局。
E: The two arrive at the Monitoring Room to find a maze left by the absent space station's owner.\n"Using a Curio to hide another Curio sounds like something she would do."\nBut oftentimes, knowing the way does not equate to knowing how it ends.

C: 你乘上了神奇的星穹列车，现在熟悉一下乘员和设施吧！今后，这里就是你的家了。
E: You boarded the amazing Astral Express, and it's time to get familiar with its passengers and facilities! From now on, this will be your home.

C: 黑塔原来不止一个……仔细想想，倒也合理。这位黑塔要求你前往她的办公室。\n多半是个令人头疼的委托，但不去也不行。
E: So, there's more than one Herta... It makes sense now that you think about it. This Herta wants you to head to her office.\nIt'll probably be an annoying request, but you do have to go.

C: 可可利亚不愧为大守护者。为了庆祝你们重返上层区，她甚至悉心安排银鬃铁卫夹道欢迎，可谓是关怀备至。\n但铁卫们却不似可可利亚那般贴心——他们为了尽快完成任务，似乎只想把你五花大绑之后丢进克里珀堡。\n你们现在已俨然成为全城瞩目的大明星了…还是依丹恒所说，先想办法去机械屋避避风头吧。
E: The Supreme Guardian Cocolia has her Silvermane Guards lined up on both sides of the road to welcome you and your companions back to the Overworld. Such a grand reception can only come from a worthy ruler.\nThe Guards, however, are not so keen on the idea of putting up a show. To complete their task as soon as possible, they'd rather see you hogtied and thrown into the Qlipoth Fort.\nYou and your company are now talk of the town... Maybe you should listen to Dan Heng and go to the workshop to avoid unnecessary attention.

C: 旋转栈桥坐落在禁区中心。远望栈桥那端，是被希露瓦描绘为「地狱」的光景…而你们正是为此而来。\n但在那之前，你们必须操作栈桥控制终端，使此岸与彼岸相连。\n希露瓦表示这样的终端机不止一台。在禁区里找找看吧！
E: The gear bridge is located in the center of the restricted zone. On the other side of the gear bridge is what Serval described as "hell"... And that is exactly where you need to go.\nBut before that, you must use the gear bridge terminal to connect the two sides.\nServal tells you that there is more than just one terminal. Go and look for them in the restricted zone!

C: 故事尘埃落定，布洛妮娅继任成为大守护者，上下层区再次交融，组建成了完整的贝洛伯格。\n你们与布洛妮娅道别完毕，但在离开雅利洛-Ⅵ之前，三月七似乎还有没完成的心愿…\n再在城市里逛一圈，把那些值得纪念的人和物用快门记录下来吧。
E: The story ended and Bronya succeeded as the Supreme Guardian. The Overworld and Underworld reunited to create a complete Belobog.\nYou bid farewell to Bronya, but March 7th still has some unfulfilled wishes before you leave Jarilo-VI...\nTake another stroll in the city and record with your camera the people and things you want to commit to memory.

C: 得知你们为星核而来，停云邀众人前往司辰宫通传来意。\n仙舟之上，六司各掌其职。在这敏感时刻，你们若想在罗浮上自由行动，便须取得司掌航行与外交的天舶司长官，驭空的首肯。
E: Knowing that you came for the Stellaron, Tingyun invites everyone to the Palace of Astrum for a meeting.\nSix individual commissions oversee the Xianzhou. If you wish to move freely on the Luofu during these sensitive times, you must obtain the approval of the Head of the Sky-Faring Commission, Yukong, who is in charge of transport and diplomacy.

C: 「建木」的根系缠紧洪炉，自工造司各处汲取力量，生成名为「丰饶玄鹿」的灵兽拱卫自身。\n一番奋战，你们却发现玄鹿生机不绝，倒地亦能复生。唯有切断其供输来源，方有胜机。
E: The Ambrosial Arbor's roots wrap tightly around the furnace and absorb power from all over the Artisanship Commission, creating the Abundant Ebon Deer to protect itself.\nYou discover during battle that the Ebon Deer appears immortal and revives as soon as it is defeated. The only chance you have of victory is to cut off its energy source.

C: 不多时太卜便回到阵中。按她所说，药王秘传召来了奇异孽物，并以妖术扰乱心神，令云骑们无法前进。\n而今她已经查明原因，但要解除此厄，非得由身为短生种的你们帮助不可。
E: The master diviner soon returns to the encampment. According to her, the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus have summoned bizarre abominations and used sorcery to disturb people's minds, making the Knights unable to push forward.\nShe has figured out the reason but require the help of short-life individuals like you to overcome it.

C: 流萤向你解释了此处是为何地：黄金时刻的边境，梦境的更深处，家族的建设改造地（换句话说，梦中的工地），她还补充说，自己的「秘密据点」就在深处…只是「家族」眼线密布，两人得偷偷溜进去才行。\n通向深处的道路扑朔迷离，恐怕你得开动脑筋，活用梦境的性质才能继续前进。
E: Firefly explains this place to you: It is the edge of the Golden Hour, the inner depths of the Dreamscape, and The Family's construction and remodeling zone (in other words, a construction site within the dream). She adds that her "secret stronghold" is further on... The only problem is that "The Family" has eyes everywhere, and you will have to sneak in to get inside.\nThe path into the depths is complicated and confusing. You may have to think outside of the box and creatively utilize the characteristics of the Dreamscape to continue onwards.

C: 流萤向你袒露了心声。无论你作何感想，现在都已经到了告别的时候…但你们还可以同行最后一段路。\n前往「黄金的时刻」，从那里返回现实与众人会合吧。
E: Firefly has confessed her innermost thoughts to you. No matter how you feel about it, it is time for you to say farewell... However, you can still walk the last part of this journey together.\nHead to Golden Hour and return to reality to reunite with everyone.

C: 返回现实果然没有你想象中的那么简单——你和流萤甫一抵达黄金的时刻，就遭到了桑博的袭击。在你失去意识之前，你看到桑博似乎幻化成一女人的身形…如果不是他惯于女装，那袭击你们的一定另有其人。\n你们即将抵达这片空间的尽头，在这里看到了一位手持拼图的筑梦绅士，并利用他打开了通向出口的大门。继续前进吧。
E: As expected, returning to reality isn't as simple as you expected — Firefly and you are attacked by Sampo as soon as you arrive at the Golden Hour. Before you lose consciousness, you see Sampo shift into what appears to be the figure of a woman... Either he's a habitual crossdresser, or your assailant is actually someone else.\nAs you are about to reach the end of this space, you see a Dreamweaver Gentleman holding a puzzle and use him to open the door to the exit. Continue onwards.

C: 大堂近在眼前…你们究竟会在那里发现什么？
E: The lobby is just ahead... Just what will you discover there?

C: 筑梦拼图在匹诺康尼无处不在。通常来说，看到筑梦拼图就等于看到了一扇大门…不知是有意还是无意，这种诡异的设计在匹诺康尼简直泛滥成灾，让你深感家族是不是没有新活可以整了。\n无论如何，还是按照流程集齐筑梦碎片吧，你知道教授朋友向来没什么耐心。
E: Dream Jigsaws are ubiquitous in Penacony. Generally speaking, seeing a Dream Jigsaw is the same as seeing a door... Intentional or not, this creepy design is so common in Penacony that it makes you wonder whether The Family has run out of creative ideas.\nAnyway, you might as well go through the procedure and collect all the jigsaw fragments. You know how your professor friend isn't known for his patience.

C: 为了让故事足够浅显易懂，加拉赫决定寓教于乐，带领你们前往克劳克影视乐园——他将把那里的游乐设施当做教具，给你们上一堂匹诺康尼的历史课…你很累，大家都明白，但还是由衷希望你暂时别睡着。
E: To better get his story across, Gallagher decides to make things fun by taking everyone to Clock Studios Theme Park. Using the facilities there as tools, he will give you all a lesson on the history of Penacony... Everyone understands that you are exhausted, but they hope you won't doze off.

C: 你的█ ██ ██ █注意力彻底被那█ ███ █埃维金男孩夺去了。他到底是██ █ ██ █ 什么来头？还有时间，或许你可以追上█ ███ ██，问问他究竟是什么██ ███ ██ ██。
E: You are c█m█lete██ ██tranc█d by t█e █vgin boy.██ust who ███he? There█s sti█l tim███Mayb█ you ███ catch up ██ h██ and as█ █im exactly wha█ █████████.

C:
2:1 祂赐了世间一切众人「意义」，天地万物都造齐了。祂歇了一切创造的工。
2:2 然而，众生复向太一呼告，有大伟力的星神，伤哉。
2:3 你以『秩序』为天地万物万民定义，却令我等晓得自己不过是你的傀儡。
2:4 故在那日，万众集结一心，将神投入毁灭坑中。
2:5 事就这样成了。这是第七日。
2:6 众人大大欢呼，声音震地。那时，晨星一同歌唱。

「普世同谐，群星共熠，无上功德颂神主！」
「秩序已死！秩序已死！秩序已死！」
E:
2:1 THEY gave "meaning" to all in existence and all of heaven and earth were made perfect. Hence, THEY rested from THEIR work of creation.
2:2 However, the masses cried out once more to Ena that the blood of the great Aeon must be spilt.
2:3 You use "the Order" to define all of creation, yet make us aware that we are naught more than your puppets.
2:4 It was on that day that all of creation united as one, and cast the divine into the pit of destruction.
2:5 This is how it came to pass. This was the seventh day.
2:6 All of existence exclaimed out in joy and their voices of celebration shook the very earth. In that moment, the stars sang in great unison.

"The world is at harmony, the stars shine together, praise be to the Great One!"
"The Order is dead! The Order is dead! The Order is dead!"

C: 列车组终于胜利会师，与你们一道的还有忆者黑天鹅及罗浮将军景元。\n将军与公司的各位要员约定就谐乐大典一事先行磋商，并邀请列车组的各位前去旁听——尤其是你，{NICKNAME}。你根本没有拒绝的理由，不是么？
E: The Express Crew finally reunite victoriously. Accompanying you are Black Swan, the Memokeeper and Jing Yuan, the Luofu General.\nThe General and various IPC dignitaries have agreed to hold talks regarding the Charmony Festival incident — and they have invited the Express Crew to be present... You in particular, {NICKNAME}. You have no reason to turn down this offer, right?

C:
金色的美梦要开始躁动了。
在接下来的长夜里，你恐怕会遭遇许多挫折，见证众多悲剧。最后，目中所见只余黑白二色。
但请相信，在那黑白的世界中会有一点红色稍纵即逝，但在你做出抉择之时——
——它必将再度示现。
而你，要仔细咀嚼其意义，然后回到清醒的世界去。
我们都将在那里找到答案。
E:
The golden dream is about to become restless.
In the long night that will follow, I fear that you may encounter countless setbacks and witness endless tragedies. In the end, only black and white will be left in your vision.
But you must have faith. That black-and-white world will have a fleeting moment of crimson. But, when you make your decision...
...It will reappear once again.
And you, you must carefully ruminate on its meaning, then return to the waking world.
We will find our answer there.

C: 对于托帕来说，匹诺康尼这个项目还未开始就已经结束了。钟表匠的遗产争夺、砂金的盛大死亡、星期日的成神野心…这些大事件全都与她擦肩而过。\n但现在，她却必须走到台前，完成与家族代表的谈判。托帕对此并无怨言——一来她是个专业人士；二来，她享受踢出这临门一脚的感觉。
E: For Topaz, the Penacony project was over before it even started. The struggle for Watchmaker's Legacy, Aventurine's memorable demise, Sunday's ambition to become a god... She had brushed up against all of these major events.\nBut now, she had to step forth and complete negotiations with The Family's rep. Topaz had no complaints about this... First of all, she is a professional, and second of all, she loves the feeling of shooting that game-winner.

C: 又费了好大工夫，你闯进了这什么蕉社的地界，这群人的脑子不知道是不是也被什么人搅过，说话比你还怪。\n去跟他们聊聊吧，至少显得你说话像个正常人。
E: Putting in some serious work, you crash the turf of Slumba... or whatever. Can't tell if these folks have been brainwashed by someone. They chat in a way even weirder than you do.\nWell, go have a chat with them. It might actually make you seem like the sensible one here.

C: 细数往事，清除隐患，该离开艾迪恩公园了——回望，随后前进，人一生中能做的或许只有这两件事。
E: You've reflected on the past and eliminated the lurking danger. It's time to leave Aideen Park... Look back, then continue onwards. Perhaps these are the only two things a person can ever do in life.

C: 幸存者的名字往往就是「不幸」，正因她曾为绝灭大君所害，天才才得以扭转生死。
E: Survivors are often called "unfortunate." It was because she lost her life due to the Lord Ravager that the genius was able to reverse her death.

C: 我们成功进入了三相神殿。只是，欧洛尼斯并不欢迎我们，反而以各种谜题刁难，阻止我们进入神殿深处。
E: We successfully entered the Temple of the Three Fates. However, Oronyx does not welcome our presence and complicates our path with various puzzles, blocking us from reaching the temple's deeper chambers.

C: 遐蝶向寡言的斗士格奈乌斯坦露了此行的目的。一行人继续前行，沿途收集情报，誓要将尼卡多利的五瓣神魂归位，阻止不死神躯的诞生、重铸纷争泰坦的荣耀。
E: Castorice reveals the true purpose of our mission to Gnaeus, the silent gladiator. The party presses on, gathering information on the way, vowing to return Nikador's five soul fragments to their rightful place to prevent the creation of their immortal divine body, and to reforge the glory of the Strife Titan.

C: 我与{NICKNAME}他们失散在这片幻境中。据{NICKNAME}所说，{F#她}{M#他}看到了万敌心中的恐惧：那是来自悬锋一族以血铺就的荣耀……
E: {NICKNAME} and I became separated in this illusion. {NICKNAME} told me that {F#she}{M#he} travelled with Mydei and had seen the man's deepest fear, which was the blood-soaked glory of the Kremnos...

C: 与阿格莱雅商谈结盟一事时，我们与昏光庭院的风堇相识，{NICKNAME}与遐蝶决定陪她一同回到树庭，完成阿格莱雅交付的外交任务。
E: During alliance negotiations with Aglaea, we encounter Hyacine from the Twilight Courtyard. {NICKNAME} and Castorice opt to join her journey back to the Grove to complete Aglaea's diplomatic mission.

C: 前进路上，自称卡吕普索的神秘人突然出现，她声称已救下那刻夏，并带领{NICKNAME}他们向「启蒙王座」前进。
E: During their advance, a mysterious woman identifying herself as Calypso appears suddenly, stating she saved Anaxa and offering guidance to {NICKNAME}'s group to the Luminary Throne.

C: 你决绝地否定了悬锋人千载的荣耀执念，决定独自还乡，接下尼卡多利抗击黑潮的使命。在迈上回乡之路之前，你还需与城中的友人们一一作别。
E: You decisively reject the Kremnoans' centuries-old obsession with glory, opting to return home alone and assume Nikador's duty against the black tide. Before starting your homeward journey, you need to say goodbye to your friends in the city.

C: 与盗火行者的意外遭遇，导致欧洛尼斯的火种被提前取出。众黄金裔们希望由{NICKNAME}来承担岁月的职责。\n{NICKNAME}和迷迷愿意尝试接受欧洛尼斯的试炼，而公民大会将近，黄金裔的英雄们也有新的麻烦要面对。
E: An unexpected encounter with the Flame Reaver led to the premature extraction of Oronyx's Coreflame. The Chrysos Heirs hope that {NICKNAME} will take on the authority of Time.\n{NICKNAME} and Mem are willing to face Oronyx's trial. But with the citizens' assembly approaching, the Chrysos Heir heroes have new troubles on the horizon.

C: 与盗火行者的意外遭遇，导致欧洛尼斯的火种被提前取出。众黄金裔们希望由{NICKNAME}来承担岁月的职责。\n{NICKNAME}和迷迷愿意尝试接受欧洛尼斯的试炼，而公民大会将近，黄金裔的英雄们也有新的麻烦要面对。
E: An unexpected encounter with the Flame Reaver led to the premature extraction of Oronyx's Coreflame. The Chrysos Heirs hope that {NICKNAME} will take on the authority of Time.\n{NICKNAME} and Mem are willing to face Oronyx's trial. But with the citizens' assembly approaching, the Chrysos Heir heroes have new troubles on the horizon.

C: 另一方面，在奥赫玛，元老院卑劣的加害计划正在悄然实施，很快，便演变成了一场巨大风波。
E: Meanwhile, in Okhema, the Council of Elders' despicable scheme was quietly taking shape, and soon, it erupted into a storm of chaos.

C: 将{NICKNAME}与白厄接送至树庭后，赛飞儿找来「贼灵」巴特鲁斯，回到冥滩一阵搜刮…
E: After dropping {NICKNAME} and Phainon off at the Grove, Cipher rounded up the "Spirithief", Bartholos, and returned to the Nethershore for a bit of scavenging...

C: 神话已偏移了原定的轨迹，若命数是天上的巨星，那它的游离或会牵动太阳，也会牵动今夜的潮汐。\n你摸不到星，但可以站在潮汐里，感受波澜拍打你的脚踝。\n那是海在向你诉说它的忧虑。
E: The myth has drifted from its destined course. If fate is written in the stars, then their gravity pulls not just the sun, but the very tides at your feet.\nThe stars may be untouchable, but the tide isn't. Stand in its flow and feel how cosmic forces lap at your ankles.\nThat's the ocean whispering its worries, wave by wave, shore to soul.

C: 正如有人攥着希望的灯火，踏过自己一生命运的黄昏，直至步入坟茔。\n正如你抱着你的希望，圆满地抵达了时间的终点。\n去吧，再见。庙宇旁便是天造地设的洞府。
E: Just as one clutches the flame of hope, traversing through the twilight of their destined life until they reach their grave.\nJust as you, embracing your hope, have arrived at time's end in fulfillment.\nGo now. Farewell. By the temple lies a heaven-made sanctuary.

C: 退场歌已经奏响，剧目将近尾声…但在此之前，沉默无言的观众将会为你献上掌声，庆贺你完成了这场悲剧，庆贺你将走向下一场悲剧。\n走向他渴望的悲剧。\n将观众逐出神话的剧场，或是让这场剧目成为万物的绝唱。
E: The music for the curtain call has begun to play, and the show nears its end... But before that, the silent audience will offer you their applause, celebrating your completion of this tragedy, commemorating your path toward the next tragedy.\nToward the tragedy he yearns for.\nEither banish the audience from this mythical theater, or let this performance become the swan song of all creation.

C: 「再创世」的仪式已经顺利完成，翁法罗斯的旅程结束…为什么自己什么都不记得？难道真的是以「记忆」为代价…？\n这不是匹诺康尼吗？难道说「太一之梦」就一直没醒来？
E: The Era Nova Ceremony was a success, and the journey in Amphoreus had reached its end... So why can't you remember anything? Was it really at the cost of "memories"...?\nIsn't this Penacony? Could it be that you never woke up from Ena's Dream?

C: 权杖内核层已严重损毁，宛如废墟。要想在此搜寻德谬歌的痕迹，无异于大海捞针。真是欲盖弥彰呀，这只说明一件事——\n我找对地方了。
E: The Scepter's kernel is severely damaged, little more than rubble. Seeking traces of the Demiurge here would be like finding a needle in a haystack. How revealing... This only confirms one thing...\nI'm exactly where I need to be.

C: 螺丝咕姆的宝贝看起来不错，希望它在探索矩阵上同样有效。
E: Screwllum's treasure looks promising. Let's hope it works just as well on the Matrix.

C: 铁墓已经被打败，但永恒之地翁法罗斯的故事还没有结束。或者说，它该迎来怎样的结局，取决于昔涟的选择……
E: Irontomb has been defeated, but the story of Amphoreus, The Eternal Land, is not yet over. Or rather, how it should end depends on Cyrene's choice...

C: 坐上椅子回溯记忆，你需要找出遗漏的记忆盲点洗清自身的嫌疑
E: Sit on the chair and backtrack your memories. You need to find the Cognition Chasms that have escaped notice in order to clear yourself of suspicion.

C: 阮•梅，培育生命的大师，让你去回收在空间站乱跑的「小生命」…她为了让你不透露此事，甚至喂你吃下「反吐真剂」。\n她究竟在想些什么？
E: Ruan Mei, the master nurturer of life, asks you to recover the "little lifeforms" that are running amok on the space station. She even goes so far as to feed you an "Anti-Truth Serum" to ensure you don't reveal this matter.\nWhat could she be thinking?

C: 阮•梅，培育生命的大师，让你去回收在空间站乱跑的「小生命」…她为了让你不透露此事，甚至喂你吃下「反吐真剂」。\n她究竟在想些什么？
E: Ruan Mei, the master nurturer of life, asks you to recover the "little lifeforms" that are running amok on the space station. She even goes so far as to feed you an "Anti-Truth Serum" to ensure you don't reveal this matter.\nWhat could she be thinking?

C: {NICKNAME}的开拓日报：\n没见到托帕。克里珀堡有新情况。回去找布洛妮娅。
E: {NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:\nDidn't see Topaz. There's a new situation in Qlipoth Fort. Going back to find Bronya.

C:
{NICKNAME}的开拓日报：
前情太复杂。总之：布洛妮娅&贝洛伯格，危。
先去找人收集意见。上层区收集完了。该去下层了。
帕姆注：到底发生了什么，倒是把细节说清楚啊帕！
E:
{NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:
Story leading up to this is too complicated. Basically, Bronya & Belobog = in danger.
Need to find people to get some ideas first. Finished in the Overworld. Time to go to the Underworld.
Pom-Pom's Notes: What exactly is happening! Write down the details first, at least!

C: 矿车工老师傅似乎为你准备了新的谜题——去问问他准备的如何了吧。
E: The senior mine cart operator seems to have prepared a new puzzle. Go and inquire about his preparation

C: 你再次收到了克拉拉的短信，了解到她似乎已经完成了对小机器人的维修。\n有空时不妨前往史瓦罗基地查看状况吧。但千万别忘了，这可是你亲口答应她的——\n没人可以辜负克拉拉，没有人。
E: You receive Clara's new message. She seems to have finished repairing the little robot.\nMaybe you can see how things are going at Svarog's Base when you have the time. Remember, you promised her to go —\nNo one can break a promise to Clara. No one.

C: 你帮助希莉儿获得了安息。\n但你的内心仍然渴求答案——为什么她会变成饱受折磨的幻影？为什么她会被谜样的箱子所束缚？\n你需要去找到一位熟悉贝洛伯格历史的人，从她那里得到答案。
E: You helped Cyrille to find eternal peace.\nBut you hunger for answers deep inside — how did she turn into a tortured phantom? Why was she bound by these mysterious armory boxes?\nYou have to find someone familiar with Belobog's history to get to the bottom of this.

C: 快乐的时光总是短暂，陶德与你在海边，迎着波月古海的海浪，他向你诉说着他的故事。又或者，这并非他的故事，而是你与他，以及其他人的故事……
E: Good times are always fleeting. Todd is with you at the coast, facing the waves of the Lunarescent Depths. He tells you his story. Or rather, it isn't his story, but instead the story of you and him, and of others...

C: 牌友希望你不要将「黛青小姐」绳之以法。说到底你只是一个偶然过客，得到了一个被小心隐藏的真相。真相是否应该为人所知，这取决于你的决定。
E: The game mates hope you don't bring "Ms. Daiqing" to justice. After all, you're just an occasional passer-by who exposed a carefully hidden truth. Whether the truth should be revealed is up to you.

C: 根据名侦探三月七的推理，经过险象环生的冒险，罗刹终于找到了接头地点。也不知道是谁这么胆大妄为，竟敢购买星核来为害仙舟！
E: According to Genius Detective March 7th's deduction, after a danger-laden adventure, Luocha finally reached the meet-up point. Who is so daring as to purchasing Stellaron to wreak havoc on the Xianzhou ship?

C: 铖杰师傅决心完成莱恩老师的设计，希望你也能从旁监督。你也不知道这样的监督有何意义，要是有空就去看看吧。\n当一个人需要他人的监督才有信心继续完成时，这已经说明了很多问题。
E: Chengjie decides to complete Master Ryan's design and hopes you can accompany him while he works. You don't know if supervision like this can yield any result, but go ahead and do it anyway.\nWhen someone requires supervision before they have the confidence to complete a task, that says a lot about that supervisee.

C: 不出所料，只要是有能让你来修理玉兆的机会，罗浮人都会毫不客气地让给你，去给他们露一手看看吧。\n你已经玩过好几次了，说真的，这也不难，为什么大家都不肯自己动手呢？
E: As expected, whenever there is an opportunity to make you fix jade abaci, Luofu residents will take it. Go and give them a hand.\nYou've done it a few times by now. Honestly, it's not difficult to fix, but why does nobody want to do it themselves?

C: 地衡司已经判明「模拟云吟术」是次元扑满所为，接下来你和地衡司决定展开「追猎行动」。\n地衡司以行医市集为陷阱布置饵食，希望由你抓住引起异象的扑满……
E: The Realm-Keeping Commission has ascertained that the "cloudhymn magic imitation" is a Warp Trotter's doing. Following this, you and the Realm-Keeping Commission have decided to go on a "hunt."\nThe Realm-Keeping Commission has placed baited traps all over Healer's Market, and they hope you can capture the Trotter causing the abnormalities...

C: 正论也好、歪理也罢，只要能说服大善人们接受放生机兵，就算全面胜利！
E: Whether it's right or wrong, as long as the Benevolent Ones can be convinced to accept releasing the automatons, it's a win!

C: 去海边完成放生仪式吧。话说事情到底是怎么演变到这一步的…算了，无所谓了。感恩行善，功德无量，药王慈怀。
E: Go to the coast to complete the release ceremony. Actually, how did things get to this point... Never mind. It doesn't matter. Be grateful and do good deeds, obtain immeasurable merit, mercy of Sanctus Medicus.

C: 无论前半生接受过什么科学、魔法、信仰其他随便什么的教育，当一个三流网络红人向你发来垃圾短消息宣称她在某处荒废园子里撞见灵异鬼怪时，你的反应是——1、好耶，可以和她贴贴！2、什么新式诈骗短信，拉黑不送。3、算了，去看看吧。\n当然，不管选什么，你都暗自下定决心，任她巧舌如簧，绝不为此行掏哪怕五十信用点，绝不！再说了，你兜里哪儿有闲钱啊。
E: No matter what kind of science-, magic-, faith-, or whatever-based upbringing you've had, when a third-tier influencer sends you a spam message claiming to have encountered supernatural entities in a deserted garden, your reaction would be: 1. "Sweet lol, I can meet up with this hot babe!" 2. "A new online scam? Blocked." 3. "Whatever. Let's check this out."\nNaturally, no matter which one you choose, you would have steeled your mind to not give even <unbreak>50</unbreak> credits for this trip no matter what she says! No matter what! Besides, it's not like you have any disposable income.

C: 谜题解开了，游戏却并未结束。「捕头」告诉黑天鹅，花火即将再次行凶，而黑天鹅一定赶不及去阻止她。你感受到这段梦境中闪过了一段短暂但剧烈的情绪波动，大概因为黑天鹅并不享受这种被人牵着鼻子走的感觉吧。
E: You have solved the puzzle, but the game is not over. The "constable" has told Black Swan that Sparkle is about to commit another murder, and Black Swan definitely would not have enough time to stop her. You feel a brief but intense surge of emotion flash across the Dreamscape, likely because Black Swan dislikes this feeling of being led on a wild goose chase by others.

C: 事实是没有人偷走了孤云，是孤云自己偷走了孤云。无论是作为犯人还是受害者，孤云应该向你们解释清楚。\n跟随孤云继续前进。
E: The mystery's solved: Nobody stole Guyun. It just made itself "gone with the wind." Culprit or victim, Guyun owes everyone an explanation for what happened.\nFollow Guyun and continue onward.

C: 在局外人的操弄之下，罗浮仙舟羁押许久的巨恶，步离人战首呼雷最终脱出牢笼大开杀戒。此刻幽囚狱中的局势危如累卵，你们唯一能做的，只有在他逃出此间前，关上幽囚狱的大门。
E: With the machinations of external parties, the borisin Warhead, Hoolay, a heinous criminal who had been imprisoned on the Xianzhou Luofu for ages, managed to break free and embark on a wanton massacre. The Shackling Prison was plunged into imminent peril — closing The Shackling Prison's gates just before he managed to flee was all that you all could do.

C: 高天之上，竞锋舰中，群狼环伺，猎手弯弓。罗浮仙舟的演武擂台上终于展开一场血之角逐……
E: Aboard the Skysplitter in the sky, a hunter draws their bow amid prowling wolves. The Xianzhou Luofu's Wardance arena finally plays host to a bloody contest...

C: 莱斯利回应了芙洛拉的感情，但愿她再无遗憾，能够从此重启自己的人生。\n这片心绪空间已经没有了主人，该离开了。
E: Lesley's response to Flora's feelings will hopefully grant her solace and allow her to begin anew.\nAll the creators of this Emoscape have left. It is time to leave this realm.

C: 你看到了一份甜蜜的冰激凌，柯柯娜的生活会好起来吗？你决定一探究竟。
E: You see a delectable ice cream. Will Cocona's life get better? You decide to see it for yourself.

C: 我知道他们后来是怎么评价我的——荒诞无稽、杀人为乐…他们说错了。\n掌权后，我再也没有快乐过，甚至再也没能睡过一整个晚上。恐惧像深海中涌出的巨型乌贼，将我的心死死缠住，试图将它拖进黑暗的深渊。\n除了不断地清除掉那些恐惧的源头…灰骑士，我又能怎么办呢？我又该怎么办呢？
E: I know what they said about me later — outrageous, murdering for pleasure... But they were wrong. \nAfter gaining power, I've never been happy, neither have I gotten a peaceful night's sleep — the fear surges forth like a giant squid from the abyssal depths, entwining its tentacles around my heart, attempting to pull me back into the black abyss.\nApart from severing the origins of these fears... Gray Knight, what can I do? What do I do?

C: 螺丝咕姆成功说服了家族，取回了查德威克的记忆。\n回到空间站，和黑塔、螺丝咕姆一起同查德威克博士道别。
E: Screwllum has convinced The Family and retrieved Chadwick's memories.\nReturn to the space station and bid farewell to Dr. Chadwick, accompanied by Screwllum and Herta.

C: 收集筑梦拼图的碎片，找到那个孩子的藏身处。
E: Collect pieces of the Dream Jigsaw and find that child's hiding spot.

C: 记忆的舞台从纷争的剑下来到了负世的座下，危险与灾厄暂且远离了这段往事，你接下来或许可以欣赏一段没那么沉重的故事。但你要知道，以厮杀与苦难作为进场歌的戏剧，往往也以此作为退场——无论如何，先去找找戏剧的主人演员吧。\n「人类，你想从对方身上得到什么？」
E: The stage of this memory has transitioned from under Strife's blade to beneath Worldbearing's seat. The threat and disaster have subsided for now, and maybe you will even be able to immerse yourself in a slightly less heavy story. But you must be aware that any play that begins with slaughter and suffering often meets a similar end... Whatever the case, it would be best to find the protagonist of this story first.\n"Human, what is it you wish to gain from them?"

C: 呜呜，呜呜…有怪物呜！
E: Wubba-woo, woo-whoo... Monsters!

C: 科员以斯帖正在为自己的形象而苦恼，你发现她想改变发色，但苦于找不到参考。带着你独特的审美，过去指导一下以斯帖吧！
E: Researcher Esther is having a rough day with her appearance. She wants to change her hair color, but she doesn't know what colors to change to. With your unique perspective on beauty, go and advise Esther!

C: 你的学生希拉竟是一名仿生人，你答应要教导她的也并非什么寻常知识，而是教她如何做人。
E: Your student, Sheila, is an android, and you're going to teach her how to act like a human.

C: 前往磐岩镇，调查奇怪的地方，也许你能找到马克西姆丢失的记忆……
E: Head to Boulder Town to investigate the strange place. Maybe you'll be able to find Maxime's lost memories...

C: 吉尔伯特急需一枚战功勋章来展现自己的威风，和他一起击败禁区里的失控机器人吧——等等，我刚才说了「一起」了吗？
E: Gilbert needs to achieve something on the battlefield to show his strength. Defeat the robot out of control in the restricted zone with him... Wait, did I say "with him"?

C: 民间科学家雷金正在找人帮忙。\n他似乎对贝洛伯格教育部的题库产生了兴趣，还指望你能帮上些忙。
E: The Civilian Scientist, Regin, is looking for help.\nHe seems to have currently taken an interest in the Belobog Ministry of Education's question bank. Maybe you can help him.

C: 你从「正当权益会社」发布的公告中得知艾格尼斯发布了委托，想要行使她的正当权益。帮帮艾格尼斯！
E: You see that Agnes has issued a commission on the Rightful Rights Society's noticeboard and wants to exercise her rightful rights. Go help Agnes!

C: 巡逻的银鬃铁卫在裂界中目击到了幻象回响，它们因夙愿未遂而不得解脱。向它们提供帮助吧。\n紧张的男子似乎图谋不轨……
E: Some Silvermane Guard patrols spotted illusory echoes in the Fragmentum who are stuck inside due to unfinished businesses. Help them.\nThe nervous man seems to be plotting something...

C: 「寻径指津」的爱好者们借着演武仪典的东风，在竞锋舰上办了一场大型活动，去凑凑热闹也无妨。
E: Lovers of "Pathfinder" took advantage of the Wardance excitement and organized a large-scale event on the Skysplitter. It wouldn't hurt to see what it's about.

C: 在机缘巧合下，你成了卜筮用具「雅努斯迷津」的辅祭。好人做到底，协助命运三相殿的祭司，完成一批积压的寻物委托吧。
E: By a twist of fate, you're now an acolyte of the divination tool — Janus' Maze. Since you've started, might as well help the priests of the Temple of the Three Fates finish their backlog of "lost and found" assignments.

C: 在机缘巧合下，你成了卜筮用具「雅努斯迷津」的辅祭。好人做到底，协助命运三相殿的祭司，完成一批积压的寻物委托吧。
E: By a twist of fate, you're now an acolyte of the divination tool — Janus' Maze. Since you've started, might as well help the priests of the Temple of the Three Fates finish their backlog of "lost and found" assignments.

C: 「贼灵」巴特鲁斯讲述起了自己的英雄事迹，究竟它是如何巧妙地化险为夷。
E: Spirithief Bartholos recounts their heroic deeds, telling how they cleverly turned danger into triumph.

C: 「仲裁官」的试炼再度到来。它的内容、形式、好处和损害你已经很清楚了，不是吗？去吧，为了「均衡」……
E: The Arbitrator's trial is here once again. You are already well aware of its content, format, pros, and cons, aren't you? Go then. For the sake of Equilibrium...

C: 黑塔要求你以「开拓」的身份进入天才俱乐部制作的「模拟宇宙」，试着从虚拟星神口中套出星神与命途的奥秘。
E: Herta asks you to enter the Simulated Universe created by the Genius Society while pretending to be the Aeon of Trailblaze, and try to glean the secret of Aeons and Paths from the simulated Aeons.

C: 黑塔要求你以「开拓」的身份进入天才俱乐部制作的「模拟宇宙」，试着从虚拟星神口中套出星神与命途的奥秘。
E: Herta asks you to enter the Simulated Universe created by the Genius Society while pretending to be the Aeon of Trailblaze, and try to glean the secret of Aeons and Paths from the simulated Aeons.

C: 你为钟表小子雕像带去了足够多的「金表钞」——吸取了足够多美梦能量的钟表小子决定给你展露一手绝活。
E: You have brought enough Clock Credits to the Clockie Statue — Clockie, having absorbed enough dream energy, decides to showcase a signature trick to you.

C: 你再次加入了铁卫禁区的联合演习。\n杰帕德也加入了这次演练，只要战胜他就可以直接宣告演练结束。
E: Once again, you join a joint training exercise in the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone.\nGepard is joining this training too. Defeat him to immediately conclude the training.

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, Adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 真心话游戏来到了第二轮，卡芙卡想通过这个游戏得到什么呢？也许只是解闷而已。但你确实可以从一真一假的回答中，得到自己好奇已久的答案。至于孰真孰假……
E: The game of truth and lies has entered its second round. What does Kafka hope to gain from this game? Perhaps just some entertainment. But from the truthful and false answers, you can finally find answers to things you've been curious about for a long time. As for which answers are true or false...

C: 银狼引起的风波终于告一段落，但伦纳德依旧忧心忡忡。\n为了空间站的网络安全，也为了保住这份工作，他请求你协助进行一项测试……
E: The troubles caused by Silver Wolf have abated, but Leonard still looks concerned.\nHe's asking for your help to carry out a task that will improve the space station's cybersecurity and help him keep his job...

C: 银狼引起的风波终于告一段落，但伦纳德依旧忧心忡忡。\n为了空间站的网络安全，也为了保住这份工作，他请求你协助进行一项测试……
E: The troubles caused by Silver Wolf have abated, but Leonard still looks concerned.\nHe's asking for your help to carry out a task that will improve the space station's cybersecurity and help him keep his job...

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n这一次，于尔丹希望你根据藏宝图找到合适的藏品。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nThis time, Uldan wishes you to find an exhibit based on a treasure map.

C: 来到金人巷中，你们竟然同时见到了两个龙女。如此妖异怪事，必定是岁阳所为。
E: After you arrive at Aurum Alley, to your surprise, you come across not one but two Dragon Ladies. Undoubtedly, this anomaly must be the work of the heliobi.

C: 十妖在林，不如一妖在手。岁阳唯一该去的地方，就是绥园中的镇妖塔。
E: The only good heliobus is a captured heliobus. The only place they should go is the Suppression Towers in Fyxestroll Garden.

C: 桂乃芬在金人巷做过探店视频，小有人气。\n那里对她来说是一个特别的地方，不知道对你来说是不是也很特别，先到那里吧。
E: Guinaifen has some popularity in Aurum Alley since she had done restaurant-visit videos there.\nThat place is special for her. Is it special for you as well? Head there first.

C: 监狱的狱警们破坏了球笼航道，你必须手动调整路线将它们修复，不然就永远没法跟伙伴们汇合了。
E: The prison wardens have destroyed the Spheroid lane. You have to manually reroute the course to repair the lanes, or you'll never be able to reunite with your companions.

C: 据说爱德华医生上架了一枚题材劲爆的梦泡——到底能有多劲爆？去找他问个究竟吧。
E: It's said that Dr. Edward has released a quite topical dream bubble — Just how evocative can it be? Speak to him to find out.

C: 玩完梦泡之后，你脑海中涌现出了复杂的情绪。\n爱德华医生肯定想要知道你的体验感想，去跟他反映一下吧。
E: After playing with the dream bubble, complicated emotions well up in your mind.\nDr. Edward definitely wants to know about your experience. Go talk to him.

C: 监狱的狱警们破坏了球笼航道，你必须手动调整路线将它们修复，从而将各个监狱区划再次连接。
E: The wardens have destroyed the Spheroid lane. You have to manually reroute the course to repair the lanes and reconnect the various prison blocks.

C: 进入了黑桃的心绪空间，现在要做的事就是帮它改掉这个爱捉弄人的坏毛病！\n不过，首先得抓住它……
E: You've entered Spade's Emoscape. Now, you need to help it change its bad habit of pranking others!\nBut first, you'll need to catch it...

C: 进入了淑女的心绪空间。淑女会习惯性地隐藏内心，到底哪边才是它的真实想法呢？
E: You've entered Lady's Emoscape. Lady will habitually hide its heart. What are its true thoughts?

C: 为什么「沉眠」会出现于此，你们两人似乎都有一肚子疑问。
E: Both of you have questions about why the "Dormancy" might appear in such a place.

C: 经过十五日的剑术练习与奇遇，三月七与你所想一致，仅仅是剑斗胜利已经不能满足了。\n尾巴大爷说他能让斯科特洗心革面，他最好可以……
E: Great minds think alike. A duel victory is no longer March 7th's and your goal after all the swordplay training and adventure in the last fifteen days.\nMr. Tail claims he can make Skott turn over a new leaf. We shall see about that...

C: 通过威胁信，尾巴成功进入了斯科特的内心世界。据说，恶人的欲望会被具象化成宫殿的样子，而扭曲的欲望就隐藏其中。\n继续向前，找找斯科特最扭曲的欲望是哪里吧。
E: Tail found his way into Skott's inner world through a threatening letter. The desires of the wicked are manifested as palaces, with their twisted desires hidden within.\nContinue onward and find Skott's most twisted desire.

C: 协助见习医生伦道夫进行拍摄，以便让他去捕获这些离散忆质。
E: Help Trainee Healer Randolph with the filming so that he can capture these scattered memoria.

C: 你现在是卢卡选手的教练了！\n带领卢卡赢得第一场比赛吧！让素裳好好体验一下来自域外雪国的热情吧！
E: You are now Contestant Luka's coach!\nLead Luka to victory in his first match! And let Sushang have a good taste of the passion from the outworld snowlands!

C:
「明知注定失败的比赛，我也要参加到底吗？」
「那老子问你：注定失败的人生，就不活了吗？」
「可如果这注定是一场徒劳的悲剧，又何必看到结尾呢？」
「因为你是个战士啊，蠢材。」
E:
"Should I still participate in a tournament till the end when I know I'll definitely lose?"
"Then let me ask you: Will you stop living if you know you'll life is doomed to fail?"
"But why should I see the end of this story when it's fated to be a tragedy that I can't change?"
"Because you're a fighter, idiot."

C: 探查善逝的历史记录，感染了反有机方程的智械，也会有「情感」留存吗？
E: Review Sugata's historical records. Would an Intellitron infected with the Anti-Organic Equation still have "emotions" remaining within?

C: 完成「大衍万象」困难模式III
E: Complete Mutare Magnus Hard Mode III

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n作曲用的灵感都收集齐了，回去看看乐队的排练情况吧。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nThe inspiration required for composing music has all been collected. Go back and see how the rehearsal is going.

C: 为了完成每日课题、角逐最终奖项，你作为摄影助理，陪同三月七踏上了摄影之旅。\n依据摄影灵感进行拍摄吧。
E: To complete the daily tasks and compete for the final prize, you, as a photography assistant, accompanied March 7th on a photography journey.\nTake a photo based on the photography inspiration.

C: 依靠树庭的泰坦神迹，以及脑内关于测试的残存记忆，你成功在圣树的根系网络中仿造出了差分宇宙。按照卡利多托斯的说法，这是最适合你的求学场所，用命途的方程式去理解翁法罗斯的神话和历史。说起来，这算不算是——模拟宇宙的模拟宇宙？
E: Using the Titan Miracle from the Grove and remnant memories pertaining to the test, you successfully emulated a counterfeit Divergent Universe in the Sacred Tree's root system. According to Calidorthos, this is a most appropriate place for you to gain knowledge by using Path Equations to understand Amphoreus' myths and history. Come to think of it, isn't this a simulated version of the Simulated Universe?

C: 第二场比赛也顺利拿下，接下来是赢得「银盏徽章」、晋级淘汰赛的关键对决。\n你需要面对新的强敌——缇宝和她的天使海豹！可是……
E: The second match is secured! Now comes the crucial showdown to win the Silver Chalice Badge and advance to the knockout stage.\nYour next formidable opponent — Tribbie and her Angel Seal! But...

C: 为了复原「特调配方」，你受邀成为「惊梦酒吧」的特邀调饮师。在真理医生的配合下，你完成了第二份配方。接下来，又会有怎样的客人不期而至呢？
E: To restore the "Special Recipe," you've been invited as a guest drinksmith at the Dreamjolt Hostelry. With Dr. Ratio's cooperation, you've completed the second recipe. Now, what unexpected guests will walk through the door next?

C: 虽然意外错失了加入旅团的机会，但在负责人的推荐下，驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大仍然接受了实习的邀约。值得开心的是，因为你的关心与照料，它已经不再感到迷惘了。那么，是时候见证驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大令人啧啧称奇的成长啦！
E: Although missing the chance to join the troupe by accident, Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas still accepted the internship offer on the supervisor's recommendation. The good news is, thanks to your care and attention, it's no longer feeling lost. Now, it's time to witness Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas's remarkable growth!

E: Click the bottom right corner

C: 「卡利白正统，就在卡利百！」广告机的女声慵懒地说道，你不懂两者有什么区别。
E: "The orthodox Kapo-Kali IS Kali-Kapo!" The advertising bot lazily declares, and you are confused about the differences between the two.

C: 星核的爆发会引来「裂界」的侵蚀，它的出现与你体内的星核不无关系。
E: Stellaron bursts can lead to Fragmentum corrosion. These are connected to the Stellaron within you.

C: 非人生物？
E: Non-human life?

C: 保护奇物权益！
E: Protect rare item rights!

C: 希拉，你会回来救我们吗？在我们也遇到了同等危难的时候，如果当年你成功挽救了母星……
E: Oh Sheila, when we face another dire crisis like this, if you're able to rescue your home planet... Will you come back and save us?

C: 可、可咱们也不能就这么跑了吧……
E: B—But we can't just run away like this, right...

C: {NICKNAME}，用配控装置转换斥力桥。
E: {NICKNAME}, use the control device to switch the repulsion bridge.

C: 就你的处境而言，我觉得你在场听听是件好事。毕竟我有一大堆和你有关的计划，说到这里，姬子……
E: But as far as you're concerned, I think it would be better for you to listen in. After all, I have a lot of plans ahead involving you. Speaking of which, Himeko...

C: 总感觉缺了点什么……
E: I feel like it's missing something...

C: 嗯，我捏住了。
E: OK, I got it.

C: 嗯，我扔掉了。
E: Okay, well I've cast out all the anxiety now.

C: 银河是很广大的啊。你突然这么问我，我也不知从何说起……
E: The galaxy is endlessly vast. I wouldn't know where to begin, especially if you ask me that so suddenly...

C: 为什么需要我？
E: Why do you need me?

C: 「裂界」是星核造成的现象。
E: Fragmentums are a product of the Stellaron.

C: 有什么坏掉的设备可以找我，但我不保证有兴趣修喔。
E: If you got any broken equipment lying around you can always come find me, though I can't guarantee I'll be interested in fixing it.

C: 哇噢！好明亮的大堂！今晚有软和的床垫和弹弹的枕头啦！
E: Wow, what a beautiful lobby! It's gonna be soft mattresses and cushiony pillows tonight!

C: 喂？之前跟你们说话的军官，是杰帕德•朗道大人吗？
E: Say, the officer that you were speaking to... was that Gepard Landau?

C: 请容我拒绝。
E: Allow me to refuse.

C: 士兵能阻止裂界入侵吗？
E: Can soldiers really hold back the Fragmentum?

C: 没有什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 希露瓦！我们是之前路过你这儿的，还帮你修过东西——记得嘛？
E: Serval! We came past here before and helped you fix a few things, remember?

C: 你很讨厌可可利亚吗？
E: Do you dislike Cocolia?

C: 见鬼，你们都不用上班吗…
E: Don't you two have work to do?

C: 都办妥了，没人受伤。
E: All done. No one was hurt.

C: 他们甚至还蹬鼻子上脸，在门窗墙壁上写满了侮辱我的话——
E: They even wrote insults all over the doors, windows, and walls —

C: 星核就是这么可怕的东西。
E: Stellarons are terrible things.

C: 从一到五，给这次旅程打分…
E: On a scale from 1 to 5, how would you rate this journey...

C: 不必了，我追求画面纯净。
E: Maybe we could try for a cleaner composition for this one...

C: 嗯…接下来去哪儿呢……
E: Okay... Where to next?

C: 毕竟那是希露瓦嘛。
E: That's your sister for you.

C: 雷厉风行，说到做到——她的办事风格向来如此。那个时候，我还以为…我还以为我们会是一辈子的朋友。
E: Quick as lightning, always keeping her word — that was her way of doing things. Back then... I thought we'd be friends for life.

C: 嗐，我原本倒是想珍藏起来的…但你也知道，老古董都是这个毛病——越不用越容易坏。再说，修了它也不会有人给我报酬，对吧？
E: *sigh* I wanted to keep it with me... but that's the problem with old things — the less you use them, the easier they break. Besides, no one's paying me to fix it, right?

C: 呵…明明喝了那么多茶，怎么还是这么快就困了……
E: *yawn* I drank all that tea. Why am I getting sleepy?

C: 错！千万不能把动物的毛发放进湿垃圾箱！
E: Nope! Never put animal fur in a wet trashcan!

C: 不知为什么，一个稚嫩的女声突然在你脑海中响起：下面的区域，以后再来探索吧！
E: For some reason, a sweet female voice pops into your head: "How about we explore the area ahead of us later?"

C: 不如说，你从没见过比它更干净的东西。这只垃圾桶仿佛全宇宙的纯洁化身，这未免也太荒诞了吧？
E: In fact, you've never seen anything this clean before. This trashcan is like the universe's very incarnation of purity... Maybe we're going too far.

C: 大恩不言谢，告辞。
E: I can't thank you enough. Bye for now.

C: 地上和地下已经隔绝了这么多年，突然跑下来你们几个「外来者」，着实是件新鲜事。
E: Y'know, the underground has been cut off from the surface for years. For you outsiders to descend on us out of nowhere is pretty incredible.

C: 我想问些别的事。
E: I want to ask something else.

C: 哼。
E: Hmph.

C: 随你，我可不会强求。
E: Suit yourself. I'm not forcing you.

C: 对啊，你们不是还要找首领谈事嘛。一堆破铜烂铁机器人而已，咱们可不怕它。
E: Yeah, you still need to talk with the chief. It's only a bunch of scrap metal. What are we afraid of?

C: 要想真正地抓住我，你还必须正确回答我一个问题。
E: Hmph, doesn't count unless you can answer this question.

C: 我可是一直暗中看护你们啊！你晓得铁卫盯了你们多久吗，我好容易才找到一个救人的机会……
E: Meanwhile, there I was, looking out for you from the shadows! Do you know how difficult it was to make an entrance? They were watching you the whole time!

C: 好了！我会帮助你们，毫不保留，分文不收！只求小哥千万别到处乱说！
E: You win! I'll help you to the best of my ability — free of charge I might add! But please, don't go spreading rumors about me?

C: 前面那个人…是在睡觉吗？
E: That person up ahead... is he asleep?

C: 它们不知从哪儿涌了出来，一股脑就把我们和流浪者全赶出去了，还堵住了下到里圈的必经矿道。
E: They came out of nowhere and pushed the vagrants and us back. Then they blocked off the only tunnels into the inner section.

C: 下层区的人好像都很匆忙，这里生活节奏太快啦。跟这里比起来，熙熙攘攘的上层区都显得舒适了不少。
E: They're always in a hurry. The pace of life here is so fast! Things are pretty busy in the Overworld too, but everything feels more relaxed up there.

C: 算了，之后再继续讨论吧。
E: Uhh, that'll do for now.

C: 最近总是噩梦缠身。
E: I've been having nightmares recently.

C: 你也是身不由己。
E: You had no choice.

C: 遇到什么麻烦了吗？
E: Is there trouble?

C: 但他们的领袖还算通情达理。我和那位奥列格，虽然在认知上有些分歧，但至少尊重彼此的想法。
E: But their leader seems like a reasonable individual. Oleg and I have our differences in understanding, but we respect each other's opinion.

C: 忘了加点「口才」。
E: I forgot to be more diplomatic.

C: …确实想象不出来。不过我更关心，你到底说了啥「粗鄙之语」？
E: ...No, I can't... But more importantly, what kind of "foul language" were you using?

C: 没有批评。
E: She didn't.

C: 听说你以前来自上层。
E: I heard you came from the Overworld.

C: 虽说你们的旅途远在天边，但我敢断言，咱们的道路总有一天会再交汇的。后会有期，「地火」的朋友！
E: While you still have a long journey ahead, I have no doubt our paths will cross again one day. Till we meet again, friends of Wildfire!

C: 喂，「怪物盔甲」！醒醒，给我醒醒！
E: Hey, Monster Armor! Wake up, wake up!

C: 拜这位匿名的好心人所赐，这里的小朋友们暂时什么都不缺了。
E: Thanks to this anonymous kind-hearted donor, the children here have more than enough things for the time being.

C: 你怎么一个人在这待着？
E: Why are you here alone?

C: 哎，我就不明白，「怪物盔甲」怎么会这么不经揍……
E: Hey, I don't understand, how could Monster Armor be beaten so easily...

C: 我也不知道…
E: I don't know...

C: 而且，「外来者」在下层区声名远扬——您要是肯赏脸参赛，那这拳馆指定是座无虚席！
E: Besides, the Outsider is well known in the Underworld. If you can grace us with your visit, then the tickets will be sold out for sure!

C: 大守护者这不还没放弃咱吗？
E: The supreme guardian hasn't abandoned us, isn't it?

C: 哈哈哈，分析得真是透彻！我算明白你为什么年纪轻轻就能当上戍卫官了！
E: Seems like you have a good handle on the situation. I see now why you made captain at such a young age, haha!

C: 所以，容我总结一下：戍卫官先生的意思是，铁卫想要借此机会拉拢「地火」，重新在下层区树立铁卫的正面形象…对吗？
E: So... you're also saying the Guards want to work with Wildfire and use our reputation to win back people's support, correct?

C: 裂界里的怪物…朝镇子上涌过来了…！
E: They're swarming toward the town!

C: 他也预料不到会有入侵事件吧…
E: Surely he couldn't have foreseen a monster invasion?

C: …前任大守护者的决断导致了长达十余年的封锁，也酿成了诸多悲剧。
E: The misjudgment of the former supreme guardian isolated the Underworld for more than a decade. With that isolation, came tragedy...

C: 尽管说吧，我一定帮忙。
E: Let's hear it. Always glad to help.

C: 不对，只是作者偷懒了。
E: No, the author is just being lazy.

C: 这一次多亏了{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}，大家都很感谢你。要是哪一天{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}有空了，也把你的冒险故事讲给我们听吧。
E: Thanks so much, {M#mister}{F#miss}. Everybody is super grateful. When you have the time, tell us all about your adventurous stories.

C: 我不懂你在说什么…
E: I have no idea what you're saying...

C: 修好它。
E: Fix it.

C: 你离开这座垃圾箱，将它抛之脑后，不再理睬。
E: You leave this dumpster and forget all about it.

C: <unbreak>20</unbreak>个。
E: <unbreak>20</unbreak>.

C: 漫长的十纪中，星际和平公司从未放弃将诸界重新连通的愿景。
E: For the entirety of the past ten Amber Eras, the Interastral Peace Corporation has never given up on our hope of reconnecting the worlds.

C: 再见。
E: Goodbye.

C: 对，对，内部事务——我完全赞同驭空司舵的意见。
E: I fully agree with you, Helm Master Yukong, this is indeed an internal affair.

C: 先是驭空对我们横加打压，再是将军出场谈笑风生，一下就让我们对他起了好感。
E: He wants us to trust him. He took advantage of Yukong's frosty reception to play the good guy.

C: 这是我的提议吧，将军。
E: Wasn't that my idea, general?

C: 将军难道以为我会输给那个「刃」不成？
E: Tsk, you think I'd lose to Blade?

C: 坐标？轨道交汇？
E: Coordinates? Converge?

C: 哎…仙舟可真是好久没出过这么大的乱子了……
E: *sigh* It's really been a long while since Xianzhou encountered something this serious...

C: 好啦，别拌嘴了。估计太卜司要准备挺长时间。我们先在附近走走吧。
E: Okay, enough chit-chat. I reckon the Divination Commission could be a while — let's take a look around.

C: 唉…恩公可从来没问过小女子天舶司是做什么的。真真人比人，气死人；司比司，没意思……
E: *sigh* You never asked what the Sky-Faring Commission does. I suppose not all commissions are created equal...

C: 听说太卜司的穹仪出了问题。
E: I heard there's a problem with the meridian pin.

C: 那是名唤「建木」的古树，「罗浮」仙舟曾引以为傲的宝物。
E: It's an ancient tree — we call it the Ambrosial Arbor. It was once the Xianzhou Luofu's prized treasure.

C: 便是长生种也难得一见
E: That is true even for long-life species

C: 出示玉符
E: Show the jade seal

C: 你可不要因为我是新兵就小瞧我哦～
E: Don't look down on me just because I'm a new recruit~

C: 请问，您有没有见过这位小姐姐路过？
E: Have you seen this lady?

C: 她在咱们这儿点了一杯「仙人快乐茶」就离开了。刚刚见她的时候，正在街边小吃摊那儿转悠呢。客官可以去那里找找。
E: She ordered a cup of Immortal's Delight and went on her way. I saw her checking out the food stalls over there, that might be a good place to start.

C: 干脆还是早点打烊吧。
E: Better shut the store early then.

C: 我还有很多事想问你…
E: I have a lot to ask you...

C: 我们会带你去见罗浮将军，既然你自认清白，不妨向他解释，他自会裁决。
E: We're taking you to see the general of the Luofu. You can profess your innocence all you like, but the general will decide your fate.

C: 「药王秘传」放弃百年潜伏，选择现在示身，说明其有必胜把握；然而准备再充分，终究是冲着云骑军而来。各位的能力与存在，「药王秘传」丝毫不知，也无法防备。
E: The Disciples of Sanctus Medicus renounced their century of secrecy and chose to reveal themselves, meaning they feel confident of victory... but no matter how well-prepared they may be, their focus has always been the Cloud Knights. They are completely unaware of your existence and capacity, and in short — cannot be prepared against you.

C: 几位恩公怕是都比我活得长些。
E: Even you benefactors have probably lived longer than me.

C: 战友堕入魔阴身应该怎么做，当云骑的心里都有数，不要忘记你受过的训练。
E: Every Cloud Knight knows what they must do if their comrades become mara-struck. Don't forget your training.

C: 短生种的寿命转眼即逝，何必自蹈死路？
E: The lives of short-life species are so fleetingly brief. Why seek death?

C: 丹鼎司中，战事暂止。
E: The fighting has stopped for the moment at the Alchemy Commission

C: 毗邻鳞渊境的洞天。
E: The delve bordering Scalegorge Waterscape.

C: 该是偿还代价的时候了！时候到了！！
E: *laughing in madness* It's time to pay the price! It's time!!!

C: 我不是他。
E: I'm not him.

C: 「药王秘传」？
E: Disciples of Sanctus Medicus?

C: 不，这些事情都与我无关了。
E: No. They have nothing to do with me anymore.

C: …我已说过——
E: ...I already told you—

C: （放弃）
E: (Give up)

C: 你带我来这儿，教你的族人知道，就麻烦大了。
E: If your people knew that you had brought me here, there would be great unrest.

C: 不知这周遭的壁画是否与封印有关？
E: Could the murals in our vicinity be related to the seals?

C: 我想邀请各位作为遍历此战的见证，参与天舶司为阵亡者所举行的「慰灵奠仪」。不知各位意下如何？
E: I'd like to invite all of you, as witnesses to this war, to a soul-soothing ceremony hosted by the Sky-Faring Commission. Will you consider?

C: 对了，我还没问过你，你想不想学呀？
E: Oh, I haven't asked you yet — are you interested in learning yourself?

C: （三月七还在收拾行李吗……）
E: (Is March 7th still packing her luggage...?)

C: 对不起。心仪的舞伴…我已经有人选了。
E: I'm sorry. The dance partner of my choice... I've already chosen.

C: 可以，可以。不过领航员小姐，我必须得指出——
E: Sounds good. But Ms. Navigator, I must point out that—

C: 往后我这趟匹诺康尼之旅，就得劳烦各位「开拓」朋友多多照顾了。希望我们——相处愉快。
E: Going forward on this Penacony trip, I'll be counting on all my "Trailblazer" friends here. Looking forward to a delightful time with you all.

C: 艾丽，稍安勿躁。
E: Alley, just a moment.

C: …说到这个，刚才遇见个女人，说是巡海游侠。我总觉得哪里不对劲，你去帮我探探她的底细……
E: ...Speaking of which, I ran into a woman just now who introduced herself as a Galaxy Ranger. The whole conversation felt off. Help me look into her...

C: （黄泉回去了…奇怪，总觉得刚才始终有种微妙的感觉……）
E: (Acheron left... Strange... I can't shake off this odd feeling I have...)

C: 呵呵，承蒙谬赞。我们对忆质的理解也只是浅尝辄止而已。
E: Thanks for the compliment. In fact, we don't really have an in-depth understanding of the memoria.

C: 这跟阿基维利有半点关系？
E: What do all these have to do with Akivili?

C: 等等等等——总计四十六起恶性事件！你是否承认，它们皆由你所为？
E: And that's not even half the list! There are a total of <unbreak>46</unbreak> cases of malicious conduct! Do you admit to being the culprit in every case?

C: …不，你不是帕。
E: ...No, you are not.

C: ——你是否认罪帕？
E: ...Do you plead guilty to this charge?

C: 我…我知道，受人恩惠就要付出回报！
E: I... I understand. It's only right to return the favors I receive!

C: 我观察你们好久了，流萤小姐固然了解匹诺康尼，但要论「大人的娱乐」…恐怕还是我桑博更胜一筹啊。
E: I've been watching you two for a long time. Miss Firefly does know Penacony well, but when it comes to "entertainment for grownups," I think I can do much better.

C: 算了吧。
E: Forget it.

C: 这可是「家族」的物什，哪能有猫腻呢？但你不想试也没问题，大不了我来——
E: This belongs to The Family. How can there be anything wrong with it? If you aren't up for it, I'll just do it myself...

C: 你在担心什么吗，流萤小姐？
E: Anything bothering you, Miss Firefly?

C: 你回来了，{NICKNAME}！没事吧？
E: You're back, {NICKNAME}! Are you alright?

C: 你想解释什么吗，桑博？
E: Do you have anything to say, Sampo?

C: …对不起。
E: ...I'm sorry.

C: 你也可以登上列车。
E: You can board the Astral Express, too.

C: 谢谢！「和哑巴交朋友」——我会铭记在心的！
E: Thanks! I'll keep your advice in mind!

C: 是石头老板干的，想不到吧？
E: It's Boss Stone's doing. Can you believe it?

C: 我可真是个大恶人。
E: Oh dear me, ain't I a big bad meanie for making you sob like a crybaby?

C: 你看，在这片梦想之地，一切都被允许，一切都有可能。不堪回首的过去像泡沫一样散去，不愿面对的明天永远也不会到来。
E: You see, everything is possible in this land of dreams. The nightmarish past will disperse and fade away like bubbles in water, and the future that you don't want to face will never come.

C: 谁？听都没听过。今天就是梦主本人来了，我也不会放你们进去。
E: Who? Never heard of him. I wouldn't let you in even if the Dreammaster were here.

C: 抱歉，这次要去的地方必须得坐弹球机…你先请，我会跟在你后面的。
E: Sorry, I'm afraid we need to take the pinball machine to reach this place... You go first, and I'll be right behind you.

C: 可即便如此，你也落后大部队了。事到如今还没发现么——家族在隐瞒的，这片「美梦」背后的秘密。
E: Even so, you are lagging far behind the main party. Have you not noticed yet? What The Family is hiding, the secret behind this sweet dream.

C: 哇，好漂亮……
E: Wow, it's beautiful...

C: 米哈伊尔…好像在哪听过……
E: Mikhail... Where have I heard this name...

C: 你赢得了我，还有其他桶的信任。希望此物可以表达我们对你的承认。
E: You've won me over, along with many others. This item carries our high regard for you.

C: 以及——想必你们已经听说萨姆的事了。好好期待一下吧，那家伙性格单纯，喜欢堂堂正正的胜负，一定与你们*合得来*。希望各位别被他的热情压垮！
E: Also, I take it you've already heard about Sam. You should look forward to the meeting. He's a straight shooter who values a fair fight. I think you'll *get along* with him just fine. Don't be overwhelmed by his enthusiasm!

C: 要不这样吧，我可以代你那位妹妹出席各种场合——你肯定也不想让人们知道…谐乐大典已经无法举办了吧？
E: How about this? I'll stand in for your dear sister at events — surely you don't want the world to hear the Charmony Festival's been called off?

C: 看来我们达成共识了——那就回去通知黑天鹅小姐吧。
E: Then we are in agreement. Let's return and inform Miss Black Swan.

C: 三月七，你在里面吗？
E: March, are you there?

C: 刚才，我捕捉到了一些非常熟悉的记忆，出现在这里的*老朋友*不仅有她，还有你们遇险时，现场的第三者……
E: I caught some very familiar memories just now — she's not the only *old friend* who has appeared here. There was also a third party at the scene when you ran into danger...

C: 小心，这些痕迹是刚留下的，那位不速之客还没走远。
E: Careful, these traces are fresh. Our unsought guest isn't far away.

C: 是不是要教我穿墙了？
E: Are you going to teach me to phase through walls now?

C: 很好，我就知道你一定会来。对了，那位忆者…算了，我不多问了。
E: Excellent, I knew you would come. By the way, about that Memokeeper... Never mind, I won't press the issue further.

C: 啊…似曾相识的走廊，似曾相识的房间。还记得吗？我们上次见面，就是在这地方。
E: Ah... a familiar hallway, a familiar room. Do you remember? The last time we met was right here.

C: 回见，朋友。我真的非常期待，能和各位一同揭开「死亡」的真相。
E: So long, friend. I really am looking forward to uncovering the truth about "Death" with everyone.

C: （发生了好多事…抓紧时间整理下思绪，等人到齐吧……）
E: (So much has happened... I should take a moment to gather my thoughts, and wait for everyone to arrive...)

C: 你的「剧本」中有任何关于我的部分吗？我想知道，在命运所见的未来中，<color=#ff3a3e>「我」</color>留下了怎样的注脚？
E: Is there anything else in your "script" about me? I'd like to know what kind of footnote <color=#ff3a3e>"I"</color> get to leave in that future foreseen by destiny?

C: …有了，尽管很朦胧，但这是阿弗利特的声音。另一位…是他的子嗣吧。
E: ...There it is — it's hazy, but it's Ifrit's voice. The other one... is probably his progeny.

C: 痛苦和贫穷是母神的考验，祂也赐给了我们机遇，那就是你的幸运，卡卡瓦夏。你的好运是我们…也是所有埃维金人最宝贵的财富。
E: Pain and poverty are the trials of Gaiathra Triclops. She has also granted us a chance, and that's your good luck, Kakavasha. Your good luck is the most precious wealth we — all Avgin have.

C: 当然。
E: Of course.

C: 博学的教授，感谢您的帮助。家族自会答谢义人。
E: Learned Doctor, I'm grateful for your help. The Family will surely reward a righteous person like you.

C: 黎明的时刻——我听说那里坐落着加工梦境基底的「早霞工厂」。
E: The Moment of Daybreak — I've heard that's where the "Dawn Factory," which processes the foundation of the Dreamscape, is located.

C: 哦？嗝…你要…把这个给我？没想到这地方，居然还有人想当好好先生……
E: Oh? You... you are giving... these gems to me? Didn't expect to meet such a generous soul in this place...

C: 这些宝石送给你。
E: Here, I got these gems for you.

C: 我想了想，倒也是…诸如在生日许愿时吹蜡烛会被噩梦的幽灵缠上这种事…从我们嘴里说出来确实不太专业了。
E: I thought about it, and she had a point... Reporting on stuff like blowing out birthday candles and getting spooked by nightmare ghosts... isn't exactly professional material.

C: 年纪大了，再不复健，怕是连当年吃饭的手艺都要忘咯。调饮用的原材料呢，你放哪儿了？
E: I'm getting up there in age, and I need some practice before I forget the skills that used to put food on my table. Where did you stash the ingredients?

C: …如你所见，我正在招待客人。别让我重复第二遍。
E: ...As you see, I'm entertaining my guests. Don't make me repeat myself.

C: 这张光锥…被严格保管起来了。他应该很在乎这份记忆。
E: This Light Cone... is securely guarded. It must hold some important memories.

C: 知更鸟的采访中曾提及，即便她登上过如此多华丽的舞台，她最珍视的演出还是小时候和哥哥过家家时一起办的演唱会。
E: According to Robin's interview, despite having performed on so many grand stages, her favorite performance was a pretend show she put on with her brother when they were just kids.

C: …罢了。既然二位带着善意前来，我也没有再下逐客令的理由。
E: ...Well, since you've come with goodwill, I have no reason to show you the door.

C: 没有律师敢为你辩护，或许你该试着替自己争取一下无罪声明？
E: No lawyer has the audacity to defend you, perhaps you ought to represent yourself?

C: 何必特意问我？
E: Why are you even asking me?
...Sure.

C: 我在这里还有一场…表演。
E: I still have... a show to do.

C: …「卡卡瓦夏」。
E: ...Kakavasha.

C: 如果把这些叶子带回去——会开出新的小花吗——
E: If these leaves could be brought back... Would they bloom into new flowers?

C: 这里好开心——我想一直待在这里——
E: It's so fun here... I want to stay here forever...

C: 你们好。对于我的出现，各位似乎并不意外。
E: Hello. None of you seem surprised by my arrival.

C: 那就事不宜迟，出发去影视乐园吧！
E: Let's waste no time and head to the theme park then!

C: 这家伙搞得也太夸张了吧，真把自己当大明星了？
E: That guy's really taking it to a whole new level. Does he really think he's a superstar or something?

C: 即便你希望如此…我也无法给出承诺。
E: Even if you wish for it... I can't promise you anything.

C: 那个已然从深海中生还，却无法再走到台前开口说话的人——我很高兴得知她依旧在匹诺康尼，并且平安无事。
E: Someone who survived the treacherous depths, but is unable to take the stage and speak the truth. I'm happy to know she's safe and sound, and still on Penacony.

C: 但不是现在。
E: But not now.

C: 不好意思了，毛茸茸的小家伙，我实在有些要紧事要办，不得不用这种方式请你们帮个小忙。
E: I'm sorry, fluffy. I really have something urgent to attend to, so I had no choice but to resort to asking this favor of you all.

C: …但那种事不会发生。就照你说的，我会离开。
E: ...But that won't come to pass. I'll do as you ask. I'll leave.

C: 放心，星期日先生正在追踪他的去向，预计很快会有结果。但事已至此，公司一定不会轻易罢休，所以梦境的秩序和稳定就要拜托你们了。
E: Don't worry. Mr. Sunday is currently tracking his whereabouts and he'll have something to show for it soon. However, given the situation, the IPC surely won't let this go easily. Therefore, we are relying on you Hounds to maintain the order and stability of the Dreamscape.

C: 这车有自动驾驶，我只是把手搭在方向盘上，行了吧？
E: This car has full self-driving capabilities. I'll just put my hand on the steering wheel. Will that do?

C: 我知道你有很多疑问…还记得我们在陌生的梦境里遭遇了「死亡」吗？那时我被迷因攥在手中……
E: I know you have many questions... Do you remember when we encountered "Death" in that strange Dreamscape? When I was caught by that meme...

C: 所以萨姆究竟是…
E: So, who exactly is Sam...

C: 两处梦境虽风格各异，建筑的样式却相差不大，很像是同一位设计师的作品。这种相似背后的联系也引人遐想……
E: Though both Dreamscapes have distinct styles, the architectural designs are quite similar — works of the same hand, perhaps. Hard not to speculate on the connection...

C: 你不与我们同行么？
E: Not coming with us?

C: 这点我可以打包票，先前告诉各位的故事全都是真的…呃，大部分吧，除了「家族重新接纳了我」那段。
E: Well, don't worry. Almost everything I shared was true... well, except for the part about "The Family accepting me back."

C: 姬子小姐，是你修复了列车，令其重新驶于银河？
E: Miss Himeko, were you the one who repaired the Express and got it sailing through the cosmos again?

C: 果然…「钟表匠」就是第三位无名客，连我都猜到了。
E: Sure enough... the Watchmaker is the third Nameless. Even I could guess that one.

C: 为了米哈伊尔，也为了匹诺康尼的未来。
E: It's for Mikhail, and for the future of Penacony.

C: 去吧，那翅膀头小子肯定知道答案。
E: Go ahead. I'm sure Mr. Wings holds all the answers.

C: 你的内心是否对此痛悔，定心改过？
E: Do you sincerely repent and vow to change your ways?

C: 那是鸢尾花家主的私人请求，与我们无关。退下，别再给谐乐大典添乱了。
E: That was a personal request from the head of the Iris Family, and it has nothing to do with us. Step aside and stop causing trouble for the Charmony Festival.

C: 「梦想之地」匹诺康尼…你们兄妹二人想要的乐园就长这副模样吗？
E: Penacony, the Land of the Dreams... is this truly the paradise you desire?

C: 如果人们不为未来而活，难道就只是为活而活吗？如果哥哥认为「同谐」也无法挽救弱者的困境，那又有哪位星神能实现我们的理想？
E: But if people don't live for the future, do they merely exist for survival? If even you, my brother, don't believe that the Harmony will save the weak, then which Aeon can make our dreams come true?

C: 两位方才口中的「神」，当真是那位{RUBY_B#同谐}希佩{RUBY_E#}么？
E: The "God" you both mentioned... are THEY truly {RUBY_B#The Harmony}Xipe{RUBY_E#}?

C: …他是我的同伴。他登上列车前，我们就回复了家族的邀请函。所以系统里应该没有他的记录，有没有办法通融一下？
E: ...He's my fellow Trailblazer. We responded to The Family's invitation before he boarded the Express, so he wasn't registered in your system. Is it possible to accommodate him as well?

C: 您好，我是酒店的安保负责人，猎犬家系的科蒂。有什么需要帮忙的吗？
E: Greetings, I'm Coty of the Bloodhound Family, Head of Security for the hotel. How may I assist you?

C: …啊？阿斯德纳白橡木？可你刚才不是说……
E: ...Huh? Asdana's White Oak? But didn't you just say...

C: 喝下这瓶苏乐达™，快乐美梦速速达！
E: Grab a bottle of SoulGlad™, and make your dreams a blast!

C: 如果还能再见面…请一定要来列车上坐坐。
E: Should we ever cross paths again, I'd love for you to visit the Express.

C: 多年以后，你们在繁华的匹诺康尼再次相见，却不敢相认。也许这就是每一位逐梦客都可能留下的遗憾吧。
E: In the years that followed, you encountered each other once more on the prosperous streets of Penacony, but dared not call out to one another. Perhaps akin to the lingering regret of every Dreamchaser.

C: 「时间」的试炼…希望不会浪费我们太多时间。
E: The trial of Time... I hope it won't waste too much of our time.

C: 竟然真的有一支火箭筒。
E: He wasn't lying. There's actually a bazooka here.

C: 「纯美」荣光在上，没想到我们竟再次见面了。二位温暖的面庞在这燥动的时刻仿若春风，照拂着我热砂般的心！
E: By the glorious light of Beauty! I never thought I would see you again. In such turbulent times, your kind faces are as spring's gentle breeze, bringing solace to my scorched heart!

C: 听哪！玫瑰色的「纯美」已让各位哑口无言——多么荣幸！
E: Hear ye! The rosy glow of the Beauty has rendered you speechless — what an honor!

C: 我们必须封印匹诺康尼的星核。
E: We need to seal the Stellaron on Penacony.

C: 聪明，孩子。你的思想和那位先生一样灵敏。
E: Smart kid. You're just as sharp as the other one.

C: 在来之不易的休息日里，人们得以从生活的重压中解脱，回归灵魂的平静。
E: During these hard-earned rest days, people are given the chance to extricate themselves from the stresses of everyday life, allowing a certain tranquility to return to their souls.

C: 不久前……
E: Not long ago...

C: 唔，我想…可能是这边？
E: Hmm... I guess... maybe this way?

C: 既然你对这里有印象，我们就再去几个房间，看看能不能想起更多，好不好？
E: Since this place seems familiar to you, why don't we explore a few more rooms and see if you can recall anything more?

C: 就像钟表小子一样，你见过任何列车组以外的人，和米沙产生过互动吗？
E: Have you ever seen anyone outside of the Crew interact with Misha?

C: 我出生在普热斯米尔星系的露莎卡星，是航海家米哈伊尔先生和夏尔太太的养子。两位老人给了我一件宝物，一个承载了他们希望寄语的名字——
E: I was born on Lushaka in the Przesmir system, adopted by seafarers Mikhail and Char. They gave me a treasure, a name that carried their hopes...

C: 是啊，我是这么说过……
E: Yeah, that's what I said...

C: 我…可能不走了。我准备留在阿斯德纳，和拉扎莉娜跟铁尔南一起。
E: I... I'm staying in Asdana, with Razalina and Tiernan.

C: 他说，我们的世界就像那座喷泉一样，不知从什么时候开始，海水正在一点一点淹没人们生活的地方。
E: He described our world as a fountain. At some point, the sea started to gradually swallow up the land where people lived.

C: 是银狼告诉我的。我只是遗憾它们不在我的剧本里。
E: Silver Wolf told me about it. It's such a shame that it's not part of my script.

C: 害怕？我很难从你身上感受到这种情绪。你怕什么？
E: Afraid? I rarely sense that emotion from you. What do you fear?

C: 「苜蓿草的家主意图投靠公司，用自由换取生存，却被长子大义灭亲，而后者接任了家主之席。」
E: "The leader of the Alfalfa Family sought to defect to the IPC, trading freedom for survival. However, his eldest son slew him in the name of righteousness and ascended as the new family head."

C: 这戏剧对我来说有点太文艺了，最好懂的反而是打架的部分…不过可算是到出口了，我们快走吧！
E: Ah, this show is a bit too literary for my taste, but the battle part is quite easy to understand... Anyway, we've arrived at the exit. Let's go!

C: 这还要卖关子？
E: Come on, don't keep me in suspense.

C: 好可疑…
E: IDK man you're looking kinda sus...

C: 答案很简单：因为他正是那与一切已知信息相悖的<color=#dbc291ff>致命破绽</color>。而这也意味着，对这段记忆深信不疑的你……
E: The answer is simple — He is <color=#dbc291ff>the one fatal flaw</color> that contradicts all our known information. This means that you, who wholeheartedly believe in this memory...

C: 黑天鹅
E: Black Swan

C: 这一切都是一场梦？
E: All of this is just a dream?

C: 前往最后的舞台。
E: Let's embark on the final stage.

C: 如果人们不愿醒来呢？
E: What if folks don't wanna wake up?

C: 能见识你隐藏的实力了吗？
E: Will I get to witness your hidden power?

C: 雨…要开始变大了。在分别前，容我最后提出几个问题吧。
E: The rain... is intensifying. Before we part ways, please allow me to ask a few final questions.

C: 暂时没有什么办法能动摇他们沉睡的原因，哪怕是你的「钟表把戏」也不行。
E: We have no means to wake them up now. Not even your clockwork will do the trick.

C: 怎么会这样？
E: How could this be?

C: 还有别的事要做。
E: I've got something else to do.

C: 喂？
E: Hello?

C: 工作时间到了。打起精神，去见见那位身居高位的「配角」吧。
E: Time to get to work. Let's prepare ourselves and meet that esteemed "supporting actor."

C: …自主上市？
E: ...Going public?

C: 匹诺康尼会变成怎么样？
E: What will happen to Penacony?

C: 老奥帝同意了，这一关就算是过去了吧？那剩下几位家主……
E: Old Oti is in agreement, so the issue is settled, I presume. What about the remaining family heads...?

C: 果然，什么「通过抵押便能实现愿望的典当行」…只是故弄玄虚。
E: Okay, "A pawnshop that grants wishes"... I see. It's just a marketing gimmick.

C: 格拉默铁骑的孑遗——「AR<unbreak>-26710</unbreak>」？
E: AR<unbreak>-26710</unbreak>, a remnant of Glamoth's Iron Cavalry?

C: 我是否可以理解为，这是「钻石」瞒着公司，向星核猎手递出的一张邀请函？
E: Can I see this as an invitation from Diamond to the Stellaron Hunters while keeping the IPC in the dark?

C: 还没说到咱们呢…
E: We haven't even been mentioned yet...

C: 炸弹还能扮演？
E: Bombs are playable characters now?

C: 你明明是个垃圾桶。
E: You're obviously just a trash can.

C: 还记得吗？剧本上说过我会在梦想之地经历三次「死亡」。
E: Do you still remember? The script said that I will experience "death" three times in the Land of Dreams.

C: 我们的故事总有一天也会过去
E: One day, our stories will also be a part of the past.

C: 那现在，我们心里的这种「遗憾」…又是什么呢？
E: Then, what is this regret we feel in our hearts right now...?

C: 那里潜藏着名为「第Ⅸ机关」的秘密。终有一日，我会抵达它的所在。
E: In there lurks a secret called "Device IX"... One day, I'll reach it.

C: 我可能也见过…和你相似的人。
E: I think I might've seen... someone like you.

C: 这么说来，记得你在故乡也有过一段任教经历，想起什么有趣的事了吗？
E: Now that you mention it, I recall that you had a teaching stint back home. Any delightful stories that come to mind?

C: 瞧你紧张的，上个学而已，能坏到哪去？
E: Ooh, is someone having a case of nerves? We're just going to school. How bad can it be?

C: 初次见面，在下——缭乱忍侠•AKA乱破是也。
E: Greetings, I am the Dazzling Ninja, AKA Rappa.

C: 就是它们！
E: That's them!

C: 这什么东西啊！
E: What is that!?

C: {NICKNAME}同学，欢迎来到「试镜会」。
E: {NICKNAME}, welcome to the audition.

C: 经过了短暂的烘烤，你设计的香蕉派出炉了。
E: After a brief bake, your banana pie is ready.

C: 你被三月七摁在桌上，她将剩下的香蕉派狠狠塞入你的口中。
E: You are pinned to the table by March 7th as she forcefully stuffs the remaining banana pie into your mouth.

C: 你认识我们？
E: You know us?

C: 他香蕉的？我他香蕉的怎么开始他香蕉的了？
E: Bet your bananas? When the bananas did I start saying fudgin' bananas?

C: 你从来没觉得文字这么陌生过，就连联觉信标也没法帮你翻译里面的胡言乱语。如果这不是谜语人的手笔，那它的撰写者怕是有什么大病。
E: You have never found words to be so foreign as they are now. Even the synesthesia beacon can't help you translate this gibberish. If it weren't a work of the Riddlers, one would wonder whether the writer was irredeemably mentally disturbed.

C: 别遗憾，相信未来你也能拥有自己的小群体。
E: Don't be disappointed. Believe that you will be able to have your own little group in the future, too.

C: 弟子在。
E: Yes, Master.

C: 我不知道，忍徒。
E: I do not know, my disciple.

C: 你可以画任何东西，诠释你心中所想的画卷。这是属于你自己的忍法。
E: You may paint anything that you wish. This is your own ninjutsu.

C: 这定会是一幅能让折纸大学改头换面的大作，为了自己的青春不留下遗憾，你要好好构思这幅画的内容。
E: This will be a masterpiece that transforms Paperfold University. To ensure you have no regrets about your youth, you must carefully plan the content of this painting.

C: 可惜，这只不懂艺术的大头猴子打断了你的遐想。但他提醒了你一件事：时间永远是创作最可贵的资源。
E: Unfortunately, this clueless monkey interrupted your daydream. But he did remind you of one thing: Time is always the most precious resource in creation.

C: 你想起了过去在沙滩上度假的时光，海浪的声音覆盖了耳边的嘈杂声，沙鸥在头顶盘旋，阳光洒在你的身上，身旁那位熟悉的伙伴向你递来一杯椰汁……
E: You reminisce about past beach vacations: the sound of the waves drowning out the noise, seagulls circling overhead, sunlight warming your skin, and a familiar friend handing you a coconut drink...

C: 异乡人呐…谢谢你的画作，贯彻自己认为正确的事，才是桶的骄傲。
E: Outlander, I'm grateful for the artwork. True dignity lies in staying faithful to what you believe is right.

C: 原来要收手的吗？
E: We were supposed to hold back?

C: …确实不能放着学生们的安危不管。
E: ...Indeed, we must not leave the students to fend for themselves.

C: 呜呜…谢谢你的鼓励，我会努力的！再让我刷几遍教学视频……
E: Thanks for encouraging me! I—I will keep at it! I should watch the tutorial a few more times...

C: 再等等吧…
E: Wait a moment...

C: 同学，这世上没有那么多机会。
E: Second chances don't come around that often, girl.

C: 这里只有我，一位「二等研究猿」，来匹诺康尼完成自己的毕业课题：基于「模因」的返祖实验。
E: Here, it's just me. A second class research ape working in Penacony on my graduation thesis: An atavistic experiment centered around memetic entities.

C: 这一统治寰宇的物种在短短几个月内便消亡了。
E: The same banana species that reigned over all the others of its kind was scrubbed clean from the entire cosmos in just mere months.

C: 不出三个系统时，你也会和这群学生一样变成睡蕉小猴。不想自己的导演生涯就此结束，就乖乖把他们交出来。
E: If you don't acquiesce, then in less than three system hours, you'll turn into a Slumbernana Monkey like those students. Hand them over now if your directing career even means anything to you.

C: 唔，倒也有个主意。总之你先别急，咱们再去会会蒙塔娜——记得要温柔点啊。
E: Hmm, I do have an idea... sort of. Just hold your horses. Let's go back and meet Montana first. Remember — be nice!

C: 是啊，我都有那么几次被通缉…不对，十几次？算了。
E: Yeah, I was wanted on a few occasions too... Ehe, maybe a dozen times? Never mind, that's not important now.

C: CUT——
E: CUT—!

C: 不错。丹恒演员不但擅长表演，还深谙传播学的道理。
E: I'm impressed. It seems Dan Heng is not only a skilled actor, but also has profound knowledge on communication theory.

C: 阁下所言不错。在下曾落入御猿屋手中，深受邪忍妖术之苦，又历经千生万劫破除邪法，终于逃得生天。
E: What you said is right. I once fell into the clutches of Osaru's domain, when sorcery ninjutsu was inflicted upon me. I had to undergo endless tribulations to break the fiendish spells. Only then did I manage to escape.

C: 喂，你身上的模因病毒比匹诺康尼这个月的烂片还多，再去外面招惹小猴可真要杀青了——
E: Hey. You have more memetic viruses on you than the number of trashy Penaconian films released this month. If you wander outside and provoke those monkeys again, you're really going to be done for!

C: 逃离此处
E: Flee.

C: 拒绝战斗
E: Refuse to fight.

C: 劝你小心点，别给她灌输没用的知识。「智识」的坐标系只有一条横轴，除此以外都是进步的阻碍。
E: You'd better be careful not to go overboard with giving her such useless information. There's only one horizontal axis on Erudition's coordinate system. Everything else is an impediment to progress.

C: 今日我赐你「缭乱•忍者」之名，你将成为我等讨伐邪忍的尖兵，引领忍之都砥砺前行。
E: I hereby bestow upon you the title of Dazzling Ninja, entrusting you to be my weapon to defeat the evil ninja and guide the Ninja Capital into the future.

C: 邪祟•总长罪孽深重，必当以严刑相待，但并非是要其忏悔，而是为了——
E: The Fiendling Chief is guilty of multiple sins and deserves punishment. However, repentance is not what we seek, instead...

C: 那不是蒙塔娜和其他同学们吗？他们也回来了！
E: Isn't that Montana and the other classmates? They're back!

C: 别再把时间浪费在没用的试题上了，马上就要交卷了……
E: Stop wasting your time on useless questions, it's almost time to hand in your papers...

C: 小猴的数量实在太多了，最好尽量解决掉它们。
E: There are too many monkeys. It's best that we try to eliminate them.

C: 领衔主演
E: Lead Actors

C: 你这窃贼，别想逃！
E: You little thief! You're not getting away!

C: 愿那战士安然无恙。若做好准备，我便代缇宁为各位主持仪式了。
E: May that warrior be safe from harm. When you are ready, I will preside over the ritual on Trinnon's behalf.

C: 又见面了，小蓝人！
E: Hello! We meet again, Bluey!

C: 随你怎么说，下贱的奥赫玛人……
E: Say whatever you like, despicable Okheman...

C: 你要不还是一枪钉死我吧…
E: Ugh. Forget it. Just kill me, alright?

C: 缇宝紧随着生气的缇安离开了……
E: Tribbie leaves after Trianne, who is fuming...

C: 我理解，尽管出价吧。
E: I understand. Feel free to name your price.

C: 好贵重，拿着的手微微颤抖…
E: My hand is trembling under the weight of this gift...

C: 嗯？您是……
E: Hmm? You are...?

C: 嗯！缇安答应过缇宝，不到万不得已，不会开门！
E: Mm-hmm! Trianne promised Tribbie that we wouldn't open the gate unless we had no other choice!

C: …但愿吧。
E: I pray for their safety, too.

C: 听起来是号大人物。
E: He sounds like a big shot.

C: 这就是我要说的第二件事了：不到万不得已，千万不要「开门」。你的身体状况并不乐观。
E: That's the other thing I wish to mention: Do not open the Gate unless you have no other choice, Lady Trianne. Your body is... not in good shape at the moment.

C: 也是…路上看看他还有没有为我们留下类似的指引吧。
E: Right... Let's see whether he left any similar directions for us along the way.

C: 空气怎么可能说话啦。人家觉得，肯定是有什么超自然的存在在捣鬼……
E: How can the air possibly speak! I think that something supernatural must be at play here...

C: 我做不到…
