E: I can't do it...

C: 那么，你双手平推，掌心抵在看似刮板、实为轿底的沉重石板下，猛地一推——
E: With both hands, you press against the heavy stone slab, resembling a scraper but actually the bottom of a sedan, and with a sudden push—

C: 接下来，小女神，请汝再演绎一遍那个吧。
E: Now, can our little goddess perform that again?

C: 不过是…呵，泰坦与人子们陈旧的约定罢了。
E: Heh, it's just... an ancient promise between the Titan and humans.

C: 即便是翁法罗斯本土神话，也不外乎「心诚则灵」四个字。只要你能展现出诚意，蝴蝶便绝不会无动于衷……
E: Even in the native myths of Amphoreus, it all boils down to "sincerity brings miracles." Show genuine intent, and the butterfly will surely respond...

C: 别担心，小敌。这种情况也不是第一次啦，很久以前……
E: Don't worry, De. This isn't the first time he's been like this. A long time ago—

C: 就在…这里出去，拐几个弯…反正就在浴场附近！
E: It's... Um, just take a few turns after you go out from here... It's close to the baths!

C: 不行，和平时一样模糊。但敌人的气息消失了，也许{M#他们}{F#她们}转移到了安全的地方吧…大概。
E: No. It's fuzzy like always, but the enemy's aura has disappeared. Maybe... they've moved to a safe place...?

C: 这次——就比比谁能在*超高温*浴池里坚持更久！
E: This time... We'll see who can stay in the super hot bath for longer!

C: 首先，悬锋人的字典里没有「恐惧」二字。
E: There is no word for "fear" in the Kremnoan language.

C: 先是帕狄卡斯，他死在第二个{RUBY_B#四月}耕耘月{RUBY_E#}，被拉冬人的毒箭射中腹部。他的药方能救所有人，唯独没救下自己。
E: Perdikkas was the first to go. He was shot in the stomach by a poisonous arrow from the people of Ladon in the second {RUBY_B#Fourth Month}Month of Cultivation{RUBY_E#}. In the end, his remedies mended all but himself.

C: 这是…？
E: What's this...?

C: 男人、女人、长者、孩童…悬锋人对归乡的渴望深入心髓，他们一直在等待这天，企盼王者的归来。
E: Be they men, women, the elderly, or children... the hearts of all Kremnoans yearn for home. They've all been waiting for this day, for the day their king returns.

C: 哼，流言传得真快啊。
E: Hmph. Rumors sure travel fast.

C: 那{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}和{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}呢？它们的火种也还没归位……
E: What about {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} and {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#}? Their Coreflames are yet to be restored...

C: 也不过…沉没一座王朝而已。
E: I am but sending a dynasty to its end.

C: 阿雅，还是不要苛责小白了…奥赫玛的处境，非常危险。
E: Agy, there's no need to scold Snowy... Okhema is currently in grave danger.

C: 我有一颗星核，能冒充火种吗？
E: I have a Stellaron. Can we pass it off as a Coreflame?

C: 分别前，再多说几句吧。
E: Let's have a chat before we go our separate ways.

C: 万敌阁下！
E: Lord Mydei!

C: 我的表情管理就这么差劲？
E: Am I really that terrible at controlling my facial expressions?

C: …是啊。到头来，我依旧没能弄清那黑袍剑士的来历，甚至连它的死亡都无法确信。
E: ...Indeed. In the end, I still haven't unraveled the mystery behind that black-robed swordmaster, and I can't even ascertain their demise.

C: 加快脚步吧，战场就在前方。
E: Let's hurry. The battlefield is just ahead.

C: 吾师，没关系么？
E: Teacher, are you sure about this?

C: 周围这些人，应该只是平民，不是敌人吧？
E: All these people... They're just civilians, not enemies, correct?

C: {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>只有一人能活到最后，见证「再创世」</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>众人将与一人离别，惟其人将觐见奇迹——</color>{RUBY_E#}
E: {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>Only one shall live till the end, and they alone will witness Era Nova</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>All shall bid farewell to one, and that person alone will witness the miracle —</color>{RUBY_E#}

C: 但*我们*对于她意味着什么…这个问题的答案，就在这段记忆的尽头。
E: But what did we truly mean to her? You'll find that answer at the end of this memory.

C: 别心急，泰坦……
E: Be patient, Titan...

C: 请保持距离。
E: Please stay clear.

C: 异邦人的王也不过如此…
E: So much for the king of those outlanders...

C: 看来，优渥的生活总会磨平大人物逐梦的锐气，而小角色就不同了。孩子，请向我重复一遍你打算向圣杯许下的愿望。
E: Seems like living in luxury has dulled the ambitions of the so-called elite. But underdogs like you? You're a whole different story. Now, remind me again. What wish would you make to the Grail?

C: 翡翠女士，你该不会真的在琢磨这个老头子玩什么把戏吧？
E: Madam Jade, don't tell me you're actually trying to figure out what kind of game this old man is playing?

C: 孩子，你这是默认这位牛仔会打赢圣杯战争？这么灭自己威风可不好啊。
E: Kid, you're basically admitting you think that cowboy's going to win the whole thing. Where's your confidence? You gotta keep your head in the game.

C: 你饿了？
E: You hungry?

C: 说到份量，你要是不挑口味…
E: Well, if you're not picky about the food...

C: 哟！库丘林，被人家打回来了？
E: Oh! Cú Chulainn! Things didn't go your way, huh?

C: 我本以为「英灵」的模样会…显得更特别？
E: I thought a Heroic Spirit would look... I don't know, more special?

C: 知更鸟小姐，很遗憾让您失望了。我只是活跃在逐梦时代的一位过时的艺人，在娱乐业高速的新陈代谢中枯萎凋零的一块死皮。
E: Miss Robin, I'm sorry if this isn't what you were hoping for. I'm just a faded star from the Age of Dreaming, a piece of dead skin in an industry that sheds its past without a second thought.

C: 让我想想…
E: Give me a minute...

C: 波提欧不会有事的！
E: Boothill will be fine!

C: 还有<unbreak>899</unbreak>个需要进行预约的会议，在把事情搞砸前，最好快一点完成它们。
E: You've still got <unbreak>899</unbreak> more meetings to schedule. You'd better hurry up and finish before things spiral out of control.

C: （好累，感觉已经没法思考了。）
E: (I'm exhausted... I feel like I can't even think anymore.)

C: 御主，我向这把剑起誓，会保护你的安全。
E: Master, I swear on this sword that I will protect you, no matter the cost.

C: 我从一开始就说得明明白白。谐乐大典草草落幕，而匹诺康尼需要全新的经济增长点，我们得打造一个足够引人注目的商业项目！
E: I've been very clear about this from the start. The Charmony Festival met a hasty wrap, and Penacony needs a fresh economic boost. We need to create a business venture that will grab everyone's attention!

C: 从者们没有人权吗？
E: Do Servants have no rights?

C: 不过，我更好奇的倒是您，所费不赀，却铺陈出这么大一出闹剧，就不怕像葛瑞迪那般落得个不体面的下场？
E: But now I'm more curious about you, sir. You've spent so much money, only to create such an unsightly mess. Aren't you worried you'll end up in disgrace like Grady?

C: 作为Rider，他曾亲手创作了一条永不沉没的小船，名唤「罗盘号」。作为Rider，他曾是个搭乘列车遨游星间的无名客。
E: As a Rider, he once built an unsinkable little ship named The Compass. As a Rider, he was once a Nameless who rode the stars aboard an interstellar Express.

C: 曾经的敌人，未必不能是现在的朋友啊。我说的对吧，牛仔？
E: Past enemies can still become present-day allies. Am I right, cowboy?

C: 瞧，这里有一行台词。
E: Look, there are subtitles here.

C: 英雄所见略同。
E: Great minds think alike.

C: 明明是我先来的，为什么你能操纵我的使魔？
E: I was here first! How are you controlling my familiars!?

C: 下一把，下一把我绝对能赢回来！
E: Next round! I'll definitely win the next round!

C: 你们先走吧，等我结束最后一局就会赶上的。
E: You go on ahead, I'll join you after I wrap up this last game.

C: 我已经麻木了。
E: This doesn't even faze me no more.

C: 作为演员，我也是你宝具的一部分！既然如此，曾是主演的我，自然也能动用你第二宝具的力量！
E: As an actor, I am part of your Noble Phantasm, too! As such, being the former protagonist, I can naturally use your second Noble Phantasm's power!

C: 与我联手，一下子便能将这些对手排除在外。这个道理，最精通投资的战略投资部高管，想必能做出合格的回答。我说的对吗，砂金先生？
E: If we join forces, we could sweep the rest of these opponents off the board in an instant. Surely, a senior executive of the Strategic Investment Department who understands investments better than anyone would make the right choice. Wouldn't you agree, Mr. Aventurine?

C: 因为，真正的怪物诞生自片场之外，也即——导演的镜头。
E: It's because the true monster is born beyond the set. The director's lens... is the real cradle of terrors.

C: 另外，就当是为粉丝提供一点额外的服务吧，在我个人看来，奥帝先生找上各位的原因很简单——单纯是收视率会比较高。
E: And you, my fan... this little behind-the-scenes is just for you. I believe the reason Mr. Oti reached out to you all is simple — You'll bring in higher ratings for this show.

C: （前面那个是…音符小姐？）
E: (That person up ahead... is that Miss Note?)

C: 要不怎么是艾普瑟隆的大明星呢？
E: That's why it's Epsilon's superstar!

C: 触犯了会怎样？
E: What happens if you violate the prohibitions?

C: 嗯？
E: Huh?

C: 显然，这里有许多停云。
E: Apparently, there are many Tingyuns here with us.

C: …你有什么头绪？
E: ...What's your take on this?

C: 我…又是谁？
E: And... who am I?

C: 「没有必要，那太危险，你也做不到。」
E: "There's no need for that. It's too dangerous, and you can't do it anyway."

C: 除却那位将军或许喜欢……
E: Aside from the fact that the general might like it...

C: 都说此物能窥人深梦……
E: They say this item can peer into dreams...

C: 如今联盟有列位相助，胜过五十支奇兵，再送就边际效应啦。
E: Now that the Alliance has all of you there to help them, sending any elite fighters more would just be overkill.

C: 每每想到这里，便会感到些许落寞，仿佛小女子的人生被切走了一部分，偏偏自己还被排除在外。
E: That thought has filled me with sorrow, as if a piece of my life had been stolen away, and I had no part in it.

C: 不是。
E: No.

C: 对啦，提及梦境，我也有一份薄礼想赠予恩公。
E: Oh, speaking of dreamscapes, I have a gift for you, my benefactors.

C: 看看停云赠予的梦。
E: Look at the dream gifted by Tingyun.

C: 其实我反复设想过现在的情景。
E: I've imagined this moment many times.

C: 幻胧处事心狠手辣，可最该被除掉的我却活了下来，阮•梅大人与仙舟素无干系，又为何要对小女子出手相救？
E: Despite Phantylia's ruthlessness, she spared me when I should have been eliminated. And why did Miss Ruan Mei, who has no ties to the Xianzhou, go out of her way to save me?

C: 但多年以后，当我成为橡木家主再临此地，才知道那道光芒的背后是「星核」。
E: When I returned here many years later as the head of the Oak Family, I finally learned that the light was actually a Stellaron.

C: 其实你压根没做好准备，对吧？
E: You're not ready at all, are you?

C: 回应我们的不会是神明，而是属于明天的自己。
E: It's not the Gods who answer us, but ourselves from the future.

C: 但如果你不支持，就不会带他回来。
E: But if you didn't support this idea, you wouldn't have brought him back.

C: 没什么好说的。
E: I don't have anything to say.

C: 都说洗白弱三分，应该没问题吧！
E: Well, you did get nerfed after turning into a good guy... So, I guess I'm okay, too!

C: 那的确意料之外，还是算了吧。
E: That's unexpected, alright... but let's not do that.

C: 嗯，想来是个大工程，这次我会一起下车。
E: Mhm, I suppose there's a lot to do. I'll disembark with all of you this time.

C: 踏上远行的人，需要的只是「出发」而已。
E: Those who embark on a long journey simply need to "set off."

C: 你是否听过这么一种说法：「忆者穿行诸界，只为搜集一切珍贵的记忆」。
E: "Memokeepers traverse the worlds only to collect precious memories." Have you heard that before?

C: 书接上回，足以改写银河历史的天才传奇就从这里开……
E: Alright, so continuing from where we left off last time, this is where everything would begin for the genius smart enough to rewrite the history of the entire cos—

C: 那道门没锁。
E: The door wasn't locked.

C: 果然失败了…这下只能靠你我了。
E: I guessed as much... It's no longer working. Looks like it's just the two of us out here now.

C: 我是{NICKNAME}。
E: I'm {NICKNAME}.

C: 不明白你在说什么……
E: No idea what you're saying...

C: 诺杜斯先生，维尔图斯说的没错呀，你们在这儿可危险了，还是跟*我们*一起回奥赫玛吧。
E: Mr. Noldus, Virtus was right. It's too dangerous for all of you to be here. Please come back to Okhema with us.

C: 抱歉，可能我不是特别擅长讲故事吧。
E: I'm sorry. I guess I'm not good at telling stories.

C: 忘说了，千万别碰白色的石脊。「大地」泰坦赐福它们的时候，把坏脾气全都塞进这些硬块里了。
E: I forgot to mention. Don't touch their white stone humps. When the Earth Titan blessed these creatures, it's said they also stuffed their ill tempers into these humps.

C: 话又说回来，既然你压根没把那边两位当作「市民」……
E: Speaking of which, since you've never considered the pair over there to be "citizens"...

C: 现在不是冒险的时候。也许你该遵从她的建议，保持安全距离。
E: Now isn't the time to take risks. Maybe you should have followed her advice and kept a safe distance.

C: 血污的气息…你是，{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}灰黯之手{RUBY_E#}的指侍？
E: The scent of blood... Are you an attendant of the {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Hand of Shadow{RUBY_E#}?

C: 真是一环扣一环啊。
E: What an intricate plan indeed.

C: 这不是强迫，但…人们沐浴水中，本就是为了「坦诚相见」。你愿意相信我吗？
E: I won't force you, but... people hope to regard one another with bare honesty when they enter a bath. Are you willing to trust me?

C: 就是这样，很不错。补上迟来的自我介绍吧，我是「金织」阿格莱雅，奥赫玛的改衣师，翁法罗斯的「黄金裔」之一。承蒙同袍信任，我暂时主持着黄金裔的行动。
E: Yes, you're doing great. Alright, it's about time I formally introduce myself: I am Aglaea the Goldweaver, dressmaster of Okhema and one of the Chrysos Heirs of Amphoreus. The trust placed in me is how I came to lead the Chrysos Heirs in our mission today.

C: （努力憋住嘲笑）
E: (Try hard to hold back your laughter)

C: 好险。有种不好的预感。
E: That was close, but I have a bad feeling about this.

C: …先照她说的做吧。
E: ...Let's just do as she says.

C: 粉霞天女、辩论场……
E: Rosy Celestial Maiden, forum...

C: 消息很灵通嘛，连万帷网都知道了？年轻人就是有活力！不过今天忙成这样，*我们*哪有空啊。
E: Wow, you guys are well-informed. You even know about the World Wound Web? Young people sure are full of energy! But it's been such a busy day, where would we find the time to surf the web?

C: 它并非寻常的盥洗盆，而是黄金裔持有的祭仪器皿，现在由我赠予二位。
E: It's not your average washbasin. This ceremonial vessel belonged to the Chrysos Heirs and is now my gift to the both of you.

C: 你果然已经知道了…但我们是为了救人。
E: So, you are indeed aware of our transgression... However, we only did so to save a life.

C: 讨伐尼卡多利的计划是？
E: How do you plan to fight Nikador?

C: 在这种事上，我更信任你的判断。
E: I trust your judgment more on matters like this.

C: 早些时候，你们对我的苦衷施以理解，现在该我做一样的事了。
E: You showed empathy toward my struggle earlier, and now it's my turn to return that kindness.

C: 抱歉，希望你们…能原谅我先前的行为。
E: I'm sorry. I hope... you can forgive me for my actions earlier.

C: …声音？谁？那个？哪个？
E: ...Sound? Who? That? Which?

C: 从某种意义上说，混乱才是梦的本质。
E: In a way, chaos is the nature of dreams.

C: 但我不能将诸位的性命尽数押在一场战役上。
E: Yet, I cannot jeopardize all of your lives in one single battle.

C: {NICKNAME}擅长使用多种武器，那把炎枪不止一次化解了敌人的攻势。而我和万敌都更擅长进攻，如果仅从作战角度考虑……
E: {NICKNAME} excels in wielding a range of weapons, and {M#his}{F#her} flaming lance has quelled the enemy's advances multiple times. Mydei and I are both better at offense, so from a tactical standpoint...

C: 还得再做做心理准备…
E: I still need a moment to mentally prepare...

C: 抱歉啦，缇安老师。事关重大，再给我们多点耐心吧。
E: I'm sorry, Trianne. This is a matter of grave importance, so please bear with us.

C: 这两种荣耀，我们只能二选其一。
E: Those are the only two paths to glory we can choose from.

C: ——上吧，我们要拔得头筹了！
E: Let's go! We're going to win this competition!

C: 我放弃了…
E: I give up...

C: 这东西也许能帮上忙——<color=#dbc291ff>扎格列斯之手</color>的石台，用它填平断裂的通路就行了。
E: This might come in handy — the stone table for the <color=#dbc291ff>Hand of Zagreus</color>. Let's use it to fill the crack in the path.

C: 这个大家伙，莫非是真言狮口？
E: Wow, look at this big guy. Could this be Verax Leo?

C: 王储啊…悬锋城已经失去了一切。它的人民…传统…以及最为宝贵之物，荣光。
E: Crown prince... Castrum Kremnos has lost everything — its people, traditions... and most importantly, its glory.

C: 我们的神明…已经彻底失去理智。它不再是万人敬畏的战争图腾…它已然堕落，正在酝酿着毫无荣光的阴谋……
E: Our god has completely lost their sanity. No longer a revered symbol of war, they have fallen and are now plotting an evil scheme...

C: 说不定和那头老狮子口中之事有关。
E: Maybe it's connected to the scheme the old lion mentioned.

C: 漂亮！去收获我们应得的奖励吧，反正悬锋城是没人用得上了。
E: Well done! Go claim our rewards — no one else in Kremnos will have any use for them anyway.

C: 我和缇宝会竭尽全力守护圣城的公民，各位无需挂虑。
E: Don't worry about that. Tribbie and I will do our best to protect the people of our holy city.

C: 没时间思考这些了，我们继续。
E: We can't afford to stop and think about that right now. Let's press on.

C: 白厄举起了{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的石符……
E: Phainon raises the stone talisman of {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}...

C: （泰坦的低语）
E: *Titan's murmurs*

C: 如果能用它配平天秤，再往托盘上加些配重，也许就能解开{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的谜题了。
E: If we can use it to balance the scales and add more weight to the pan, we might be able to solve {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s riddle.

C: {NICKNAME}，下来吧…看来这样行不通。
E: Come down, {NICKNAME}... Seems like this isn't going to work.

C: 请为我们揭示被迷雾遮蔽的过往，引导我们找到熄灭疯狂的办法！
E: Please reveal to us the past that has been shrouded in fog and guide us to a way to quench this madness!

C: 美好的…被封存的……
E: Happiness... sealed away...

C: 旅行，喜欢。和你，一起？
E: Travel, like. With you, together?

C: {NICKNAME}…来吧，和我们一同登台吧。在「剧本」里，我们是银河舞台最绚烂的主演，镜头绝对不会从你身上移开。
E: {NICKNAME}... Come, join us on stage. In the script, we are the most brilliant actors on the cosmic circuit, and the focus will always be on you.

C: 我们好像一起旅行过…
E: We seem to have traveled together before...

C: 但…没关系。既然你出现在了这里，那就证明我们的道路还会交汇。你还活着，我也会活下去。尚未到来的分别不会是永别。
E: But... it's okay. You being here means our paths are bound to cross again. You're alive, and I will continue living. The parting that has yet to happen will not be an eternal one.

C: 看招，系统崩溃！
E: Take this. System crash!

C: ——按丹恒的说法，这只生物和天外的神明有关。兴许能解决我们的麻烦。
E: According to Dan Heng, this creature is related to a god from beyond the sky. Perhaps they can help us solve the problem.

C: 这里。这里！
E: Here. Here!

C: 悬锋城？对于我们这些手无寸铁的平民，{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的领土可是禁地。就算是在从前……
E: Castrum Kremnos? For us unarmed civilians, {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s territory is off-limits. Even in the past...

C: 你每件事都要向她汇报吗？
E: Do you always have to report everything to her?

C: 阿格莱雅大人，她为奥赫玛做出的奉献值得更多感激。但大多数人只记住了她冰冷的一面。
E: Lady Aglaea's contributions to Okhema deserve more appreciation, but people mostly see her as distant and aloof.

C: 记住，阿格莱雅，无论黄金裔还是元老院，我们的地位都是由奥赫玛的公民赋予的。
E: Remember, Aglaea, whether it be the Chrysos Heirs or the Council, our positions are entrusted to us by the people of Okhema.

C: 我们不奢望合作，但求不生冲突。
E: While we do not expect you to work with us, we do not wish for conflict either.

C: 若必须与你一战…那便战吧。
E: If this is meant to be... then I will fight you.

C: （去找下一只若虫吧。）
E: (Time to move on to the next nymph.)

C: 运气真好，运气真好……
E: Wahaha, it's my lucky day...

C: 你能唤醒死者？
E: You can rouse the dead?

C: 阿格莱雅说过…必须有人触碰并吸收「火种」，暂时成为它的载体。
E: Aglaea mentioned that... someone must touch the Coreflame and absorb it to become its temporary receptacle.

C: 你将纷争带给此世，本不应拥有如此平静的结局…但没有关系。这里只有你我，其他人不必看见你临终的模样。
E: Such a peaceful end is not befitting of you, the bringer of Strife into this world... But it's a good thing it's just me here. No one else can see what you look like in the final moments of your life.

C: 献上「火种」吧，黄金裔。
E: Surrender the Coreflame, Chrysos Heir.

C: 「为肉身灌注黄金之血，为神谕甘愿枯竭干涸……」
E: "Fill our bodies with blood of gold, till we wither in willing service to the prophecy..."

C: 由我来传达或许不妥…但若要继续和白厄并肩战斗，你们有必要了解他的过去。
E: I may not be the right person to tell you about him, but you must know his past if you are to continue fighting alongside Phainon.

C: 爷爷奶奶说，外边的世界有很多坏人，才会一直打仗…我可不想救那些坏人啊！我只要，当保护村子的小英雄就好了！
E: Grandpa and grandma said the outside world is full of bad people. That's why they're always at war... Who wants to save bad people like them! I can be a hero, but only our village's little hero!

C: 听起来是一种平衡英雄与凡人的机制。
E: It sounds like some sort of system to balance the heroes and the mortals.

C: 果然，你也意识到了。
E: It looks like you've realized it as well.

C: 好好养精蓄锐吧。过几日，我们涡心见。
E: Go and rest and regain your strength. We'll meet at the Vortex in a few days.

C: 两位的决心毋须质疑。赞美纯粹的无私和勇气…愿{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}照亮你们的前路。
E: Your resolves cannot be questioned. We praise your pure selflessness and courage... May {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} light your path forward.

C: 「为肉身灌注黄金之血，为神谕甘愿枯竭干涸……」
E: "Fill our bodies with blood of gold, till we wither in willing service to the prophecy..."

C: （泰坦的低语）
E: *Titan's murmurs*

C: 情绪还没铺垫上去，告别的话留着以后再说吧。
E: That doesn't seem appropriate for the current mood, so let's just leave the farewells for next time.

C: *嘶哑的呢喃*
…汝竟这样急于加入死者的行列么？
E: ...is it death's embrace you yearn for with such urgency?

C: 您了解我：安提基色拉人是以灵魂的振幅和频率感知这个世界——
E: You know about us. We Antikytherans perceive the world through the amplitude and frequency of souls...

C: 既然你这么清楚，当时又何必出手将我救下？
E: Since you are aware of this, why did you save me back then?

C: 哦？大名鼎鼎的理性之泰坦承认自己不够智慧，你这帮信徒可要失望了。
E: Oh? Are you saying that the renowned Reason Titan is now admitting a lack of wisdom? Your followers are going to be sorely disappointed by this.

C: 黎明云崖真正的主人，始终是那位纵览全局的「神礼观众」啊。
E: The true master of Dawncloud has always been the Theoros, who watches over everything.

C: 去吧，阁下。透过这道<color=#dbc291ff>「雅努斯密径」</color>，你便能步上朝圣的长阶了。
E: Go on ahead. Take this {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>Janus's Hidden Passage</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>"Janus shortcut"</color>{RUBY_E#} and the long pilgrimage stairway will be waiting for you at its end.

C: 我相信，{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}绝不会拒绝您施行<color=#dbc291ff>向泰坦提问</color>的权利。毕竟，阁下身为将死之人，如今应是与刻法勒最为相近的存在了吧？
E: I believe {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} will not deprive you of your right to <color=#dbc291ff>ask your question</color>, especially now that you're on the brink of death... you must be closer to Kephale than anyone else, wouldn't you agree?

C: 你在我的脑子里也算待了有段时间。怎么，还没有习惯身体主人的态度？
E: Oh? Haven't you been in my head for some time now? It's high time you get used to how I feel about things.

C: 我们和元老院五五开。
E: We're tied with the Council of Elders.

C: 是吗？没有真正打起来，勉强还算和平…吧……
E: ...I suppose "peaceful" is technically correct if no actual violence happened...

C: 我…做不到。
E: I... I can't do it.

C: 查看左边的黄金短矛。
E: Inspect the left Golden Short Spear.

C: 既然如此，就照你说的，签订契约吧——并衷心希望你已做好了满盘皆输的准备。
E: In that case, let's make a pact with those conditions. I hope you're prepared to lose it all.

C: 通往更高处的门，是那里吗？好像有人…有魂守着呢。
E: Do we need to enter that doorway to climb even higher? There seems to be a person... more like a soul guarding it.

C: 逆流而行，杀出这该死的冥界……
E: I'll go against the current... and kill my way out of this cursed nether realm...

C: 缇安，画了好久！希望小小蝶，喜欢。
E: Trianne spent a lot of time drawing this! Trianne hopes that Little Cas likes it.

C: 继续前进…我或许会迷失于此。我必须离去了…因为黑潮还在生者的世界肆虐。
E: If I go any further... I might lose myself. I must leave now, for the black tide still wreaks havoc in the realm of the living.

C: 「墨涅塔的爱」…黄金之茧最初的赐福，大概并不为人所理解。直到{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}降临后，人们才学会了解读这份美好的赠礼。
E: "Mnestia's Love" was the Chrysalis of Gold's first blessing, but it most likely wasn't understood by mankind. We only learned to interpret this wonderful gift after {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}' arrival.

C: …二位。我要出发了。
E: ...I'll be going now.

C: …等我。
E: Wait for me.

C: …谢谢你。
E: ...Thank you.

C: 奇怪，要说是冥河的倒影，似乎又太过…灵动。
E: Strange... For reflections in the River of Souls, they seem oddly... animated.

C: 呀…这样的话，反而没有路能走了。
E: Uh... If you do that, we'll actually run into a dead end.

C: *狂热的喝彩*
E: *fanatic cheering*

C: 奥赫玛在这一制度下屹立千年不倒，自然能证明其存在的合理性。
E: Okhema has stood strong under this system for a thousand years. It stands to reason that there is purpose in its existence.

C: 听好了，把思路逆转过来——「『我』要如何决定世界命运，才是正确的选择？」——这才是你真正应该思考的。
E: Listen up, I'll say this only once. Flip your perspective around and ask yourself this instead, "What should I do to ensure that the world doesn't stray from the correct path?" That is what you should be thinking about.

C: 还有时间，好好想想你会如何作答吧，也别说给我听……
E: You still have time, so give it some thought. Oh, and don't bother telling me the answer.

C: 晚些时候再说。
E: Not now.
Heh...

C: 那无人能说得出口的事实…那血淋淋的，被贪婪、恐惧和虚荣所埋没的真相，就由我来掘地三尺，将它呈现在你们眼前吧。
E: The answer that no one can bring themselves to speak of... A truth stained in blood and buried in greed, fear, and vanity... Allow me to lay it bare before you.

C: 您是最后一位。慎重思考吧，您的庄严一票将打破这场完美的僵局。
E: No, you're the last. Cast your vote with care, for your decision will break this impasse.

C: 我们所有人的每一次触碰，每一次拥抱，将再也不会是冰冷的剥夺……
E: Every touch, every embrace we share, will never again be an ice-cold loss...

C: 献上火种…为它在天空中刻下星辰吧。
E: Surrender the Coreflame and carve their star into the sky.

C: 所以，背负这个世界的全部，活下去。别让你珍重之人、别让「金织」女士失望——
E: So, carry everything of this world and live on. Don't disappoint those most precious to you. Don't disappoint Lady Goldweaver.

C: 看见了吗？黑塔魔镜，靠它们几个，我足不出户就能完成空间折跃，将自己的「数据精神体」投射到银河各个角落。
E: See these Herta Mirrors? With them, I can project my "data spirit entity" to any corner of the cosmos through spatial warps, without even needing to leave my room.

C: 能不能麻利点？
E: Can't you hurry up?

C: 逐火之旅与神谕…
E: The Flame-Chase Journey and the prophecy...

C: 当然，我正有此意。下一次贤人会议，我会全力为你争取应得的权利。
E: You're right. I shall do just that. In the next meeting of the sages, I will spare no efforts fighting for the rights you deserve.

C: 呵呵，承蒙谬赞了。那依等价交换，让吾也回敬一个问题，如何？
E: Heheh, you flatter me. Why don't I ask you a question as well, as a form of equivalent exchange?

C: 「它将以自身为城墙，阻挡无尽蔓延的疯狂。它深谙：若末世降临，世间将无物可供征伐……」
E: "They use their own body as our city walls, keeping out and protecting us from the pervasive spread of madness. They are acutely aware that if the end times were to arrive, there would be nothing left in this world to conquer..."

C: 正是。我相信，当命定的时刻来临时，你一定能明白这番话。
E: Indeed. I believe that when the fated moment eventually arrives, you will be able to understand my words.

C: 若想证明它，也必须由你写下最后一步。去吧，别让我失望。
E: If we are to prove its existence, you must take the final step. Go, do not disappoint me.

C: 女武神在上……
E: In the name of the warrior goddess...

C: 对人性彻底失望的塞涅俄丝，开始憧憬神性的淡漠。她遣使我和露奈比斯飞向大地，去寻找传闻中能将人类与泰坦的灵魂融为一体的禁术。
E: Disillusioned with humanity, Seliose began to long for the detachment of divinity. She sent Lunabis and me to the earth in search of a forbidden art said to fuse human and Titan souls.

C: 正因如此，我才能够向你证明：人性根底那簇坚韧的希望，并不会被时光磨灭…它只是在等待着被疗愈、呵护，直到重新焕发出色彩。
E: Only then can I prove to you that tenacious hope, buried in the deepest part of the human soul, has not been lost to time! It's just waiting to heal and grow, and then it will shine once more.

C: 「西风罗盘」…交给我吧！
E: A West Wind Compass... leave it to me!

C: 各位——平台一旦停靠下来，我们就立刻冲向出口……
E: Everyone — once the platform stops, we make a break for the exit...

C: 雷雨，风暴——同样与我为伍！
E: Thunderstorms and tempests walk by my side!

C: 火…种……
E: Core... flame...

C: …拜拜，「盗火行者」！
E: ...Bye-bye, "Flame Reaver"!

C: 一千余年前，黎明云崖……
E: A thousand years ago, at Dawncloud...

C: 那刻夏的灵魂在冥界见到遐蝶，完成了创世猜想的证明。他在公民大会上投出关键一票，并利用渎神罪行重挫元老院夺权野心，使「逐火之旅」得以继续。
E: Anaxa's soul met Castorice in the nether realm, where he proved his hypothesis regarding creation. At the citizens' assembly, he cast a pivotal vote and used the charge of blasphemy to thwart the Council of Elders's schemes for power, allowing the Flame-Chase Journey to continue.

C: …{NICKNAME}，这么突然地闯入一个人的世界，可是会让人家手足无措的哦！
E: ...{NICKNAME}, bursting into someone's world like that can really catch them off guard!

C: 没想到迷迷会对占卜感兴趣…可是，这也不算什么小众爱好，为什么要遮遮掩掩？
E: Never thought Mem would be into divination... But it's not exactly a niche hobby, so why all the secrecy?

C: 唔…嗯……
E: Uhh... hmm...

C: 多亏了遐蝶跟小灰子，这古城的结界才能被驱散呀——回头想想，我这个忙帮得可太值了~
E: Thanks to Castorice and Gray Mystery, the ancient city's barrier was finally dispelled. Now that I think about it, helping them was well worth it.

C: 我可不需要什么控制装置！毕竟…咳，你懂的！
E: I don't need a controller! After all... you know!

C: …我努力试过不去活成他们口中的样子。但讲真的？那太累了…我早就想放弃了。
E: I've tried not to become a liar. But... honestly? It's just too hard... I'm close to giving up.

C: 我读到过一些骇人的故事，声称「清洗者」会将记忆残片以炼金之术强加给继任者，以此延续「身份」和「仇恨」……
E: I've read some chilling accounts, stories of the "Cleaners" using alchemical arts to implant fragments of memories into their successors, ensuring both identity and hatred live on.

C: 走吧，我们去找她。
E: Let's go find her.

C: 小白，小灰…你们回来啦。
E: Snowy, Little Gray... you're back.

C: 我想，现在…就是那个「特别的时候」啦。
E: I think... now's the "right time."

C: 不可思议。你明明没有亲眼见过那名黑衣剑客…只是听我用言语复述，竟然就能还原到如此地步吗？
E: Unbelievable. You've never seen that black-clad swordmaster... yet you've recreated this so precisely, just from what I described?

C: 别出声，好好听着。
E: Be quiet, and listen carefully.

C: 哈哈哈…那我等着。
E: Hahaha... I'll be waiting.

C: 你…不说些什么吗？
E: Aren't you going to say something?

C: 几日后，黎明云崖……
E: Days later, at Dawncloud...

C: 要是我不打算管这摊子麻烦事，你还有什么后备计划？
E: Do you even have any Plan Bs if I decide to nope out on this?

C: 外出远征辛苦了…
E: Rough expedition, eh?

C: 她的右侧是马身的「星月之翎」露奈比斯，旋步中踢踏漫天的星罗。
E: To her right was the horse-bodied Lunabis, the Moonlit Plume, whose graceful steps trampled the stars in the heavens.

C: 去吧。但愿我们的担忧不会变成现实。
E: Go, then. Let's hope our concerns don't come true.

C: 地上一天，天上十年……
E: A day on the ground feels like ten years in the sky...

C: 久等了，丹恒。
E: Thanks for waiting, Dan Heng.

C: 带翼的天马？
E: Is that a winged pegasus?

C: …来吧，英雄！
E: ...Come on, heroes!

C: 还有这根棍子！
E: And my bat!

C: 还有他的长枪！
E: And his spear!

C: 艾格勒，尽管已被黑潮腐蚀……
E: Aquila... Even though they have been corrupted by the black tide...

C: …呵，得来全不费工夫。扎格列斯之手，总会在最需要的时候出现。
E: ...Heh, that didn't take much effort. The Hand of Zagreus always appears when it's most needed.

C: 沿着天空子民终日祈望的方向——向上。
E: In the direction that the denizens of the sky have prayed to their whole lives — upward.

C: 莫非它也无法突破天穹？
E: Could it be that they, too, were unable to break through the heavens?

C: 既然你已下定了决心，那就继续前行吧。
E: Since you've made your decision, keep moving forward.

C: 当他们意识到，自己千百年来的信仰竟被一个身负诅咒的混血儿颠覆之后……
E: When they realized that their centuries-old faith had been overturned by a cursed child of two clans...

C: 那约定要我们等待天空之子重返故地…完成回收泰坦火种的使命。
E: Our pact requires us to await the return of the Skyfolk to their ancestral lands... to complete the mission of reclaiming the Titan's Coreflame.

C: 感谢你的回信！真没想到，*我们*居然是通过这种形式了解到了你的过去……
E: Thank you for your letter! Never expected that we would learn about your past in this way...

C: 风堇能修复天空吗…
E: Can Hyacine fix the sky...

C: 神谕里没写这个？
E: Was this not predicted in the prophecy?

C: 赛飞儿小姐，我相信她会尽到自己的职责。
E: I'm confident that Miss Cipher will do everything in her power to fulfill her duty.

C: 丹恒，你还能再施展一次灵水术么？
E: Dan Heng, can you use the spirit water art again?

C: 我随身携带的灵水已经用完了。而且……
E: I've used up all the spirit water I brought. And...

C: 啊…终将实现，天父降下的神谕……
E: Ah... Finally come true, the sky father's prophecy...

C: 征伐艾格勒以前，我做了最坏的准备。即便奥赫玛终有一日会被黑潮攻陷……
E: I prepared for the worst before the fight against Aquila. Even if there came a day when Okhema was taken by the black tide...

C: 为、为什么？！人家以为奥赫玛是安全的！
E: Wh—Why!? I thought Okhema was safe!

C: 快，去看看他的情况！
E: Quick, let's go check on him!

C: 在昏光庭院的天空末裔——风堇的帮助下，众人登上艾格勒的空中堡垒。风堇决心完成代代相传的使命，却发现「阳雷骑士」塞涅俄丝讨伐艾格勒的伟业，竟是一段染血的谎言。
E: With the help of the Twilight Courtyard's last descendant of the sky, Hyacine, the party ascends to Aquila's flying fortress. Hyacine resolves to fulfill the duty passed down over generations of her family, only to discover that the glorious feat of Seliose the Daythunder Knight campaigning against Aquila was nothing more than a blood-stained lie.

C: 原来是你。
E: So, it was you.

C: 请您放心，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}。黑塔女士同我正是为了翁法罗斯而来。
E: Rest assured, {NICKNAME}. Madam Herta and I have come here for the sake of Amphoreus.

C: …是你吗？
E: ...Is it you?

C: 或是踏上最后的伟大征程。
E: ...or embark on one final grand journey.

C: 当他还是一名稚嫩的少年时，这少年心中，萌发过一连串英雄主义的幻想：他时而畅想手中的木剑是一柄沉铁……
E: When he was young and innocent, he had heroic dreams, imagining his wooden sword was forged of iron...

C: 绕了半天路，结果「秘密基地」就近在眼前么……
E: Some secret base. It was right here in front of us the whole time...

C: 居然动作比我们快。
E: Looks like he won this race.

C: 翻开「学士」。
E: Reveal the "Scholar."

C: 毕竟刻法勒背负的，是整个世界呢。
E: After all, Kephale bears the weight of the entire world.

C: 怎么一副难以置信的表情，难道是…想我了？
E: Why so surprised? Could it be... did you miss me?

C: 「供物比世界的命运更为沉重之人，是为——」
E: "The one whose offering weighs more than the fate of the world is—"

C: 英雄们的航船，将摆渡至最后一幕。
E: Our heroes will be ferried to the final scene.

C: 乘上时间的长河吧，它会挺身护送各位，抵达创世涡心……
E: Ride the river of time. It will guard your passage to the Vortex of Genesis...

C: ——待我手刃了那刽子手，就让我们在西风尽头把酒言欢吧。
E: And when I'm done with that executioner, we'll raise our cups where the west winds end.

C: 我来拖住那刽子手，你去把{RUBY_B#神谕}此世最大的谎言{RUBY_E#}圆上——然后，就让我成为新世界的第一缕风吧。
E: I'll distract that executioner — you go turn {RUBY_B#prophecy}the world's biggest lie{RUBY_E#} into truth. Let me become the first wind of your new world.

C: 我相信…「再创世」的彼岸是一片花海。
E: I just know... Beyond the Era Nova lies a sea of flowers.

C: 依托它微弱的光亮…又一次——不，无数次——我坚持了下来！
E: By its faint glow... once again — no, countless times again — I endured!

C: 以七贤人之名，我要求你立刻远离启蒙王座：此地是「理性」至高无上的圣地，容不得任何人亵渎——
E: In the name of the Seven Sages, I demand that you immediately step away from the Luminary Throne. This is the sacred ground of "Reason," and no one may desecrate it—

C: 看来，避免刀剑交锋，果真是天方夜谭。
E: It seems the clash of blades was inevitable.

C: …实在令人痛心。
E: ...How painful.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>你愿意接过我们背负的一切，最后一次重回时间起点，阻止「铁墓」的{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>完成</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>诞生</color>{RUBY_E#}…拯救我们深爱的世界，改写它注定逝去的结局吗？</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Will you take on everything we've carried, return to the beginning one last time, stop the {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>completion</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>birth</color>{RUBY_E#} of Irontomb, save the world we love, and rewrite its doomed fate?</color>

C: 铭记此刻吧，铭记所有无法亲眼目睹世界尽头的友人们，他们的夙愿——
E: Remember this moment. Remember your friends who never lived to see the world's end. Remember their final wishes—

C: 还有从中升腾的，你心中至纯粹的怒火——
E: And let the purest rage in your heart rise out of those wishes...

C: 没错！此时此刻，人家的记忆终于完整了！
E: That's right! At this very moment, my memories are finally whole!

C: 探索、了解、建立、连结——然后，我们会一起回家！
E: We'll explore, understand, establish, and connect — after that, we'll find our way home together!

C: 必须阻止铁墓降临。
E: We must stop Irontomb's descent.

C: 我知道，也明白命运从来颠扑不破。所以，我忧心的不是未来……
E: I know. I also understand that fate cannot be changed. It is not the future that I worry about...

C: 我来冻上你这愚忠之人的脑瓜子！
E: Groveling fool, I'll freeze that brain of yours!

C: 既然还有时间，就让我们再认识一下这里的朋友吧～
E: Since there's still some time, let's get to know our new friends here~

C: 帕福斯代表，你对此有何高见？
E: Delegate from Paphas, do you have any insights?

C: 你…是从谁那儿听说的？
E: Where... did you hear this from?

C: 出来吧，「神礼官」。
E: Come forth, "Theoros."

C: 我可不似你那般自由自在。那只多洛斯小猫到处添乱，已经够让我烦心了。而且，我还得完成手上的制衣委托……
E: I'm not as carefree as you. That little Dolos kitten is already causing enough trouble for me, and on top of that, I still have tailoring commissions to complete...

C: 是啊。不过，她随时都有可能回来——聊重要的事，还得留个心眼才行。
E: Indeed. But she could return at any moment. If we're having an important discussion, we must remain vigilant.

C: 凯撒身居高位，必须审慎细致。为避免不必要的误会，请两位照我说的做吧。
E: The Imperator's elevated position means she must always remain meticulous and careful. Please, do as I say, guests. It would avoid unnecessary misunderstandings.

C: 但是你想，这反而会成为我们的「捷径」，对吧？
E: But... think about it. That's actually gonna be our "shortcut."

C: 嘻，这就是说话的艺术，跟{NICKNAME}学的，像吗？
E: Teehee, and that's the art of conversation! I learned it from {NICKNAME}, after all. So, how did I do?

C: 你们是预言中的「救世主」，对他的了解远胜过我。或许，只有你们能从其人言行中发觉一丝端倪……
E: You are the "Deliverers" of the prophecy and know about him far more than I do. Perhaps only you can find traces of the truth from his actions and words...

C: 凯撒人呢，怎么还不现身？那小矮子，平日对谁都一副颐指气使的样子！今天我就要、就要……
E: Where's the Imperator? Still not here? That little imp is always acting so high and mighty towards everyone! Today, I will... I will...!

C: …算了，再给我一杯！
E: ...Whatever. Pour me another cup!

C: 胆敢妄议我的身高，仅这一点就足够将她碎尸万段。
E: A criticism of my height is a grave enough insult already. She should be dismembered.

C: 嘻嘻，对你这种大英雄来说只是顺手的事，没什么难的啦……
E: Besides, this would be child's play for a great hero like you. It won't be hard at all...

C: 可是，该怎么做？
E: But how?

C: 可是，你还没有得到自由。
E: But you have yet to taste freedom.

C: 彼时，卡厄斯兰那压制了黑潮的蔓延，但无法根除铁墓的苗床。黑潮仍在世界深处涌动，正是海妖的国度最先拥抱了「毁灭」。
E: At that time, Khaslana had suppressed the black tide's rise, but he was unable to remove Irontomb from its roots. The black tide still roiled in the depths of the world, and the kingdom of sea sirens was the first to embrace the Destruction.

C: 渺小的泰坦眷属，以为自己能阻挡真理的浪潮，多么天真……
E: Such tiny Titankins... thinking they can stop the tide of truth. How naive...

C: 期许、诺言，皆是如梦泡影。
E: Hopes and promises are nothing but the foam of dreams.

C: 待到「救世主」归来，就让这场荒唐的宴会结束吧。
E: When the "Deliverer" returns, I will let this absurd celebration come to an end.

C: 对不起…维吉妮娅，让你也……
E: I'm sorry... Verginia... for letting you...

C: 是我写的…最后一首诗……
E: It's my... final poem...

C: 见证，聆听…然后唤醒吧。
E: Witness, listen... and awaken.

C: 「曳石爵」阿波罗尼，生于光历<unbreak>3704</unbreak>年，逝于光历<unbreak>3960</unbreak>年。
E: "Dux Helkolithist" Apollonius. Born Light Calendar <unbreak>3704</unbreak>. Deceased Light Calendar <unbreak>3960</unbreak>.

C: 浇奠第一次逐火之旅的英雄们。
E: Libate for the heroes of the first Flame-Chase Journey.

C: 谢谢，我最后一位听众…呵，这大概也是我能听见的最后一句嘉奖了。
E: Thank you, final audience of mine... Heh. This is probably the last praise I'll ever hear in my life.

C: 回答我，为什么是「你」？
E: Why are "you" the one doing this? Answer me!

C: 当然。在将二位彻底驱逐前，我不介意再作最后一次解答：
E: Of course I am fully aware. I don't mind answering you one last time before I thoroughly exile you from this world:

C: 所以，诸位明白了么？正如卡厄斯兰那所说，「毁灭」并非过程，而是结果……
E: Do you understand me now? As Khaslana stated, "Destruction" is not the process, but the outcome...

C: 头脑风暴，我喜欢。还是二打一，更喜欢了。
E: A brainstorm? I like it. And it's two against one? I like it even more.

C: 至于匹诺康尼的未来应是何种样貌，就由她…他们来「开拓」吧。
E: As for what Penacony should look like, it'll be up to her... no, up to their "trailblazing" now.

C: 我不会做这种事，绝对不会。
E: I wouldn't do that. Ever.

C: 这道门，可真…壮观呀？
E: This gate is... really... impressive?

C: 我知道你在想什么，那位理论中的「记忆」令使，行踪依旧成谜。但事到如今，我更倾向于，忆庭之镜映照出的…是浮黎留下的某种「神迹」。
E: I know what you're thinking. That theoretical Emanator of Remembrance remains a mystery, but now I'm leaning towards the idea that what the Garden's mirror reflected... was a kind of "miracle" that Fuli left behind.

C: （取出《如我所书》…）
E: (Take out As I've Written...)

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>正在访问：回归#33550337——</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Accessing: Recurrence #33550337—</color>

C: 但，为了让你还能拥抱明天，继续这段无忧无虑的旅程……
E: But in order to make sure you can still embrace tomorrow and continue this carefree journey...

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>对象：回归#33550337。进程：<unbreak>13.131%</unbreak>——</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Object: Recurrence #33550337. Progress: <unbreak>13.131%</unbreak>—</color>

C: 看，房间尽头的符号……
E: Look. That symbol at the end of the room...

C: …怎么样，{NICKNAME}？第一次「开拓」之旅，感觉如何？
E: So, {NICKNAME}? How was your first Trailblaze journey?

C: …三月七？
E: ...March 7th?

C: 他们一直都在我身边。没人知道我被遗忘的过去，也没人会心有芥蒂。因为……
E: They've always been by my side. No one knows about my forgotten past, but no one holds it against me. That's because...

C: 游戏的目标，就是把她找出来。
E: The objective of the game... is to uncover where she's hiding.

C: 作为她最重要的同伴，你一定能做到的，不是么？
E: You're her closest companion. If anyone can do it, it's you, right?

C: 其实，你不必大费周章寻找三月七的下落。
E: In truth, you don't have to go to such lengths to find March 7th.

C: 如果{NICKNAME}特别在意，人家就闭上眼睛，你牵着我走！
E: If it really bothers {NICKNAME} that much, I'll close my eyes. Just take my hand and lead the way!

C: 她来了，这次的目标…是我么？
E: She's coming... Is it me she's after this time?

C: 果然，根源是三月七吗？
E: Just as I thought... It all begins with March 7th, doesn't it?

C: 树庭……
E: The Grove...

C: 不对。倘若是我的记忆，她们理应认得我才是。
E: No. If they were my memories, they would recognize me.

C: 你每句话都要上价值的旧疾还没痊愈吗？
E: I see you still speak as if every sentence must add something of profound value.

C: 谢谢你，丹枫！谢谢你，景元！谢谢你，镜流！谢谢你，不知道跑到哪里去了的白珩！
E: Thank you, Dan Feng! Thank you, Jing Yuan! Thank you, Jingliu! And thank you, Baiheng, wherever you've run off to!

C: 当然。
E: Of course.

C: 金丝引向的，会是世界最深的秘密么？
E: Could the golden thread be leading us to the world's deepest secret?

C: …自然，我会把握好应有的分寸。
E: ...I understand. I'll only do what needs to be done.

C: 「记忆」在她手中被轻易掐灭，不留痕迹。其手段决绝，仿佛与这条命途有着不解之仇。
E: She snuffed out the Remembrance without any effort and left nothing behind. Her actions were so determined... as if she had an unquenchable hatred against that Path.

C: 忆庭的窃贼。漫长的时间里，他们觊觎这个世界，却始终被阻挡在外。
E: They are thieves from the Garden. They have long coveted this world, but had always been kept out.

C: 咱们双管齐下，一定能让这台铁疙瘩彻底报废。现在——就等那俩人回来了。
E: With our two-pronged attack, we'll turn this hunk of metal into scrap for sure. Now, we just wait for those two to get back.

C: 站在灾难最前方的星穹列车，才是众多宇宙平凡文明的希望哪。
E: The Astral Express, standing at the forefront of disaster, is the hope for many ordinary civilizations across the universe.

C: 愿寰宇中所有自立走到今天的文明，能够一起度过这次难关。
E: May all civilizations that have made it this far on their own strength weather this crisis together.

C: 「一眼就被识破，也太没面子啦。」
E: "Getting seen through right away is just so embarrassing."

C: 现状不允许我忽视任何变量，尤其是最关键的那一道：你的意志。
E: Unfortunately, current conditions won't let me ignore any variables. Especially the most important one: your will.

C: 这代表「赞达尔」束手无策。他无法掌控德谬歌，就像他无法掌控机器头，只能用尽一切手段抹去它的存在。
E: It means Zandar had no control. He couldn't contain the Demiurge, just like he couldn't handle Droidhead. So he tried to erase every trace.

C: 这里是他的主场，保持警惕。
E: It's his domain. Stay alert.

C: 什么破名字。我宣布——它现在改叫「黑塔的大手」！
E: What a dumb name. I hereby rename it... "Herta's Big Hand!"

C: 他试图用最彻底的「毁灭」掩盖真相。逻辑自洽，手段极端。
E: He sought to bury the truth beneath absolute Destruction. Logically sound, but ruthlessly extreme.

C: 是白厄和所有人愿望中的黎明。
E: It's the dawn that Phainon and everyone had wished for.

C: 我早已是遍入天地的「纷争」，这世间必要的伤痕。站在你们面前的，不过是万千神躯的一具。
E: I am Strife, scattered across all creation, the scar that this world needs. What stands before you is merely one of countless divine bodies.

C: 那你眼神真的很好了。
E: You've got sharp eyes.

C: 是他的风格。人都说猫有好几条命，但活了死、死了又活，来来回回千万次，换谁都遭不住。
E: Sounds just like him. People say cats have nine lives, but dying and coming back, millions and millions of times... no one walks away from that in one piece.

C: 金色的竖琴静静伫立——白厄，他在企盼你拨动琴弦。
E: The golden harp stands silently. Phainon awaits your touch upon its strings.

C: 恰如此时此刻，众人将为翁法罗斯编织的「未来」。
E: Just like the "future" we will now weave together for Amphoreus.

C: 「二缺一，不知蜗居公主什么时候来？」
E: "We're one player short. When's Princess Homebody showing up?"

C: 「揭开记忆的被褥——」
E: "Lift the beddings of memory..."

C: 「这片净土，也在遭受『毁灭』浸染。」
E: "Even this pure land is being tainted by the Destruction."

C: 没错，让星神也好好见识下我们的厉害！
E: Yup. Let's show the Aeon how powerful we are!

C: 后面有的是你表现的机会啦。
E: There'll be plenty of time for you to show off in the future.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>奔跑吧。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Run.</color>

C: 真是…安静呀。
E: It's... so quiet.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>为创世，镌写开篇的一笔！</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>And inscribe the opening stroke of genesis!</color>

C: 说实在的，灰子，你这豪华卧室里还真有不少宝贵家伙呢。从没见过的飞天坛递模型，一颗酷似泰坦的头颅，还有奇怪的钟表小人模型……
E: I gotta say, Gray Mystery, you've got quite the collection of treasures in this fancy bedroom of yours. A Flying Amphora model I've never seen before, a head that looks just like a Titan's, and those weird Mr. Pocket Watch figurines...

C: 既然{NICKNAME}来了，不妨由真正见多识广的人来为我们解惑吧？
E: Now that {NICKNAME} is here, why don't we let someone who's truly worldly enlighten us?

C: 昔涟…？
E: Cyrene...?

C: 和我说说发生了什么吧。
E: Tell me what happened.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>对于宇宙，这就是「记忆」的本质。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>For the universe, that process is what we call "memory."</color>

C: 祂，陨落了吗？
E: Did THEY fall?

C: 不仅如此，你会闭合翁法罗斯的因果。这是一个封闭世界，所以「记忆」为它带来的影响，会全部收束为「你」的影响。
E: And more than that, it means you will close off Amphoreus's causality. This world is sealed. The effect that the Remembrance brings to it will all converge on one thing. That one thing is "you."

C: 为了让翁法罗斯被群星眷顾，「记忆」向银河求援。
E: To gain the favor of the stars for Amphoreus, the Remembrance sent a call for help to the cosmos.

C: 我们怎么可能让这种事发生呢？
E: There's no way we would let something like that happen, right?

C: 如果德谬歌是被消灭的，这里多多少少该留下些残余。我不相信星核能像手术刀一样精细，把痕迹炸得一点不剩。
E: If the Demiurge was destroyed, there'd be at least some bits of it left. I don't buy that a Stellaron could have blasted all the traces away as cleanly as a scalpel.

C: 记录
E: Record

C: 如果到头来，每一次提笔，都只能写下相同的结局。那这篇沉甸甸的史诗……
E: If "I" can only write the same ending every time "I" lift my pen, then is this weighty saga...

C: 查找。「昔涟」。
E: Query. "Cyrene."

C: 学习
E: Learn

C: 「可你却总是嘻嘻哈哈，好像从来没有烦恼。」
E: "Yet you always seem so happy, as if nothing ever worried you."

C: 但现在，好朋友，我想告诉你，它也是世上最浪漫的力量。
E: But now, my good friend, I want to tell you that it's the most romantic force in the world.

C: 期待一下吧。下次见面时，就轮到我来为你讲述「爱」的故事了♪
E: Just wait... It'll be my turn to tell you a story of "love" the next time we meet ♪

C: 为庆祝我们达成根本性共识，我会为你的演出准备一片舞台。
E: Then, to celebrate us coming to a fundamental agreement, I will prepare a stage for your performance.

C: 我们进入无名泰坦大墓，发现了此地的秘密——永劫回归中三千万世的「昔涟」都会来到这里，将自己奉献给「记忆」。在黑天鹅的协同下，我们在大墓深处找到了「长夜月」。
E: We entered the nameless Titan's great tomb and discovered its secret... across the thirty million cycles of Eternal Recurrence, every incarnation of "Cyrene" had come here, offering herself to the Remembrance. With Black Swan's help, we found "Evernight" in the depths of the great tomb.

C: 列车组的支持，让我们的工作在市场开拓部的施压下，依然能有条不紊地推进。
E: Thanks to the Express Crew's support, our operations stayed on course, even under the relentless pressure from the Marketing Development Department.

C: 海瑟音
E: Hysilens

C: 不知道，也不需要知道。
E: I don't know, and don't need to know.

C: 以中央电梯为基线，橄榄形编队，准备收容！注意你们身边多出来的任何一个人！
E: Everyone, fall in an olive-shaped formation! And use the central elevator as our starting point! Prepare for the collection process! Pay attention to anyone suspicious around you!

C: 我听着风言风语，说入侵时期有个极为骇人的怪物躲在这里，专挑平日研究成绩垫底的科员下手。
E: I've heard rumors of a horrific monster that sneaked in during the invasion. It is said to prey on the lowest-performing researchers.

C: 呀哈哈的何塞•拉萨罗
E: Laughing Hosea Lazaro

C: 首先，我的朋友不是我；其次，我交朋友也不是为了听八卦呀。
E: First of all, it's not me. Secondly, I don't make friends JUST for the sake of gossip.

C: 只是我这个朋友神通广大，我想你也许能从她那边套出什么情报。这个时间…我看看，她一定是在科室外面翘班摸鱼。
E: It's just that my friend is pretty amazing, and I think you might be able to extract some information from her. Let's see... Right now she's probably slacking off somewhere outside the department.

C: 什么密钥……
E: What encryption key...

C: 文件来源可靠吗？
E: Is the source of this document reliable?

C: 你就是「瓜田里猹」？
E: Are you Richard_Knowitall?

C: 所以，你以为是理查偷走了我的密钥？
E: So, you think Richard was the one who stole my encryption key?

C: 正在启动权限认证…认证中…认证失败！
E: Initiating authentication verification... Verifying... Verification failed!

C: 更别说我们已经拿到了「星际和平公司」的风投，研究「无明磷粉」与发量之间的黄金配比……
E: Not to mention, we have secured investment capital from the Interastral Peace Corporation to study the correlation between Lightless Phosphorous Powder and hair volume.

C: 您好，权限验证…已通过。
E: Hello, authentication... passed.

C: 那时，我还要请你当我们的{F#伴娘}{M#伴郎}，你可别忘了这个约定啊。
E: By then, I will invite you to be our {F#bridesmaid}{M#best man}. Don't you forget it.

C: 其实也不是什么棘手的事，科员们目前都在为复兴计划忙乎，我想拜托你到<color=#dbc291ff>空间站的各个舱段</color>看看他们是否需要<color=#dbc291ff>协助</color>。
E: It's nothing too difficult, really. The department staff are busy with Project Revival. Can you please go to <color=#dbc291ff>every zone in the space station</color> to see if they need <color=#dbc291ff>assistance</color>?

C: 总之，多谢你为「黑塔」做出的贡献。这是我向艾丝妲站长申请的奖励，请收下。
E: In short, thank you for your contribution to Herta Space Station. This is the reward I managed to secure for you from Lead Researcher Asta. Please take it.

C: 温队长真是鞠躬尽瘁。
E: Well, you truly are a man of dedication, Mr. Wen.

C: 但我们也不能扔下他不管。
E: But we can't just leave him.

C: 我们致力于在银河中重建属于人的正义价值，这就是两位创始人——古恩•科诺列夫和希拉•诺娃的提议。
E: We are committed to rebuilding the value of justice for humans in the cosmos. This is the proposal of the two founders, Gunn Konolev and Sheila Nova.

C: 看起来军团不是第一次干坏事。
E: It seems this is not the first time the Legion played the bad guys.

C: 你想说的是流光忆庭的激进派吧？因过分垂涎他人记忆，以致无所不用其极。如果真是他们所为，寻常的治疗确实无能为力。
E: Are you talking about those radicals in the Garden of Recollection? There's nothing those guys wouldn't do to get hold of other people's memories. If this is their doing, ordinary treatment is not going to work.

C: 可以再详细说说你都看到了些什么吗？
E: Can you elaborate on what you saw?

C: 好吧，既然你们都这么坚持，那我会告知原型机<unbreak>157</unbreak>有关她身世的来龙去脉。
E: Well, since you insist, I'll tell Prototype <unbreak>157</unbreak> about her story.

C: 故事里的他一定无法释怀。
E: This must have been tormenting for him.

C: 不，这不符合「螺中笑声」上检测到的数据。
E: It can't be. It doesn't match the data detected in the Crackup Conch.

C: 提示「算力不足，稍后再试」？
E: "Insufficient computing power. Try again later?"

C: 成熟的男人失踪了也正常！
E: Guys his age just need "alone time" sometimes!

C: 你，你竟然说得出这种话！
E: Y—You dare to utter such a threat!

C: 查看限定写真。
E: Look at the limited-edition snapshot.

C: 修行…听上去肯定比体能锻炼还要厉害！大哥每天都在挑战体能上限，一个人围着空间站跑<unbreak>21358</unbreak>米！孤狼中的雄鹰！永远高标准严要求！
E: That trial... I bet it's even more intense than physical training! And brother Arlan already challenges himself to the limit in that department — he runs <unbreak>21,358</unbreak> meters around the space station every day! An eagle among wolves! Always so hard on himself!

C: 他提到说自己在空间站阅读到一册没有署名的手写笔记，里面记录了化解上级压力的<unbreak>36</unbreak>种方法。
E: He said he read an anonymous handwritten journal in the space station — it contained <unbreak>36</unbreak> different strategies to do with managing pressure from one's boss.

C: 阿兰他……
E: Did Arlan...

C: 每次见到这张通行证，你肯定都在告诉自己：阿兰，你必须打起十二分的精神去和佩佩一起玩，因为这是艾丝妲站长的委托！如果在她面前犯了错…她肯定会狠狠惩罚我，折磨我的！
E: I know exactly what message you're trying to drill into yourself by sticking this photo onto your pass: "Arlan, taking Peppy out to play is an assignment from Lead Researcher Asta — you better throw that holodisc like it's a full-on discus! If you spare any effort... Lady Asta will find out and punish you terribly for all eternity!" *sniff*

C: 我如果不及时制止，只怕它们会干出什么堪比「反物质军团」入侵的坏事。
E: If I don't stop them in time, they may even wreak havoc on a scale that could rival the Antimatter Legion's invasion.

C: 唉，放在平时，我卢卡奇绝不会出卖非人生物的权益。这次情况特殊，小机器人们一定会体谅我的……
E: *sigh* Usually, I wouldn't even think about infringing the rights of non-human creatures. However, this is a special situation. Hopefully the little robots will understand me...

C: 「呜呜伯」和人类不同，在它们的逻辑里，没有「为害」的主观意识。
E: You see, Wubbaboos are different from humans. In their way of thinking, there is no active concept of malevolence.

C: 没想到你也有孩子气的一面。
E: I never expected that you had this childlike side to you.

C: 是报告照片诡影的科员？
E: Is he the one who reported the specter photos?

C: 这里的科员总在自我鞭策，就像永不止息的陀螺——希望得到黑塔大人的认同，甚至…博识尊的注视。
E: The researchers here are always highly motivated, working themselves like an ever-spinning top, trying so hard just to earn recognition from Madam Herta, or maybe even... a sidelong glance from Nous the Erudition.

C: 很忙的样子啊。
E: You look busy.

C: 听艾丝妲小姐说，这位客人似乎是黑塔女士的学术伙伴，能和她往来，那一定是银河中响当当的人物了……
E: Miss Asta said that the guest appears to be Madam Herta's research partner. If he's doing research with her, he must be famous throughout the galaxy...

C: 游戏卡带？
E: Game cartridge?

C: 从结果上来看，这群家伙根本没有带走星核。
E: Look, in the end, they didn't take the Stellaron with them.

C: 那肯定…比我重要得多吧？不插科打诨了，{NICKNAME}，我们应该去主控室看一下。
E: Well... they're definitely far more important than I am. But enough of that. {NICKNAME}, we should go check out the main control room.

C: 她又怎么了？
E: What's with her?

C: 没人比我更懂朋克洛德。
E: Nobody, and I mean nobody, knows more about Punklorde than I do.

C: 这是我的演绎中，最适合巡海游侠的表达。
E: That was the most suitable way of describing the Galaxy Rangers in my interpretation.

C: 每个人都有责任。
E: Everyone's responsible.

C: 是的。在漫长的追踪中，这种违和感贯穿始终。
E: Yes. That incongruous feeling has persisted throughout this long pursuit.

C: （阿兰也很忙啊，还是不打扰他了吧。倒是那边的人…在对着黑塔的画像做什么呢？）
E: (Arlan is also busy. I'd better leave him alone. That person over there... seems to be doing something to Herta's portrait.)

C: 每片区域中都有<color=#dbc291ff>「3个</color>「骇入声明」，试着将它们全部找出来吧。作为附加奖励，收集「骇入声明」会提升你在测试中的作战能力。
E: There are <color=#dbc291ff>3</color> hacking callcards in each area. Try and locate all of them. As an added reward, collecting hacking callcards will increase your combat ability in the test.

C: 是这样的，就像我在短信里说的，虽然入侵事件结束了，但它还是暴露出空间站的信息安保有许多问题，或者说，漏洞。
E: Thing is, like I said in my message, even if the invasion is over, it still exposed many security issues the space station faces. In other words, gaps.

C: 一旦成功接收邮件，无论何时何地、打开与否，程序都会自动开始攻击。眨眼间，「病毒」就会充满整个空间站！
E: The moment the mail is successfully received, the program will attack automatically and immediately regardless of time, location, or whether it was opened. Within moments, the virus will spread throughout the entire space station!

C: 还是算了。
E: Forget it.

C: 我今天就要教训教训他！
E: I have to teach him a lesson!

C: 你情不自禁地开始数房间里到底有几种动物——
E: You find yourself counting her fluffy animals...

C: 祂是…
E: Who is "THEM?"

C: 我们还会再相逢吗？
E: Will we meet again?

C: 看上去是友善的来客。
E: They appear to be friendly.

C: （她似乎提到了令人在意的事，但我想不起来了。）
E: (I think she mentioned something important, but I can't remember.)

C: 总之，好好干吧。我要出门一趟，想找人帮忙，你可以问艾丝妲。
E: Anyway, keep up the good work. I need to go out for a bit. Go ask Asta if you want someone to help you.

C: …唔，没有实体，但有生命的奇物？抱歉，我一时没有头绪……
E: ...Hmm, a Curio that's alive but doesn't have a body? Sorry, but nothing comes to mind...

C: 没有实体，但拥有生命。
E: One that has no body, but is alive.

C: 啧啧啧，看看这小女娃，多乖巧，多水灵。
E: I say, what a wonderfully intelligent-looking young lady.

C: 确实。你编不出来。
E: True. You wouldn't be able to make that up.

C: 在星核猎手的通缉令上，他们被指控与耶佩拉叛乱案有关——导致了兄弟会的覆灭。
E: On the Stellaron Hunters' wanted posters, they stand accused of inciting the Jepella Rebellion — the uprising that caused the downfall of the Brotherhood.

C: 阿德勒也……
E: Adler also...

C: 但可惜，以人类的时间观念来界定，她只活了短暂的二十九天。
E: However, she lived for a mere <unbreak>29</unbreak> days on the human calendar. Such a pity.

C: …嗯？不，等等——
E: ...Oh? No. Hold on...

C: 我只有一事不解。芝士流心大人这么优秀，为什么得不到阮•梅女士的认可呢？它真的很渴望她的爱……
E: It's genuinely puzzling. Despite Molten Cheese Tart's remarkable qualities, why hasn't Madam Ruan Mei acknowledged it? It's clear that it yearns for her love.

C: 对了，这是什么鬼？
E: Aaaand what the heck is this?

C: 她给了我权限，没有再过问。
E: She gave me permission and said no more.

C: （你在示意我去更前方吗？）
E: (Are you telling me to keep going?)

C: 我该去哪里找「培养皿」？
E: Where would I find the incubator?

C: 结论：无法进入。嘶嘶。概率：<unbreak>50%</unbreak>。仍有路径可以查询。
E: Conclusion: You cannot enter. *buzz* Probability: <unbreak>50%</unbreak>. Other paths are open.

C: 会有第五位天才加入吗？
E: Will there be a fifth genius joining?

C: 接下来…我希望你陪我一同出席。
E: And now... I wish for you to attend this meeting with me.

C: 已设置为自适应模式，待机中……
E: Adaptive mode activated. Standing by...

C: 开下导航我看看。
E: Let's take a look at the navigation system.

C: 老歌德，今天谁想摸鱼了？
E: Old Goethe, who's looking to slack off today?

C: 不可能，摸鱼是人的本性。
E: No way. Slacking off is human nature.

C: 咦，你又来听小女子唱歌啊，这可不行啊，你得去歌剧院里正儿八经地听…难道说你还有什么事情要找小女子吗？
E: Huh. Are you here for my singing again? That won't do. You need to enjoy the proper performance in the theater... Or are you here for something else?

C: 好美的花！那我可就收下喽。
E: What beautiful flowers! Thank you so much.

C: 你也会想家？
E: Do you miss home, too?

C: 哎呀，你真是贵人多忘事啊，明明当初帮了我那么大忙。
E: My, my. I know those who do great things often forget their small deeds, but you really helped me out back in the day.

C: 哈哈，这还多亏了你之前经常帮我试茶，我才受到启发，想出用试茶的法子来吸引客人。
E: Hahaha! It's thanks to you helping me sample all those teas! That was what inspired me to use tea tasting as a way to attract customers.

C: …把泰科铵大球馆砸出个洞的事，你自己说还是我来？
E: ...Do you want to mention the time we smashed a hole through Taikiyan Stadium, or shall I?

C: 以「存护」的名义——
E: In the name of Preservation!

C: （也许瓦尔特先生知道这是什么？发消息问问他吧。）
E: (Maybe Mr. Yang will know what this is. Let's send a message to ask him.)

C: 走吧，我们去他房间看看。
E: Let's go to his room and talk to him.

C: 丹恒！布洛妮娅刚才给我们发消息啦，你看到了没？
E: Dan Heng! Bronya just sent all of us a message. Did you see it yet?

C: 话说回来，你怎么收拾得这么快？没有什么要带的行李吗？
E: Wow, that was fast... Don't you have anything you wanna bring with you?

C: 丹恒还在闭关休养，哪儿也不去…所以，你要不要和我俩一起赴约？
E: Dan Heng won't be going anywhere for a while — he's still resting up, so... wanna come with us?

C: 哎呀，居然谦虚起来了？这可不像你呀。
E: So humble all of a sudden, huh? Are you feeling alright? Should I call a doctor?

C: 应大守护者之令——请您在此止步，托帕小姐。
E: By order of the Supreme Guardian, proceed no further, Miss Topaz.

C: 她很懂沟通的艺术。
E: She has a way with words.

C: 说得没错~很多时候，立场不同不代表谁对、谁错——但为了让工作能够推进下去、不陷入停滞的局面，往往只有一个办法……
E: You're absolutely right. Differing views don't necessarily mean one person is right and the other is wrong. However, to keep things moving forward, there's usually only one solution...

C: 既然你明白，咱们就说正事：我现在在庇尔波因特，有笔关乎整个部门的大生意，我这一趟还缺个靠谱的项目管理——朋友，非你莫属啊。
E: Since you get the point, let's get down to business... I'm currently at Pier Point — there's a major deal that could affect the whole department. I just so happen to need a reliable project manager for the job... what do you say, old friend?

C: …嗯？语气这么严肃，这可不像你啊。是什么重要的事，说来给我听听？
E: Uh-oh, sounds like something serious is happening. You'd better fill me in.

C: 谢谢你，克拉拉！你的意见对我们来说非常重要。
E: Thanks, Clara. Your thoughts mean a lot to us.

C: 只能由布洛妮娅自己决断了。
E: Only Bronya can make the final call.

C: 现在开始介绍博物馆…
E: Okay kids, now we're going to learn about the museum...

C: 收到，长官！
E: Yes, sir!

C: 明白，希望你们能享受节日的氛围。
E: Understood. I hope you both enjoy the festivities.

C: 有可能。这个世界的地下藏着不少秘密。
E: It's possible. Many mysteries lurk beneath the surface of this world.

C: 听听娜塔莎医生怎么说吧。
E: You should listen to Dr. Natasha.

C: 你和娜塔莎医生有过节？
E: Did you have a dispute with her?

C: 我无法理解。
E: I've no idea.

C: 这样做一定会让那些已经对「特效药」产生依赖的病人感到痛苦…毕竟要由我们来亲手打碎他们「虚假的希望」。
E: This will be hard for the people that have come to rely on the wonder medicine... but it's up to us to remove this false hope.

C: 别冲动。设身处地地想想，他会有那样的反应也很自然。我能做的只有尽力为这些患者治疗，消除他们的疑虑。
E: Don't let your emotions get the better of you. If I were in his shoes, I might well have had the same reaction. Now I need to focus on treating the patients, and dispelling their doubts.

C: {NICKNAME}，欢迎回到俱乐部！「轻量级」比赛现已开放！
E: {NICKNAME}, welcome back to the club! The lightweight league is now open!

C: 若您有任何需求，请随时告诉我！我来为您安排！
E: If you have any requests, feel free to let me know! I'll try my best to arrange it for you!

C: 真是不好意思，让你看笑话啦……
E: I'm so sorry, you must think I am a joke...

C: 那是什么东西？
E: What's that?

C: 他日纵然回首…
E: One day, as they turn around...

C: 拿好拿好，后会无期~
E: Take it. See you later.

C: 这个教训你好好记住吧。
E: Learn from this lesson.

C: 我只是想帮你，不用害怕。
E: I just want to help you. No need to get scared.

C: 「暖阳花」的花语是「温暖、向往光明」…对于濒临死亡的患者来说，爸爸他应该就是唯一的那束光吧？
E: Sunshines represent "warmth and love of light..." For patients on the verge of death, my dad might have been the only light to penetrate the darkness around them.

C: 对我来说，这些花各自都有不同的涵义。让我亲自挑选的话，肯定耗上很久都拿不定主意。
E: To me, every flower carries a different meaning — it would take me ages to decide.

C: 所以我把它们都藏到了安全的地方，等着您回到上层区的那天再予转交。
E: That's why I put the letters in a secure place, waiting to hand them to you when we could meet again.

C: 对了，「风雪免疫」...要不要喝下它，就由你来决定吧。
E: Oh, the Blizzard Immunity. Shall we drink it? It's your call.

C: 你在此处发现了一张可疑的海报，说不定它和博物馆的文物失窃案有关。
E: You discover a suspicious poster — perhaps it has something to do with the museum theft case?

C: 和佩拉一起检查了孩子们收集到的零件……
E: You and Pela check out the parts collected by the children.

C: 唔…如果不拿着设计蓝图、花上十几个小时仔细做对比的话…应该完全看不出区别吧？对，差不多还原到了这个程度——干得漂亮，{NICKNAME}！
E: Well... as long as you don't pull out the blueprints and spend dozens of hours comparing... this version is virtually indistinguishable from the original. Excellent work, {NICKNAME}!

C: 是布洛妮娅大人的消息吗？看来她也觉得这件事已经拖得太久，必须亲自介入了……
E: Was that a message from Lady Bronya? Hm, this theft case has been dragging on for too long — she must have decided to intervene...

C: 你这么记仇？
E: Are you holding a grudge!?

C: 出发吧。
E: Let's head out.

C: 别想那么多，放好你的哨！今天的口令是<color=#dbc291ff>不烤面包烤红肠</color>，记住没？
E: Don't overthink things — just play your part. Today's password is "<color=#dbc291ff>roast the sausage, not the bread</color>." You got that?

C: 还记得我们上次抓到的那位诺尔伯特公子吗？铁卫从他嘴里打听出了新情报，我这次是特地来通知你的。
E: You remember that Norbert guy we captured? The Silvermane Guards have acquired new intel from him — I thought you might find it interesting.

C: 进来吧，赶紧进屋来，咱们好好讨论下接下来的生意怎么进行。
E: Here, hurry up and come inside. We need to discuss the details of our next operation.

C: 你，解决了星核危机的英雄，大守护者敬重的战友宾朋…要是只因为眼前小小的一道宾馆房门就让犯人溜走了，岂不令人耻笑？
E: Wouldn't it be a shame if you, the hero of the Stellaron crisis, the supreme guardian's respected comrade-in-arms, let the prisoner slip away... just because of a hotel door?

C: 没想到室内是这样…真是座气派的博物馆呢。
E: I didn't expect things to look like this inside... What a magnificent museum.

C: 啊，虽然克拉拉已经是志愿者了……
E: Umm, I'm already a volunteer...

C: 麻烦你了。
E: Thanks for your help.

C: 她说这是个误会。
E: She said it was a mistake.

C: 啧！你、你别蹬鼻子上脸……
E: Tsk! Watch it! Don't push your luck...

C: 希儿说，这样显得有神秘感…
E: Seele said it could make her look more mysterious...

C: 哔嘟…自我介绍。我是「家用寻物仪『理查德』•版本<unbreak>0.63</unbreak>•专家型•年度豪华版」，昵称「查宝」。
E: Beep, beep, beep... Self introduction: I am Richard, the Home-Use Object Finder. Model information: Version <unbreak>0.63</unbreak>, Professional model, Annual Deluxe package. Nickname: "Findie."

C: 哔嘟…本次搜索完毕，进入休眠模式。请及时为「家用寻物仪」充电。
E: Beep, beep, beep... Current search complete. *yawn* Entering sleep mode. Please recharge the Home-Use Object Finder.

C: 大事不好了！虎克大人她，一个人带着洞洞机跑到大矿区里去了！
E: We got trouble! The boss went to the Great Mine alone with her Diggertron!

C: {NICKNAME}，我们把希儿姐姐叫过来，把他抓走！
E: {NICKNAME}, let's tell Seele to take him away!

C: 是我错了……
E: My mistake...

C: 我们找到了矿脉探测器。
E: We found the vein detector.

C: 这宝贝还会哭呢。
E: This treasure can even cry, you know?

C: ——我们手上的物资也不富裕，这些你们就先拿去吧。
E: ...Here, take it. I'm afraid we're short on goods and materials right now.

C: 哎呀，跑偏了——{NICKNAME}，快把好消息告诉大家吧！
E: Ugh, can we focus? {NICKNAME}, tell them the good news already!

C: 我不想死…！
E: A—Agh! I don't wanna die...!

C: （它…说话了？）
E: (Did it just... talk?)

C: 她是我们俩的妹妹，也是朗道家年纪最小的孩子。
E: She's our little sister, the youngest child of the Landau family.

C: 她最近刚从雪原科考归来，但状态一直不大好，似乎有什么心事……
E: She just came back from a scientific exploration on the Snow Plains, but she seems really out of it... almost like she's worried about something...

C: 锵锵——岩烧山珍串做好了！
E: Ta-da. The Stone-Roasted Meat Skewer is ready!

C: …一天都没有落下过。
E: ...never missing a day.

C: 乖，没事没事……
E: Aww, it's okay. It's okay...

C: 不过，要是我们没解决游荡的怪物，你打算怎么办啊？一直躲在这个角落里发抖吗？
E: But if we didn't take care of those monsters, what were you planning to do? Just stay here, shaking in your boots?

C: 这些店铺和招牌…总觉得我以前见过。
E: These shops and signs... Why do I feel like I've seen them before?

C: 你和史瓦罗是什么关系？
E: What's your relationship with Svarog?

C: …克拉拉？你怎么会在这里？
E: ...Clara? What are you doing here?

C: 你说的大危机…
E: The crisis you're referring to...

C: 谁知道呢？
E: Who knows?

C: 还好用吗？
E: Is it working?

C: 唔…我们还要向帕斯卡问清楚——它到底为什么要偷零件。
E: Hmm... We still need to ask Pascal why he was stealing parts in the first place.

C: 唔…不知道这里会不会有线索呢？
E: Hmm... I wonder if we can find any clues here?

C: 是这样的……
E: That is correct...

C: ——好嘞！那你们可跟紧了。
E: Great! Stay close.

C: 呵…要不是搬走得早，说不定我现在也是这群人中的一员哪。
E: Hm... If I hadn't moved away when I did, I'd probably be where they are right now.

C: 咻…突然就攻过来了，真可怕！
E: Phew...That was scary, it just suddenly attacked!

C: 反正把你锤烂以后我们也能拿到认证吧？那正合我意！
E: If we turn you into scrap metal, we still get our certification, right? Suits me!

C: 克拉拉不是说要来找什么机器元件吗？还是先去娜塔的储藏室看看吧。
E: Clara said she was going to find components, right? Let's start with Nat's storage room.

C: 克拉拉，你上次说过吧？史瓦罗的职责是守望下层区，存护这里的文明。如果我们抱着相同的愿望谋求合作，他为什么要拒绝呢？
E: Clara, you said it yourself before, right? Svarog's duty is to protect the Underworld and preserve the civilization here. We have the same wish. Why would he refuse to cooperate with us?

C: 克拉拉一定会回报大家的！但是唯独这件事不行……
E: I'll definitely return the favor! But not like this...

C: 希儿，别说了。那孩子已经下定决心了，我能从她的眼神里看出来。
E: It's no use, Seele. She's made up her mind. I could tell from her expression.

C: 如果有其他需要帮忙的地方，克拉拉一定会努力的！唯独这件事……
E: If there's any other way I can help you, I'll do my best! But this...

C: 人们在别的世界征服了天空。
E: In other worlds, people have already conquered the heavens.

C: 哎呀——没有医生在场的话，怎么能放心战斗呢。
E: Hah, how can you put up your best fight without a doctor on the battlefield?

C: 我作为「地火」的首领，当然不能眼睁睁地看着你们为了下层区奋战，自己却在一边见死不救。
E: As Wildfire's leader, I couldn't simply look on while you fought on our behalf. We had to come help.

C: 克拉拉是谁，也是流浪者吗？
E: Who's Clara? Is she one of us?

C: 宣传单你拿着。好好看看，可别丢了。记得到时候来流浪者营地参加拍卖会，不见不散！
E: Take a pamphlet, have a look, and don't lose it! Remember to stop by the vagrant camp for the auction. Be there or be square!

C: 你们两个的组合还真可爱。
E: Hehe, you two make an adorable duo.

C: …我眼睛虽然有点花，但脑子还没糊涂……
E: ...My eyes might not be up to much, but I can assure you my brain's working just fine...

C: 五百五十冬城盾一次，还有要加价的买家吗？
E: <unbreak>550</unbreak> going once, any buyers going higher?

C: 这个…不要怕，只是技术性调整，不要怕。
E: Uh... There's nothing to worry about — it's just a technical issue.

C: 你的意思是有人在登记注册表上做了手脚吗？不可能，我们全程监督……
E: Are you suggesting that someone altered the registration form? That's simply not possible! We've been keeping a close eye on everything...

C: 啊，就你？少糊弄人了，我才不信！
E: Tsk. You? Yeah right. I don't believe you!

C: 这是你们应得的回报——再说了，你们要是成功拍下了地髓探针，不就又相当于把钱还给卖家了吗？
E: You've earned it. Besides, if you win the bid for the Geomarrow Probe, you'll have paid back the seller anyway, right?

C: 六百！
E: <unbreak>600</unbreak>!

C: 七百二十冬城盾两次！
E: <unbreak>720</unbreak> going twice!

C: …虎克还是觉得，探针才是最好的礼物。
E: ...Hook still thinks the probe is the best gift.

C: 我、我昨晚是看到那个小偷了…不过，你旁边这位是？
E: I—I did see the thief last night, but... who is this person next to you?

C: 叔叔，您先冷静一下…这么说来，那个窃贼应该随身带着金属利器，而且有个…呃，方脑袋…对吗？
E: Sir, please take a deep breath... So, the thief was armed with a metal weapon and had a... um, square head... correct?

C: 它似乎十分需要这些零件，让我们不要伤害它……
E: It seems that it needs these parts, and it's begging us not to hurt it...

C: 唉…克拉拉也觉得这种「机械宠物」很奇怪。
E: *sigh*... This robot pet phenomenon really gets to me.

C: 经过刚才的战斗，小家伙好像已经暂时适应这副新外壳了？太好了……
E: It appears to have adjusted to its new shell after the battle. That's great...
███You██Pascal█good███I██am called██name██!

C: 换言之，考虑到我们无法对网络外的个体进行持续监测，该方法只能在短时间内保证机械单元帕斯卡的稳定性。
E: In other words, because we cannot monitor the robot outside of the network, this approach can only guarantee Pascal's stability for a brief period of time.

C: 根据演算，该个体再度发生故障的概率约为……
E: The probability of the robot crashing again is around...

C: …到那时候，克拉拉就再重复一遍同样的做法。如果之后再发生…那就再来一次。克拉拉会引导它、修复它——不管重复多少遍，克拉拉都会陪伴、帮助帕斯卡……
E: And if that happens, I'll do it again. And if it happens again, I'll go through the exact same steps. I'll guide him and fix him. No matter how many times it happens, I'll be there to help Pascal...

C: 不对，克拉拉觉得不是这样。人与机器应该平等相处…况且，史瓦罗先生不也是「机器」吗？
E: No, I don't think so. Humans and machines should coexist as equals. Isn't Mr. Svarog also a machine?

C: 帕斯卡最近没有出问题吧？
E: How has Pascal been recently?

C: …没、没有，长官！
E: ...N—No, sir!

C: 守护者大人一早提醒过我，你异想天开，触碰禁忌的知识，会给贝洛伯格带来灾祸…但我相信你，姐姐，我相信你对人民的忠诚！可是……
E: The Madam Guardian has warned me before that you were indulging in fantasy, that you'd been exposed to forbidden knowledge, and that you would bring destruction down upon Belobog... I believe you, Serval, I believe you think you're acting with loyalty to the people! It's just...

C: 这不是小时候的打闹游戏了，姐姐。我不会手下留情的！
E: This isn't like our childhood games, Serval. You won't get any leniency from me.

C: 我给你梳理一下——戍卫队上个月订制了一批警卫机器人，因为制造班的产能过于紧张，所以把一部分工作外包给了城里的私人制造厂……
E: Let me give you a rundown first... So, last month, the Garrison ordered a batch of guardbots. And at the time, the manufacturing team was so overstretched that there was no other option but to outsource some workloads to a private manufacturer in the city.

C: 谁知道这批机器人的质量完全没达到验收标准，有严重的失控隐患！
E: And it turns out that this batch of robots is simply subpar, and there is a real danger that they could go out of control.

C: 失控机器的出现位置我已经大致标记好了。赶紧去吧，没时间磨蹭了！
E: I've marked the general location of those robots. Hurry up! We don't have much time left!

C: 咿…！我想，我想……
E: Eh... I think... Um...

C: 她？她家好像出了点事…就先跑回去查看情况了。刚才有个戍卫队的铁卫来找她单独谈话，具体谈了什么内容我是没听到，但她的脸色立刻变得很难看……
E: Well... There seemed to be a family emergency, so she ran back to check on them. It was a Silvermane Guard from the Garrison who came to send her the message. I don't know what they talked about, but she looked dreadful afterwards.

C: 我看到了…人，很多很多人。他们聚集在一片空地上，一起抬头望着某样东西……
E: I saw... people, lots and lots of people. They're gathered in a clearing, and they're all looking up at something...

C: 这里的氛围让人不安。
E: There's a restless atmosphere here.

C: 成功！这道机关也关闭了。
E: Success! Another mechanism shut down.

C: 和胡乱破坏的低级裂界生物不同，它好像有自己的思想，甚至会使用高明的战术。
E: Unlike those random low-level Fragmentum creations, this one seems to have a mind of its own. It seems to be able to use complex tactics.

C: 要不给他解冻试试？
E: Wanna defrost them and find out?

C: 自动机兵防线会负责他们的安全。最重要的防线在上层区，我们一旦崩溃，地下将瞬间覆灭。必须不惜一切代价维持防线。
E: The automatons will ensure their safety. The most important defensive position is here on the surface. If our lines crumble, the underground will vanish in an instant. Our defenses here must be maintained at all costs.

C: 也许，我还要感谢你们，外来者。迫于你们带来的压力…我终于得以直面自己最后的弱点。
E: Perhaps I should be thanking you, outsiders. The pressure you have imposed... has at long last compelled me to confront my final... weakness.

C: 听啊…这力量在涌动…在歌唱……
E: Listen to the power surge... sing...

C: {RUBY_B#祂}星核{RUBY_E#}的力量与我同在…
E: The power of the Stellaron is with me...

C: …嗯。只要还有时间，我们就一定能找到修复世界的办法。
E: ...Okay. As long as we still have time, then I know we'll find a way to save the planet.
...What?

C: （就在这里等待朗道姐弟吧……）
E: (I'll wait for them here...)

C: …大概吧。不过…我来这里的主要目的还是为了自己。
E: I think I'm mostly here for myself. Still...

C: （这里就是杨叔标记的调查区域了…四处看看吧。）
E: (This is the area that Mr. Yang had marked... Better take a look around.)

C: 要不先把奖励给我…？
E: How about giving me my rewards first?

C: 一路平安，{NICKNAME}。愿你此行能有所收获。
E: Have a safe trip, {NICKNAME}. I hope your journey will prove fruitful.

C: 我是受了司辰宫的委派…
E: The Palace of Astrum sent me...

C: 哎呦…{F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}，你帮俺…找找笔记，笔记比俺重要。
E: Oww... {F#Young lass}{M#Young fella}, could you help look for my notes? That's worth more than my life.

C: 您就别拿我说笑了。
E: Please don't tease me.

C: 刚才你不是来问过一遍了吗？我再讲一次哦。
E: Didn't you ask me already? I'll say it one more time.

C: 洗碗布放在这个柜子里，擦桌子的布，我放在厨房第二个柜门上边，厨房用布也单独分出来了……
E: The dishcloth is placed in this cabinet. As for the cloth for wiping the table, I put it on the second cabinet door in the kitchen, and the kitchen clothes are placed separately...

C: 这个「浇花」这里，好像画了一个杯子，然后这里三分之一的水是什么意思啊，是只用倒这么多的水吗？
E: In the "Water the Flowers" section, you drew a glass that is one-third full of water. What does this mean? Is this the amount of water you use to water the flowers each time?

C: 但是梅姐…我对她太过熟悉了，反而注意不到她在为我做什么。
E: As for Mei... I took her for granted and failed to notice all she has done for me.

C: 你瞧瞧，星核一来，天灾人祸。我对仙舟医学史的考察计划又打了水漂。
E: See? Now there's a Stellaron causing calamity here. My plans to research the medical history of the Xianzhou just went down the drain.

C: 丹鼎司里出了不少大事…
E: A lot has happened in the Alchemy Commission...

C: 跳起来触碰枝条。
E: Jump up and reach for the branch.

C: 行，我去回绝陶德吧。
E: Alright. I'll go and decline Todd's offer.

C: 我回来了。
E: I'm back.

C: 又在睡懒觉，你还好吗？
E: Napping again? Are you okay?

C: 找我什么事？
E: What's up?

C: （上报希拉的学习成果）
E: (Reporting the results of Sheila's studies.)

C: 「…学名是『工造司民用维修单元甲型』，该机巧坚称自己是一朵『蘑菇』，请知情者立刻与我联系，有重谢……」
E: "...Its official name is Artisanship Commission Civil Maintenance Unit Type-A, and it self-identifies as a mushroom. Please contact me immediately if you know anything for a hefty reward..."

C: 到最后它就像大部分文艺青年那样，还没来得及写出个把像样的作品，就迷失在喧嚣的城市里了…咳，我希望它不是为生活所迫找了份工，那样的话也太不「诗人」了。
E: In the end, just like all other artistic youths, it got lost in the hustle and bustle of city life before it ever got the chance to write a decent piece... Ahem, I hope circumstances haven't forced it to have to get a job. That wouldn't be very poetic, would it?

C: 人都有对象了。
E: C'mon, she's already got a partner.

C: 来者何人？竟敢从背后接近老夫！
E: Who goes there? Dare thou approach this old timer from behind!

C: …我认为主人写的那些糟粕不能算是诗，甚至连说糟粕都不配……
E: ...I don't think the master's doggerel can be considered poetry. Even calling it "doggerel" is being generous...

C: 但是，可悲可叹呱！我在这乘船码头上已经等待半天了，却没有酝酿到足够的情绪，创作出一首颂离别的诗。
E: But, alas! Croak! I've been waiting all day here on this jetty but haven't managed to brew up the requisite emotions to compose a poem of departures.

C: 你别走，我可以和你一起还贷…
E: Don't go. I can help repay the mortgage...

C: 知音难寻，至交好友即将远行。此一别山高水长，不禁忧心日后的寂寥。世事风霜，人生百态不过如此……
E: Rare is a true companion, a good friend about to depart. The separation is vast and the journey arduous, causing worry for the loneliness that will follow. The world is full of trials and tribulations, life's myriad ways are nothing more than this...

C: 不，今日的小聪已经不是往日的小聪了，我写了一首最美的诗，希望你能听到最后。
E: No, I'm no longer the Cong you know. I've written the most beautiful poem for you. Please listen till the end.

C: 噢噢噢，就是静斋喜欢的那个诗人嘛。听过听过！
E: Oh, it's the poet that Jingzhai dated before. I've heard of him!

C: 这不是我刻上去的，难道孤屿真是我的前世…我们俩的缘分其实早就注定了！
E: I didn't engrave the words. Was I really Guyu in my former life? Jingzhai and I are fated to be together!

C: 想要最新款的女士服装。
E: I'd like to buy the latest arrivals in women's clothing.

C: 你能追上机巧鸟吗？
E: Can you chase after a cycrane?

C: 我把礼物寄出去了。
E: I've sent out the gift.

C: 你低估了她给我的帮助！
E: You underestimated the help she has given me!

C: 我还有其他的事儿。
E: I have other matters to attend to.

C: 我也不知道喔！
E: I have no clue!

C: 你只要举起相机，咔嚓一下，把它拍下来给我就行。
E: Your job is to hold the camera and snap pictures of the markings.

C: 在满是皱纹的老脸上，陶德的五官紧紧皱缩了起来。
E: Todd's wrinkled face crinkles up in pain.

C: （保险起见，还是打开相机用侦测功能看一下吧？）
E: (Should I switch on the camera's detection system, just to be safe?)

C: 嘘——小点声！仙舟人对这样的事情分外警惕。
E: Hey — Shhh! The Xianzhou people are extremely sensitive to that kind of talk.

C: 但一代又一代的学士来到此处，老去，却无功而返。到最后，学会几乎要放弃这项课题了。
E: But generation after generation of scholars came here, grew old, and returned without success. Until finally, the Guild almost gave up this field completely.

C: …这话怎么说？
E: ...What makes you say that?

C: 只是一张普通的家庭合照，没有什么疑点。
E: An ordinary family photo, nothing to see here...

C: …我、我不！我不嘛！我就要你买给我！我就要吃琼实鸟串！
E: ...I, I won't! I won't do it! I want you to buy it for me! I want to eat a berrypheasant skewer!

C: 难道你们没有手机吗？
E: dO yOu GuYs NoT hAvE pHoNeS?

C: （嘘，她要是察觉了我的征兆，一定会动手的。）
E: (Shh, if she notices my symptoms, she won't hesitate.)

C: 莫名其妙！我们都是被骗了的人，你应该向那个臭婆娘……
E: Ridiculous! That woman tricked all of us. You should've told her to take a—

C: 但是经历了这件事情之后，我反倒想，要是我对魔阴身的机理，更有了解就好了……
E: ...but this whole incident has made me wish I knew more about the mara-struck...

C: 但是经历了这件事情之后，我反倒想，要是我对魔阴身的机理，更有了解就好了……
E: ...but this whole incident has made me wish I knew more about the mara-struck...

C: 抱歉，仙舟之上可没有旁听秘密的路灯。
E: I'm sorry, but Xianzhou street lamps aren't in the habit of eavesdropping on conversations.

C: 哦？
E: Oh?

C: 我不会认错的。虽然历代罗浮龙尊庶几相似，但唯有丹枫大人拥有那般神情……
E: I don't think so. The appearance of the Luofu's High Elders have been similar through the ages, but there's no mistaking Master Dan Feng...

C: 龙师们当真以为他们那点小心思没人知道吗？
E: Did the Preceptors truly believe that nobody knew of their scheme?

C: 清醒些吧。对龙女下手，只是在摧毁他们所剩不多的威望罢了。
E: They should return to their senses. Attacking the Dragon Lady only destroys what little prestige they have remaining.

C: 碎片一样的梦境中，总有些兵戎相见的故人；而在旅途中，我也总是能遇见一些能被称为「导师」的人。
E: In my fragmented dreams, I meet enemies on the battlefield... but in my travels, I meet many people who I can describe with the word "teacher."

C: 没错！
E: Precisely!

C: 啊？这？这不是《渔公案》里面出现过的剧情吗？
E: Huh? I... Isn't this a scene from The Angler Mystery?

C: 「饮茶会」只是代号罢了，难道坏蛋会管自己叫「坏蛋会」吗？总要起个没那么恐怖的名字掩人耳目吧！
E: The Tea Society is just a code name, did you think they'd call themselves the Evil Society? They have to have a nice-sounding name to conceal themselves!

C: 好嘞，出发！开始寻访证人！
E: Alright, let's go! Time to interview the witness!

C: 这只是猜测。我们目前没办法知道他做了什么…因为机巧鸟上的影像资料都丢失了。
E: I'm afraid "evil plans" are still within the realm of speculation at this stage. We have no way of knowing exactly what he did because the cycrane data was lost.

C: 好，我也酝酿一下。
E: Sure, gives me time to make a few more adjustments.

C: 我有非常重要的公事，请立刻让你的老板来见我。
E: I have important matters to discuss with your boss. You need to bring him to me now.

C: 「武力威胁」
E: Intimidating

C: 对不住，习惯了。
E: Sorry, old habits.

C: 让你笑话了。我曾经在故乡悠闲度日了许久，久到几乎忘了自己曾经战斗过。自从登上列车后，沉睡许久的热情也渐渐回来了。
E: Hehe, well... I enjoyed a long stretch of peace on my home world — long enough for me to start forgetting that I was also a fighter. After I boarded the Express, my old enthusiasm slowly began to return.

C: 瓦尔特先生说笑了，这是关乎这对母女互相理解的事情，又怎么能算是小事呢？要我说，神策府里的文山会海才是小事。
E: Mr. Yang, you jest. How can harmony between parent and child constitute a triviality? If you ask me, the mountains of documents in the Seat of Divine Foresight are the only triviality around here.

C: 所以，我是被妈妈收养的孩子？而这位采翼小姐…才是我的母亲？
E: So... I was adopted? And this Miss Caiyi... was my real mother?

C: {NICKNAME}，能请您再陪我一次吗，我想和妈妈好好谈谈。
E: {NICKNAME}, can you come with me one more time? I want to have a proper chat with Mom.

C: 我不清楚那会是怎样的未来…在这一点上，我与你一样盲目，因为艾利欧不曾对我透露过只言片语。很久以前，艾利欧让我相信：在这世界上并不存在真正的*自由意志*，选择不过是可能性的穷举。
E: I'm not sure what kind of future that will entail... Elio never revealed a single word about it to me — I'm as blind as you are. A long time ago, Elio convinced me that there is no true "free will" in this world, and that choice is merely an exhaustive list of possibilities.

C: 我可以发誓：{NICKNAME}。我一定会遵守规则，「一真一假」。
E: I give you my word, {NICKNAME}: I will abide by the rule of one truth, one lie.

C: 你是为了容纳星核而诞生的人造体，从诞生起，你的命运就是在黑塔空间站接收星核，我负责在那之前保护你，教你基本的常识、认知以及战斗技巧。
E: You are an artificial body created for the purpose of hosting a Stellaron. From the moment of your birth, it was your destiny to receive the Stellaron at Herta Space Station. Before that task was complete, I was responsible for protecting you, as well as teaching you general knowledge, common sense, and combat skills.

C: 这是你的最后一个问题，{NICKNAME}，给我点惊喜吧。
E: This is your last question, {NICKNAME}. Surprise me.

C: 关于你的过去没什么可说的。你记得我，是因为你只见过我。在你诞生灵魂的时候，是我陪在你身旁。
E: There's nothing to say about your past. You only remember me because I was the one with you when your soul was born.

C: 我成长在一个被星核污染的星球：天衣五——「新巴比伦」，在那里生长的人类不知道什么是恐惧，这种概念根本不存在。
E: I grew up on a planet contaminated by a Stellaron: Pteruges-V — "New Babylon." Humans there don't know what fear is — the concept itself simply doesn't exist.

C: 你为什么加入星核猎手？
E: Why did you join the Stellaron Hunters?

C: 因为{M#他}{F#她}中了我的「言灵」。
E: Because {M#he}{F#she} was struck by my Spirit Whisper.

C: 可能的话，还是想尽量避免那样的未来呵。
E: If possible, I'd like to avoid that kind of future at all costs.

C: 哈，我们云骑军就是要保护你们的嘛。这一片都戒严了，我正在疏散群众呢，你跟着我走，我带你去安全的地方。
E: Ha, I was protecting you more like — it's a Cloud Knight's job to protect others. This area is under martial law, I'm escorting all civilians to safety. Follow me.

C: 你的云骑枪法不赖啊，哪个伍的？
E: That was some impressive Cloud Knight spearmanship. Which unit are you from?

C: 素裳姑娘，仙舟出什么事了？我往来行商多次，从未见星槎海如此模样。
E: Miss Sushang, what exactly has transpired here? In all my trade visits, I've never seen Starskiff Haven in such a state.

C: 不是搬箱就是开锁…好像咱们才是本地人，是给外来游客停云小姐引路的。
E: Moving containers, picking locks... Seems like we're doing all the heavy-lifting just so Miss Tingyun can enjoy the scenery.

C: 我是行商啊，熟悉仙舟有何奇怪。倒是你一个云骑，好像全不熟悉本地的路线似的。
E: I'm a merchant, is it really that strange that I know my way around the Xianzhou? Now, for a Cloud Knight to be unfamiliar with the local topography...

C: 打扰了，我有事求见将军。
E: Greetings. I need to speak to the general about something.

C: 不必了，我并非为此而来。云骑行使职责，并无过错。我当时一意突围，也多有得罪了。
E: That won't be necessary, the Cloud Knights were doing their duty. I should be apologizing for any damage I caused myself.

C: 别走，还未决出胜负呢。
E: Leaving so soon? We haven't settled this yet.

C: 这杆枪，依旧认得你这个主人。
E: This spear still recognizes you as its master.

C: 我将此事呈报元帅，怎料那位{RUBY_B#玉阙的爻光}「戎韬将军」{RUBY_E#}颇感兴趣，竟中道拦阻，设下「十方光映法界」，想先一步会会二位。
E: I reported everything to the Marshal, and {RUBY_B#Yao Guang of Yuque}the Seer Strategist{RUBY_E#} just so happened to take an interest in the case — they set up a Deca-Light Reflection Barrier in hopes of meeting the two of you beforehand.

C: 是么？我只是在思考。
E: Huh? I'm just thinking.

C: 我们…认识吗？
E: Do we... know each other?

C: 我教你剑时就已说过啦。我不对全无生趣、引颈待戮的人动手——
E: I told you when I taught you the way of the sword — I am uninterested in drawing my blade against someone who does not long for life... who wants only to be slaughtered—

C: 喂，你别慌，我这就救你出来！
E: Hey, don't panic, I'll get you out of there!

C: 那你来得不巧，仙舟出了点意外。不过要不了多久，将军就会解决的。走吧，你不能待在这儿，咱们得去最近的云骑驻所。
E: You chose a bad time for a visit I'm afraid — there's been an incident. It won't take long for the general to fix it, though. This place isn't safe — we should head to the nearest Cloud Knight garrison.

C: 剑首？我记得，那是云骑军中剑术登峰造极之人的头衔。太遥远了……
E: Sword Champion? If I recall correctly, that title is bestowed on one who reaches the pinnacle of swordsmanship in the Cloud Knights. But that was a long time ago...

C: 行迹可疑，藏头露尾，只这一条就够了。你该不会觉得我是小孩子，就很好糊弄吧？
