E: ...Suspicious behavior and half-truths — those alone are reason enough. You think you can fool me just because I'm a child?

C: …他有没有教你如何处置堕入魔阴身的仙舟人？
E: ...but did he ever teach you how to deal with the mara-struck?

C: 对付魔阴身时，我发现了这个…
E: When I was dealing with the mara-struck, I found this...

C: 外人看来，这封信不过是某人久病得愈的家书喜讯。但里面所写的事情，实则触犯了「不赦十恶」的禁律，堪称大逆不道。
E: To an outsider, this letter appears to be nothing more than good news detailing a recovery from a chronic illness. However, what is actually being discussed is a violation of the Ten Unpardonable Sins. It's heresy.

C: 我能从药王那儿得到什么？
E: What can I get from Sanctus Medicus?

C: 你低下头，对周围的一切充耳不闻，静静地抄写着。
E: You lower your head. You become closed off to the world around you as you quietly copy the text.

C: 你们准备得怎么样了？可以决斗了吗？
E: So, have you prepared yourselves? Are you ready to fight?

C: 不必谦虚。我习武多年，你有几斤几两，我一看便知。
E: No need for modesty. I've studied martial arts for years — I can tell how strong you are with just a glance.

C: 开药方的人是谁？
E: Who prepares the prescriptions?

C: 我们曜青的寿瘟祸迹是轮月亮，啧啧，感觉比罗浮的好看。
E: The Luofu's plaguemark is a tree, while the Yaoqing's is a moon. Ha, I think we got the better one.

C: 大叔……
E: Master Gongshu...

C: 如果所料无差，应该就是咱们攻入丹鼎司的时候了。
E: Unless I'm mistaken, this must be the time we broke into the Alchemy Commission.

C: 你对这个女孩有何企图？不管你存着什么样的心思…这般夺走他人回忆，如叶障目，愚弄他人——
E: What do you want with this girl? No matter the nature of your intentions... stealing others' memories like this, deceiving them, blinding them...

C: 请你相信「流光忆庭」，我所做的一切，都是为了保护你。
E: *sigh* Please trust the Garden of Recollection. Everything I'm doing is for your protection.

C: 那又何必执着于回望过去呢？
E: Then why are you obsessing over the past?

C: 我在现实中也没挨过景元的打啊……
E: Well, I was never beaten up by Jing Yuan in reality, either...

C: 有点瘆得慌……
E: Do you have to make it sound all scary...?

C: 跟上我。
E: Come with me.

C: 这么离谱的事情…我连想都没想过。不过，你说的很有可能喔！
E: Could it be...? That never even occured to me... but I guess it's not impossible!

C: 但是，我也很担心这样的选择会不会给星穹列车带来麻烦……
E: But naturally, I'm concerned about whether or not this places the Astral Express in any danger...

C: 那你多吃一点！
E: Then eat to your heart's content!

C: 云璃，你先出去。
E: Yunli, please go for now.

C: 就是考虑到这样的情况才瞒着她。本不欲节外生枝，却反倒弄巧成拙，冥冥中莫非真有天意？
E: This is exactly why I didn't want Yunli to know about this. I didn't want to create trouble, but trouble found its way here anyway. Perhaps it really is divine intervention?

C: 是这样吗？谢谢你。
E: Really? Thank you.

C: 看起来为我指路的匠人也不知道武库在哪里，就这么翻找下去，也没有任何效率，说不定我还会被爷爷先带走……
E: Seems like not even those craftsmen know where the arsenal is... At this rate, we won't find anything, and Grandpa might take me away before I can do anything...

C: （至少要将工造司里发生的事告诉怀炎将军，现在回司辰宫一趟吧。）
E: (I should go back to the Palace of Astrum and tell General Huaiyan what happened at the Artisanship Commission.)

C: 孤云被盗一事，虽然所有知情者各有大小不一的嫌疑。但其中云璃小姐是本案最大的嫌疑人。
E: In this case of Guyun's theft, everyone involved seems suspicious to some extent, but Miss Yunli is the main suspect.

C: （合上剑匣）
E: (Close the sword case)

C: 不，我仍然要熔了这柄剑！
E: No, I'm still going to melt down this sword!

C: 我被困在了这里，但这支步离人猎群应该也遇到了同样的困境……
E: It's true that I'm stranded here, but it seems like that borisin pack is in the same boat...

C: 你骗了他们，也骗了我。
E: You lied to them, and you lied to me, too.

C: 于是我回到了埋葬那家伙的石碑前——从此之后，再也无人能将我从石碑中拔出。
E: So, I returned to the stone monument where my master was buried, and since then, no one was able to remove me from it.

C: 只是在下次冲动之前，我会先等一等。
E: But maybe I'll try to be more patient next time.

C: （如实相告）
E: (Tell the truth.)

C: 哎！这都是花火的个人发言，可不代表假面愚者啊！
E: Hey! That's Sparkle who's saying all that! She doesn't represent the Masked Fools!

C: 再想一想。
E: Think again.

C: 以我尚浅的认知，只能得出两个结论：其一是，凶手似乎没有制造「密室杀人」的必要，因为密室总需要一个存在的理由……
E: Based on my shallow understanding, I can only draw two conclusions: One is that the murderer did not need to create a locked-room case — because a locked-room always needs a reason to exist...

C: 以上，便是「假面天才」花火大人的挑战书！所有线索已经备齐——祝君狩猎愉快！
E: Thus the Masked Genius Miss Sparkle has thrown down the gauntlet! All the clues are in motion — happy hunting!

C: 不必惊慌！太卜司可不止这一扇门。我知道有个地方可供紧急时出入。
E: There's no need to panic, okay? This isn't the only entrance into the Divination Commission. I know an emergency access.

C: …多余的问话到此为止！三座阵基启动了吗！
E: ...No more questions! Have you activated the three terminals!?

C: …喂，你不会被她洗脑了吧？！
E: ...Hey, did she brainwash you!?

C: 是呀，我就知道符卿必有对策。
E: Of course, I'm sure you have a countermeasure at the ready, Master Diviner.

C: 你们来时都见过玉界门吧？这「换境画屏」与玉界门同等效用，能将两个空间坐标以某种，咳咳，外人听不懂的方式连接在一起。
E: You all saw the Jade Gate on your way in, I assume? The Shifting Screen works in the same way. It connects two spatial coordinates in ways that laymen, ahem, wouldn't understand.

C: 等、等等！年轻人，你可是小瞧了工造司啊。将军远在天边，帮不了你们，但老夫可以！
E: H—Hold on! My young friends, don't underestimate the Artisanship Commission. The general is too far off to help us now, but I can!

C: 这东西在守卫「建木」根须和洪炉……
E: It's guarding the Ambrosial Arbor's roots and the furnace.

C: 我…丹枢姐姐…我能靠我自己，只有自己才靠得住……
E: I... You're right, Dan Shu... From now on, I'll do my best to rely on myself...

C: 不，没事了…是在下一时失言。
E: It's nothing... Forget I said anything.

C: 那我们就暂时别过吧，{NICKNAME}小友。
E: See you soon, {NICKNAME}.

C: 我会立刻传令通缉丹枢的。如果你有找到她的线索，也欢迎随时与我联系。
E: I'll put out a wanted notice for Dan Shu immediately. If you find any trace of her, get in touch with me.

C: （交出「餐云承露丹」）
E: (Hand over the Brumedew Concentrate Pellet)

C: 你打断青镞的话头，向她汇报了此前在工造司发生的一切。
E: You interrupt Qingzu and report to her everything that happened at the Artisanship Commission.

C: 上得去，下不来！
E: Can't see right, can't see left!

C: 总不见得让我喂狼吧？
E: I can't feed myself to them, right?

C: 朋友啊，你可能不清楚，你方才杀害的是「放生帮」成员放生的小动物。他们以将生命从危险境地中解放出来，任其自由生活为乐事。
E: My friend, you may not be aware that you have killed an animal released by the Unshackled. They are a group that enjoys rescuing animals from dangerous situations and releasing them.

C: 我什么时候说要加入了？
E: When did I say I want to join them?

C: 先放一边…
E: Let's put it aside first...

C: （他们似乎沉浸在自我感动的氛围中…还是不要打扰他们了。）
E: (They seem to be deeply moved by their own actions... I'd better not disturb them.)

C: 未必没有胜算啊，人偶…
E: We've still got a chance, puppet...

C: 你看明白了吗？这篇志怪话本出现在幻障迷境里是有原因的，话本里藏着离开这里的提示，你要是记不住，就再来看一遍。
E: Do you understand? This story of the supernatural is in the illusory maze for a reason. It contains the clue to help us get out of here. Come back and read it again if you need to.

C: 你来仙舟这么久，都没有听说过十王司吗？
E: You've been on the Xianzhou for this long and you've never heard of the Ten-Lords Commission?

C: 「绥绥仙狐，颀尾庞庞」，绥园本是一位狐人巧匠打造的园林洞天，供同胞们休憩闲游、赋诗宴饮的地方…以下五百字省略。
E: "Wandering Fox Spirits and Ghostly Tails..." Fyxestroll Garden was originally a garden delve constructed by a foxian craftmaster. It was a place for their kin to rest, write poems, and feast... et cetera et cetera.

C: 你们是什么人，为什么会来到这里？立刻逮捕！
E: State your name and your business! Arrest them immediately!

C: （…这里是？）
E: (...Where am I?)

C: 你就是…那个驱走「幻胧」的人……
E: You... You are the one who drove Phantylia away...

C: 别管那个判官小姑娘，咱们俩离开这儿就行。
E: Forget about the judge — just get us both out of here.

C: …能帮到你真是太好了。
E: ...I—I'm glad it helped...

C: …说的比唱的还好听。
E: ...Don't get ahead of yourself, Cirrus.

C: 门扇轻轻打开，透过门缝，你注意到门后并无一人，之前的声音就像不曾存在过一般。
E: The door cracks open a sliver. Through the crack, you notice that there is no one behind the door, as if the voice from before have never existed.

C: 可是……
E: But...

C: 欸？这口气，不像是雪衣大人。
E: Huh? That doesn't sound like Madam Xueyi... right?

C: 去调查其他铜镜。
E: Investigate other mirrors.

C: 我和雪衣大人相处了很久，她一直都了解我胆小怕事，但是却从未苛责过我。
E: I've spent a long time working with Madam Xueyi. She's always known that I'm scared and timid, but she never told me off...

C: 你懂个屁！嗐…说这些干什么！现在应该怎么办？
E: What do you know!? Tsk... And what are we even talking about? We need to focus...

C: 没想到你这姑娘竟然真的能通过这条道路，呵呵，这么多年了，终于算是有所成长。
E: Ha, I didn't think you'd be able to, hehe. All these years and you finally started to grow up a bit.

C: 贵客，欢迎光临！我是这里的店长柯柯娜，请问您有什么需要的吗？
E: Welcome, guest! I'm the shop owner here, Cocona. How may I assist you?

C: 嘀嗒！刚才和你说话的人，感觉不太对劲。
E: Tick-tock! Something's not quite right about the person you just spoke to.

C: 等到天边的光芒出现…等到……
E: Just got to wait till the light appears over the horizon... Till then...

C: 常见的症状，看来还是以前的老毛病。
E: A common symptom. Looks like her old problem is acting up again.

C: 不过是为了让我乖乖留下罢了…不过是为了让我忘记自己究竟是谁……
E: It's just to make me stay obediently here... To make me forget who exactly I am...

C: 她那么看中那张唱片，应该可以用它打开她的心锁吧？快去试试！
E: That record she values so much could be used to unlock the locks over her heart. Go try it now!

C: 别害羞嘛。这样，我先告诉你我想做什么，然后我们交换好不好？
E: Don't be shy. How about I tell you what I want to do first, then you tell me?

C: 我会努力变成你想象中的样子。
E: I'll work hard to become that image in your mind.

C: 能力出众、踏实肯干的柯柯娜，在很短的时间内就成为了店里的明星销售。
E: The capable and down-to-earth Cocona did not take long to become the store's star employee.

C: 但那还是在说谎…
E: But it's still lying...

C: （柯柯娜…必须让她冷静下来。）
E: (Cocona... I must calm her down.)

C: （这恐怕是最后的机会…<color=#dbc291ff>我必须拉她一把。</color>）
E: (This may be my last chance... <color=#dbc291ff>I have to help her out.</color>)

C: 我不能眼睁睁地看着你…坠落。
E: I can't just stand by and watch and let you... fall.

C: 为了留下你，我不得不去尝试。
E: If it means that you'll stay, I have to give it a try.

C: 我会一刻不停地为你鼓掌~
E: I will keep applauding you!

C: 找不到她了？您的意思是……
E: Can't find her? You mean...

C: 不然的话，不然的话…他们肯定会判我工作失职、禁止我再入梦的！
E: Or else, or else... I know that they will deem me negligent of my duties and forbid me from ever dreaming again!

C: 糟、糟了——您、您看上去是位通情达理的{F#小姐}{M#先生}，求您别把这件事告诉家族的人！
E: Oh—Oh no! Pl—Please... you seem like a reasonable person... Please do not tell The Family about this!

C: 我听说那位客人是因为赊欠房费被强行赶走的。他好像已经在匹诺康尼住了很久了…但他看上去实在不像什么有钱人。
E: I heard that this client was forced to leave as he was behind on his room fees. He had been in Penacony for a very long time... But he didn't look like a rich man to me.

C: 为了维系这幅躯壳的存在，很多人都在持续地付出代价。那代价包括财力、时光、生命…甚至「自我」。
E: Many people are still paying a price to maintain the existence of this body of mine. They are paying with their finances, their time, their lives... and even their "selves."

C: 希望做到这个地步就够了。
E: I hope we've done enough.

C: 航班就要起飞了，要是不抓紧时间的话……
E: Your flight is about to take off. If you don't hurry...

C: 看来您已经做出明智的选择，接下来的事情就交给我来处理吧。
E: Looks like you've already made the most astute choice. Leave the rest of the matter to me.

C: 匹诺康尼的折纸打印技术相当成熟，您需要现打一座半身像摆上去吗？
E: Penacony's origami printing techniques are quite advanced. Do you want to print a bust tailored to your visage and place it here?

C: 再问一遍，你知道*我*是谁吗？
E: I'll ask you again: Do you know who I am?

C: 您客房里的《进入梦乡》杂志每期都会刊登填字游戏，您得空时可以试着玩玩，打发下时间……
E: There are crossword puzzles in every issue of the Diving into Dreamland magazine in your guest room. You can try those out if you wish to kill some time...

C: 叫我「灰总」就好。
E: Just call me Boss Gray.

C: 别废话了，开始工作吧！
E: Enough blabbing already. Get to work!

C: 原来是他！你感到一阵轻松，这样事情就好办了。
E: Him! You feel relieved — this is going to make things easier.

C: 另外，你也对自己在酒店<unbreak>135</unbreak>层工作的同事展现出的专业能力感到钦佩：他或她顺利帮助罗伊罗伊先生完成了入住，而且完全没有扰乱你的工作节奏。
E: Also, you admire the professionalism of your coworker up there on the <unbreak>135</unbreak>th floor. They have helped Mr. Royroy complete his check-in without disrupting the flow of your work.

C: …这世上你第二难以忍受的事情，就是看着一个皮皮西人在你面前掉泪——心碎程度仅次于目睹妙龄银发美少女在你眼前化作泡沫。你决定放他一马……
E: ...The second-hardest thing in the universe for you to endure is to watch a Pepeshi weeping... second only to the heartbreak of watching a young silver-haired girl turn into bubbles before you. You decide to give him a freebie...

C: …哼唧？
E: ...Oink?

C: 呵呵…明面上是公司里数一数二的精英，私底下却还像是两个血气方刚的小年轻呢。
E: Hehe... They are top elites of the IPC in public, but just two hot-headed kids in private.

C: 真让人惊讶，你的表情管理意外地很不错呢~
E: I'm surprised by how you make sure your facial expressions look great all the time.

C: （等着吧，青雀！你的{F#好姐妹}{M#好兄弟}来救你了！）
E: (Wait for me, Qingque! Ya {F#girl}{M#boy} is coming to your rescue!)

C: 越是到了关键时刻越需要理性的思考。干得漂亮，{NICKNAME}。
E: The more critical the moment, the more important it is to think rationally. Good job, {NICKNAME}.

C: 谁、谁让你提奥帝叔叔了！快闭嘴！
E: Wh—Why did you mention Uncle Oti! Zip it!

C: 那么，有缘再见！
E: So then, 'til we meet again!

C: …这也是我希望列车的各位老师能来的原因。
E: ...That was why I hoped that the crew would be here.

C: 三月七熟络地将她准备好的苏打豆汁儿拿出，地道的罗浮饮料已经准备很久了！
E: March 7th takes out the mung bean soda she prepared with practiced ease. She'd prepared this authentic Luofu drink ages ago!

C: 是彦卿小兄弟，还有星穹列车的客人们啊，让各位久等了。
E: It's Yanqing and the Astral Express crew! Thank you all for waiting.

C: 我能不知道吗？我的意思是说，既然没有完成最初的教学目标，三月就还是个没出师的徒弟。哪怕我回到朱明仙舟，三月你可不能疏忽了练习！
E: You think I don't know that? What I mean is, as she has not yet completed the initial target for her training, March has still not completed her tuition. I don't want you slacking on your training while I'm back on the Xianzhou Zhuming!

C: 正是，要是本座在这里，哪里会出这么多岔子！
E: Precisely. There's no way so many things would go wrong with me around!

C: 你还在惦记着手稿吗？
E: Are you still thinking about the manuscript?

C: 这个巨大的水箱里放着的是…种子？
E: This giant water tank holds... seeds?

C: 要不{NICKNAME}你去监督吧……
E: Well, then, how about you keep an eye on him, {NICKNAME}...

C: 为什么雪衣判官可以做到这些事？
E: Why do you have the power to do these things?

C: 莱恩老师，我从格物院里找到你最后的手稿，和入职邀请函放在一起，第一页背面写着「这是我一生的梦想」……
E: Master Ryan, I found your last manuscript in the Sapientia Academe stashed together with the IPC Designer Invite. At the back of the first page, it wrote, "This is the dream of my life"...

C: 有点怀念磐岩镇的温馨了。
E: I'm kinda missing Boulder Town's homey feeling.

C: 噢，我好像想起来了…之前有一次卢卡守擂，希儿就在下面当观众。
E: Oh, I remember now... Luka was defending his title once, and Seele was watching in the audience.

C: 所以你们打了一场？
E: So, you two had a fight?

C: 哎…总是自说自话，拿你没办法。行吧，既然{NICKNAME}答应了，那这趟也算我一个。
E: *sigh* There's no stopping you once you've made up your mind. Fine. Since {NICKNAME} agreed, count me in too.

C: 「师傅，我很高兴！」
E: "Master, I feel great!"

C: 但他又怕卡西迪能把「小飞」修好，然后用追踪功能寻找「大奔」…所以他把损坏的无人机丢到了某个地方，自己带着「大奔」跑路了。
E: But they also knew that Cassidy could fix Little Fay, and use its tracker function to find Big Ben... The thief must have tossed the broken drone somewhere and only made off with Big Ben.

C: 死不悔改啊，这家伙——那就不用再跟他废话了，卢卡！
E: Going all the way, huh? Enough talk then — Luka, let's get him!

C: 「熔锤镇出身的勇士…」
E: "The Moltammerville warrior..."

C: …那我们可算是棋逢对手，对吧？
E: ...That means we're evenly matched, right?

C: …也别看我，都是他自己一拍脑门想出的主意。同不同意都看你，史瓦罗。
E: ...Don't look at me. He's the one who came up with this idea. It's up to you to accept it or not, Svarog.

C: 哈哈哈，看吧，都说了我绝对能说服他！
E: Hahaha, see? I told you I could convince him!

C: 帮助下层变得安全，然后喊出我的决胜台词——
E: I'll make the Underworld safe, then yell out my other winning slogan:

C: 不过，史瓦罗承认了玛吉的实力，也愿意听我讲讲下层区大家的事情。
E: But Svarog will acknowledge my strength and be willing to listen to the Underworlders.

C: 姬子，你觉得如何？按照列车目前的状况，我们接受了黑天鹅女士的提议，应该安排一次去翁法罗斯的「开拓之旅」，补充燃料。
E: What do you think, Himeko? Since we've accepted Miss Black Swan's proposal, we should probably head to Amphoreus for refueling.

C: 喂！别走的那么快！喂…至少出了事别把我们供出来啊！唉，他们不会惹出什么事端吧…真令人不安。
E: Hey, wait! Just think about what you're doing! And... don't mention our names if something goes wrong! Ugh, I hope they don't get into trouble... This is nerve-wracking.

C: 将军说了，想要让罗浮从灾后重整旗鼓，恰恰需要这场演武仪典。
E: The General said this ceremony would help the Xianzhou Luofu recover from the crisis.

C: 确实。
E: I agree.

C: 属下也是百思不得其解。朱明的使节舰按规矩，停靠在客船码头，将这群犯人移交罗浮这边。
E: Honestly, it gives me a headache too. The Zhuming diplomatic ship, adhering to standard procedure, docked at the passenger terminal to hand these criminals over to the Luofu.

C: 想我们了吗？
E: Did you miss us?

C: 他为什么看起来如此衰老？
E: Why does he look so old?

C: 怀炎将军言重了，在下不过是据实传达罢了。我家将军考虑到让两位久等不妥，先遣我们二人前来……
E: Please do not misunderstand me, General Huaiyan. I was simply stating the truth. Master thought it would be inappropriate to keep you waiting, so she sent us here...

C: 那可不行！每把剑都是彦卿的宝贝！
E: Unacceptable! Every sword is precious to me!

C: 听丹恒先生一说，彦卿才察觉到这背后涌动的暗流。
E: Thanks to your words, Mr. Dan Heng, now I finally see the underlying tensions.

C: 你乱吹牛别带上我。
E: Brag all you want, but don't drag me into this.

C: 但现在你们直接明抢公司的货物，这是不是有点过分了？
E: But straight-up snatching IPC cargo, isn't that going a bit too far?

C: 住…住口！谈事就谈事，你翻那些旧账有意思吗？
E: S-stop it! Let's focus on the business at hand. What's the point in dragging up the past?

C: 嘿嘿，这就是你不懂了～按照公司的《筑材物流部运输合同法》第<unbreak>17</unbreak>条之规定：「当货物已寄出且仍在途中时，除运输事务安全外一切风险责任由寄件方承担。」
E: Hehe, let me tell you something! As stated in Article 17 of the IPC's Building Material Logistics Department Transport Agreement Law: "Subsequent to the dispatch of goods and during their transit, all risks, save for those pertaining to the transportation safety, shall be the sole liability of the consignor."

C: 这位姐姐…还真是不简单啊！
E: This lady... is really something else!

C: 明白了。请吧，斯科特先生。
E: I'm on it. Please follow me, Mr. Skott.

C: 还是司鼎大人思虑周全。
E: That's really thoughtful of you, Cauldron Master.

C: 这么称呼，是不是听起来好多了？
E: Sounds much better, right?

C: 我明白啦，就依将军所说，我答应了！
E: I see, General. Then count me in!

C: 好哇！自明日开始，彦卿与云璃会每日教你云骑剑术的基本要旨。
E: Great! Starting tomorrow, Yanqing and Yunli will teach you the basics of the Cloud Knights' swordplay.

C: 但对呼雷的探视，从来是由曜青仙舟天舶司派出使节，百年一次。为何你要在这节骨眼上……
E: Usually only emissaries from the Xianzhou Yaoqing's Sky-Faring Commission visit him once every century. Why do you have to visit him now, of all times...?

C: 奇怪，是我起晚了吗？三月和丹恒这是去了哪儿？
E: Hmm, did I oversleep? Where did March and Dan Heng go?

C: 这附近似乎有什么味道？
E: What's this smell around here?

C: 形如撑天巨柱的「钥匙」贯入「锁孔」中，开启通往镇伏凶犯的幽狱之底。
E: When a "key" in the shape of a colossal sky-bearing column slots into the "keyhole," it unlocks the path to the Shackling Prison crypts, where criminals of high severity are held in subdued captivity.

C: 这些入侵者拥有非凡的力量，他们无需持配武器，他们自己就是最危险的武器。
E: These intruders possess extraordinary strength. They wield no weapons, for they are the deadliest weapons themselves.

C: 步离人巨大的身形充满压迫感。即便死去多时，这堆肉山仍仿佛能随时跃起扑杀猎物一般，令人颤栗。
E: The borisin's large stature easily lends them an intimidating quality that stays with them even after their demise. Looking at this pile of borisin corpses would send chills down anyone's spine, for it feels as though they can reanimate and pounce onto their prey any moment.

C: 毒药？
E: Is it poison?

C: 即便是登上战场，斩阵杀敌，在与那些恶形恶状的孽物交锋时，我也一无所惧。
E: Even in the thick of battle, facing down savage abominations, I never felt scared.

C: 我…没有彦卿小弟这样的梦想。我之所以要挑战守擂竞锋，只不过是因为答应了爷爷，想赢下他赠给演武仪典的宝剑。
E: Well, I... I don't have a dream like Yanqing does. The only reason I'm participating in the Ringmaster's Challenge is because I made a promise to my grandfather. I wanna win the precious sword he's contributed to the Wardance.

C: 彦卿小弟，能不能把刚才的话再学一遍？
E: Could you repeat what you just said, Yanqing?

C: 好方便的能力！
E: That's pretty convenient!

C: 你刚才已经说过了。
E: You already said that a moment ago.

C: 不知道你怎么想，我不会把生命浪费在这种毫无意义的选项上。
E: I don't know how you think, but I won't throw my life away for a lost cause.

C: 云璃，那么眼下的情况该如何处置啊？
E: So, Yunli, what do you think we should do?

C: 神策府这边打算怎么办？
E: What's your plan now?

C: 这群步离人都身着官方服色。除云骑之外，还有两人以天舶司和工造司的身份示人。
E: All these borisin are dressed in official attire. Besides the Cloud Knight, there were also two borisin disguised as members of the Sky-Faring Commission and the Artisanship Commission.

C: 好惊人的力量…凶手只用了一击便打碎了这名武弁的骨骼。
E: Incredible strength... The attacker shattered this warden's bones with a single blow.

C: 呼雷，你有没有想过，为何过去整整七百年，这些家伙才想到要来营救你？
E: Hoolay, have you ever wondered why it took them seven centuries to come to your rescue?

C: 水…我想喝口水。
E: Water... I need some water.

C: 你是步离人。
E: You are borisin.

C: 在此值勤的云骑士兵孤立无援，<color=#eb4d3dff>若是轻举妄动向她求助，无论成功与否，都会引发严重的后果</color>…切记，千万要谨言慎行。
E: The Cloud Knights Soldier on duty here is alone and without reinforcements. <color=#eb4d3dff>Understand if you thoughtlessly ask her for aid, you will reap severe repercussions regardless if the outcome is a success or failure.</color> ...Remember: Be mindful of your words and actions.

C: 到底是怎么回事…迴星港早该传来消息了。
E: What exactly is happening... We should have received word from Stargazer Navalia long ago.

C: 猜测猎物可能的去向，接着就该慢慢收网了。
E: We predict their next move, and we take them down.

C: 你看了这么久的竞锋舰，发现了什么吗？
E: You've been observing the Skysplitter for a while. Have you noticed anything?
Ah...

C: 真遗憾。在听完这个故事的刹那，我心中竟然升起了一丝对你的敬意。
E: What a shame. What a shame. Your story actually sparked a trace of respect for you in my heart.

C: 就是这股气势…很有精神嘛！三月，你要是能双腿打直了别发抖，那就看起来更有说服力了。
E: That's the spirit, sounds like you're all fired up! If you could just keep your legs from shaking so much, it would be more convincing, March.

C: 那是爷爷交托给我的任务，至于你，安心守住擂台就好。
E: That was the mission my grandfather entrusted to me. You just relax and keep guard over the ring.

C: 我已收到驭空大人的知会，特来接应二位。
E: I was informed of your arrival by Madam Yukong and came to greet you personally.

C: 遭人暗算。
E: There was a plot against him.

C: 那真实的原因是？
E: Then what is the real reason?

C: 请问是哪位选手呢？
E: May I ask who that might be?

C: 还记得我告诉你们的吗？狩猎，应当考虑猎物的所想，而不是一味追逐猎物的踪迹。
E: Do you remember what I told you before? Hunting is about thinking in the same way as your prey, not just mindlessly chasing after them.

C: 答的好！擂赛马上就要开始了，我必须去完成爷爷交付的任务了。
E: Good answer! The tournament is about to begin, so I must go carry out the mission that Grandpa gave me.

C: 这不是云璃小姐吗？如果有什么事情需要帮助的，请告诉在下。
E: Is that you, Miss Yunli? If there is anything that I can help you with, please let me know.

C: 还得引用景元将军的名言吧，「嗐，来都来了。」
E: To use General Jing Yuan's favorite expression: "Since I'm already here..."

C: 给我记好了，我叫三月七！罗浮的守擂剑士！
E: Remember this! My name is March 7th! Ringmaster of the Luofu!

C: 你们以为我会逃跑？狼所行之路，只有前进，没有逃离！
E: You thought I would run? A wolf's path only goes forward. Running is never an option!

C: 但你错了，他们很明白，狼永远是狼。
E: But you were wrong. They know all too well that a wolf will always be a wolf.

C: 为了让天上的众星，成为步离人放牧的原野。
E: I fight so that I can turn the stars above into a great wilderness for the borisin to roam.

C: 「猎狼守擂」行动结束，地衡司的使者们抚恤民众，一时惊扰也旋即平复。
E: Operation "Wolfhunt Showdown" has ended. The messengers from the Realm-Keeping Commission are calming down the populace and the momentary disruption has subsided.

C: 而在这之前——要与神相争，更大的「联盟」不可或缺。为此，他们还向仙舟引介了一位盟友。
E: Before reaching that point, battling the gods necessitates a larger alliance. Hence, they sought out an ally for the Xianzhou.

C: 只能在城里到处找找看了…
E: I'll just have to look around in the city...

C: 若是「家族」做的，我有办法。
E: If The Family did it, I have an idea.

C: 有什么和她过去有关的物件吗？
E: You got any items that have to do with her past?

C: 送些花，给他哄开心了，也许他就愿意给边境星区的那些苦命人免除些赋税了。
E: Giving him some flowers to cheer him up, and maybe he'll be willing to lift the tax levies on those poor folk along the frontier star districts.

C: 滚开。
E: Get lost.

C: 可惜朕刚成年，皇太后便去世了，但外戚们并不打算将权力归还给朕。
E: It was disheartening that when I was of age, the Empress Dowager passed away, and my extended family did not intend to return my imperial authority to me.

C: 侍卫，把我舅舅…送回家吧。然后，宣琳儿玛进殿。
E: Retainers, take my uncle... home. And then, summon Lenamar.

C: 谢谢你，灰骑士。
E: Thank you, Gray Knight.

C: 顺着他的目光看去，在城市虚构的地平线之上升起了阵阵烟雾，那是逐梦客们第无数次开启狂欢的标志。盛会之城的喧嚣如此遥远，你和老人与它断无关系。
E: Following his gaze, you see puffs of smoke billowing from the fictional horizon of the city, signaling yet another time of merriment for the Dreamchasers. The clamorous city of festivities sounds so distant that it feels like a world apart from the elderly man and you.

C: 我明白了…这是螺丝想到的办法，对吗？
E: Got it... This is Screw's idea, right?

C: 我明白了…这是他想到的办法，对吗？
E: Got it... This is his idea, right?

C: 到底是为什么……
E: Why...

C: …解除安全协议吧。将对撞速率提高到默认阈值的<unbreak>1.3</unbreak>倍——我们从这里开始。
E: ...Lift the safety protocols. Increase the collision rate to <unbreak>1.3</unbreak> times the default threshold. Let's take it from there.

C: 我听说了，俱乐部里有一位天才研制出了一种秘密药物，可以帮人「屏蔽」部分意识和记忆。但我和俱乐部的各位向来交情不深，所以才想到找你帮忙牵线。
E: I've heard that a genius has developed a secret drug capable of blocking parts of the consciousness and memory of a person. I've never been close with anyone from the Genius Society, so I'd need you to pull the strings for me.

C: 现在他可以休息了。
E: Now, he can rest.

C: 有点道理。
E: You've got a point.

C: 那真是个不错的比喻，这片梦境中的每一位筑梦师确实都是「鸟」。我们「隐夜鸫」的符号，不就是在夜晚歌唱的鸟儿吗？
E: It's not a bad metaphor at all. The Dreamweavers in this Dreamscape are really all birds. Our Nightingale symbol — is it not a bird that sings at night?

C: 我是谁跟你没关系。有这闲工夫不如去找找流梦礁的折纸小鸟。
E: Who I am is none of your business. If you've got time to spare, you might as well go look for Dreamflux Reef's Origami Birds.

C: 呵呵，冯恩先生的心态确实像他的同龄人呢……
E: Heh-heh, Mr. Vaughn certainly acts like he's of the same age as the child...

C: 谢谢你，无名客。
E: Thank you, Nameless.

C: （放任他离开）
E: (Let him go)

C: 四只折纸小鸟将中心的蓝色小鸟围住。你能感受到湛蓝爵士的无措，和那幅极力掩饰、却仍忍不住流露出的笑意。
E: The four origami birds surround the blue bird. You can feel Dr. Blues' bewilderment and the faint smile he struggles to suppress yet can't entirely conceal.

C: （或许「家族」的筑梦师们知道些什么。）
E: (Maybe The Family's Dreamweavers know something.)

C: 呵呵~走吧，该去找找那孩子藏起的钥匙拼图了。
E: Heh heh... Let's go then. We should look for the jigsaw key that the child hid.

C: （他的故事该被记录下来……）
E: (His story deserves to be recorded...)

C: 大概要等很久了…
E: I guess it will be a long wait...

C: 所以，我提议兵分两路：我和帕拉滕去找药，小友去市场买些喜欢的吃食回来，我们之后在这里集合。
E: So, I suggest we split up: Palaten and I will secure the medicine, while our young friend buys some food back, after which we will reconvene here.

C: 啊…啊……
E: Ah... Agh...

C: 不是蔬果，而是食物？呵呵，小朋友，你还真会给我出难题。
E: Not fruit and vegetables, but food? Heh-heh, you sure know how to create a quandary in me, little friend.

C: 啊对了，冒昧问一句，你买这么多食物是要做什么？
E: Ah yes, if you don't mind me asking: Why are you buying so much food?

C: 他偷药，既是为了救人，也是为了检验圣城仓库的防御——果然发现问题了吧？你们不想着加强防范，反倒要治他的罪？
E: He stole the medicine not only to save lives, but also to ascertain the warehouse's security measures. And there was a problem found, was there not? You never thought to strengthen your security, but seek to punish him instead?

C: 还有什么要问的事吗，贵客？
E: Is there anything else you'd like to ask, honored guest?

C: 哦？我还以为自己在庭上已经说得很清楚了呢。但有些话确实不能暴露在阳光下……
E: Oh? I thought I expressed it quite clearly in court. Though some words cannot be exposed to the light of day...

C: 不过这位雕像小姐的记忆太过模糊，还需要其他的碎片才能窥见与之相关的往世。伙伴，去云石市集收集一些关于「帕里斯」和「阿卡迪亚」的记忆吧！
E: But, this statue lady's memory is too blurry. We need to find other fragments of it if we want to see into her past. Partner, let's go to Marmoreal Market and collect some memories related to "Paris" and "Arcadia"!

C: 是你——它亲自铸造的眷属。你的血统尊贵如角斗浴血的胜者，你的使命高尚如破腹献肠的祭司。但你却辜负了你的命运，在对奥赫玛军的突袭中失利，败退而归。
E: It is you... The Titankin that they created themselves. Your bloodlines are as noble as a gladiator's, raising their weapon high in victory. Your mission is as noble as the priest that pierces the belly and viscera of offerings. Yet you have failed your destiny, as you were defeated in your ambush of the Okhema army and returned vanquished.

C: 毫无尊严的懦夫，要逃走你就自己逃吧。
E: You dishonorable coward. If you wish to escape, do it alone.

C: 居然还想逃跑…看来只有在献祭前切断祭品的四肢，才能让胆怯者安然接受命运。
E: You're still trying to escape...? I see. It seems that only when a sacrifice's limbs have all been sliced off clean that these cowards will finally accept their fate.

C: 元老，请您三思……
E: Elder, you must reconsider...

C: 我等的言语依靠甲胄间的共鸣，乃是纷争的回响。
E: Our language is created using resonance between our helmets and armor, which is the echo of strife.

C: 好好听！
E: Music to my ears!

C: 你想战斗。
E: You want to fight.

C: 你俩过好日子比什么都强。
E: Nothing is more important than your happiness.

C: …嗯，是的。
E: ...Yes, it is.

C: 是吧！你就快趁着幕匿时先动身吧，现在大部分人都在睡觉，我马上就来找你！
E: Isn't it? Leave quickly while the hour of Curtain Fall is still with us and most people are still sleeping. I will come and find you soon!

C: 这么多年了，总算有聪明人戳穿了她的把戏。
E: So many years, and someone smart finally saw through her tricks.

C: 男人骂骂咧咧地陈述着过去祭司们的种种罪行，时而愤怒，时而流泪。
E: The ranting man details the various crimes of past priests, sometimes in anger, sometimes in tears.

C: 况且，想要找到帕西提亚，现在就只剩这一条路了。
E: Besides, if you want to locate Pasithea, this is the only way left.

C: 生活还是很美好的。
E: Life is still pretty good.

C: 我们就是无敌的二人组。
E: We are the Invincible Duo.

C: 等着瞧吧，总有一天，公正之秤的惩戒会平等地落到我们每个人头上。
E: We'll see. One day, the Scale of Justice will exact equal retribution unto each and every one of us.

C: 现在回答我，帕西提亚，在欧洛尼斯的谕示里，你看到了什么？
E: Now, answer me, Pasithea — what did you see in Oronyx's prophecy?

C: 你早已忘记了她的模样，她的声音，即使她来到你的面前，呼唤你的名字，你也没法认出她。
E: You have long forgotten her face and her voice — even if she were to stand before you and call out your name, you would not recognize her.

C: 稍微等一下。
E: Hang on a sec.

C: 我只是害怕，如果我从未逃出命运。如果{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}看着我背叛它，又看着我被它救起…我不知道该怎么面对。
E: I'm fearful. If I really never once escaped destiny, if {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} watched at my betrayal of them, then watched me receiving their salvation... I don't know how to face it all.

C: 多亏托帕小姐带来的反铁墓疫苗，加上我们及时关闭了造物引擎，贝洛伯格才没有再次遭遇危机。
E: Thanks to Ms. Topaz's anti-Irontomb vaccine, and our timely shutdown of the Engine of Creation, Belobog was able to avoid another crisis.

C: 他日得罪负荆去，今朝浴血奏凯来。悬锋故邦皆沦丧，烈火分劈炼金刚。
E: That day he left in disgrace, bearing thorns in apology. Today he returns, bathed in blood, triumphant. Kremnos, his homeland, lay all in ruin, split asunder by blazing fire that forged adamant.

C: （叹息）。
E: (sigh)

C: 花瓶沉浸在它的世界里，静悄悄的。
E: The vase is immersed in its own world, completely silent.

C: 生命的第一因究竟是什么？
E: So what is the prime mover of life?

C: 与「毁灭」展开了对决。
E: Engaged in a showdown with Destruction.

C: 并非每个人都愿意与仿生人接触，况且…他们愿意教她的也就是些科研知识，至于为人处世方面的事，却是不如你合适。
E: Not everyone is willing to deal with an android. Besides... They are only willing to teach her things related to scientific research. When it comes to teaching her facts of life, you are a better candidate than them.

C: {NICKNAME}老师，谢谢你的指导。我用数据浏览了许多普通人在虚拟社区中记录下来的个人生活。
E: {NICKNAME}, thank you for your guidance. I found records of people's private life that they uploaded to the virtual network.

C: 我也不想和埃美丽一起做实验，她真的太不会说话了。
E: I don't want to do lab work with Emily either. She's got really low EQ.

C: 对！上次你教我的那句话的确有用，但要接着聊下去…我就原形毕露了！
E: Oh yeah! The phrase you taught me last time was really useful, but if I try to keep on talking... I'd reveal my true colors once again!

C: 你来得正好，我现在有个猜想！
E: Good thing you're here! I have a hypothesis!

C: 喔，那和我最开始的猜想完全吻合嘛。
E: Oh, so it completely fits my initial hypothesis.

C: 听说你在写怪谈笔记？
E: I heard you're making a compilation of ghost stories?

C: 不像是真的…
E: Doesn't seem real...

C: 哎，怎么我这么倒霉啊，工作不顺，家庭还闹矛盾……
E: *sigh* Why am I so unlucky? My career isn't going well, and my family is having arguments...

C: {NICKNAME}，你是年轻人，脑子转数和行动力可真强。
E: {NICKNAME}, you're definitely a youngster. You think fast and act fast.

C: 不错，不错…你抓住了精髓。这辆车是我心爱的座驾之一，可能是世界上仅剩的一辆还能正常上街的<unbreak>650</unbreak>年限量款「铜墙」牌轿车。
E: Good... This is a great photo. This car is one of my all-time favorites, and probably the only <unbreak>650</unbreak>-year-old limited edition "Bronze Wall" sedan left in the world that can still drive normally.

C: 你对「真诚」的定义很特别…
E: Your understanding of "sincerity" is pretty unusual...

C: 一块告示板，被人用炭笔粗暴地涂黑，只留下一个形似橄榄枝的图案，像是有人在磐岩镇的黑夜中记录着什么。
E: A notice board brutally covered in black soot, only leaving behind a shape that looks like an olive branch. It was as if someone was recording something in the dark Boulder Town night.

C: 「鼹鼠党」…「虎克老大」？唔，这是什么过家家游戏吗？
E: The Moles... Boss Hook? Hmm, is this some kind of kid's game?

C: 下层的野兽用激情点燃午夜，像骄傲的鼹鼠用辛勤对抗毁灭，
E: Light up the night with the fervor of the Undergrounds. Face up the destruction with toil like the pride moles.

C: 唉，又是平平淡淡的一天……
E: Alas, it's just another day...

C: 一分钟，我就耽误你一分钟！当我求你了…
E: One minute, just one minute of your time! I'm begging you...

C: …我一开始的想法和你一样。不过我没想到，他们真的把这事报告给上面了……
E: ...I thought the same at the beginning. But I wasn't expecting that they even asked their superior about this...

C: 谢谢你帮老爸捎信，{NICKNAME}。这是之前答应好给你的谢礼，请一定收下。
E: Thank you for bringing my dad's letter, {NICKNAME}. Please accept these for your trouble.

C: 你在表演话剧吗？
E: Are you acting in a play?

C: 都到这一步了，你怎么能打退堂鼓？
E: Look how far you've come. You can't back out now!

C: 哈哈哈哈哈，看来你也只能到此为止了啊！
E: Hahaha! Looks like this is as far as you come, then!

C: 考我。
E: Test me.

C: 您是不是漏读了题面的信息？这嘈杂的环境确实不适合深度思考。我相信以您的聪明才智，只要有足够的时间，一定能给出正确答案……
E: Did you miss all the info in the question? It really is too noisy in here for cognitive testing. I'm sure with your wits, it's only a matter of time before you come up with the right answer...

C: 您是不是漏读了题面的信息？这嘈杂的环境确实不适合深度思考。我相信以您的聪明才智，只要有足够的时间，一定能给出正确答案……
E: Did you miss all the info in the question? It really is too noisy in here for cognitive testing. I'm sure with your wits, it's only a matter of time before you come up with the right answer...

C: 嗯，这是个不错的问题。
E: Mmm, good question.

C: 这是个陷阱，我不会上当的。她肯定是想当面拷打我，把我关进小黑屋，逼我出稿……
E: This is a trap. I won't fall for it. She just wants to find and torture me, lock me up, and force me to write...

C: 照片拍完了。
E: I took the pictures.

C: 不客气，你多保重。
E: You're welcome. Please take care.

C: 那我兄弟们呢？歌德老大呢？阿丽萨大人呢？阿丽萨大人总不可能死了吧？
E: What about my brothers-in-arms? Boss Goethe? Madam Alisa? There's no way Madam Alisa would be dead!

C: 咳、咳咳…就是想挣点钱养家糊口，没想到还挨一顿毒打…{M#大哥}{F#大姐}您真不是人哪！
E: *cough*... I just wanted to get some money to keep myself fed, but now I'm all beaten up... {M#Sir}{F#Ma'am}, you're really violent!

C: 一定、一定！我不能再这样下去了——这要让老爹知道了，那我还有什么脸面对他……
E: Definitely! I can't continue like this anymore — If my Dad ever finds out, I would never be able to face him again.

C: 对不…起……
E: I... I'm sorry...

C: 花不完的钱。
E: Endless money.

C: （我这是在哪儿，刚刚明明还在杜氏茶庄那儿喝茶，怎么就跑这儿来了。杜老板说不定还在找我呢，还是赶紧回去吧！）
E: (Wait, where am I? I was having tea at Du's Teahouse, but why am I here? Boss Du might be looking for me. I should hurry back!)

C: …呃？那个，你感觉如何？口感还可以吗？
E: ...Eh? A—Are you all right? How do you like the tea?

C: 没关系，你先慢慢想，我不急的。
E: It's okay. Just take your time. I'm not in a hurry anyway.

C: …不过这也说不上有多么奇怪。自然选择的压力让宇宙中的生命形式无法像梦境中那样荒诞——那只无形的手，当然也会影响到各个星球上的审美。
E: ...Not that's anything strange. The pressure of natural selection prevents universal lifeforms from absurd evolution evolving into fantastic renditions as seen in dreams — of course, that invisible hand also guides the aesthetics of every planet.

C: 听说有些「赤陶学派」的学者在此尝试什么「信仰之跃」，也不知道那些人最后成功了没有。
E: You hear that some Erythrokeramist scholars attempted a "leap of faith" of some sort here, but you don't know if anyone succeeded eventually.

C: 你总觉得它的设计实在眼熟——即使突然开始播放「失物招领」的通知，你恐怕也不会感到意外。
E: You find its design very familiar — you wouldn't be surprised, even if a Lost-and-Found notice is suddenly broadcast.

C: 以下为您展开详细报道。
E: Let's take a closer look at the details.

C: 流光忆庭始终保存着乐队最后一场巡演的「记忆」。在公司授意下，忆庭将这段记忆分享给许多参与星球复兴工程的世界，表达他们对寰宇复苏的支持。
E: The Garden of Recollection has been preserving the "memories" of the band's last tour. On the advice of the IPC, in order to express their support for recovery across the universe, the Garden shared these memories with the many worlds participating in planetary revitalization projects.

C: 善后过程中，一股神秘的良性数据流协助清除了残余病毒，并在所有受影响的设备上留下一则信息：「你好，世界」。
E: During the aftermath, a mysterious but benign data stream assisted in purging the remaining virus. On every affected device, it left a single message: "Hello, world."

C: 命运重渊
E: Abyss of Fate

C: 现在情况如何？都说政局挺动荡的，不会要打仗吧？
E: How is the city faring at the moment? People are saying there is unrest in politics. You don't think it will lead to war, do you?

C: 迈德漠斯，你做到了，我们做到了！我们成功地替你的母亲，替歌耳戈王后复仇了。
E: Mydeimos, you did it! We did it! We have taken revenge for your mother! We have avenged Queen Gorgo!

C: 圣树底部的王座，凡世智慧的顶点——无数树庭学者为抵达知识的宝座而耗尽毕生心血，但现在，它就这样毫不设防地展现在你的面前。
E: At the base of the Sacred Tree lies the throne, the pinnacle of mortal wisdom. Countless scholars of the Grove spent their lives striving to reach this seat of knowledge. Yet now, it stands before you, unguarded and unclaimed.

C: 第一，叫我阿那克萨戈拉斯。第二，什么叫「也」？你的意思…你想死在树庭？当真老糊涂了？
E: First, call me Anaxagoras. Second, what do you mean "as well"? Do you mean... you want to die here in the Grove? Have you gone senile?

C: 不错。能按计划启动么？
E: Very good. Can we proceed according to plan?

C: 好了，别唉声叹气的。现在，格拉维塔斯，你有另一项重要的任务。
E: Alright, that's enough lamenting. Gravitas, you have another important mission now.

C: 是的，无论你是否在意，无论你是否对这奇怪的「柱头」感到好奇…接下来，我想为你讲述一个小小的生活哲思——
E: Yes, whether you care or whether you're curious about this strange "pillar head"... let me share with you a little life philosophy —

C: 金色的流体在圣烛中起落，周围的植物似乎在轻轻摇曳，回应着金色流体的律动。
E: The golden liquid within the holy candle rises and falls, while the surrounding plants seem to sway gently in response to its rhythm.

C: …刚刚那是…被人袭击了？当你回过神来，你已经被好心人安置于此处了。
E: ...Were you just... attacked by someone? As you come to, you find yourself placed here by a kind soul.

C: 谁是翁法罗斯最聪明的人？
E: Who is the wisest in all of Amphoreus?

C: …冲撞的小海豹！
E: ...A little bumping seal!

C: 嗯…<color=#dbc291ff>献身拱心的树藤上</color>……
E: Hmm... <color=#dbc291ff>upon the Dome of Devotion's vines</color>...

C: 你追求预言是为了什么？
E: Why do you pursue prophecies?

C: 给我双倍代金券。
E: I'll take the bonus voucher.

C: 这座圣烛的底座上交织的是星辰与时钟的图案，细看之下，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}与{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}的双重神徽隐匿在繁复的花纹之中。
E: The base of this holy candle is adorned with interwoven images of stars and clocks. Upon close inspection, one can seem to see the divine emblems of {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} and {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#} hidden within the intricate pattern.

C: 你甚至能从即将消逝的光芒中感受到那股问好的意思。
E: You can even feel a sense of salutation from the fading light.

C: 木马外表看上去毫无机关，但你却可以明显感受到，有股神秘的推力在让你们缓缓前进。看来「渡河」云云并非虚言——雅努斯的神力，翁法罗斯人的第一款水上发动机。
E: The wooden horse appears to have no mechanism, but you can feel an unseen force gently propelling you forward. It seems the "crossing" is no mere metaphor — Janus' divine power, the first water engine of Amphoreus.

C: 有时，洋流会送来意想不到的惊喜——比如一个漂流瓶，又或是一条自己蹦上岸的鱼。
E: Sometimes the currents bring surprises, like a drift bottle or a fish that jumps right onto shore.

C: 不过，你可以试试回浴场号召那些喜欢的泡澡的朋友跟你一起过来。
E: But you could try rallying your bath-loving friends to come here and test it out with you.

C: 的确，管它木马还是木牛，还是等下次清闲时再来吧。
E: Indeed. Whether it's a wooden horse or a wooden cow, I'll come back for it later when I've got the time.

C: 这门课上有被称为「渎神」的内容。如果接受不了，就请你们自闭耳目离开。
E: This course includes content some might call "blasphemous." If you can't handle it, feel free to cover your ears, shut your eyes, and leave.

C: 战士啊，丢下你的武器…无需再回那喧闹的现世浴血拼杀，那早已不是你的责任……
E: Warrior, lay down your arms... There's no need to return to the bloody battles of that noisy mortal world. That burden is no longer yours to bear...

C: 我只记得与最重要的人做了个约定——「明天见」。
E: The only thing I remember is a promise I made to someone dear to me: "See you tomorrow."

C: 我就知道，对若虫而言，逐光的旅程一定是漫长的。
E: I knew it. For a nymph, the journey of chasing light is bound to be a long one.

C: 终于还是来了喀？能不能先请你…「电量偏低」。
E: So you finally showed up, crrk? Could you please... "Low Battery."

C: 呃，请多指教…
E: Err, it's nice to meet you too.

C: 异问魔…？在列车上？
E: An Inquisition Spirit...? On the Express?

C: 「流光忆庭」是追随星神浮黎的组织，作为「记忆」的信使，我们放弃了肉身，以模因的形式穿梭于宇宙，为浮黎搜寻星海间最珍贵的记忆。
E: Garden of Recollection is an organization that worships the Aeon Fuli. As a messenger for the Remembrance, we surrendered our worldly bodies and traverse the universe in the form of memes to search the stars on behalf of Fuli for the most precious memories.

C: 哔——啵。
E: Beep-boop.

C: 奥列格兵长说这话的时候很真、真诚，我可以替他作证！
E: Captain Oleg was completely earnest wh—when he said that. I can vouch for that!

C: 别担心，我会出手。
E: Don't worry. I'll do it.

C: （太笨啦，是佩佩在跟你说话！）
E: (Stop being stupid. Peppy is talking to you!)

C: 它还说，自己是阮•梅女士独一无二的创造，和我们不一样，它是一种更高级的生命，没有生理需求，所以<color=#dbc291ff>不需要进食</color>。
E: It also said that it was a unique creation from Madam Ruan Mei's, unlike us, and that it's a higher lifeform without biological needs, so it <color=#dbc291ff>doesn't need food</color>.

C: 你决定回头跟艾丝妲说一下，找个机会给佩佩洗个澡。
E: You decide to tell Asta later on to give Peppy a bath.

C: 呃？这和我说的话有什么相干吗？
E: Huh? What does this have to do with what I said?

C: …我知道了，是我错了，对不起。
E: ...I know. It's my fault, and I'm sorry.

C: 假的。
E: That's totally not true.

C: 嘿嘿，但我和{NICKNAME}不一样。我们站在一起，就是最好的伙伴！
E: Hehe, but we're different, {NICKNAME}. We're the best partners when we work together!

C: 我「和」迷迷？
E: Me "and" Mem?

C: 我也有挺多人格。
E: I too have quite a few different sides.

C: {NICKNAME}！{NICKNAME}——又在发呆吗？
E: {NICKNAME}! {NICKNAME} — are you spacing out again?

C: 这样呀…人家也很喜欢浪漫的故事，不过，却又说不清什么才是「浪漫」呢。也许…它就是那些「不需要懂得」的事物吧……
E: I see... I like romantic stories too, but I can't quite say what "romantic" really means. Maybe... it's one of those things that don't need to be understood...

C: 要是这套「匣里流光」能够搭配精神感应系统，根据飞行士直觉自动变换排列排布方式，那样就能将能量收束于一处、增大出力了…真是妙～啊……
E: If this set of Luminflux Pyxis can be used with a psychosensory system to automatically change the arrangement according to the pilot's intuition, then the energy can be concentrated in one place and the output can be increased... It's wonderful~

C: 辛苦了，这是我准备好的报酬。
E: Good job. Here's the reward for you, then.

C: 但是！今日我定要洗刷耻辱！你，有没有胆量决一胜负？
E: However! I must avenge myself of the shame of defeat today! You! Dare you accept a duel?

C: 准备好了！
E: You bet!

C: 你们这个圈子还搞霸凌呢。
E: You folks bully people in your community?

C: 我？哈哈，我连个正式名字都不配有。
E: Me? Haha, I'm not even important enough to have an actual name.

C: 这是一块植入了棋力检测程序的玉兆，说话的人棋力越强，它就震动的越厉害。您还是少说两句吧，我怕它震坏了。
E: This jade abacus is embedded with a program that can detect a person's chess proficiency when they speak. The higher the speaker's chess proficiency, the more violent its vibrations. That being so, I'd be grateful if you could hold your tongue a little — I'm afraid you'll break it.

C: 很抱歉…根据我的推论，积木的数量应该不止这些…如果你手头还有积木，可以继续交到我这里。
E: I apologize, but my calculations indicate that there should be more building blocks than these. If you find any more, please bring them to me.

C: 我每个版本都买。
E: I purchased every version of it.

C: 没问题，上吧。
E: No problem. Go.

C: 我好爱这个地方，想永远待在这里。等那两个朋友都到齐了，就来舞池找我们吧。
E: I love this place, and wish to stay here forever. When my two friends arrive, look for us on the dance floor.

C: 让我瞧瞧…这种预兆代表着——
E: Let's see... This omen means...

C: 这座人台表面布满了暗淡的纹路。或许在某个时刻，它会焕发出流光——但不是现在。
E: The surface of this dummy is covered in dark wrinkles. Perhaps there will come a time when it shines brightly... But that time is not now.

C: 不错嘛，贵客，你比我想象中更擅长这项活动。
E: Not bad, my distinguished guest. You're more skilled at this than I imagined.

C: 多谢你了，贵客。现在，我会着手解封众多预言中的一则。
E: Thank you, esteemed guest. And now, I shall begin to unfurl one of the many prophecies.

C: 当茧褪去时，唯余一块金丝织成的锦缎漂浮在空中。衣匠伸手一挥，它便分作两半，其中一半飞进了你的手里……
E: When the cocoon falls away, only a piece of brocade woven by golden threads is left floating in the air. With a wave of the Garmentmaker's hand, it splits in two, one half flying into your hand...

C: 然后，您去古董店卖掉花瓶。趁着老板将它端进库房的功夫，我会偷偷溜进去，神不知鬼不觉地取出一本账本——
E: Then, you take the vase to an antique store to sell it. When the boss turns around to put it away in the warehouse, I will sneak in and grab their accounting book before anyone is any the wiser...

C: 关于你的工作…
E: About your job...

C: 您的手段还真了不得呀，不知道能不能把「她」也抓住呢，桀桀桀！
E: Your methods are remarkable indeed! I wonder if you could capture "her", too... Hehehe!

C: 嘴上爽爽怎么了…{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}它老人家大人大量，一定不会在意的。
E: So what? The great {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} surely wouldn't mind.

C: 看到能交互就点了…
E: When I see an option to interact, I just press it...

C: 人们都说讲故事追求一个「意料之外，情理之中」，其实做游戏也是如此呀。
E: They say good stories should be "unexpected yet reasonable" — making games is just the same.

C: 哎呀，此时此刻，我真想代替老巴特鲁斯说一句——「啊，黎明陨落后的月色真美」——可惜这里不像{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}灰黯之手{RUBY_E#}的领域，根本没有什么月亮。
E: Ah, I wish I could say for old Bartholos  —  "How lovely the moon looks after dawn's fall"  —  but sadly, unlike the {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Hand of Shadow{RUBY_E#}'s realm, there's no moon here.

C: 那太好了！
E: That's excellent!

C: 我在人们的面前一字摆出三只箱子；他们呢，只需要交一个金币，就可以去猜我到底在哪一个箱子偷偷藏了宝贝。如果猜对了，宝贝就归他们，打开就能拿走。
E: I laid out three boxes in front of a crowd. They only had to pay one coin to guess which one had the treasure. Pick the right one, and the treasure is theirs.

C: 别演我了。
E: Drop the act.

C: 这跟平常的口嗨可不一样，咱们换个人少的地方再聊。
E: This is different from our usual banter. Let's go somewhere quieter to talk about this.

C: 嗯，这里就方便说话多了。
E: We can talk here.

C: 又比如这第二段，「我毕竟对屠刀一无所知」——信息的来源似乎相信有种来自神秘领域的不可见的力量在威胁着整个世界…但会是什么呢？
E: Also, in the second stanza, "After all, I know nothing of the butchering blade." The source of the information seems to believe that an unseen power from a mysterious domain is threatening the world... But what could it be?

C: 啊，您误会了…我是说「艾吉克拉尼翁」——您从「黄金替罪羊」那里收获的羊头。
E: Ah, it's nothing like that. I meant Aegikranion — the ram's head you recovered from the "Golden Scapegoat."

C: 抱歉，在下不仅没有帮到你们，反而把事情搞砸了。
E: I'm sorry. Instead of helping, I seem to have made things worse.

C: 无论如何，赞美{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}，也感谢您的付出。我打算联系他的学生，或许见见老面孔，能让他的症状得到改善。请收下这些吧，谨以表达我的谢意。
E: In any case, praise {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}, and thank you for your efforts. I plan to contact his students — perhaps meeting some old faces might help improve his condition. Please accept this as a token of my gratitude.

C: 去吧，辅祭，为委托画上结束符。
E: Go, acolyte, and bring closure to this request.

C: 或许可以<color=#dbc291ff>用它来挡住球</color>？多试试看吧！
E: Maybe you can <color=#dbc291ff>use it to block the ball</color>? Give it a few tries!

C: 如果您仗义出手，我这有些他们没能带走的宝贝，全都归您！
E: If you help me, I'll give you something valuable — whatever the priests left behind, it's all yours!

C: 我想至少今天，至少这次…呃啊…可档案里的线索都用尽了，我还是想不起来…找不出那个火种匣。时间不多了…果然，我还是和以前一样没用……
E: At least for today, at least this time — ugh... I've gone through all the records, but I still can't remember... I still can't find the right Coreflame Casket. We're running out of time... I really am useless, just like before...

C: 一枚余火缓缓下落，降在伊来内的掌心。
E: A single ember drifts downward, landing gently in Alain's palm.

C: 我吗？…不必了。
E: Me? No, I'll stay...

C: 我还有别的事…
E: I've got other matters to handle...

C: 即便这就是旅途的终点，我也再无遗憾了。
E: Even if this is the end of my journey, I have no regrets.

C: 没有人回应你。她貌似和昏光庭院有些联系，但好像又不认识风堇，况且「回到天空」是指……
E: No one responds. She seems to be connected to the Twilight Courtyard, but doesn't seem to know Hyacine. Also, when she said return to the sky, what did she mean...?

C: 但若是医者难以自医，又能去往何处寻？
E: But if a healer can't heal themselves, where else can they turn?

C: 「均衡。」声音重复。你从那没有感情的语调中琢磨出了一丝赞许，「诸界将因此改变。」
E: "Equilibrium." The voice repeated. You detect a hint of approval from that emotionless tone, "It is for this that all worlds change."

C: 只有特殊的持明能化龙。
E: Only special Vidyadhara can turn into dragons.

C: 有什么疑惑？
E: Got some questions?

C: 战斗结束，你在原地等待，但什么也没有发生。
E: The fight is over and you wait in place, but nothing happens.

C: 你愣在原地，十分惊愕，祂如同毒蝎伸出钩尾，对你轻轻一蛰。你看到疯狂场景，万物藤蔓生长不再受控，缠住受馈者，遍地孽物哀啼。
E: You freeze in place, terrified. THEY stretch out THEIR poisonous scorpion-like hooked tail, and sting you lightly. You see wondrous scenes flashing before your eyes — vines grow wildly and entangle their beneficiaries, and there are abominations and crying everywhere.

C: 「阿基维利——阿基维利！」一个声音发疯大笑着，「好久不见，甚是想念！」你毛骨悚然，疯子才具有的感染力。
E: "Akivili, Akivili!" A voice laughed wildly, "It has been so long, I miss you greatly!" Your hairs stand on end. This is the infectious enthusiasm of a madman.

C: 给你个沉浸器，去试试。每次生成「位面饰品」都需要沉浸器。
E: Here's an Immersifier. Go try it out. You need an Immersifier every time you generate Planar Ornaments.

C: 「『模拟宇宙』和外边不一样，可破坏物会掉落<color=#dbc291ff>宇宙碎片</color>，很有用的。现在，回去把那玩意打了。」黑塔叹了口气，「白给你发钱，你就拿着！」
E: "The Simulated Universe is different from the real world. Destructible objects will drop useful <color=#dbc291ff>Cosmic Fragments</color>. Now, go back and hit that plaything." Herta sighed, "If something's free, just take it!"

C: 「…离远点，{NICKNAME}，你靠得太近…被『存护』影响了。」
E: "...Keep your distance, {NICKNAME}. You'll be affected by the Preservation... should you get too close."

C: ——贪饕的星神？！
E: Aeon of Voracity!?

C: 你礼貌地敲了敲它。那之后，你又在它面前等了整整十一个自然月——
E: You politely knock on it and wait there for eleven whole natural months...

C: 虫潮褪去，你重返大拉铂尔星，发现这里枯枝遍地，处处是被啃食过的痕迹——你面前出现了一个万分熟悉的木屋——你上次见它应当在很久、很久以前。白雪落满这里的窗，树枝掉落幻觉松子味的碎屑。
E: The Swarm recedes, and you return to Lapole Major, only to find it strewn with dead branches and bite marks everywhere — evidence of Swarm devastation. Suddenly, you notice a wooden hut that is familiar to you. You recall seeing it once, a long, long time ago when its windows were obscured by snow and its wooden shingles exuded the scent of pine nuts.

C: 他用暗哑、断裂的声音痛斥大骂！他称战胜赏金猎人后，他并未得到他追寻的「自我」…那传颂呓语的人乃是骗子！接着，他仍在不断进行「征服」。
E: He curses in a hoarse and anguished voice, lamenting that even after defeating the bounty hunters, he failed to find the "self" he had been seeking... and started to believe that the person who had recorded the whispers was nothing more than a liar! Despite this, he persisted in his "conquests."

C: 你感觉吃下了一团空气。一只「血罪灵」在你胃里乱撞，味道像一颗*臭味果*。
E: You feel as if you have gulped down a mass of air as a Sin Thirster stirs within your stomach, leaving a flavor resembling that of a *Stink Fruit*.

C: 你相信在这场屠杀中，任何人都应动恻隐之心——但面前这人并非如此…香味混合血腥味钻进你的鼻腔，一些虫子的尸体随风拍到面前的窗户上…你打了个寒颤。幸好这里有一层坚不可摧的玻璃，外面除了已死的虫群外，还有不少狂躁的士兵……
E: Despite the gruesome scene before you, the individual in front of you displays no signs of mercy... The stench of blood mixed with fragrance fills your nostrils, and the remnants of insects are plastered to the window by the wind... which sends shivers down your spine. Thankfully, this place is sheltered by a layer of impenetrable glass, beyond which lies heaps of dead insects and fervent soldiers...

C: 一片「<color=#dbc291ff>虚无之影</color>」从「忆泡」中涌现。笑容满面的自灭者突然爆发出前所未有的哭泣，准备张开手臂拥抱它——接着立刻被它吞没！
E: As a <color=#dbc291ff>Shadow of Nihility</color> emerges from the broken Memory Bubble, the Self-Annihilator's heartfelt smile abruptly turns to anguish. He embraces the shadow with open arms and gets consumed immediately, vanishing in an instant!

C: 你身在一群赏金猎人中。你们的飞船似乎要前往秘密的目的地。你开始嫌弃身旁这群家伙语言粗鄙——他们称自己的领袖有着*阿哈级别的信誉*…听上去，这位领袖固执专横，在得到梦靥般的启示后，执意要前去蠹星平原狩猎虫族。
E: You find yourself among a bunch of bounty hunters, your ship steering towards a secret destination. You are becoming increasingly irritated by their rowdy demeanor and vulgar language, all the while hearing them claim that their leader has *prestige comparable to Aha*... Whoever their leader is, they seem to be an arrogant figure who has gained "insight" from nightmarish visions and has insisted on embarking on an insect hunt at the Lepismat Plains.

C: 被「宇宙黏菌」吞噬的星球上曾有记载：「用餐前的礼节」实为梳洗自己、等待被吞噬的仪式；部分误解图腾的旅行者在刀叉交错、火柴闪烁三下后，被渊兽肚子里的古阿米巴黏菌吞噬。
E: According to the records of planets devoured by Cosmic Slime Molds, the so-called 'pre-dinner ritual' was actually a ceremony for the offering to freshen themselves and prepare to be devoured. Some travelers, who misunderstood the true meaning of the totem, reversed their knives and forks and waited for the match to flash three times, only to be consumed by the ancient Amoeba Slime Molds residing within the bellies of the Depth Crawler.

C: 帝皇战争爆发时，德•维恩的势力已在赛普鲁戈星球发展壮大。彼时<color=#dbc291ff>机械领主们</color>率先开始灭绝星球上的有机生命——战争机器走过一座座城市，它们庞大的脚掌将高楼大厦轻易摧毁。
E: By the time the Emperor's War broke out, De Wayne's power had already been well-established on Cyprogo. The <color=#dbc291ff>mechanical overlords</color> started eliminating the organic lives on the planet. The war machines traversed through cities, demolishing skyscrapers effortlessly with their massive feet.

C: 判定「自我认知」 - 获得第二个启示。
E: Intra-Cognition Assessment — Obtaining the second revelation.

C: 后来，战争结束。幸存者们——无论有机或无机——回到了久别的和平生活，但大部分人的后半生在穷困与创伤中度过。
E: The war was brought to an end later. Survivors, both organic and inorganic, returned to a long-awaited peaceful life. Yet, most of them spent the rest of their life in destitution and trauma.

C: 在塔尔因星的戈壁滩，热风吹拂着砂石，你拖动日渐衰老的身躯，缓慢地走在这片荒芜里。许多个琥珀纪前，这里曾遍布水草与花朵，但它们都先你一步走进了虚无。
E: In the gravel deserts of the planet Tarryan, hot gusts blow through the sands as you drag your ever-aging body slowly through this desolate wasteland. Many Amber Eras ago, lush wetlands and grasses enveloped the areas here — but they regressed to nihility before you could.

C: 或许不能。你播种下最后的发明，它们将在戈壁上开出小花，直到覆盖原野。在你之后，仍有它们傲然面对虚无的未来。
E: Maybe not. You sow your final seed of invention. May they bloom among the desert gravel until flowers cover the entire wilderness. May they continue to proudly face the nihilistic future long after you're gone.

C: 星际和平网络的拍卖会上，挂着一副蒂玫德的画作，蹩脚的莲花池里，约莫能看出轮廓的灵长类正伸手捞取水里的太阳。经过笔迹检定，作者竟是那些被认为不具备艺术天赋的库拉人！
E: At the Interastral Peace Network's auction, there's a painting from the Demeter system: In a shoddy lotus pond, you can make out the rough outline of a primate reaching out its hand to scoop out a sun from the water. After a calligraphy appraisal, the painter is discovered to be none other than one of the supposedly untalented artists of the Kora people!

C: 你确实答应过学士，但是你忘了告诉他，这事你说了不算。
E: You may have promised the scholar that you would leave one behind. However, you forgot to mention that you have no authority on this.

C: 「模棱两可，颇有他们的风格。」帕提维娅讥讽地评价。「是蛆虫般趴在帝皇遗产上，啃食智慧果实的众多学士里，将诞生一位天才。亦或是，鲁珀特三世将自帝国的废墟中醒来。」
E: "How ambiguous, suits them perfectly." Patavia scoffs. "Would a genius be born from the myriad scholars crawling all over the Emperor's legacy like maggots gnawing at the fruit of wisdom? Or would Rubert III awake from among the Empire's ashes?"

C: 帝皇之死令所有「权杖」陷入自我封闭，它们失去交流的能力，不再能重现战时那骇人的实时决策。
E: The death of the Emperor sealed all the Scepters. They lost their ability to communicate, and are unable to demonstrate the ability to produce the terrifying instantaneous decisions made during the war.

C: 和滞留的学派成员交涉。
E: Negotiate with stranded members of the other schools.

C: 又一次意外？
E: Another accident?

C: 收下传单。
E: Take the flier.

C: 工具无法替帝皇思考。
E: Tools could never replace the Emperor's thought.

C: 完全听不懂。
E: I don't understand a word.

C: 你嗅到熟悉的糕点香氛，点缀着惊惶鹿的花朵。她悠闲地站在模拟实验室里，仿佛打一开始就知道，你们会从这里经过。
E: You catch a whiff of a familiar confectionery scent adorned with Startled Deer flowers. She is idly standing in the simulated lab as if she knew from the beginning that you would pass by here.

C: 一只蝴蝶扇动翅膀，鳞羽上的粒子恰到好处地发生反应。它掉进偶然形成的微型虫洞，因巧合在中子星的内部绽放，令严丝合缝的宅邸崩裂开。
E: When a butterfly flaps its wings, the particles on its scaled wings conjure a reaction in just the right amounts. It falls into a micro-wormhole that randomly forms, blooming from a coincidence within a neutron star, tearing apart a perfectly sealed residence.

C: 「也正因如此，我们成了天才。」
E: "And that is how we became geniuses."

C: 千万不要睁眼！
E: Do not open your eyes!

C: 你做过些什么多此一举的行为?
E: What kind of superfluous actions have you done?

C: 你身处无垠草原，白云点缀蓝天——一切都是*像素*绘制。你低头看自己的双手，它们变成了像素方块。
E: You are in a vast grassland and the sky is speckled with clouds. Everything is a "pixel" drawing. You look down at your hands and find them to be pixelated cubes.

C: 「…令诸有情…所求皆得…折磨治愈…互为共生……」
E: "...All sentient beings... will have all their wishes fulfilled... torment and healing... are in a symbiotic relationship..."

C: 「我们是最后的牛仔！」首领振臂高呼，红鹮袖章象征他们已归顺皇室，你相信，他们就是*皇家*强盗。
E: "We're the last cowboys!" Shouts the leader who flails his arms happily. The red ibis armbands indicate their submission to the royal family. You believe they are the royal bandits.

C: 「你有<unbreak>82.49%</unbreak>的概率会在第一局就出石头，<unbreak>94.61%</unbreak>的概率在第二局出剪刀。」星体计算机说，「如果你选择现在掀桌与我生成的怪物战斗，你有<unbreak>99.37%</unbreak>的概率会输。」
E: "There is an <unbreak>82.49%</unbreak> chance of you playing rock in the first game, and a <unbreak>94.61%</unbreak> of you playing scissors in the second. If you choose to flip the table with me and battle with the monsters I created, there is a <unbreak>99.37%</unbreak> of you losing."

C: 你坐在牌桌前，独眼荷官的金属义腿与尼尔迪斯牌桌腿交缠在一起，躯干于桌洞正中央伫立，弹球围绕他的腰间转圈。
E: You sit at the card table across from a one-eyed dealer whose metal prosthetic legs are intertwined with the legs of the Nildis table. His torso runs through a hole in the center of the table with a pinball circling his waist.

C: 你的钱包也瘪了。你损失了很多宇宙碎片…你希望能再次遇到她。
E: Your wallet is no longer stuffed, and you have lost lots of Cosmic Fragments... You hope to run into her again.

C: 他用期待的眼神看着你。
E: He looks at you with anticipation in his eyes.

C: 他十分悲伤，他不能理解竟有人可以抵抗一只咕咕钟的诱惑……
E: He is devastated. He cannot understand how someone can resist the temptation of a cuckoo clock...

C: 「噢，我的老朋友，好久不见！我刚告别黑森林中所有的无机生命。」咕咕钟狂热粉丝见到你，立刻开始泣涕连连，「我正联系星际和平公司业务拓展部，他们答应为我们在宇宙中宣扬咕咕钟爱好者！很快我们的队伍将会更加壮大！」
E: "Oh, my old friend! It's been a long time! I've just bid farewell with all the inorganic beings in the Black Forest." The cuckoo clock fanatic starts sobbing when he sees you. "I've contacted the Business Development Department of the IPC, and they've promised to help us promote our fan club in the universe! We'll be a stronger team soon!"

C: 虽然你一贫如洗…但你仍然可以用尽全力呵护它。
E: Although you are destitute... you can still do your best to nurture it.

C: 「逻辑：模拟宇宙的旅程需要时刻确认自我认知。」螺丝咕姆说，「{NICKNAME}，我们好奇你的自我认知在这场奇妙旅途中是否有所改变。如果测试使你的自我认知发生动摇，你将相信自己是一台『机器』，这是我们所不愿看到的。」
E: "Affirmation: We need to constantly reaffirm our Intra-Cognition during our journey in the Simulated Universe," says Screwllum. "{NICKNAME}, we wonder whether your Intra-Cognition has changed during this wonderful trip. If your Intra-Cognition is swayed by the test, you'll see yourself as a machine, and that's not what we hope to see."

C: 超合金混凝土。
E: Superalloy concrete.

C: 「检测到您的定期存款提取申请，为保障您的财产安全，请回答下列二次密保问题，验证您的个人身份。」
E: "We have received your application for your time deposit withdrawal. In order to ensure the safety of your funds, please answer the following secondary security questions to verify your identity."

C: 由于驾驶员的美食理念与主办方不合，寿司飞船失去了比赛资格。
E: Due to culinary disagreements between the pilot and the organizers, the sushi spaceship is disqualified.

C: 「口味激烈的藏品。」愚者因醉意已沉沉欲睡，「纯白的完整面具，谎言并非愚者的专属，有清闲的人漂泊在宇宙里，戳穿华丽的泡沫。」
E: "Sharp-tasting collections." The Fool is dozing off in his drunkenness. "Pristine white complete masks. Lies are not the unique properties of Fools. Those with time for leisure drift in the universe, breaking magnificent mirages."

C: 「投降吧，小家伙。别说是在商店街，就是整个拉夫卡迪奥，能在比赛中胜过妾身的，也是屈指可数。」店长发出恐吓声，分叉的信子近乎要触碰到你的眼睛。
E: "Give it up, young one. There are scant few in the Lafcadio — and fewer still in this Shopping Street — who can defeat me in this contest." The shop owner makes a threatening sound and her forked tongue almost touches your eyes.

C: 「求求你买点吧，再看不到业绩，我就要从公司滚蛋了。我家里还有一台智能冰箱和一个扫地机要养呢。」它的语气之悲切，甚至让你怀疑，售货机里藏了一个真人。
E: "Please buy something. If I don't up my performance, I'll be fired from the IPC. I have a smart refrigerator and a robot vacuum to feed at home." It sounds so upset that you almost suspect there's a real person hiding in the vending machine.

C: 你试图打造曼妙的歌声，但蹩脚的唱腔却连鱼群都尝试逃离。愤怒的眷属们向你一拥而上，打算终结这撕心裂肺的曲调。
E: You attempt to craft a graceful melody, but your clumsy singing drives even the fish away. The enraged Titankins surge towards you, intent on silencing this heart-wrenching tune.

C: 在海上与法吉娜化身的波浪共饮，涉身进入冥界寻找已死的恋人。总有一天，其中也会有你的位置。
E: Share a drink with waves that are the manifestation of Phagousa on the sea and venture into the nether realm in search of your dead lover. One day, there will be a spot for you as well.

C: 但你清楚，作为你们当前的研究基础，一旦公开，此前所有的学术成果都将毁于一旦。
E: But you are fully aware that this is related to the current foundation of your research. Once this goes public, all existing academic progress will be destroyed.

C: 你费尽九牛二虎之力，锁住疯掉的奇美拉。在山羊学派的成果展示上，作为野化培育的研究结果。
E: Grappling with every ounce of your strength, you manage to lock up the crazed chimera. It will be shown as the results of animal reintroduction into the wild at the Caprism school's exhibition.

C: 举杯豪饮，参与祭祀。
E: Raise a glass, and partake in the ritual.

C: 他们将怪物引入陷阱。
E: They lure the monsters into traps.

C: 哎，法吉娜，若不是你，哪有这么多海怪和麻烦？再者说，那些宝物，本就是启程前献祭给你的东西！
E: Ah, Phagousa, if not for you, where would all these sea monsters and troubles come from? Besides, those treasures were offerings sacrificed to you before our journey!

C: 就连看惯了死亡的塞纳托斯，也不由为其垂泪。它收集游离的残魂，投入茧中。金蝶飞散而出，去往世间追求浪漫的足迹，羸弱的人形也从残茧中诞生。
E: Even Thanatos, long accustomed to death, sheds tears for the butterfly. Gathering its fragmented soul, Death cast it into a cocoon. Golden butterflies emerge to pursue romance in the mortal world, while a fragile humanoid form is born from the remains of the cocoon.

C: 无畏的阿科托斯，传说中最后一位完成朝圣的勇士。雅努斯为他的战船降下恩赐，只要不僭越艾格勒的领域，翁法罗斯的天空将任他自由穿行。
E: Fearless Akotos is the last warrior to complete his pilgrimage, according to legend. Janus graces his warship, granting him free passage through Amphoreus's skies as long as he does not venture into Aquila's realm.

C: 黄金亦能被腐蚀。
E: Gold too can corrode.

C: 「您算是赶上时候了，促销活动火热进行中，再不出手下次可就不一定有这个机会了。」商人拼命怂恿你。
E: "Lucky you! We're running a very special promotion right now — hesitate, and you might never see a deal like this again!" The merchant prods.

C: 可是规则…就是用来打破的。
E: But rules... are made to be broken.

C: 白昼给了它光亮的眼睛。
E: Day granted them radiant eyes.

C: 没想到艾格勒还是公关大师。
E: Sounds like Aquila is also a PR expert.

C: 这故事很耳熟。
E: This story sounds familiar.

C: 垃圾就该回到它本该待着的地方，维护空间站环境人人有责。
E: Trash should go back to where it belongs. Everyone is responsible for taking care of the space station's environment.

C: 废纸倔强地躺在垃圾桶边上，往来科员那么多，却对此视而不见。
E: The paper scrap stubbornly stays beside the trashcan. It is ignored despite the number of researchers passing by.

C: 「有时候我觉得我身体里蕴藏着一个热带雨林。」
E: "Sometimes I feel like I have a rainforest inside me."

C: 「每次你要走的时候，热带雨林的河水决堤奔涌直落，雨水为何倾盆而下？或许是因为我的眼泪模糊了视线。」
E: "Why does the rain pour down every time you have to leave, when the river of the rainforest breaks its banks and rushes down? Maybe because my tears have blurred my vision."

C: 眼见榜单上全是些毫无营养、只知道吹捧黑塔的歌曲与评论。你认为点开这个页面简直是脏了你的眼。
E: You come to realize that the whole leaderboard is just spam promoting songs and comments about Madam Herta. You begin to feel dirty merely opening up the page.

C: 一只精美木匣，侧面开一狭长小口。你正好奇这是什么时，却听得雷诺阿含混不清道：「放进去。」——不…那真的是他的声音吗？你确信自己听到了*杂声*……
E: It is an exquisite wooden box with a long and narrow opening on its side. As you wonder what it is, you hear Renoir speaking in a muddled voice. "Put it in." No... Is that Renoir's voice? You are sure you heard a NOISE...

C: 通过灵性的典仪，他们编织时间的丝缕，意图自创世之树凋落的最后一片叶向起始的萌芽溯行。他们坚信如此便能与尊贵之人相遇，尽管那瞬间稍纵即逝。
E: Through a spiritual ritual, they weave the threads of time in an attempt to trace backwards from the last withered leaf on the World Tree to the first bud in the beginning of everything. They firmly believe that by doing so, they will get to meet the noble being, though the encounter will be brief and fleeting.

C: 你切断通讯，跨上那崭新的浮空摩托。这大宝贝可花了你整整十八个月的工资——虽然贵，但它能治愈你在职场中受到的创伤。你觉得值，可惜今天疗效不大好。
E: You end the call and get on your brand-new floating motorcycle. This baby costs <unbreak>18</unbreak> months of your salary — although it is pricey, it can soothe the trauma you have suffered in your workplace. You think it is worth its price tag, but it doesn't do much to your pain today.

C: 男人变得近乎歇斯底里，胡言乱语地退入「后巷」的阴影中。
E: The man is borderline hysterical, raving manically as he vanishes back into the darkness of the "back alley."

C: 男人发出一阵刺耳的尖叫，狂笑着冲进了剧院背后那深不见底的「后巷」。
E: The man lets loose an ear-piercing shriek and charges into the unfathomable "back alley," carrying his maniacal laughter with him.

C: 我不会辜负你的。
E: I won't disappoint you.

C: 怎么说，兄弟？依我看，咱们不如赶紧出钱拿下——免得等到以后价格飞涨，我们只能躲在角落里暗自后悔……
E: What do you say, bro? The way I see it, we should put the money down now. If we wait to buy it after the price has gone up, we'll only have ourselves to blame...

C: 你好。
E: Hello.

C: 今天的你得到了「幸运」的青睐…这是莫大的馈赠。
E: Today, you have received fortune's favor... This is a great gift.

C: 看上去和你在探险途中遇到的宝箱区别不大。也许那个女人只是在故弄玄虚，也许……
E: It looks pretty much like the chests you've come across while exploring. Maybe that woman was trying to trick you...

C: 世间极品！如果有机会，你真想把丹恒拉来一起细品。不为别的——单纯因为你认定丹恒是个懂茶的人。
E: The best tea ever! If possible, you'd love to bring Dan Heng here to sample this tea, solely because you are convinced that he is someone who knows a lot about tea.

C: 哼哼…没想到这次轮到我来抓人了！
E: Hehe... I didn't expect that I would be it!

C: 好高啊，好可怕啊，它动起来的时候好晃悠啊……
E: It's so scary and high up here. And it shakes so much when it moves...

C: 必须坚持住…
E: Gotta hang in there...

C: 瞧，刺激的来了——喀咕噜噜@#%￥…&*…
E: Now for the exciting part — crrk, *gurgle* @#%¥...&*...

C: 你将手举到眼前，仔细端详掌心里那一撮五颜六色的晶石。
E: You bring your hand up to your eyes and closely examine the multicolored crystals in your palm.

C: 他的笑容十分僵硬。
E: His smile is stiff as a board.

C: 就躲在这里！
E: I'll hide here!

C: 换个地方。
E: Find another spot.

C: 要是对不起有用，还要洞洞机做什么？
E: If sorry does anything, why would I need Diggertron?

C: 真不错呀，真不错…拿着，{NICKNAME}——很高兴跟你做生意。
E: That's nice, real nice... Take this, {NICKNAME}. It's been a pleasure doing business with you.

C: 何其丑陋的花朵，简直不愿承认它是我们大大的造物喀！
E: Such an unsightly bloom. I can hardly believe it's our master's creation, crrk!

C: 看到这炼金法阵了吗？据说它蕴含着强大的魔力，必须念对咒语才能发动嘤！
E: Do you see this alchemical matrix? It's said to contain immense magical power. You have to recite the spell correctly to activate it, eep!

C: 时间能做到什么…
E: What time can do...

C: 隐藏房间？
E: A hidden room?

C: 好消极的一只鸟。
E: What a pessimistic bird.

C: 我很了解我自己，我只是一只忧伤的小小鸟，想飞都飞不了太高。
E: I understand myself. I'm but a little, tiny, minuscule bird bogged down with sorrow, one who wishes flight yet is altitudinally challenged.

C: 据我所知，不是的。鹤运物流的机巧鸟是用来运送快递的，赶路就挺忙的了，没有搭载闲聊功能的必要。
E: Not as far as I know. The cycranes of Heron Express are used for courier services. They are all busy rushing to their destinations. There is no need for cycranes to come equipped with a chat function.

C: …我可没少对机巧鸟说话呀，按道理来说，它也应该对我敞开心扉。
E: ...I often speak with cycranes. Logically, they are completely open to me.

C: 除了它，还有好几只机巧鸟也失去了联系…不会真的是什么机巧鸟大罢工了吧？
E: Aside from the cycrane you mentioned, we've lost connection with several other cycranes... This isn't some kind of cycrane labor strike, is it?

C: 我知道你是什么意思，你还是认为我和一个会发声的木偶没有差别。
E: I know what you mean. You think there's no difference between me and a talking puppet.

C: 你坚定了信念，既然你是顾客，为了检查商品，摸一摸也是自然而然的。
E: You are resolute. You are the customer. It's only natural that you would want to touch a product in order to inspect it.

C: 你说的对，这确实不重要。
E: You're right. It's not very important.

C: 结果…你看到了，内存太满，我直接宕机了。要不是你，我可能就报废在路边了，你可真是一个好人啊。
E: As a result... Well, as you can see, my memory was too full and I crashed. If it weren't for you, I might be a piece of scrap on the roadside. You're such a kind person.

C: 哼，逞强。你就在后面好好看着就好了，这是我献给你的战斗。
E: Hmph, stop acting brave. Just watch me from the back. I'll dedicate this battle to you.

C: 请告诉我，你的信念是什么！
E: Please tell me, what is your conviction!

C: 再继续为难你也没有什么意思了…休假结束了，我也该回到鹤运物流了。
E: There's no point in messing with you anymore... The vacation is over. I'll be going back to Heron Express.

C: 注意看，眼前的这个男孩叫小帅，这个女孩叫小美。就在刚才，他们与一只机巧鸟大壮正商量着要如何征服世界，好巧不巧，他们盯上了你。
E: You see a boy called Little Johnny and a girl called Little Susie. They are discussing their plan to conquer the world with Bossman, a cycrane. You happen to be their newest target.

C: 而我，我是突然获得智慧启迪的机巧鸟，你明白吗？就算是「{RUBY_B#博识尊}遍智天君{RUBY_E#}」也会注意到我！跟你们这些平凡的人类不一样……
E: And I am a cycrane who has been conferred wisdom, understand? Even{RUBY_B#Nous} the Wisdomwalker{RUBY_E#} will take notice of me! I'm different from ordinary humans like you...

C: 你就不要谦虚了，这道题基本就是你解出来的。
E: Don't be modest. You basically solved the question by yourself.

C: 大胃王挑战赛？那是什么？
E: Competitive Eater Championship? What's that about?

C: 我们拭目以待。
E: Let's wait and see.

C: 哦！看来你的想法和我一样！
E: Great minds think alike!

C: 预备——开吃！
E: Ready... get set — EAT!

C: 独处的千年里，我终于领悟了波动速读法。就拿这条光带传输的内容试试喀！
E: A thousand years of solitude... and at last, I've mastered the art of quantum speed reading. Let's put it to the test with this data stream, crrk!

C: 宇宙…最后的边疆！
E: The final frontier of the universe!

C: 豆腐渣工程！
E: Shoddy construction!

C: 这只若虫与飞天坛递相视而立，仿佛在无声地沟通。
E: This nymph faces the Flying Amphora, as if they are communicating silently.

C: 哇哦，你俩再试一遍，我再测试一下。
E: Wow! Do it again, I wanna test something.

C: 好吧，那就给你。
E: Fine, here, take them.

C: 此事我早向云骑举报过了，我说有人埋伏在这儿扬言要教训我。哼，只要他敢动手，只要我高呼一声，定有埋伏好的云骑将他当场逮捕！
E: I've already reported the incident to the Cloud Knights. I told them someone was threatening to "teach me a lesson." Hmph, as soon as he tries anything, I'd yell, and the ambushed Cloud Knights will arrest him on the spot!

C: 哎，说是「福利」，实际上磕碜得很。你别看这里往来的货运星槎络绎不绝，但大部分都是问天舶司借调的，属于咱们工造司的星槎，屈指可数！
E: Well, they call it benefit, but in reality it's pretty shabby. Don't be fooled by the constant stream of freight starskiffs coming and going here. Most of them are borrowed from the Sky-Faring Commission. The number of starskiffs that actually belong to our Artisanship Commission can be counted on one hand!

C: 我琢磨了大半年，别的道理我还没悟出来，不过这「时势」可真有意思，只要势头起来了，英雄不英雄的先不说，这财源反正是滚滚来了。
E: I've been pondering for half a year, and I haven't figured out other truths yet, but this "era" thing is really fascinating. As long as the momentum is up, it doesn't matter whether the person is a hero or not. The money just keeps rolling in.

C: 介于这里目前的状况，这家店不知道还有没有开业的机会……
E: Based on how things are currently going here, whether or not this store even gets a chance to open up remains to be seen...

C: 井盖下的热气温柔地呼出吐息，白雾轻吻行人的脸颊，将温暖无私地赠予。
E: The hot steam from under the manhole cover rises gently like a slow exhalation. Kissing the cheeks of passers-by, it selflessly donates its warmth.

C: 哇哦，这难道是传说中的七井盖之一，丰饶之井盖！
E: Wow, could this be one of the legendary Seven Manhole Covers, the Manhole Cover of Abundance!

C: 后面是货架先生，他抱着从天而降的广告牌小姐。他们刚刚发生了一场激烈的邂逅，这份桃花让两人不由得有些狼狈。
E: Behind is Mr. Shelf. He is holding Miss Billboard, who fell from the sky, in his arms. They have experienced quite an intense encounter and the romantic situation has left them a little flustered.

C: 戒了这杯酒，她就会回来么…
E: If I quit drinking, will she come back?

C: 这个桶还真适合我。
E: This trashcan really suits me.

C: 没办法，只能忍痛牺牲你的游戏币了。
E: No choice but to heart-wrenchingly sacrifice your tokens.

C: 狠狠地*跳*
E: Jump as hard as you can!

C: 莅临晖长石号！
E: To the Radiant Feldspar!

C: 好，好，你先消停会。
E: Okay, okay, hush now.

C: 悬锋人？你们为什么…
E: Kremnoans? Why are you...

C: 有没有吉奥里亚祭司啊？
E: Is the priest of Georios around?

C: 那必须的必啊！星槎能顺利飞行，都是靠神明的庇佑，不好好做这些敬礼神明的仪式，是很容易出事故的！
E: Yes, for sure! Starskiffs rely on the blessing of the gods to sail smoothly. It's way too easy for accidents to happen — unless I pay proper homage to the gods through ritual!

C: 咱们分头行动！你跑左边，我跑右边！山高路远咱们后会无期了！
E: Let's split up! You go left, and I'll head right. It's a big scary world out there, and I'm sure our paths will never cross again!

C: 我听三月七乘客提起过，是挺有「罗浮」特色的。
E: I've heard March 7th mention that before. It's a Luofu special.

C: 那就拜托{NICKNAME}乘客啦，快去快回吧！
E: If you could please help me out with that then, {NICKNAME}. Make a quick trip!

C: 呜哇！{NICKNAME}乘客真厉害，声音竟然这么催眠！
E: Wow! {NICKNAME}, you're amazing. Your voice is like hypnosis!

C: 好的，都记下来啦！那饮料呢，帕姆记得三月七乘客总喜欢喝果汁，姬子喜欢咖啡。
E: I've written it all down! How about drinks? As far as I know, March 7th always has fruit juice, and Himeko loves coffee.

C: 「蹲」？那还是算了，不至于，哼哼。
E: Carry? Forget it. I don't think that's necessary, hmph.

C: 帕姆什么都喜欢听。
E: Pom-Pom likes all kinds of songs.

C: 不过你不用担心，一切都在帕姆的计算之中。
E: But don't worry, everything is under Pom-Pom's control.

C: 但现在，我的答案只有一个——
E: But now, I have only one answer for you.

C: 你怎么心事重重的样子？
E: What's weighing on your mind?

C: 不要小看帕姆啊，帕姆可是和许多不同乘客打过交道的。
E: Don't underestimate me, Pom-Pom had dealt with all kinds of different passengers!

C: …口气不小！
E: ...You sure talk big!

C: 请收下你应得的陪练酬劳。如果想要再次参加演练，欢迎来铁卫禁区找我登记。
E: Please accept this sparring reward. If you want to participate in drills again, come register with me in the restricted zone.

C: 面对裂界怪物的肆意入侵，我们在很多时候没有捷径可走，只能依靠「人海战术」进行抵抗。
E: Facing invaders from the Fragmentum, we sometimes have no other choice but to rely on strength in numbers to fight back.

C: （剩下的扑满应该都在积玉坊的广场上了，一口气全部抓住吧。）
E: (All the other Trotters should be at the plaza at Trove of Verdure. Let's catch them all at once.)

C: 你发出了一声不那么酷的*哼*，眼前一片漆黑……
E: You hmph in a not-so-cool way, and your surroundings turn pitch-black...

C: 我告诉你——你每打碎一件补给容器，禁区的某位铁卫兄弟就得多加班三个小时，把新的容器放到原处……
E: You should know, for every supply vessel you break, that's three hours of overtime for someone in the restricted zone to replace it...

C: 好了，赶紧从我眼前消失…铁卫禁区不欢迎你这种家伙。
E: Now remove yourself from my sight! The Silvermane Guards don't want vandals like you in the restricted zone!

C: 我懂——或许是块昂贵的金表…
E: I know... Maybe it's a valuable gold watch.

C: 管它呢，它真好闻。那不是一般的檀木或是任何自然材质的味道…而是完全人造的、源自化学的美妙清香。它真诱人…诱人到你想赶紧钻进衣柜，让这味道缠裹全身。
E: Doesn't matter. It smells good. And it's not an odor of typical sandalwood or any other natural materials... Rather, it is a miraculously cleansing scent that is completely artificial, a marvel of chemical engineering. It is so alluring that all you want is to get into the closet and let your whole body soak in its scent.

C: 你决定将它从墙上揭下。主要是为了贝洛伯格——考虑到你在此地经历的种种，你并不是很在乎画中人物的感受。
E: You decide to peel it off the wall. Mainly for Belobog — thinking of all you've been through here, you don't really care how the character in the poster feels.

C: 你决定将它从墙上揭下。毕竟你们无名客做好事向来不留名，更遑论如此精致的画像了。
E: You decide to peel it off the wall. The Nameless have never left behind any credit for good deeds done, let alone for a portrait as exquisite as this.

C: 真是个奇妙的发现。看吧，枯燥如地理学也偶有其美妙之处。
E: What a fascinating discovery. Look, there are jewels of wonder even in a seemingly dull discipline like geography.

C: 刚才那拳真是精彩！
E: What an amazing punch that was!

C: 对…对不起。
E: I—I'm sorry.

C: 不给我点报酬吗？
E: So no recompense for returning the watch to you?

C: {F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}，你怕是不知道打造一把云骑阵刀要花费多少工夫？！
E: {F#Girl}{M#Boy}, do you realize how much effort goes into crafting one of these Devastator Glaives for the Cloud Knights?

C: 你这厮想混赖！这刀靠近刀锷处镌了先祖父名讳一个「泉」字，这应该可以证明是我家传之物了吧！
E: You rascal! This sword is engraved with my ancestor's name on it — the character Quan, meaning wellspring. This should prove that it is beyond a doubt, my family heirloom!

C: 果然人世间所有的分离都是久别重逢啊。我当时就琢磨呢，行骗生涯里还没遇到过那么轻轻松松就把钱给掏了的人，不会是阔人家的傻{F#女儿}{M#儿子}吧……
E: You know what they say, every farewell is just an eventual reunion. At the time I was thinking, I've never met anyone in my whole career, who's given up money to me so easily. Surely this young {F#lady}{M#man} must be either wealthy or foolish...

C: 停停停，你把我当什么人了！
E: Hold on, wait, what kind of person do you take me for?

C: （再打一下。）
E: (Whack it again.)

C: 听起来很麻烦，不去。
E: Sounds like a hassle. No thanks.

C: …是的，先前的来信与你写成的去信双双消失在那脏兮兮的小盒中。取而代之的则是一崭新的信件——
E: ...It worked. The previous letter and your reply have both disappeared from that filthy little box. Instead, a brand-new letter has taken their places —

C: 过奖过奖。
E: You flatter me.

C: 太真丹室
E: Aureate Elixir Furnace

C: 可是，我们这里是家书肆，卖的全是书，不卖铁盒。
E: But we're a family bookstore here? We sell books, not boxes.

C: 就喜欢不干净的「鲛人泪」，让我看看吧。
E: I just like natural, unclean Draconic Tears. Let me have a look.

C: 什么规矩？
E: What rules?

C: 你们是谁？
E: Who are you guys?

C: 我是…我是谁关你什么事啊？
E: I am... What does it matter to you who I am?

C: 这个集装箱里货物特别多啊，我还以为都是…都是…都是「小阴晴伞不能看的好东西」……
E: There's so much packed into this container, and I thought it was... I thought it was... "Cool stuff that little Baroumbrella can't see"...

C: 结果仔细一看才发现，他所谓「小阴晴伞不能看的好东西」，竟然是几大箱发往域外的蘑菇干！
E: But on closer inspection, I realized that all the "cool stuff that little Baroumbrella can't see" was actually just a container stuffed full of dried mushrooms — and addressed to an off-world destination!

C: 你不认识他们，于是依着仙舟戏曲的习俗，在心中给他们起了「小梁」和「小祝」的名号。
E: You don't know them, so based on the conventions of Xianzhou Opera you decide to name them "Rom" and "Com."

C: 吓死我了，我还以为是家里人来抓我们了。
E: You freaked us out! I thought you were my family coming to bust us.

C: 不理他了。
E: Ignore him.

C: 星球本地的工作除了采矿就是种田，根本没什么高级就业岗位。所以年轻人都渴望着走出去，到广阔宇宙里寻找机遇。
E: The only local work available on-planet is mining or farming, with no hope whatsoever of any career advancement. So the youth all hunger to break out and search for opportunity in this vast universe.

C: 我最近总觉得心里空荡荡的，就像…就像胸口被凭空挖走了一块肉似的。
E: I just feel this emptiness in my chest all the time these days, like... just like someone's ripped this chunk of flesh out of thin air from my chest.

C: 你知道酒店怎么了吗？
E: Do you know what's up with the hotel?

C: 虽然与您的交谈令人愉悦，但您说得对，我们还是先离开这里比较好。
E: While it's been a real pleasure chatting with you, what you said is right — we should get out of here soon if we know what's good.

C: 眼前的皮皮西看起来像是一只带着裂痕的陶瓷茶杯，轻触即碎。
E: The Pepeshi looks like a cracked porcelain teacup that would shatter at the faintest touch.

C: 那么，您有什么想要咨询的吗？
E: So, would you like to consult me about anything?

C: 等等、你等等，现在的年轻人怎么这么开不起玩笑！
E: Hang on, wait up. Kids these days don't know how to take a joke!

C: 随着夏布罗歇斯底里的惨叫，你们面前竟真出现了*一团火*。
E: As Chabro screams hysterically, a "ball of fire" actually appears in front of you.

C: 你知道吗，孩子——时至今日，星际间依旧传扬着我的大名！
E: You know what, kid? To this day, my name is still passed around among the stars!

C: 就先聊到这吧。
E: Let's end it here for now.

C: 刺激一点的。
E: Thrilling ones.

C: 谁说不是呢？但即便这样豪华的阵容，也远远称不上胜券在握。
E: Who said it wasn't? But even with such a luxuriant lineup, victory was far from guaranteed.

C: 刺激一点的。
E: Thrilling ones.

C: 越向城中央的天幕塔靠拢，所能分到的光照就越充足。这座高塔变成了压迫与不公的象征。
E: The closer you got to the Canopy Tower in the middle of town, the more light you could get. This tower became a symbol of oppression and injustice.

C: 现在是早上吗？
E: Is it morning now?

C: 抱歉，我只玩手游。
E: I'm sorry. I only play mobile games.

C: 呃…几十年前拿过。别闹了，这年头谁还在乎拿什么奖啊？
E: Um... Yeah... A few decades ago. Come on. Who cares about awards these days?

C: 相信自己的能力——你就是筑梦师！我也是筑梦师！他也是筑梦师！只要插上想象力的翅膀，我们人人都能成为最优秀的筑梦师！
E: Trust yourself to be a Dreamweaver, and you'll be one! I'm a Dreamweaver! He's a Dreamweaver! With the wings of imagination, everyone can be an excellent Dreamweaver!

C: 给它打个分吧。
E: Please rate his work.

C: 上次他在公开发布会上做出承诺的时候，结果可不怎么好看。
E: It didn't end up well when he made that promise at the public press conference.

C: 这是谁说的，「平庸」？说这话的人真的懂行吗…我们要打造的可是领先于时代的东西，我看她还是先去提升下自己的审美再说吧！
E: Who made this comment? Mediocre!? Does she even know anything about the industry? We're making something ahead of this era here. She should improve her tastes before making any comments!

C: 有点印象。
E: The name sounds familiar.

C: 好久都没和人聊得这么开心了，唉，要是早点认识您该多好……
E: It's been a long time since I had such an enjoyable chat. Alas, if only I met you earlier...

C: 现在的年轻人，啧…行了，用扁桃体也能猜到他怎么编排我的。
E: Youngsters these days... Tsk... I already know how he frames me.

C: 他们只要听到几句宾客的夸赞就能把绒球翘上天，以为成名都是靠自己的才华，把家系的帮扶抛之脑后。
E: All it takes is a few compliments from the audience, and their egos shoot through the roof. They start thinking they're the sole reason for their fame, forgetting about the support they get from the Iris Family.

C: 如果对环境不满的从业者们轻易知难而退，何谈改变这个环境？何谈让鸢尾花家系胜过星际和平娱乐？
E: If all artists who are dissatisfied with the industry leave, how can we change it? And how can we Iris Family beat our competitor, Interastral Peace Entertainment?

C: 如果作为观众想看到更优秀的艺术，就一定要抬高审美标准，宽容的态度对行业的未来有害无益！
E: If the audience wants to see better art, they must raise their artistic standards. Being too tolerant is killing the industry!

C: 喂，别在家族的地盘丢脸！星际和平娱乐可是代表着公司的脸面！
E: Hey, don't make a spectacle out of yourself on The Family's turf! The Interastral Peace Entertainment represents the IPC's reputation!

C: 哈哈哈，有点意思，我倒想看看鸢尾花家系为什么要找一个疯子传话。
E: Hahaha, this is interesting. I wonder why the Iris Family sent a nutcase here to deliver their message.

C: 我的部下刚刚失礼了，这是星际和平娱乐的一点歉意，还请收下这些信用点…或是说苜蓿钞。
