E: Sorry for my subordinate's rude behavior. Here are some credits... I mean, Alfalfa credits... courtesy of Interastral Peace Entertainment.

C: 从今天起，我绝不会再成为浇灭别人梦想的冷水了！*皮皮西族粗口*！去他的市场受众，去他的家族利益，去他的宇宙巨星！我会成为点亮他们梦想的柴薪，为过去的傲慢赎罪！
E: From now on, I'll stop dampening other people's dreams! *Pepeshi vulgar word*! I'll forget about the target audience, The Family's benefits, or making universal superstars! Instead, I'll become the firewood that nurtures the first sparks of their dreams to atone for my past arrogance!

C: 不懂别乱说，拉洛丝小姐的音乐中一定别有用意……
E: Please stop making vulgar remarks. There must be more to Larose's music...

C: 不过现在，我已经不再需要寻死了。无论是梦境还是现实。
E: But now, I no longer have the urge to end my life, be it in the dreamscape or reality.

C: 怎么还发上好人卡了？
E: I didn't see that compliment coming.

C: 他不过是在孜孜不倦地追逐那高高在上的梦想，就像逐星的巨人！难道只因巨人所到之处大地震颤不已，人们便要说他有罪吗？
E: He was merely pursuing his dream, like a giant reaching for the stars! Should the giant be condemned just because the earth trembles wherever it goes?

C: 你说自己是制片人？
E: You're a producer, right?

C: 那之后我又拍了几部电影…可惜反响平平。现在，我为寻找灵感来到匹诺康尼，希望这座城市能回馈我的努力……
E: I made several more movies after that, but the response was mediocre. So, here I am in Penacony, in search of inspiration. I hope this city will reward my efforts...

C: 不聊了。
E: That's it for today.

C: 越是美丽的环境，越不该遭受玷污。你肯定也这么认为，对不对？
E: Beautiful places shouldn't be defiled by pollution. You agree with that, don't you?

C: 如果那时的我已经拥有了感情，我想我会感到孤独…还有恐惧。
E: If I had feelings at that time, I would have felt lonely... and scared.

C: 想要避免其他星球重蹈我母星的覆辙，这是最实在的路了。
E: This is the most pragmatic approach to prevent other planets from going down the same road as my home planet.

C: 首先，对于阁下的帮助，我再次表示感谢。
E: First, I wish to thank you again for your aid.

C: …很少有人会想要和我聊天。
E: ...Few people wish to speak with me.

C: 所以，我知道诸位经历了什么。或许不是全部的细节…但仅凭那些片段也足够我做出判断。
E: So, I know all that you have been through. Perhaps not all of the details, but... enough for me to arrive at my own conclusions.

C: 可以的话，请你拿上这张照片——然后去这公馆的别处找到我的<color=#dbc291ff>兄弟姐妹</color>。他们应该…很显眼。
E: If it's okay, please could you hold onto this photo — and then go and find my <color=#dbc291ff>brother and sister</color> elsewhere in this pavilion. They should... be quite conspicuous.

C: 偿还…偿还……
E: Payback... payback...

C: 我还记得自己当时的心情。我惶恐无比…也激动无比。我记得家主轻轻拍了拍我的肩膀，然后向我提出了那个要求——那个让我的大脑彻底一片空白的要求。
E: I still remember how I felt that day. Absolutely terrified... and absolutely thrilled. I remember the family head gently tapping me on the shoulder and making this request of me... a request that made my mind go completely blank.

C: 然后…你照做了？
E: And so... so then, you did it?

C: 这间公馆一直这么冷清吗？
E: Has this pavilion always been so deserted?

C: 让孩子们都拥有一个快乐的童年，也是世界和平的一部分。
E: Giving children a happy childhood is one small part of world peace.

C: 千等万等总算等到了。一直没消息，我担心奥科萨娜女士中途反悔，现在看来，还是我以小人之心度君子之腹。
E: I'd been holding out for ages, but the wait is finally over. After so long with no word, I was worried that Miss Oksana got cold feet. But I've just been projecting my own stingy concerns onto a gracious lady.

C: 你眼前普普通通的玩具，等带回现实世界，就会转化为特定的筹码，用于兑换反抗暴政的武装。
E: These everyday toys you see here are able to be converted into special chips once they get back to the real world, then exchanged for arms to resist our oppressors.

C: 之前校长发内推时，我还想着从基层做起、慢慢锻炼，就去应聘了奥帝购物中心的销售助理……
E: Some time ago, when the dean was sending out internal recommendations, I was thinking that I could start at the bottom and slowly work my way up, so I went to apply for a sales assistant position at Oti Mall...

C: 他是当今校长…
E: He's the current dean...

C: …我可不喜欢跟那些家伙打交道，多没劲！每个人对于「欢愉」的追求都不一样，何必费那力气把自己的审美强加给别人呢？嘿……
E: ...I just don't like communicating with people like that, it's so dull! Everyone has their own way of pursuing Elation. Why must I waste my own energy sharing my sense of aesthetics with others? Heh...

C: 哈哈哈，我理解了...话说回来，「那位」似乎正准备前往匹诺康尼。你难道不打算...？
E: Hahaha, I understand. Now that you say it, "that" person seems to be heading to Penacony. Are you not planning to...?

C: 不是很重，帮我搬一下吧？拜托了！
E: It's not very heavy. Can you please help me move it? Please!

C: 再想想。
E: Let's keep thinking.

C: 杰作，我只能这样评价。还有什么比一面覆盖了整台机器的护盾更令人安心呢？
E: It can only be described as a masterpiece. What could bring us more relief than a shield that completely covers the entire machine?

C: 灯光球。
E: A disco ball.

C: 这种地髓矿不需要精细加工，应该可以很快凑齐。
E: This kind of Geomarrow ore does not require intricate refining processes. We should be able to gather it in no time.

C: 嗯，我在听。
E: Yes, I'm listening.

C: 给我讲讲折纸小鸟的故事…
E: Tell me the story of the origami birds...

C: 啾！是魔法硬币啾！
E: Tweet! A magic coin, tweet!

C: 让我想想…对了，有个爱看书的孩子总喜欢窝在<color=#dbc291ff>书架最下面</color>，据说这样其他高个子大人就不回来打扰它了啾~
E: Let's see... Oh yes, there's a child who loves reading — it loves nesting at the <color=#dbc291ff>bottom-most shelf of the bookshelf</color>. Apparently it's so that other tall people won't bother it, tweet!

C: 来，这是人家给客官准备的礼物，请好好珍惜啾~
E: Here, this is a gift I've prepared for you. Please treasure it, tweet!

C: 感觉到从身后投来的视线…
E: I feel a gaze from behind...

C: 据说钟表小子要回小镇了啾…
E: I hear that Clockie will return to town, tweet...

C: 啾~真是陌生的面孔，您是第一次来美梦小镇吗？啾？
E: Tweet! You're an unfamiliar face. Is this your first time in Dreamville, tweet?

C: 是个危险的家伙
E: It's a dangerous one.

C: 飞起来的时候不怕高？
E: Are you not afraid of heights when you're flying?

C: 现在是匹诺康尼时间，不知道多少时不知道多少分……
E: It's unknown hour, unknown minutes in Penacony time right now...

C: 嗯？刚才是不是听见了荣誉队员的声音？
E: Hm? Wasn't that the honorary member's voice?

C: 你的表现可真好玩，再见，下次还来逗你啾。
E: Your reaction was really fun. Goodbye, I'll come back next time to make you laugh, tweet.

C: 哼，看你这么尊敬本统领，就封你个海盗王当当啾。
E: Hmph, I see that you respect me so much, I'll bestow you the title of Pirate King, tweet.

C: 陌生人，你也来买气球吗？啾？
E: Hey stranger, are you here to buy some balloons, tweet?

C: 啾啾啾啾啾～
E: Tweet tweet tweet tweet tweet!

C: 课外补习是允许的吗？
E: Is after-school tuition allowed?

C: 什么说服...你以为这是动动嘴皮子就能解决的问题吗？
E: What persuasion? You think this is something that can be solved by just wagging our tongues?

C: 别太得意了！你无法无天的日子总会有尽头的！
E: Don't be so pleased with yourself! Your days of being above the law will come to an end!

C: 有吗？我只是在看那边的其他东西...或许视线重叠了吧。
E: Was I? I was just looking at something over in your direction... Perhaps our eyes just happened to meet.

C: 没想到这东西竟然落到了你手里，此事涉及我云骑军的机密，你还是跟我走一趟吧。
E: I didn't expect you to have those documents. Well, this is highly confidential Cloud Knight information, and now I need you to come with me.

C: 少废话，我本以为你是兄弟，可没想到你个浓眉大眼的竟背叛了大家…你对得起被「药王秘传」残党所害的兄弟姐妹吗？！
E: Save your breath! I thought we were brothers, but you betrayed everyone... Can you face our fallen brothers and sisters who died at the hands of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus with a clear conscience?

C: 请谨慎保管，{NICKNAME}，这书远比它看上去要危险得多。设想一下，如果被启迪智慧的不是我这样可爱的小谛听，而是些别的什么不识字的怪物……
E: Please keep it safe, {NICKNAME}. This book is far more dangerous than it seems. Just imagine if it wasn't a cute little Diting like me that became enlightened, but a fierce, deadly monster...

C: 也许琴师本人在世时，「知音难觅」这样的事是存在的。倘若将作品交给时间的话，在未来总会遇到知音的，这首琴曲并没有成为绝唱。
E: Perhaps when the guqinist was still alive, such a thing as "hard-to-find soul mates" still existed. But if this tune was left to the vicissitudes of time, it could always meet a new soul mate in the future — never reaching its peak of perfection.

C: 幸好，作品以这样的形式完成了。
E: Luckily, the music managed to be completed this way.

C: 拍好了吗？
E: All done?

C: 朱唇如血发如霜。
E: To be known by you, my love doth spurn.

C: 且为郎君点红妆，朱唇如血肤如霜。
E: In devotion, my heart does yearn. To be known by you, my love, in return.

C: 敲敲车窗。
E: Knock on the window.

C: …我知道了，爸爸。我们去办入住吧。
E: ...I understand, father. Let's go and check in.

C: 爸爸花光了辛辛苦苦攒了二十年的积蓄，为的只是见你一面。你怎么…怎么能这样对我们，对这个家？！你到底…你到底把我们当成……
E: Father has spent all of the savings that he worked himself to the bone for twenty years to save up, just to see you. How... How could you do this to us? To our family!? What... What do you think we are...

C: 你爱我们…不，你爱过我们吗？
E: Do you love us... No, did you ever love us?

C: 你们…你们怎么会…
E: You... How did you...

C: 为什么要自证清白？
E: Why are you trying to prove your innocence?

C: 形势很焦灼，不好说。
E: It's pretty intense, it's hard to call.

C: 场合？哪有什么场合…这不就是最普通的匹诺康尼露天聚会吗？
E: Occasion? What occasion... Isn't this just a common open-air party in Penacony?

C: 你观察到水晶杯的杯口已经有些倾斜——顺着倾斜的角度望去，你看到了在远处的桌上摆放着的几瓶高档红酒。
E: You notice the rim of the crystal chalice is slightly tilted. Following the angle of inclination, you catch sight of several bottles of premium red wine on a table in the distance.

C: 没想到还能活着出来…
E: I can't believe I can make it out alive...

C: 能给我带点东西过、过来吗？
E: Can you bring me something? Bring it here?

C: 选择绿酒瓶。
E: Select Green.

C: 收手吧，朋友。黑塔女士是绝对不可能……
E: Let it go, friend. Herta will never come...

C: 第一个孔位！满足这个身高要求的人可不算多，仔细想想吧。
E: The first slot! There aren't many people that would meet the height requirements for this. Have a good think...

C: 没错，就是这样！我能看到，你身上的罪孽已被神体吞进了肚子。
E: Yes, that's it! I can see your sins have been swallowed into the holy body.

C: 怎么还没人过来…
E: Why isn't anyone coming here...

C: 下一个动作，你可以的！
E: Next move. Ya got this!

C: 很好，短短一个动作，就诠释出了我们对流梦礁现状的无奈……
E: Real nice. That short, simple gesture expresses our helplessness at the current state of Dreamflux Reef...

C: 和其他帮派抢梦泡市场？我们几个都上过学，如果条件允许，做出的产品应该可以达到安全出售的合法标准。
E: Compete with other gangs on the dream bubble market? We've all been to school... If the conditions are right, the stuff we make can probably meet the legal safety standards for sale.

C: 对哦，干嘛只把视线放在梦里呢？去现实赚了钱再回来，虽然苦了点，但总好过抢劫。
E: You're right. Why are we puttin' all our focus only on the dream world? Going back to the real world to earn cash might be a bit more work, but it's better than robbin'!

C: 等等，这些气泡…原来这就是你的计策啊，我悟了！
E: Wait, these bubbles... So that was your plan all along? I get it!

C: 啊…是你啊，我真没脸见你……
E: Ah... It's you. I can't bring myself to face you.

C: （先收起来好了……）
E: (I'll keep this safe for now...)

C: 点开页面的时候还显示「有货」，结果…选特典的时候多看了几眼，回过神来就售罄了，那些抢到《空气蛹》专辑的人都是什么速度啊。
E: When I opened the page, it still said "In Stock" — but... I lingered too long on the options when I was getting the deluxe edition, but by the time I went back to the order, it had already been sold out. The fans who managed to get the INSIDE album sure are fast.

C: 等待片刻后……
E: A few moments later...

C: 放弃，差不多得了。
E: Let's just give up. It's about time to go.

C: 不过你向来都是将不同世界的不同书籍（甚至不是书籍的东西）悄悄放进背包，不知道什么时候会再次打开它了…嗯，这里请允许我问一下，您真的看吗？
E: Then again, you've always been quietly stashing away various books (and even non-books) from different worlds into your bag, never quite sure when you'll look at them again... Hmm, allow me to pose this question, but do you truly intend to read them?

C: 可能是哪个粗心的狱卒落下的，但直到今天也没有任何人申报过这样的失物登记。
E: Maybe it was left behind by a careless guard, and no one has reported it as lost until today.
Shh!

C: 走吧，「魔阴身」发作的时候，最好别在我身旁。
E: Go. When the mara strikes, you don't want to be next to me.

C: 免去寒暄，说说来意吧？
E: Let's forgo the pleasantries — what do you want?

C: 你可能已经认不出我了，别说是你，刚才我自己也不敢相信自己胖了好多！
E: Perhaps you don't recognize me, because even I can't believe how much weight I've put on!

C: 接下来我要从这集装箱里钻进去，去找到一个保险箱，但是这些集装箱空间紊乱，一旦走进去，没人能靠自己在里面找到方向……
E: In a while, I'm going to enter this freight container to look for a security safe, but as I mentioned, the space inside these containers is in chaos. Nobody that enters can orient themselves without help...

C: 我不是人！
E: No, I'm not!

C: 你就把咱的名字供出来，让他们来抓我就好。
E: Just give them our names and tell them to come and get us.

C: 孩子光荣退役了，当父亲的想再看看它鸣响炮的光辉时刻，也不是不能理解。
E: His child has made an honorable retirement. As its father, you can understand why he would want to see it shining as it fires its cannons once more.

C: 如果你站在演武仪典的擂台往上看，你能看到整整五分钟不重样的编队表演！
E: If you stand on the Wardance stage and look up, you can see a full five-minute flight display with no repetition!

C: 仁科是这样的，一谈起飞行编队，道德水平就有些松懈。
E: Renke is just like this... As soon as he gets talking about his display team, his morality gets a little lax.

C: 预祝你们成功吧……
E: I hope this one works for you...

C: 受之有愧啊！我真的没出力！
E: It honestly has nothing to do with me! I didn't do anything!

C: 这可如何是好呀？
E: What am I supposed to do with all this?

C: 周围的学生似乎对此司空见惯，而点名的讲师头也不抬。
E: The surrounding students seem to be used to this scene, and the roll calling teacher's head doesn't even look up.

C: 只是变换了一个形态，你们之间的壁垒便轰然瓦解——此刻你只觉与眼前的「折纸小鸟」心有灵犀、不点就通！
E: No sooner than you change your demeanor, the walls between you crumble — at this moment, your thoughts are one with the Origami Bird before you, absolutely in sync!

C: 你这老狗…嘿嘿！倒也没错，从前我们有位老友，他是法吉娜忠诚的信徒，那时圣烛长明，他好几次得到了法吉娜的祝福…为我们带来狂欢的饮品。
E: You old dog... hehe! Right. We had an old friend once. He was a faithful follower of Phagousa. With the holy candle being constantly lit back then, he gained the Titan's blessing several times and brought us all kinds of beverages suited for carousal.

C: 你熄灭圣烛，佳肴鲜酿的幽香味散了些，你下意识地打了个饱嗝。
E: You extinguish the holy candle. The scent of the freshly made dishes grows muted, and you subconsciously let out a satiated belch.

C: 在开始测试前，您是否需要甜点、饮品，或是笑话？
E: Before we start, would you like a dessert, a drink, or a joke?

C: 所以这说明什么？
E: So what does that mean?

C: 视野逐渐变暗，你那布满丘壑的大脑如同朝阳，在黑暗里缓缓升起——那应该是你的大脑吧？毕竟，「闭嘴」是没有大脑的。
E: Your vision gradually grows dim. Your brain, furrowed like valleys and hills, slowly rises in the darkness like the sun... That should be your brain, right? After all, "Shush" doesn't have a brain.

C: 哦，好吧。但切记不要太过劳累，身体是开拓的本钱。
E: Oh, well. But remember not to exhaust yourself. Your health is the prerequisite for trailblazing.

C: 要不怎么能显得您「开拓」呢！
E: That's why you deserve the title of Trailblazer!

C: 吼吼，真的吗？确定吗？这就是你给出的答案吗？
E: Ho-ho, really? Are you sure? This is your answer?

C: 可恶，可恶啊，答对了…答对了啊啊啊啊啊——
E: C—Curses, it is correct... It's the correct answeraahhhh...

C: 你记得万敌曾和某个狮口打过交道，他当然了解这群狮子的出题套路，叫他过来吧——
E: You remember that Mydei has dealt with a certain lion's mouth once. Of course, he would know these lions' tricks. Let's get him here...

C: 悬锋城的人民习惯以热水泡浴，不过，要是沸腾的铁水从头浇下，即便是最勇武的人也会心生畏惧。
E: Castrum Kremnos' citizens are accustomed to hot baths, but if you pour boiling molten iron over your head, even the bravest individual would quake in his shoes.

C: …抱歉，就将这惩罚当是对肉体的试炼吧。
E: ...Sorry, just consider this punishment a trial of the flesh.

C: 同意，是「歪曲的逻辑」。
E: I agree. It's "twisted logic."

C: 或许，问问阿格莱雅？
E: Or maybe, let's ask Aglaea?

C: ——好痛！不过你也戳到了它的痛处，算是扯平了？
E: ...Owie! Then again, you also hit its sore spot. Guess that makes it even?

C: 没错，小小的巧合能让人会心一笑，但要是离谱到了不可思议的程度，大家只会觉得是不是什么地方出错了——
E: That's right. A minor coincidence will put smiles on people's faces, but if it reaches an impossibly outrageous magnitude, everyone will think that something went wrong somewhere...

C: 造桥的匠人阿吉说：「吉奥里亚在上，我怎敢偷工减料？哪怕石材上存在一丝裂痕，城主都不会放过我！」
E: The bridge builder Aji said: "By Georios above, how would I dare cut corners? The lord would have me in irons if there was even a sliver of a crack on a single stone!"

C: 使用传信石版求助。
E: Ask for help with the teleslate.

C: 我知道，自己终究无法逃脱被查杀的命运，但如果能在死前实现最后几个心愿，我会死而无憾。
E: I know that I won't be able to escape being eradicated eventually. However, I'll die without regrets if my last few wishes are fulfilled.

C: 对，就是这个！呼呼，从我的火苗中拿走少许吧，你会用得到的。
E: Yes, that's it! *crackle* Take some of my flame. You'll need it later.

C: 我不是垃圾袋。
E: I'm not a trash bag.

C: 就比如这楼顶，太空旷了…喂，你觉得楼顶应该加点什么？
E: For instance, this rooftop is too empty... Hey, what do you think we should put here?

C: 谁会喜欢那个啊？我真是看走眼了才会觉得你懂梦境！
E: Who would find that appealing? I was so wrong to think that you would understand the true meaning of the Dreamscape!

C: 别怕，弟弟，让{M#他}{F#她}见识我们热血沸腾的组合技！
E: Never fear, let {M#him}{F#her} witness the intensity of our combined skill!

C: 疯狂捡垃圾。
E: Collecting trash like there's no tomorrow.

C: 孩子，我已经能看到，那个只有星期一的幸福世界了。
E: Child, I can already see a world of joy where only Mondays exist.

C: 不知道那位英雄何在…
E: I wonder where that hero is...

C: …可是垃圾与桶本为一体，如何清理？为何清理？我不明白，请师傅给我展示展示吧！
E: ... But trash and trashcans are one and the same, so how can I clean it? Why should I clean it? I don't understand, so please demonstrate it to me, Master!

C: 虽然知道咪发迷已经踏上了旅途，但你还是打开了信箱…是过往记忆的驱使吗，还是确实期待着什么意料外的惊喜？
E: Even though you know Mifamem has already begun their journey, you still open the mailbox... Was it nostalgia guiding your hand? Or perhaps... hope for a surprise?

C: 美中不足，你仍然无法听懂它的语言。
E: Sadly, you still can't quite understand what it's saying.

C: 毫无疑问，现在它是一只热情的好奇美拉了。
E: No doubt about that. It's now a curious and affectionate little chimera.

C: {NICKNAME}，你看，这里也和记忆中的哀丽秘榭一模一样。
E: {NICKNAME}, look! This place looks exactly like how I remember Aedes Elysiae.

C: 在它们的肚子里面放着磨盘，村民会借助风车来磨碎谷物，用面粉做出香喷喷的面包。
E: They have mills in them. The villagers use windmills to grind grain and bake tasty bread from flour.

C: 现在可不敢啦，人家本来就不会游泳。现在，甚至连飞都飞不起来了。
E: I'm no longer brave enough for that now, and I can't swim. In fact, I can't even fly anymore.

C: 天空那么高，你说，我们俩会不会也是它们眼中的风景呢？
E: The sky is so high. Do you think we're part of a scenery they gaze upon too?

C: 不过，现在也算想通啦，你的到来，为它平添了不一样的回忆，让我真正喜欢上了这里呢。
E: But I've thought things through. Your arrival has filled it with unique memories, and I've truly fallen in love with this place.

C: 来几个人，把东西搬走！兵器收进库里，剩下的送给长官！
E: Bring some men and have them take it away! Take the weapons to the storehouse and take the rest to the Captain!

C: （描述悬锋教官的外观）
E: (Describe the appearance of the Kremnos drillmaster)

C: 我请求您的神谕，我有困惑想得到您的启示。请别再对现世的苦难保持沉默，若是您拒绝给出解答，我将长久守在此处，直到命运之线被剪断，直到神殿崩塌！
E: I request your divine foresight. I am lost in confusion and wish for your revelation. Please do not remain silent in the face of the struggles of the world. If you refuse to enlighten me, I shall remain right here until the threads of destiny are cut and the temple collapses around me!

C: 柴…火柴……
E: Matches... Fire matches...

C: 这一次也绝无两样！站起来，和浴血奋战的黄金裔一样，去守卫我们的家园，让光荣照耀我们最后的时刻！咕嘟——
E: This time will be no different! Stand up, just like the Chrysos Heir, who bled and fought before us! Defend our home and let glory shine upon our final moments! Gulp—

C: 不…不。我还有事情没做完。那时，那些高高在上的蠹虫，听闻黑潮来袭，就自顾自一走了之。把我们…把你们口口声声说要庇护的子民…抛弃在……
E: No... no. I still have unfinished business. Back then, those lofty parasites, upon hearing of the approaching black tide, fled without a second thought. They abandoned us... abandoned the very people they claimed they would protect... left us behind in...

C: 对了，我是个醒不来的醉客…不，我是个风流成性的舞者…不、不不，我是个耽迷纵欲的君王……
E: Oh yes, I am a drunk that can't sober up... No, I am a dancer frolicking among my loves... No, I am a king indulgent in desires of flesh...

C: 汪汪！
E: Woof woof!

C: 看你的样子，需要去医疗舱。
E: I think you need to go to the Medical Cabin.

C: 就像…现在这样。
E: Like... What's happening now.

C: 不好意思不好意思，我正在复习一些重要的工作规范，挡住您的路了吗？
E: I am sorry. I am in the middle of reviewing some important rules for my work. Am I in your way?

C: 为什么会想到保障非人生物权益？
E: Why do you want to protect the rights and interests of non-human creatures?

C: 没有什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 真是困扰，这次送波少这个好，还是那个好呢……
E: What a headache. Which one should I give to Master Capote...

C: 你平时都做什么类型的课题研究？
E: What kind of research do you usually do?

C: 好麻烦，这种事情让机器人过来取一下镇定剂不就好了么。
E: What a pain in the neck. Why don't they just send a robot to fetch a tranquilizer?

C: 到了我这把岁数看过去，那啥事都多少有点难以忘怀，你懂这意思吧？
E: At my age, everything is unforgettable. You know what I mean?

C: 被你这么一问，我脑子里还真糊涂起来了。一下子好多事儿都冲出来了。真是不能提，不能想啊。
E: Now that you brought it up, I am actually confused. I just remembered so many things all at once. The past really doesn't bear being remembered.

C: 你就是雄鹰中的骏马？
E: So you're the horse among eagles?

C: 现在很流行「爆炸头」发型吗？
E: Is it trendy to get such a luscious hairstyle?

C: 这就是为什么她比我聪明、懂得多——虽说我们从小就在这儿，也没出过门，但她对外界的一举一动了如指掌，哎，我要是能像她一样聪明就好了……
E: That's why she's smarter and more knowledgeable than me. Although we've never left this place since we were little, she's able to keep abreast of things. *sigh* If only I were as smart as her...

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I have no more questions.

C: 你是来找阮•梅女士的吗？她暂时不在哦，不过阮•梅女士很快就会回来啦！
E: Are you here to meet Miss Ruan Mei? She's not around at the moment, but she'll be back soon!

C: 她有那么多的造物要去爱，一时间看不到我们也是很正常的！
E: Since she has to give her love to so many of her creations, it's perfectly normal for her to overlook us for some time!

C: 真…真的吗？阮•梅女士创造了那么多的新生命，竟然会注意到我！那也太幸福了……
E: R—Really? It's hard to believe she notices me out of so many of her creations! That's amazing...

C: 别这么消极，多晒星光。
E: Don't feel dejected. You should get more starlight.

C: 这是谁给你取的名字？
E: Who gave you the name?

C: 嗯嗯，等我把所有造物收拢在一起，我就让大家每天写信给阮•梅女士，每封信都是夸我的，这样她就会知道我有多优秀了。
E: Wait till I gather all the creations. I'll get everyone to write letters to Miss Ruan Mei every day. Every letter is to include compliments for me so that Miss Ruan Mei will know how excellent I am.

C: 哇咔咔，没想到会在这里见到你，对了，我有个小秘密要告诉你，你不许跟别的坏点心说——
E: Mwahaha, what a surprise to see you here! By the way, I have a little secret to share with you. Don't tell the other bad snacks...

C: 一起玩？下次，呜呜？呜呜呜！
E: Play with me? Next time, woo-woo? Wubba-woo!

C: 磐岩之脊，吉奥里亚，背负一切生灵的泰坦，雷打不动、水淹不坏！用它的指甲打造的盾牌，牢不可破、坚不可摧！
E: The Pillar of Stone, Georios, the Titan bearing all life upon its back, immovable and indestructible! With a shield forged from its nails, you'll be indomitable and unyielding!

C: 眼见才为实！众所周知，纷争世，{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}曾向大地投出战矛，此事在吟游诗人的歌谣中亦有记载。
E: Seeing is believing! Everyone knows that during the Era Bellica, {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} once threw their lance into the land — this incident has been recorded in the ballads of bards.

C: 添购石料，路过。
E: Passing by, to purchase masonry materials, I am.

C: 明白，控制变量法。
E: Understood. The method of control variables.

C: 当然。无论何时，那里都是我的家乡。
E: Of course. No matter what time we speak of, Icatus is my hometown.

C: （质疑：小前提有误。）
E: (Question: Your minor premise is flawed.)

C: 我的宁芙，是我来了！我还带了一位帮助我的朋友…真不好意思，我好像还不知道你的名字？
E: My Nympha, it is I! And I've brought a friend to help me out... I'm so sorry. I don't think I actually know your name.

C: 厄琉斯…你怎么突然一下子？
E: Aelius... What makes you say that all of a sudden?

C: 为了避免像我父母这样的贵族在暗处干预，我们要让奥赫玛听见我们的故事。这些往来的书信就是最好的证明，它们会为我们诉说公正与真情。
E: We must let Okhema hear our story to avoid pesky interference from aristocrats like my parents. These letters form our best shot at providing evidence, and they'll recount justice and love in our stead.

C: 看起来是这样。
E: It seems so.

C: 沿着黑衣剑士的动向，来到了那个与他对峙的场所。
E: Tracking the black-clad swordmaster led you to where the final battle occurred.

C: 谢谢你能陪我这么久，我感觉好多了，你要是还有事就去忙吧。
E: Thanks for staying with me this while. I'm feeling better now. Don't let me keep you if you have things to do.

C: 网上还好意思说什么「买新不买旧」。哎，我要是有钱就好了…到时候再买点超导合金，然后我用一份就丢一份……
E: And they're always spamming you online to "buy new, not second-hand." I wish I were rich... I'd buy loads of superconductors and just throw them away once I'm done with them...

C: 这种时候，最好还是让他一个人静静吧。
E: Best to give him some space with his grief.

C: 这怎么可能！
E: What do you mean!?

C: 那你也算是梦想成真了。
E: Then your dream has pretty much come true.

C: 你这就是上岁数啦！
E: That's because you're getting on in age!

C: 你就是塞纳托斯？
E: Are you Thanatos?

C: （恭敬地喂食）
E: (Feed it respectfully)

C: 砰——你再次感受到了天旋地转的滋味。但还未等你倒下，便被结实的胳膊扶住了。
E: Bang — You feel the world spin once again, but before you can fall, a strong arm catches you.

C: 悬锋人不会停下。击碎挡在前方的所有东西，是流淌在我们血液里的本能！
E: Kremnoans don't stop for anyone. Breaking through everything in our path — that's what flows through our veins!

C: 详细地说，科可波阁下的全名为「悬锋猛兽•科可波三世」，乃是陪伴过万敌殿下四处征战的坐骑，骁勇善战，勇冠三军，锐不可当。
E: To be precise, Kokopo's full name is "The Fierce Beast of Kremnos: Kokopo III." It was the loyal steed of Lord Mydei, accompanying him through countless battles — valiant, peerless in combat, and utterly unstoppable.

C: 然后，「我」就要把创世神，也就是创作《被缚的埃德加》的剧作家，给杀了，对吗？
E: Then, "I" should kill the creator, the playwright of The Shackled Edgar, right?

C: 你们二位，各自准备辩词，灰发{F#女士}{M#男士}，你来裁判。我们在辩场见。
E: Good. Then you two, prepare your arguments. Gray-haired {F#lady}{M#gentleman}, you'll be the judge. We'll meet at the trial grounds.

C: 真到那时，你还能如此狡辩吗？
E: Could you still twist logic then?

C: 嗯…我就不添麻烦啦，但我想再待一会儿，说不定有其他办法能进去……
E: Mmm... I won't be a bother, but I want to wait a little longer. Maybe there's another way in...

C: {NICKNAME}贵宾，您就别消遣我了……
E: Honored guest {NICKNAME}, please don't toy with me...

C: 太好了，{NICKNAME}！下届「奥凯纳斯运动会」，我会在获奖致谢辞里第一个感谢你。是不是很受宠若惊？
E: Fantastic, {NICKNAME}! In the next "Okeanas Games," I'll make sure to thank you first in my victory speech. Feeling honored?

C: 「呃啊！噢唔——呃啊！别打这里！」远处传来缠斗声。
E: "Ugh! Oww — Argh! Not that spot!" The sounds of combat drifted from the distance.

C: 啊，是您。我在对面目睹了你们的战斗，真是千钧一发啊！我们也想赶来支援，可惜也被黑潮的袭击牵制住了。
E: Ah, it's you. I saw your fight from across the way — that was a close one! We tried to come help, but the black tide had us cornered as well.

C: 沉思之际，一阵绝望的悲泣从旁边传来……
E: As you sink deep into your thoughts, a despairing wail comes off from the side...

C: 那回，他少有地发怒了：「既然你们较之世界命运更在乎瑟希斯的存亡，我便先毁了它的神体！」
E: That time, in a rare display of anger, he declared: "Since you care more about Cerces' survival than the world's destiny, I shall destroy their divine form first!"

C: 为什么…为什么总要等呢？这里有你、有我、有大家…这里分明就是新世界啊！
E: Why... why do we always have to wait? We're all here — you, me, everyone... This is clearly our new world!

C: 我并未刻意去做些什么。在永恒酣歌的斯缇科西亚，法吉娜的神力会满足人们所有的愿望。
E: I didn't deliberately do anything. In Styxia, where eternal songs resound, Phagousa's divine power fulfills all wishes.

C: …我做的？
E: My... brew?

C: 海瑟音大人最后托付给老身的任务——「享受并延续这场欢宴」，唯独这点，我绝不会忘记。带我前去吧，救世主阁下。
E: One thing I'll never forget is Lady Hysilens's last task for me: "Enjoy and continue this revelry." Now, Great Deliverer, would you kindly escort me there?

C: 看来没成。
E: Guess that didn't work out.

C: 嗯…欢宴已抵热潮，可是…不喜蜜酿之人…仍比比皆是啊。
E: Well... Our revelry is at its height, but... Too many have passed on the honey brew.

C: 算是吧，让开些，小心被卷入洋流中去。
E: You could say that. Step back. You don't want to get pulled into the ocean currents.

C: 列车上有不少我只在目录上见过的奇物，虽然仅靠肉眼我也不能完全确信……
E: There are quite a few curios on the Express that I've only seen in the catalogs, though I'll need to see them up close before I believe them...

C: 唔…我还得研究研究……
E: Interesting... I'll have to have a closer look some time.

C: 相信我在这儿会拥有许多愉快的回忆。
E: I believe I'll have lots of happy memories here.

C: 其实，虎克这次来列车，是想要给老爹带个纪念品回去——毕竟老爹身体不太好，没有办法亲自上来看看……
E: Well, I've been looking for a souvenir for daddy since I boarded the Express. He's not so well, so he can't pay a visit himself...

C: 手机、手机…克拉拉之前把手机放到哪里去了呢……
E: Speaking of my phone, where did I put it...

C: 还是要谢谢{NICKNAME}邀请我过来——虽然我现在暂时脱不开身…但我也很期待列车之旅哦！
E: Thanks for inviting me, {NICKNAME}. I've got my hands full right now, but I'm looking forward to the Express tour!

C: 列车和我家的感觉不太一样，挺空旷的。
E: The Express doesn't give me that same feeling. It's pretty empty.

C: 有机会的话，常回贝洛伯格看看吧——银鬃铁卫随时欢迎你们归来。
E: When you find a moment, do come back to Belobog to have a chat. The Silvermane Guards will always welcome you.

C: 说实话没你想得那么好…
E: To be honest, it's not as good as you think.

C: 没事，大家都自己人。
E: The least I could do.

C: （装作没看见）
E: (Pretend you didn't notice her)

C: 炫耀啥呢？
E: Ugh. What a show-off...

C: 这你就不懂了，玩游戏，技术是一回事，运气是另一回事——想要一直赢，就得二者兼顾。
E: You simply don't understand. In games, skill is one thing, luck is another — if you want to win all the time, you need to have both.

C: 你们聊了什么？
E: What did you talk about?

C: 我听列车长说过啦，不过，多一些药有备无患嘛。
E: Yeah, yeah, the conductor mentioned, but it never hurts to have more than you need, right?

C: 我辜负了粉丝的期待，这件事我应该付出代价。可是一旦我在这件事上表达歉意，大家反而更加愤怒，觉得我只是继续在编造谎言而已……
E: I betrayed the fans' expectations and I agree I need to pay for that. However, once I showed any remorse on this matter, they got more angry and felt I was just making up lies again...

C: 因此，我将自己的反省与思考都告诉了她。虽然拉明娜当时…并没有接受我的道歉，但我相信我的诚意一定可以传递给她的吧？
E: Therefore, I told her all about my introspection. Lamina didn't accept my apology there and then, but I believe she must have felt my sincerity.

C: 丹恒老师不爱说话……
E: Master Dan Heng isn't fond of talking...

C: 嗯，没有啦没有啦，都还好的。嗯嗯！
E: No no. I'm all good. I really am!

C: 当然是统计卡波特罪行的报告书呀！作为他之前的头号粉丝，世玲可是知道许多秘密的…那些事儿，旁人想都不敢想！
E: A report that summarizes Capote's sins! I know a lot of secrets as his former top fan... Other people can't even imagine it!

C: 我想问…
E: I'd like to know...

C: 究竟是在哪里看到过呢……
E: I swear I've seen them before.

C: 可能只是某种形似的生物。
E: Maybe it was just something that looks similar.

C: 搏击手不是只靠拳头吗…
E: Aren't boxers supposed to rely on their fists...?

C: 你刚刚说了什么？
E: ...Could you repeat that again?

C: 哎呀，当然是图拉斯制药的卡洛斯理事长！别问这么业余的问题好不好？
E: Ugh! Chairman Carlos of Tulas Pharmaceuticals, obviously! Knock it off with the amateur questions!

C: 唔，这……
E: Uhh...

C: {NICKNAME}，我想请教你一件事——为什么星穹列车的车厢内部这么温暖？
E: I want to ask you about something, {NICKNAME}. Why are the Astral Express' cars so warm?

C: …要是什么都不做的话，总觉得内心有一种虚无感。
E: ...If I don't do anything, I always feel a bit... empty inside.

C: 帕姆看上去就很好捏！
E: Pom-Pom's cheeks are so pinchable!

C: 习惯了。
E: I'm used to it.

C: 希望列车的氛围也能同化你。
E: Then I hope you are swayed by the Express.

C: 不多运动就不舒服
E: If I'm not staying active, I just don't feel right.

C: 想听一些熟悉的歌曲吗？
E: Do you want to listen to something you're familiar with?

C: 这些我都做到了！
E: I've done all of that!

C: 是啊，不以现实为基础的梦境，是无法筑造下去的。
E: That's right. You can't build a Dreamscape that's not anchored to reality.

C: 我是不是睡了很久？
E: Did I sleep for long?

C: 不知道每颗星球上，会有多少个武备库……
E: I wonder how many armories and arsenals there are on each of these planets...

C: 嗯！你说得很好，可她的双剑却不是这样说的。
E: Huh! What you're saying is quite different from what her dual swords have been saying to me.

C: {NICKNAME}，这些石块…是不是你们正在找的那种？
E: {NICKNAME}, aren't you all looking for these kinds of stones?

C: 以后有机会，记得来朱明仙舟做客！
E: If you have the chance, don't forget to come and visit the Xianzhou Zhuming!

C: 反而干净温馨，像家一样。就连眼前这盆绿油油的盆栽看着都让人格外心仪，看来列车长真是在日日照顾。
E: It is clean, comforting, and feels like a home. Even this vibrant plant here is a delight to look at. I can tell the conductor has carefully tended to it day after day.

C: 里面有什么？
E: What's in it?

C: 我是废物…不，我什么也不是，我是虚无的零……
E: I'm a waste of space... No, I'm not even that. I am a void of nothingness...

C: 好啦，别吵啦，都给人家看无语了。
E: Fine, quit making such a ruckus. People are going to stare.

C: 呃，说真的，我们最怕的就是和金主之间产生奇怪的关系了…你说的这件事我就当没听过，好不好？你就说你没找到我，拜托了！
E: *sigh* To be honest, the last thing I want is to enter into weird relationships with my backer... I'll pretend I didn't hear this, okay. Please just tell him that you didn't find me!

C: 他觉得你懂得很多。
E: He thinks you're an erudite.

C: 你好了解他啊。
E: You know a lot about him.

C: 怎么又来了？都说我很忙，非常忙，城东城西，大事小事，事事都需要我们政务官思考……
E: You're here again? I told you I was busy. Like, very busy. No matter where or what the issue is, we civil servants have to be on hand at all times...

C: 不行。
E: No.

C: 就这样啦！
E: So that's that!

C: 我们这里最贵的花就是「侯爵夫人」了，这个名字背后可有一段不得了的故事呢。
E: The Marquise is our most expensive flower. There's a grand story behind its name.

C: 我最近被工作的事搞得心力交瘁…谁说脑力工作比体力活轻松的？
E: I've been so worn out at work lately... Who said that using your head to work is easier than physical labor?

C: 啊，还有佩拉小姐和玲可小姐！那两位都是很好的姑娘，我现在已经把她俩当作妹妹看待了，哈哈。
E: Ah, and then there's Pela and Lynx! Those two are great girls. They're like sisters to me now. Haha!

C: 现在的贝洛伯格缺的是什么，缺的是对壁外除了风就是雪的那点认知吗？把有限的资源投入到这种芝麻大点的小事里，根本就是浪费……
E: What is Belobog lacking right now? The awareness that there's nothing but wind and snow beyond our city walls? How wasteful do you have to be to take our limited resources and put them into something so insignificant?

C: 而这本教程里记录着那个蓝毛诈骗犯的行骗案例，是他累累恶行的见证，也是我们这些前辈血淋淋的教训！
E: The guide goes over case studies of those who were scammed by the blue-haired swindler. It is evidence of his evil crimes, a painful lesson that we predecessors suffered.

C: 这还不简单？把这个混蛋五花大绑，关在克里珀堡的地下室里严刑拷问，直到他把犯下的所有罪行供出来为止；接着再把他吊在城墙外面……
E: That's easy. They should tie this wretched villain up and lock him beneath Qlipoth Fort to be questioned under torture. The interrogation would continue until he has confessed all of his crimes. After that, he'll be hanged outside the city...

C: 唔…你要这么说，我也没办法反驳你。
E: Oh... I mean, when you put it that way, I can't say that you're wrong.

C: 哎——肤浅，真是肤浅！铁卫老爷们可看不上那种地方！
E: Oh — that's shallow, reeeal shallow! The Silvermane Guards don't give a dang about that kinda place!

C: 送你礼物的孩子…有什么目的？
E: Why do they give you gifts... What are they up to?

C: 早饭？
E: Breakfast?

C: 希望下次见面你能想起来…
E: I hope you remember something before the next time we meet...

C: 你、你们别逗我啊。但是你们看起来还挺认、认真……
E: You're kidding me... well actually... you seem p—pretty serious...

C: 那种事我也考虑过…听说男孩子都梦想着能驾驶人形机甲作战？
E: I've thought about that... I heard that boys all dream of fighting in mechs.

C: 想聊聊「正当权益会社」…
E: About the Rightful Rights Society...

C: 一天到晚跑腿，确实受不了…
E: My legs are so sore after running around for the whole day...

C: 当然，就算不小心受了伤也不用慌张，全都交给医生就好了。
E: Of course, even if you get injured by accident, no need to panic. Just leave it to the doctor.

C: 但类似的想法只会存在一瞬间。我们改变不了过去——在永远单向的人生旅程上，我们不断地选择、犯错…并为自己造成的后果担起责任。
E: But such thoughts only last for a second. We can't change the past — we're constantly making choices and mistakes on this one-way journey into the future that we call life... and also taking responsibility for our actions.

C: 这颗星球需要时间，托帕为我们争取到的权益不一定长久。为了预防公司在未来的某天收回承诺，我们必须加快脚步。
E: This planet needs time. The rights that Topaz has fought to earn us may not last forever. We need to speed up our progress in case the IPC someday backtracks on its commitments.

C: 这不，我估计她一时半会儿也回不了家，正考虑要不要邀请她当我的助手呢。
E: Right? I guess she won't be able to go home for a while, so I'm thinking about asking her to become my assistant.

C: 你舍得让杰帕德一个人留着吗？
E: Can you bear to leave Gepard here by himself?

C: 嗐，我现在才觉得自己之前根本就是自找麻烦。有什么事情非得自己憋着，没准和家人聊一聊，问题就都解决了呢……
E: I feel like I was asking for trouble by keeping everything to myself. Maybe all those problems could have been solved if I had just talked to my family...

C: 以前总觉得这些活实在没意思…现在终于想通了，干起活来也有劲了。
E: I used to think that these jobs were boring as heck... Now I've finally let that go and I find them more interesting.

C: 禁区虽说不禁止铁卫自娱自乐，但值岗期间开小差可是要记大过的。
E: It's okay to entertain yourself in the restricted zone, but neglecting your responsibilities while on duty is a major offense.

C: 最近我还在等请假流程审批呢。听说排在我前面的人还有不少……
E: I've still waiting to hear back about my leave application. I heard there are a lotta people ahead of me in the line...

C: 你们心中存有疑虑，这很正常——因为你们左右张望，却看不到「存护」之所在；你们四处寻觅，却始终找不到「存护」存在的证据。
E: Normal it is, for you to have doubts in your hearts — because you look around yourselves, and you can't SEE Preservation anywhere; you cast your eyes hither and thither, and nary do you see ANY evidence of the very existence of Preservation.

C: 搜集战场情报，将其中有用的信息逐条析出，整理好之后便能用于指导银鬃铁卫的大小战略战术了。
E: I collect battlefield intelligence, extract useful information, and sort them out. The information will be used to formulate strategies and tactics for the Silvermane Guards.

C: 在这之上，戍卫官还要负责调度全体铁卫，以便每个人都能正确地行使自己的职能。
E: Above all else, the Captain is charged with organizing the Guards, ensuring that everyone performs their job properly.

C: {NICKNAME}{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}，来找克拉拉有什么事呢…？
E: {F#Miss}{M#Mister} {NICKNAME}, do you need something from me...?

C: 我会尽可能向你提供需求的知识。
E: I will try my best to provide the knowledge you require.

C: 再见，{NICKNAME}。
E: Goodbye, {NICKNAME}.

C: 帕斯卡被格式化了吗？
E: Has Pascal been reformatted?

C: 帕斯卡最近还有异常行为吗？
E: Is Pascal still acting weird lately?

C: 那帮黑衣人后来又拜访了下层区，承诺会为之前的不当行径作出赔偿。矿工们都能分到一笔不小的数目。
E: Those people dressed in black came to visit the Underworld later and promised that they will pay for their improper actions from before. All of the miners will be receiving a considerable sum.

C: …没艺术细胞的都给我站稳、听好——
E: ...Just settle down and listen to me, you artless little cells...

C: 香甜的面包屑，是漫天飘散的雪雾
E: Those sweet breadcrumbs, like scattered snowflakes

C: 哎~天空降下星星的爱~
E: Hey! I feel the love of the universe burn~

C: 哈哈哈，你可别小看我！区区小伤，我躺上几分钟就恢复如初了！
E: Hahahaha, they're just some scratches! I'll be alive and kicking again in a few minutes!

C: 我就是星穹列车的成员。
E: Well, I'm from the Astral Express.

C: 不过，您还是可以通过这台综合终端，编辑您的玩家信息和以太灵阵容，与来自全世界的玩家对决——如果您有任何需要就请告诉我吧！
E: However, you can use this terminal to edit your information and lineup, and compete against players worldwide. Anything you need, just let me know!

C: （揪揪它的耳朵）
E: (Tug on its ear)

C: （摸摸它的屁股）
E: (Pat its butt)
...Arf?

C: …下次加油。
E: ...Better luck next time.

C: 下次再找它玩吧。
E: Play with it another time.

C: 吃出滋养，吃出品位！
E: Eat for nourishment, and eat for taste!

C: 居家应急超值之选！
E: A super-value choice for family emergencies!

C: 还是这避难所呆着舒服。
E: This shelter really is the most comfortable.

C: 呼噜…呼噜……
E: *snore*

C: 哎，全完了……
E: Oh, it's all over...

C: 啧，真难缠……
E: Oh, that's tough...

C: 工具没到啊。
E: Because the tools aren't ready yet.

C: 哎呀，你看…咱在这儿不也照样看比赛嘛？
E: Ah, look... We can still watch the competition from here, can't we?

C: 您是在游览过程中遇到什么麻烦了吗？我可以为您一一解答！
E: Did you run into any trouble during your tour? I can try to answer them all for you!

C: 我本以为希露瓦大人一定会来参观博物馆，就报名做了志愿导览员…可到现在我都没见过希露瓦大人！难道她不会来了吗……
E: I was thinking, she will definitely visit the museum, so I signed up to be a volunteer tour guide... But I still haven't seen her until now! Is she not coming?

C: 欢迎来到贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆！在这里，您将有机会踏寻贝洛伯格的历史足迹，看到世纪奇书《雪国冒险奇谭》中的种种绮丽幻想变为现实……
E: Welcome to the Belobog History and Culture Museum! In here, you will have a chance to step on the historical footfalls of Belobog and see the descriptions of the phantasmal scenes from the epic book of the century, Tale of the Winterlands, come to life...

C: 看着客官的面相，我再掐指一算，心中已经有了一个好名字了。
E: Looking at you, and with a pinch of my fingers, and I've got the perfect name for you.

C: 没关系。
E: That's alright.

C: 什么是诗？
E: What is poetry?

C: 蘑菇只想转起来，像个旋风小蘑菇。
E: I just want to start spinning like a little tornado.

C: 哎…步离人还能有什么罪啊？「战争罪」呗…但我事先声明啊！我手上可没有过什么血债！
E: *sigh* What else can a borisin be accused of? War crimes! But let me be clear! I don't have any blood on my hands!

C: 但自从战首越狱后，幽囚狱也加强了管理，集团的销售渠道遭遇了重大打击…赤衣大人让我们最近都消停点，不要在这种时候给十王上眼药。哎，难受。
E: But ever since the Warhead escaped from the prison, management of The Shackling Prison has become stricter. Most of the group's sales channels suffered a major blow... Madam Chiyi also instructed us to lie low for now and not cause trouble for the Ten Lords. *sigh* How miserable.

C: 我乍一听也觉得太难了，但判官们给我指了条明路——协助十王司工作1次，就算1次「小功」。完成<unbreak>13</unbreak>次「小功」，可以合成1次「中功」。
E: At first, I too thought that it was way too difficult, but the judges gave me a clear direction — each time I help the Ten-Lords Commission, it would be considered 1 "Small Merit." After accumulating <unbreak>13</unbreak> "Small Merits," they can be combined into a "Moderate Merit."

C: 不过嘛…干了这么几百年，我倒觉得做个小贩也有滋有味了——智斗地衡司这种好事，也不是谁想做就能做的哩！
E: But... After all these centuries, I actually think it's fun to be a merchant — matching wits against the Realm-Keeping Commission like this. Not just anyone that can do this job, y'know!

C: 啧…这么仔细一想，说到底还是我爹娘不争气啊！
E: Tsk... When I say that out loud, my parents have really let me down here!

C: 使用了我们的产品，两百年过去了，他们依然精神奕奕。别犹豫了，你们化外民来仙舟罗浮不就是为了长生吗？
E: Two hundred years after testing our product, they're still going strong and in great spirits. Don't delay! Aren't you Outworlders all coming to the Xianzhou Luofu with the express purpose of extending your life?

C: 我认识一位持明医士，他曾为「龙师」，医术深不可测！他告诉我人体每天的水分缺口足足有八百杯水之多，可光靠喝水是不够的，他们持明便有一道秘方……
E: I know a Vidyadhara healer who used to be a Preceptor with outstanding medical skills. He once told me that we needed to drink <unbreak>800</unbreak> glasses of water daily, so we could never supply ourselves with enough water just by drinking. The Vidyadhara has a secret for this...

C: 听起来是高大上，但……
E: It sounds really lofty and amazing, but...

C: 厉害啊，一语道破天机！您有考虑过应聘太卜司吗？待遇应该比我们这儿好。
E: Amazing, you've hit the nail on the head! Have you considered applying for the Divination Commission? They should get paid better than we do.

C: …神策府…神策府？！
E: ...Seat of Divine Foresight... Seat of Divine Foresight!?

C: 你就这么直呼景元大名？
E: Did you just call Jing Yuan by his first name?

C: 且说有一天，丰饶孽物作乱，元帅点兵，命景元亲征域外，澄清玉宇…他这一去，便是三百年。
E: But one day, while the Abominations of Abundance were raging against us, the Marshal rallied his troops and ordered Jing Yuan to lead an expedition force to purge their territory... Just like that, three hundred years passed.

C: 哎…今日府内倒也依旧风平浪静……
E: *sigh* ...What a quiet day at the Seat of Divine Foresight today...

C: 好。我们尽可能长话短说吧，事情挺多的。
E: Alright. I'll try to keep things brief, as we do lots of different things here.

C: 账、账户上没有交易记录。
E: Th—There's no transaction record on the account.

C: 我是「地衡司内最聪明的头脑派」，只有他们两个都派不上用场的时候，我才会登场。换句话来说，我就像是「最后的王牌」，你在牌桌上会首先打出自己的王牌吗？
E: I'm the Realm-Keeping Commission's Most Intelligent, and I only show up when those two get stuck. In other words, I'm the Ultimate Trump Card. Do you lead with your ace when you're playing tiles?

C: 你为什么还没有被开除…
E: How have you not been fired yet...

C: 我好歹是做官的，有固定工资。可那些商人和工人，那真是完全断了生计来源，苦不堪言啊。
E: I'm lucky to be an official and have a fixed salary. But those merchants and workers have been completely cut off from their livelihood, and they're miserable.

C: 嗐嗐嗐，你早说啊，非得等我批评你几句，你才说清楚。
E: Hey hey, why didn't you say so? Did you have to wait for me to say all that before you made things clear?

C: 你也知道这不文明啊。
E: You know it's disorderly conduct.

C: 我不服气呀，我宁愿亏钱，也决不能让天舶司的商团采购那家伙的合金。
E: I can't accept it. I'd rather lose money than let the Sky-Faring Commission buy her stock.

C: 怎么？你也对我们埃伊加文明感兴趣？也好，容我给你好好讲讲，也省得你再产生什么刻板印象。
E: Huh? Are you interested in our Aigaian civilization too? That's great. Let me fill you in so you don't formulate any negative stereotypes.

C: 慢走啊。
E: Off you go. Take care.

C: 为什么不让自动机巧来干？
E: Why don't you use an ingenium to automatically handle freight for you?

C: 不过幽囚狱的主簿也有特殊的地方——虽然工作强度不高，但给我们这些笔杆子的心理压力可不低。
E: Though, being a secretary in the Shackling Prison also has its unique aspects. The workload might not be that intense, but the pressure for us pen-holders is pretty substantial.

C: 虽然太卜大人虽然嘴上没说，但她老人家早就有打算治治这里的歪风邪气了。我也不瞎操心了，咱们就等着瞧吧。
E: The master diviner may not have said anything, but she has long held plans for cleaning up negative work culture here. So I don't bother worrying about it anymore. Let's just wait and see what happens.

C: 确实有一种不引人注目的感觉。
E: She does feel rather inconspicuous, doesn't she?

C: 总之，这样的状态不会一直持续下去，我向你保证。
E: All in all, this situation won't last forever. I can promise you that.

C: 我一直反对他和我一同入行伍，甚至为此闹得关系很糟。
E: I was always against him enlisting with me, and it took its toll on our relationship.

C: 十王司是做什么的？
E: What does the Ten-Lords Commission do?

C: 谢谢…哎……
E: Thanks... *Sigh*...

C: 等等，你别学我说话。
E: Hang on. Forget what I said.

C: 算了，我没什么想问的了。
E: Forget it. I don't have any more questions.

C: 会不会是十王司的圈套。
E: What if it's a trap set by the Ten-Lords Commission?

C: 其他犯人看到你的样子不奇怪么？
E: Do the other prisoners not think it's weird that you look like this?

C: 幽囚狱的破绽在哪里。
E: What are The Shackling Prison's weak spots?

C: 我既身为卜者，应当不骄不躁，不卑不亢…这些话，我时刻记在心中。
E: As a diviner, I should remain humble and well-composed. I always keep these words in my mind.

C: 慢走不送。
E: See you.

C: 闲着也是闲着，就陪你聊聊吧。
E: Well, I've got nothing else to do. We may as well chat for a while.

C: 想问问您那位朋友的事…
E: I'd like to ask about your friend...

C: 怪人？按照常人的标准来看，也许我是一个怪人。
E: A weirdo? If you judge me by the standards of ordinary people, then maybe.

C: 要是上面让你去反物质军团？
E: And what if they tell you to join the Antimatter Legion?

C: 还是不打扰你了。
E: I'd better leave you to it.

C: 杜老板深深叹了一口气。
E: Boss Du lets out a deep sigh.

C: 最近生意还顺遂吗？
E: Has business been going well lately?

C: 是吗？能听到这样的褒奖真是太好了。
E: Oh, is that so? Thank you so much for your compliment.

C: 幽囚重地，切勿徘徊…原来是{NICKNAME}大人，是在下失礼了。您再度造访幽囚狱，是有什么事情要办吗？
E: No loitering in The Shackling Prison! ...Ah, it's you, {NICKNAME}. My apologies, that was impolite of me. If I may ask, what brings you here to The Shackling Prison once more?

C: 不过大部分时候，幽囚狱里还是专业的人在做专业的事。比如这里关押的很多妖魔鬼怪，我看着都觉得害怕，更别提对付它们了……
E: For the most part, however, it's the professionals who do what they do best that keep the Shackling Prison running. For instance, you know how this place has scores of monsters and fiends locked up? I'm afraid of even looking at them, let alone fighting them...

C: 为什么？为了赚钱呗。「杂技」在仙舟可是相当受欢迎的，和幻戏比都不遑多让呢。
E: To make money, of course! Acrobatic shows are almost as popular as immersia on Xianzhou ships.

C: 你最近要是见到了她，也帮我敲打敲打她啊。就和她说：年轻人热衷于新鲜事物没关系，但千万别忘了本职工作才是你的立身之本。
E: If you run into her, don't forget to pass on my words to her. It's okay for young people to try new and fancy stuff, but they must not neglect what keeps them afloat.

C: 此象得主总能偷得浮生半日闲。对于你所问之事——时机未到，且耐心等候。近期心神倦乏需闭目静养，注意保暖。切勿熬夜伤身，勿要为琐事动气，切记早睡早起身体好
E: The bearer of this sign can always find leisure time. As for the question in your mind — now is not yet the opportune moment. Stay patient and bide your time. If you have been feeling tired lately, calm your mind and rest well. Do not stay up late and do not get angry about trivial matters. Sleep early and live a healthy life.

C: 是{NICKNAME}啊，刚想小憩片刻，你就来了。
E: You're here, {NICKNAME}. I was just about to take a break.

C: 不过最近罗浮的治安太好了，一点都不给本姑娘行侠仗义的机会，我的宝剑都要生锈了。
E: Lately, Luofu's been so safe that I haven't had a single chance to play the hero. My trusty sword is gathering dust!

C: 有什么好看的新话本？
E: Any good new stories worth checking out?

C: 想再问一些此前经历的疑惑…
E: I'd like to ask some questions about my previous experience...

C: 我都快退休了，才不要做这种找罪受的工作呢。当然了，根本也没人打算让我做。
E: I have no plans of going through such torture when I'm already about to retire. Of course, no one sees me as a general candidate, either.

C: 好，路上小心。若有任何需求，随时可以向夕葵开口，天舶司一定配合。
E: Please take care on your way home. If you need anything, you can contact Xikui. We'll do our best to help you.

C: 我怀疑，就是它严重影响了我长高。
E: I suspect this is what prevents me from growing taller.

C: 那我没法保证。
E: That, I cannot guarantee.

C: 如果你在协助十王司进行相关工作时，遇到了未知的情况，请随时与四卅七号或其他金人勾魂使沟通。我们的记忆玉兆中很可能有你需要的信息。
E: If you have questions when assisting the Ten-Lords Commission, please approach No. <unbreak>437</unbreak> or other aurumaton spectral envoys. Our jade abacus may contain the information you need.

C: 有什么有趣的典品吗？
E: Do you have any interesting collaterals?

C: 那您就来对地方了。这「不夜侯」是罗浮仙舟首屈一指的品茗胜地。别看老板娘年纪轻轻，在「铫煎黄蕊」上的研究可真是无人能出其右。
E: Then you've come to the right place. The Sleepless Earl is the premier tea spot aboard the Xianzhou Luofu. Don't let the innkeeper's young age fool you. Her research on how to simmer tea leaves is unrivaled.

C: 行，等客官什么时候方便，我们再来聊聊。
E: Okay, let's chat again when you have the time.

C: 我还没想清楚该如何应对这危机，转眼之间，建木的危机又平息了。唉，世事瞬息万变，教人如何反应得过来。经商之道可真难啊…看来我还有很长的路要走呢。
E: And the crisis ended in the blink of an eye before I could come up with a plan to make use of it. *sigh* Things are ever-changing in this world, and it teaches us to be adaptive to changes. Running a business is tough, and I still have a long way to go.

C: 让我想想看，这些年我跟过…体育代表团、学术访问团、曲艺团、马戏团、外交使团…还有……
E: Let's see, over the years I've followed... sports representative associations, academician visitations, folk troupes, circuses, diplomatic missions... and...

C: 你谈到料理的时候好尖锐。
E: You speak with such passion when discussing cuisine.

C: 我以前只是丹鼎司的一个丹士，做研究能力有限，做医士能力也有限。比我有本事的人，几百年前就显山露水，爬上高位了……
E: I was a measly alchemist at the Alchemy Commission, mediocre at both research and medicine. Those more capable than me had already made their marks several centuries ago and climbed the ranks...

C: 然后我就想起我平时读的一些闲书，什么转生成为异世界之王之类的。主人公生前有多窝囊，转生后就有多风光，我实在羡慕得不行。
E: I then recalled those novels I used to read about reincarnating into a king of some alien world and such. The protagonist would always be a bum in their previous life, but become all-powerful when reincarnated. I truly envied their lives.

C: 向肌肉许愿？
E: Wish upon your muscles?

C: 还能做到什么？改变宇宙规则？
E: Hmm, rewrite the laws of the universe?

C: 我锻炼至极致的筋肉，就像是一颗黑洞，周围所有的物质都会被它的筋肉引力场吸引，越是强大的肌肉，就越会被束缚在其中。
E: Having honed my body to perfection, my muscles are now like a black hole that exerts a gravitational pull on everything around me. The stronger the muscles, the tighter the shackling.

C: 因为我感受到了，筋肉的共鸣。筋肉有自己的灵魂，它们渴求更强的对手，我只是顺应它们的愿望来到这里而已。
E: Something resonated with my muscles. You see, muscles have a soul of their own, and mine crave bigger, more demanding challenges. I'm simply responding to their call.

C: 感觉你已经比我懂得更多。
E: I think you already know far more than I do.

C: 实际上，鹤运物流的很多工作依然需要人来进行。譬如检查货物、调配机巧鸟线路、定期检修机巧鸟，再说你也看到街边那些快递箱了……
E: In actual fact, much of our work relies on human workforce: Inspecting goods, deploying cycrane routes, cycrane maintenance... plus all those pesky abandoned boxes you've seen on the streets...

C: 你是哪位？
E: Who are you again?

C: 平时的工作有危险吗？
E: Does it get very dangerous?

C: 我可是土生土长的老仙舟人了！
E: I am a true Xianzhou native, born and raised!

C: 原来如此。看来你也是个苦劳人啊…不过现在这种零碎的工作也不好找了。
E: I see. You are an individual of labor too... But it's hard to find even the most menial of jobs now.

C: 唔…咳咳…「靡靡赤龙、森森青松～六百余年凡尘中～如梦尽是空～」
E: Lalala~ ahem... "Dragons and demons, through thick and thin. Six hundred years, of dreaming within~"

C: …真不好意思，光顾着自说自话了，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}找我有什么事？
E: ...sorry, I'm just talking to myself. {F#Miss}{M#Sir}, what can I help you with?

C: 最喜欢姐姐了。
E: You're a sight for sore eyes.

C: 年轻人常常不知好歹，我不会对你出手的，这是为了你好。
E: Fledglings don't appreciate kindness anymore these days. For your own good, I'm not going to spar with you.

C: 没其他想问的了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 很遗憾，目光短浅的人很难分辨什么是「长远的利益」和「必要的牺牲」。那颗星球文明后来被彻底「毁灭」了。
E: Unfortunately, it's hard for the myopic to discern the meaning of long-term benefits and necessary sacrifice, so that planet was utterly destroyed in the end.

C: 那不是我这种凡夫俗子应该挑战的境界，你能理解吗？
E: Can't you see she's out of my league?

C: 我的{F#好姐妹}{M#好兄弟}，我肯定会找你帮忙的，毕竟在仙舟我就只认识你嘛。所以你有什么需要我帮忙的，我也会帮你的，现在就告诉我吧。
E: I'm sure I'd turn to you for help if I needed it, my {F#sister}{M#brother}. After all, you're the only person I really know around here. So whatever it is you need me to do, just give the word.

C: 还以为你对恋爱不感兴趣呢。
E: I thought you were not interested in a relationship.

C: 想清楚了这一切之后，我就急不可耐地来到了这里，我的人生现在正要开始。
E: I couldn't wait to get here after realizing that. I'm eager to start a new life.

C: 我们下次再聊吧。
E: Let's talk again sometime.

C: 为了每天都能见到英姿飒爽的狐人小姐姐飞行士，我坚持每天坐计程槎到班。薪水消耗有些大先不说，没想到最近开始没人接单了……
E: I pay to commute by air every day just so I can see the lovely foxian pilots. All that cost aside, they've stopped taking passengers lately...

C: 啊，你来了，有什么事情要找我聊聊吗？
E: There you are. Have something to talk to me about?

C: 都回家了，没生意了…
E: Everyone's gone home. It's time to pack up...

C: 早点回家吧…
E: Let's go home...

C: 总有人喜欢，你算老几？
E: It'll always have its fans. Who are you to mock it?

C: 请问罗浮哪里好玩？
E: What does one do for fun on the Luofu?

C: 对，他们确实是为了逃走，但是这没有一点反转，没劲！
E: Yes, they were indeed trying to escape... But where's the plot twist!? Booooring!

C: 有些事想问你。
E: I have a few questions to ask you...

C: 我会一直等着你的，亲爱的。
E: I'll always wait for you, my dear.

C: 嗯，好像没有见到过这样的人…
E: Hmm, don't think I've seen someone like that...

C: 冥火大公？那不是「泯灭帮」的大人物么，咱们聊的不是一回事。我说的是个名叫「南帝」的网友。
E: Duke Inferno? Isn't he THE bigwig from the Annihilation Gang? We're not talking about the same person. I'm looking for an internet friend called "Southern Emperor."

C: 酷耶，早就想养一只！
E: Cool, I've been wanting one of those for ages!

C: 掉下去的人不会受伤。
E: Falling down doesn't lead to any injuries.

C: 买这些首饰的时候…
E: When you bought these pieces of jewelry...

C: 可惜驭空司舵不给冠名权…
E: It's a shame that Helm Master Yukong refused to give us naming rights...

C: 但在其他世界…
E: But in other worlds...

C: 之前，我曾经也附身在一个成年人身上，那是一个孩子的父亲。那个小孩着实讨厌，大喊大叫、缺乏教养、还会偷邻居家的食物。
E: Once, I attached myself to a father. His kid was so annoying — shouting, yelling, being a brat. Plus, he'd just take food from the neighbors.

C: 那个规则太复杂了，我每次想要去理解它的时候，我的意识就不知道到哪里神游去了。
E: The rules were byzantine. Every time I tried to learn, my consciousness would just float off somewhere else.

C: 她虽然在害怕，但她想改变自己，想变得让人可以依靠…但是这哪有那么容易呢？我做不到付出这样的努力，我很羡慕她。
E: Despite being scared, she still wants to change herself and become somebody reliable... but how could that be so simple? I would never be able to make the effort required for such a change. I envy her.

C: 随便？聊聊？我的时间非常值钱，而我只为那些愿意追逐财富、渴望成就自己的年轻人提供金子般宝贵的建议！
E: Little chit-chat? My time is extremely valuable, and I only dole out my precious gold-plated advice to those youngsters with the thirst and desire to chase down wealth and personal achievements!

C: 抱歉，印象不深了。
E: I'm sorry. I can't remember much about it anymore.

C: 镇妖塔轻轻浮起，浮烟不耐烦地回应了你的呼唤。
E: The suppression tower floats gently. Cirrus responds impatiently to your call.

C: 唉，人家好想被那柄浑厚的大剑粗暴地修理一番～
E: *sigh* And I was looking forward to being taught a lesson by that heap of raw iron~

C: 谁让他们技不如人的？菜就多练，输不起就别来。
E: They have no one else to blame for their inferiority. Train harder if you're crap, and get lost if you can't handle loss.

C: 哼，本座还尚未使出全力呢。
E: Hmph, I have not even given it my all yet.

C: 你吹牛！
E: You're bluffing!

C: 老板，多少钱？
E: How much for this, boss?

C: 别废话了，去找下一家。
E: Cut the nonsense. Let's head to the next one.

C: 真是个*仙舟粗语*好日子…
E: What a *Xianzhou profanity* nice day...

C: 是啊，你蜕生后没人照顾…
E: Yes. No one took care of you after you went through the hatching rebirth...

C: 大哥，这儿到底发生什么事了？
E: Hello sir, just what in the world is going on here?

C: 不想吃的小甜饼可以给我。
E: If you don't want your cookies, I'll take them.

C: 谢谢你，主爵。
E: Thank you, Dux Primarius.

C: 我也喜欢高手对弈！
E: I love watching pros go against each another!

C: 逐火之旅，干杯！
E: Cheers to the Flame-Chase Journey!

C: 敬新世界！
E: To the new world!

C: 哦？
E: Oh?

C: 你也有蜕生之法？
E: Are you also capable of hatching rebirth?

C: 物料受损是要扣绩效的。
E: Damaging materials will be marked down on the performance review.

C: 我认识你干嘛。
E: Why should I recognize you?

C: 倒也是…糟了，这个速成班一学期是十八年。
E: That's true... Wait. No. Each semester in this course is eighteen years long.

C: 那叫什么仙舟武术啊？！
E: Then how dare you call what you practice a Xianzhou martial arts!?

C: 呐这个战损就有说道了，这个是「活擒呼雷」套装里拆出来的。你看这个战损多还原？
E: Hey, there's a story behind this wounded version. It was taken out of the "Hoolay's Capture" set. Just look at how realistic it is!

C: 还有限定战损版涂装！
E: Limited-edition "Wounded" versions!

C: 我要立刻凝视深渊！
E: I want to immediately stare into the abyss!

C: 我查了，作曲是个仙舟人。
E: Well, the composer is a Xianzhou native...

C: 《关于仙舟传统文人山水画在银河当代艺术语境下的处境》
E: Xianzhou Traditional Landscape Painting Through the View of Cosmic Contemporary Art

C: 材质：囚犯，犯人亲属
E: Materials: Convict, convict's sibling

C: 我是～跪缚的囚徒！
E: I am~ The bound convict!

C: 哩哩哩哩哩哩！
E: Chirr-rrr-rrr-rrp!

C: 就是字面上的意思，我感觉有人藏在这里，并且一直在暗中观察着我，这让我鸟有些紧张，可是我找不到。
E: It's exactly as I said, I think that someone's hiding here and watching me from the shadows. It's gotten my steel feathers somewhat ruffled, but I can't seem to find anything.

C: 据说罗浮的玩具商已经研发出了遥控纸鸢，但许多纸鸢爱好者将其斥为「亵渎」。
E: Rumor has it that a toy manufacturer in the Luofu has invented remote control kites. Nonetheless, many kite enthusiasts consider the invention as a desecration of the tradition.

C: 声音这么小，怎么挥拳？
E: How can you throw a punch with such a soft voice?

C: 快看，是卢卡选手！
E: Look, it's Luka!

C: 紧闭的门总能激起人探索的欲望，可惜它似乎不打算放你进去一探究竟。
E: People are always drawn to exploring the world behind the locked gates, but the gates have no desire of letting you in.

C: 迴星港里一定还存在着专门配制营养液的功能区，可惜你并不知道它究竟在哪里。
E: There must be a special region in charge of producing the culture medium in Stargazer Navalia. Unfortunately, you don't know where it is.

C: 「造翼者，灵长目 • 人科 • 有羽亚种。丰饶之民中的一支。其记录上可追溯至仙舟启航前的『古国时代』。」
E: "Wingweavers: Primates, hominid, winged subspecies. They are one of the races of the Denizens of Abundance. Their history can be traced back to the Primeval Imperium Age before Xianzhou set sail."

C: 「但有效情报甚少，其中至少仍有四位不知其名。太卜司仅能从各种观测记录与情报中推知其存在。」
E: "There is little information available about them, and the names of at least four of them are still unknown. The Divination Commission can only infer their existence from various observational records and intel."

C: 唱名持续了许久，仍未见停。也许只有其上的住民以及仙舟的学者才知道每颗星的具体模样。但此时此刻，它们只是模糊的，让人昏昏欲睡的音节。
E: The list of names goes on and on without any sign of coming to an end. Perhaps, only the residents of those planets and Xianzhou scholars know what the planets look like. But at this moment, their names form a monotonous song that lulls people to sleep.

C: 可以显示罗浮各处环境的全息沙盘。在罗浮遭遇紧急情况时，它可以协助天舶司做出快速响应和精准决策。
E: The Holographic Sandpit displays the environment of every part of the Luofu. When there is an emergency, the Sky-Faring Commission can rely on it to make a prompt response and wise decision.

C: 你拨开箱盖，把手伸了进去，掏出一大蓬稿纸。
E: You lift the cover, reach into the package, and take out a large pile of manuscripts.

C: 将它留下来。
E: Leave it there.

C: 这页记载了名为相声的曲艺形式。
E: This page documents the folk art called crosstalk.

C: 曾经有闹事者来到水果摊前质疑水果价格昂贵、尚未成熟…随即，闹事者掏出锐器刺向摊主腹部——幸好这里是丹鼎司，摊主得到及时的抢救。
E: Once, a troublemaker came to the fruit stand and complained about the fruits being overpriced and unripe... Then, the troublemaker stabbed the stand owner's abdomen with something sharp. Fortunately, it happened in the Alchemy Commission, and the stand owner was able to receive timely treatment.

C: 然而事不如愿，愧疚感随着逼近终点的紧张感不断交替，你的呼吸变得困难…随即，你意识到这不过是眼前的一枚持明卵，你不必扮演那个疯子。
E: Yet, things do not pan out as you wish. You feel guilty and nervous as the end approaches. You are having a hard time breathing... Then it occurs to you that it is nothing more than a Vidyadhara egg before you, and you do not have to be the lunatic.

C: 咱们快撤吧，别让人发现了。
E: Get out of here before anyone finds out about this.

C: 等不及了，快开场吧！
E: There's no time. Hurry up and start!

C: 乐意效劳！
E: I'm happy to help!

C: 你为什么非要接那一箭？
E: Why do you *want* to catch her arrows?

C: 束缚岁阳的质子背包。
E: Proton backpacks that restrict and bind heliobi.

C: 咱是岁阳！不是鬼！
E: We are heliobi, not ghosts!

C: 他正在做《大矿车轨道》。
E: He was working on the The Great Minecart Track.

C: 酒店房间标配的恒温装置。其火焰可以在吸收热量和释放热量间切换，从而使房间温度下降或上升。
E: Thermostats are fitted into the hotel rooms as standard. Their flames can be switched to either absorb or release heat, heating or cooling the room.

C: 据说一些高级客户能够拥有自己的专线，仅需动动指头就能召来七八位侍者。
E: Apparently, certain high-paying customers can receive their own personal lines, and can call up half a dozen servants with just a twitch of their finger.

C: 你试图拿起旁边的笔，在纸上留下几句记录，却怎么也写不出能辨认的文字。
E: You try to pick up a nearby pen to write a few notes on the paper but realize that you can't even write in any legible language.

C: 书籍与书架砌成了屋子的墙面，随着视线不断向上延伸。
E: The books and bookshelf have become the house's walls, rising to heights as far as the eyes see.

C: 这陈腐木板与纸张所铸就的阶梯将通往哪里——愈发混沌的梦境、尚存余温的幻影、还是某段死去已久的回忆？
E: Where does this staircase made of withered wooden boards and paper go... To an even more chaotic dream, a phantom that lingers with warmth, or some long-dead memory?

C: 这座沙发的尺寸可供多人落座，但现在已经空无一人。
E: This sofa's size can seat multiple people, but it is completely empty now.

C: 毫无生气的游乐角，再无孩子的笑声将它填满。
E: A playtime corner devoid of life, never again filled with the gaiety of a child's laughter.

C: 电视上拴着两个无精打采的气球，可能是某次聚会的残余物。
E: Two listless balloons are secured to the television set — possible remnants of some party.

C: 没有阳光的梦里，只有假花才能茁壮生长。
E: In the sunless dream, only fake flowers are allowed to grow.

C: 一切都颠倒了过来：瀑布逆流而上，鲸群奔向梦境的裂口，仿佛要坠入深渊，又像是在追逐光明。
E: Everything is upside down: Waterfalls flow upwards, the pod of whales rushing towards the breach in the Dreamscape, as if trying to dive into the abyss, but at the same time chasing after the light.

C: 灵魂正催促你抛弃苦果，跨过这无形之门；
E: Souls urge you to unburden your woes and step through this formless door.

C: 「通过我，将进入混沌之梦」
E: "Step past me and enter the Dream of Chaos"

C: 架子鼓不自然地抖动着，时不时传来低沉的吼声，仿佛有一只怪物正蒙在鼓里。
E: The drum kit unnaturally starts to shake, intermittently emitting low howling sounds, like a monster sealed in it.

C: 猎犬默默地注视着你和正在不断增殖的新生梦境——尽管它只是一尊雕像，并非真正的生命。
E: The Hound silently observes you and the burgeoning dreams — even though it is merely a statue.

C: 偌大的宅邸中，一条籍籍无名的猎犬正四处观瞧。
E: A noteless Hound roams the grand mansion, scanning its surroundings.

C: 他是你们的客户吗？
E: Is he your client?

C: 他好像知道些什么…
E: He seems to know something...

C: 关于结算方式…
E: About how returns are distributed...

C: 不是只要努力就能发财吗，我明明…付出了这么多，千里迢迢到这里，花大价钱和家族的人处好关系，入住酒店都是用房产做抵押的……
E: Doesn't hard work translate into wealth? I obviously... gave up so much, traveled all the way here, spent a fortune getting cozy with The Family, shacked up in this hotel using my own house as collateral...

C: 看看我的！
E: Watch this!

C: 有什么用啊。有什么用。收集这闪金光的玩意，就为了挂在家里，到处喊人来看？
E: What's the point... What's the point. Collecting all these shiny knick-knacks just to hang them at home, and then getting people to come over to look at them?

C: 光鲜亮丽的东西是没法长久保存的。您应该明白这个道理。
E: Splendid things can never be kept long. You should understand that.

C: 你的收藏品出售吗？
E: Are your collectibles for sale?

C: 就是群技术疯子！只顾着研发时候寻求刺激，根本不考虑用户感受！
E: It's those technofreaks! They only care about the thrills of research, never stopping to consider the feelings of the users!

C: 讲讲黑塔空间站的事。
E: Talk about Herta Space Station.

C: 那种诡谲的怪诞的压抑的疯狂的不可名状的…埃德加先生究竟是怎么做到的啊……
E: That creepy, grotesque, depressing, mad, unfathomable prose... How the heck did Mr. Edgar accomplish that...

C: 少女的喉咙中滚出一声幼猫似的呜咽。
E: A kitten's mewling wail escapes the girl's throat.

C: 愤世嫉俗？不对，只是单纯的失望而已。
E: Jaded? No, this is merely disappointment.

C: 会动的道具！这可比动物园有趣多了，快来看看吧！
E: A movable prop! This is more interesting than a zoo. Come on and have a look!

C: 我是维塔利，匹诺康尼最神奇的道具训练师！瞧瞧，我身后这些就是最新的训练成果。
E: I am Vitali, the most amazing prop trainer in Penacony! Look behind me! These are my latest training results.

C: 路灯。
E: Street Lamp.

C: 然后华丽地落在地上，摔裂了。
E: And grandiosely lands itself on the floor before it breaks into many pieces.

C: 我？呵…一事无成的累赘罢了。如果我父母的人生是一份完美答卷，那我就是答卷上唯一的污点。
E: Me? Heh... a useless burden. If you say my parents are leading a perfect life, then I'm probably the only flaw in their life.

C: …就比如这店里的飞碟堡，我每天都能畅吃到饱！
E: ...Such as the Floatdisc Burger from this shop. I can eat unlimited burgers till I'm full every day!

C: 广告牌开心地晃了晃。画面上的女子确实气质独特，很有魅力。
E: The billboard sways happily. The young girl on the screen does indeed seem to have a unique quality. She is very charming.

C: 事实上，那是我们的第一次相遇…
E: To tell you the truth, it was the first time we met...

C: 我的心脏…似乎…不太对劲……
E: My heart... Something... Doesn't feel right...

C: 不过别担心，家族会尽最大的努力保护每一位宾客。我们有许多维持梦境世界安定的手段。
E: But don't worry, The Family protects each and every guest with utmost care. We have many security measures to maintain the Dreamscape's safety.

C: 靠近些，年轻人。你有什么有趣的经历吗，来给老婆子我讲讲吧？
E: Come closer, young one. Do you have any interesting experiences to share with an old lady?

C: 开拓者一定喜欢车子吧，我送一辆最新款斯坦威游隼给你怎么样？
E: Trailblazers must love cars. How about I give you the latest Steinway Falcon speedster?

C: 为了不让偌大家业毁于手中，这么多年来，我都在努力与「奢侈」保持距离。
E: To prevent the business from going under, I've been working hard to distance myself from luxury all these years.

C: 我想起之前跟那个指挥家吵了一架，他告诉我「自动乐团」是有灵魂的。
E: I remember getting into an argument with that conductor — he told me that the automated orchestra has souls.

C: 我对车没有兴趣。
E: I'm not interested in cars.

C: 昨天是销售冠军，今天的成交量眼看着也要登顶，真是要感谢每位愿意光顾的客人——就是您吧！您就是我的苏乐达，我的快乐之源！
E: Yesterday we were top in sales, and it looks like we're going to repeat that feat again today. It's all thanks to the customers who are willing to support us — that must be you! You really are my SoulGlad, my source of happiness!

C: 还有！我非得要喷了，好好的自动驾驶系统不用，坚持要用手操控，这不出事才怪嘛！有时候真不知道那些皮皮西人的脑子里都在想什么！
E: Also! I really have to say something about this: They refuse to use the self-driving function and insist on driving manually, of course there will be an accident! I really don't know what these Pepeshi are thinking!

C: …您是问我吗？没多长时间，原先的那位店员辞职了，我才刚从其他店调过来。
E: ...Are you asking me? I've only been here for a while, the previous staff quit and I just got transferred here from another store.

C: 那，什么是「机器的艺术」？最美的飞船长成什么样子？易于航行的外表设计、坚固安全的外壳选材、低耗高效的虚数内能引擎…这样的飞船是最实用的，也是最美的，不是吗？
E: Then, what is the "art of machinery"? What does the most beautiful spaceship look like? An exterior design that eases navigation, a body constructed from a sturdy and safe material, a low-emission and high-efficiency imaginary intra-kinetic engine... A ship like this is the most practical and the most beautiful, is it not?

C: 可以摸摸你头上的绒球吗？
E: Can I touch the fluff ball on your head?

C: 入梦须知已记录在您的梦境护照上，您可以随时查阅。如有其他需求，可随时通过房间内的电话联系酒店工作人员。
E: Please refer to your Dreamscape Pass for instructions. Should you have any additional needs, feel free to contact our staff using the phone in your room.

C: 你根本没记住我的名字。
E: You haven't remembered my name at all.

C: 有什么注意事项吗？
E: Is there anything I should keep in mind?

C: 很高兴能够在此与您相遇，请问有什么可以为您效劳的吗？
E: It's a pleasure to meet you. How can I assist you today?

C: 虽然粘土人也要靠双脚行走，但我们的身体可塑性其实非常强，什么形状都能变。
E: While we Clayforms walk on two feet, our bodies can actually stretch and take on any shape.

C: 当然可以，陪宾客聊天也在梦境贩售店的业务范围之内！
E: Certainly. Engaging in conversation with guests is within the scope of our services!

C: ——然后让您听到对方正在梦到什么！怎么样，是不是很有趣？是不是很心动？
E: ...and let you know what your friend is dreaming about! Isn't it thrilling and fun?

C: 叮铃…叮铃…叮铃……
E: *ring*... *ring*... *ring*...

C: 嘟…嘟…嘟……
E: *dial tone*

C: 叮铃铃，「讲道德的匹诺康尼派对客」——我得承认，您的笑话确实很有品！
E: *ring* An "ethical partygoer in Penacony"! I must admit that your joke is quite refined!

C: 希望你能始终把我展示在车位上。这是匹诺康尼所有车的终极梦想。
E: I hope you'll always put me on display in your parking lot. It's the ultimate goal of all vehicles in Penacony.

C: 啧。原来你没这个本事啊，我在怕什么。来呀，尽管销毁我啊。
E: Tsk. So you're just bluffing. Why am I even scared of you? Bring it on! Destroy me all you want.

C: 打开车灯。
E: Switch on the car's lights.

C: 想去！我仰慕那里很久了，好想去看看！漂亮的飞车就该停在豪华的飞艇里！
E: Yes, I want to go there! I've admired that place for so long and have always wanted to take a look! A beautiful flying car like me should be parked on a luxurious airship, after all!

C: 那是啥？
E: What's that?

C: 但是，他们肯定不希望所有人都沉浸在这里，忘记了前进的路在哪！谢谢你，我最好的朋友，是你帮助美梦小镇找回了它原本存在的意义！
E: But they definitely wouldn't want everyone to just drown in this place and forget where the road ahead is! Thank you, my best friend! You're the one who helped Dreamville re-discover its original purpose!

C: 这是几个意思？
E: What does that mean?

C: 你好？
E: Hello?

C: 我消耗过崇高道德的赞许。
E: I have consumed the Praise of High Morals.

C: 我在此向你告解，请求弥补我的罪过。
E: I hereby confess to you, to please forgive my sins.

C: 噗嗤，年度模范侍者…整得就像什么大奖一样。
E: Psh, model attendant of the year... Like it's some sort of grand award.

C: 为什么，为什么总有人冒出来破坏我的梦想？！
E: Why, why are people always popping out to ruin my dream!?

C: 怎么办啊…要不干脆去算一卦？或者去大街上抓个弹簧荷官？
E: What do I do... How about I just go get my fortune told? Or should I head to the main street to catch a Spring Loader?

C: 噢，美梦剧团，可爱又乖巧的小东西，我非常喜欢。
E: Oh, Sweet Dreams Troupe. They are a lovely and sweet bunch. I like them.

C: 唉，希望这种情况有朝一日能有所改善吧。
E: Alas, I hope things will get better one day.

C: 亲爱的朋友，钟表小子为你服务，滴答！
E: Dear friend, Clockie is here to serve you today, tick-tock!

C: 或许是他太过难看的面色着实令人同情、也或许是他的颓丧感染了你，你竟突然想和他聊聊。
E: For some reason, you find yourself wanting to talk to him. Maybe his pitiable expression has inspired some kind of sympathy in you, or maybe his depression is infectious.

C: 给您讲个好玩的吧——我有个朋友，原本是个星际驰名的运动健将，光是到手的金牌就能摆满一面墙。
E: I'll tell you something interesting... I have a friend who was once a celebrated athlete throughout the galaxy, he could cover a whole wall with the gold medals he's won.

C: 它们都是很…有意思的生命，对吧？梦境中的物件会走动，能像我们一样交流和思考，这本身就是件相当新奇的事，我喜欢观察它们的行为。
E: They are all very... interesting creatures, don't you think? The fact that objects in the Dreamscape can walk, communicate and think like us, this is such a novel concept. I enjoy observing their behavior.
(Meow.)

C: 质疑神主，控制欲过强，这都是受「秩序」影响的表现。如果你身边有这种人，请务必告诉我，报酬管够。
E: Questioning the Great One and having an overwhelming desire for control are all signs of Order's influence. If anyone around you exhibits those signs, please let me know. The reward will be worth your while.

C: 未来该怎么办啊，现在这种日子，完全看不到头。
E: What am I going to do in the future? With how things are now, I can't see where it's all going.

C: 那么，请容我贸然询问，你前来此地，是否怀有某种目的……
E: Now then, if you don't mind my asking: Do you perhaps have a motive for coming to this place...

C: 又或者…倘若你企盼新鲜的乐趣，我也可以为你献上更多惊喜。
E: Or perhaps... if you wish for more refreshingly fun times, I have more surprises in store for you.

C: 可以聊聊吗？
E: Are you up for a chat?

C: 蠹虫…梦里梦外，无处不在——那是滔天洪水无法濯净的污浊，遍野烈焰无法燃尽的腐败。
E: Vermin... They're anywhere and everywhere, within and without dreams — it is a rot that cannot be cleansed by deluges, a corruption that cannot be extinguished by rampant wildfire.

C: 嗯，不错、不错…就是这样，太美妙了！…哦，不，不不不！施托赫森，你在做什么？！这里不该是渐强的！……
E: Hmm, not bad, not bad... That's it, then. Wonderful! ... Er, no no no! Storsen, what are you doing? It's not time for the crescendo yet!

C: 嗨，我们又见面了，托斯卡尼乐团的大救星！如果不是你们出手干预谐乐大典，像我们这种只有{RUBY_B#「言语的同谐」}第Ⅵ音级{RUBY_E#}的家人根本没可能登上剧院舞台。
E: Hey, it's the savior of the Toskani Orchestra! We meet again. Do you know that if you hadn't stepped in to help with the Charmony Festival, Family members like us with only {RUBY_B#"Verbal Harmony"} scale degree VI{RUBY_E#} would have no hope of making it on stage?

C: 只要哨子一响，全世界的人都能立马进入状态，根本用不着我多费口舌。这样一来，我的语言模组的故障率就大大减小了，使用寿命也能延长好几倍。
E: One blow of the whistle and everyone just falls into place without me having to waste my breath. That reduces my speech module's failure rate and stretches out its lifespan several times over.

C: 谁不想当大导演啊？光有那份心还不够，还得有那个命才行……
E: Who doesn't want to be a famous director? It's not enough to have just the talent, though — you need luck as well...

C: …但是除了几位无名客的衣冠冢外，我什么都没见到。难道它就是「钟表匠的遗产」？未免也太无聊了！
E: ...But I've not seen anything here besides the empty tombs of a few Nameless. Are they really the Watchmaker's Legacy? That's such an anticlimax...

C: 你应该也听说了，流梦礁正在逐渐崩塌。或许过不了多久，这地方就会消失。到时候梦里就只剩下那呆板的十二时刻可去了。
E: You must have heard that the Dreamflux Reef is gradually collapsing. There is a chance that this place will disappear very soon. When that time comes, the dream will only have the boring Twelve Hours to offer.

C: 不好意思，我要继续观测了……
E: Please excuse me. I need to continue my observation...

C: 我会记得他们的。
E: I will remember them.

C: 和「钟表匠」一样，我绕过家族的监管，我也成功把历史传达了出去。
E: Like the Watchmaker, I bypassed The Family's supervision and successfully released the true histories.

C: 它足够原始，在它身上，你能同时看到过去和未来的影子。
E: The dreamland is primitive enough for you to see both its past and its future.

C: 因为这些都只是历史，它们早已过去，留给我的只有这片深邃的长梦。
E: Because it's all history. They are bygone days, leaving me with only this deep and long dream.

C: 当然可以，我很乐意为你提供一切力所能及的帮助。
E: Sure can. I'd be more than happy to help you out however I can.

C: 后来…渐渐有其它自动乐器来到这里，其中大部分都有些坎坷波折的经历，而我收留了它们。
E: But then, later... other automated instruments gradually came along, most of them with some kind of rough, storied past — and I took them all in.

C: 关于小镇居民…
E: About the townspeople...

C: 让我想想…对了，有个喜欢热闹的孩子，现在剧场这么安静，它准会跑去<color=#dbc291ff>观众席</color>活跃气氛啾～
E: Let me think... Oh, that's right, there's a child that loves crowds. It's so quiet at the theater now, so it must have gone to the <color=#dbc291ff>auditorium</color> to hype up the atmosphere, tweet!

C: 让我想想…对了，<color=#dbc291ff>有个全是小方块的房间，镜子里还有可怕的人影</color>，如果有孩子跑到那里去，可就糟糕了啾～
E: Let me think... Oh, that's right, <color=#dbc291ff>in a room filled with small squares, there are frightening figures that appear in the mirror</color>. It would be awful if a child got in there, tweet!

C: 直到有一天，我因为繁重的工作晕倒在路边，好心人喂给我一瓶美味的饮料，让我找回了活力与梦想…那饮料就是苏乐达！
E: Till one day, I fainted by the roadside from overwork. A kind-hearted stranger fed me a tasty beverage that helped me regain my enthusiasm and dreams... And that was SoulGlad!

C: 还记得我刚刚开办苏乐达工厂的时候，任何事情都能当天批示，当天决定，当天推进。
E: I remember when I just opened my SoulGlad factory — anything could be submitted, approved, and rolled out on the same day.

C: 哦~怎么样？买回家试试看吧？
E: Ohh, how about it? Buy one home and try it out?

C: 米哈伊尔，拉扎莉娜，铁尔南…我在他们的庇护下长大成人，当上了战机飞行员，加入了解放阿斯德纳的战斗。我和他们并肩作战，一起流下象征解放的血与泪。
E: Mikhail, Razalina, Tiernan... I grew up under their protection, became a combat pilot, and joined the fight to liberate Asdana. I fought alongside them, shedding blood and tears that symbolized liberty.

C: 哪怕将全部的人生都献给了一片支离破碎的梦域，他的精神依旧完整，不接受丝毫的动摇。
E: Even if everyone's lives were offered to this shattered dream, his spirit would remain intact, unwavering even in the slightest.

C: 是匹诺康尼。
E: It is Penacony.

C: 「钟表匠」的小把戏对我这个级别的家徒并不好用。如果你想了解我，可以不必采取这种方式。
E: The Watchmaker's paltry tricks are no match for a Family member of my level. You don't have to resort to such antics if you want to learn about me.

C: 甜味
E: Sweet

C: 但比起我在当学徒时认识的某位朋友，我算是相当保守。
E: But compared to the friend I met during my apprenticeship, I'm definitely more conservative.

C: 此后，她终于苏醒，并且准备按照原本的计划开始生活，可是……
E: When she finally woke up and prepared to resume her original plans to live her new life...

C: 恕我不能透露名字，但某颗星球上，一场武装政变的确一触即发……
E: I can't tell you the name, but a certain planet is on the verge of a military coup.

C: 我问你，在你心中，怎样的食物算美食？
E: Tell me, what do you consider gourmet food?

C: 以前雅各布大厨可是这里的首席主厨。只因为他坚持创新，绝不按照无知宾客的要求制作那无趣的复古口味，就被……
E: Chef Jacob used to be the head chef here. He was very focused on innovation and refused to listen to ignorant guests who wanted him to recreate boring retro food. Because of that, he was...

C: 曾经我寻觅食材时，看中一种原始森林的甲虫。一般虫子口味很寡淡，可这甲虫肉质细腻、油脂丰富，就像那…上等的牛排肉，你说这事新鲜不新鲜？
E: I found a beetle while hunting for ingredients in an untouched forest one day. Normally, beetles taste bland, but this one had tender, succulent, fatty meat. It tasted like a piece of premium steak. What an amazing find, don't you think?

C: 为什么只有我活了下来……
E: Why am I the only survivor?

C: 你好，如你所见，我是位律师，来这儿出差。很遗憾，我不能谈论任何工作细节，基于「公司」的保密原则，你懂的…但我想我们可以换个话题——
E: Hello. As you can tell, I'm a lawyer, here on a business trip. I'm sure you already know, but regrettably, I cannot discuss any work details under the confines of the IPC's confidentiality agreements. If you wish to talk about something else though...

C: 你对匹诺康尼感觉如何？
E: How do you find Penacony?

C: 让我想想…对了，有个孩子非常喜欢听人们的八卦，或许现在正在<color=#dbc291ff>听什么人聊天</color>呢啾~
E: Let me think... Oh right, there's a child who loves listening to gossip. Perhaps it is <color=#dbc291ff>listening to people chat</color> right now, tweet~

C: 听说还要更换涂装什么的，这种事千古难寻，怎么都被我碰上了？
E: I heard they're also going to repaint the airship. Just my luck to be around when they have plans for such rare works.

C: 好的，那回头再聊，我也得继续工作了。
E: Alright, talk to you later then. I should get back to work too.

C: 好的，那回头再聊，我也得继续工作了。
E: Alright, talk to you later then. I should get back to work too.

C: 目前新船员们的训练我还在不断改进，坚持下去，大家磨合好了，团队才会有更好的成长。
E: I'm still refining the training program for the new crew members. But once I see this through and after everyone gets the chance to know one another better, our team will be much better equipped to grow and strive for more.

C: 我想说…
E: Actually...

C: 只不过这头发一去不复返咯，胸肌也往下坠了点成了肚腩，吼吼吼！
E: But as the years passed, I lost my hair, and my chest pecs drooped to become part of my fat belly, ohohoho!

C: 我怎么没看到？
E: Why have I not seen it?

C: 你可真会钻空子。这个不一样，那时候我还活着、呐喊着，现在…就不好说了。
E: You really do know how to pick out my inconsistencies. It's different. Back then, I was still alive and screaming. But now... it's hard to say.

C: 我真忍不住想说学院的那些老古董们几句——不要因为年轻人拥抱新兴音乐流派便太过苛责，甚至以此揣测他们创作的本心，这样只会浇熄孩子们灵感的火焰。
E: I really can't help but want to tell those old fogeys at the academy — don't be too harsh on the youngsters just because they're embracing a new genre of music. If you go so far as to question their creative intentions, you might quench the flames of inspiration within them.

C: 天赋、人气、还有家人的倾力支持，哪个音乐人比我幸运？直到…专辑发售前……
E: Talent, popularity, and the unwavering support from family. I should have been the most fortunate musician of all. And I was, until... right before the album was released...

C: 连匹诺康尼都不尊重财富了，你不会也不尊重吧？
E: Now that Penacony doesn't care about money anymore, I hope you'll show some respect for good ol' credits?

C: 我越想越紧张，一口气喝了三杯麦芽汁，想着壮壮胆向哈鲁小姐好好介绍自己。结果嘛…等我恢复意识，已经是第二天早上的事了。
E: Thinking I could drink to calm my growing bundle of nerves before going to talk to Haru, I downed three shots of malt juice in one go... But when I finally sobered up, I realized I'd been out cold the entire night.

C: 我想聊聊…
E: I'd like to chat with you...

C: 哦？看来你的家人很有品味，审美水平相当不错。
E: Oh? I must say your family has a good eye for fashion, then.

C: 只要有梦想，皮皮西人也可以被仰望！
E: As long as I have a dream, people will look up to Pepeshi as well!

C: 赛后，他让赛训团队把我的驾驶舱改成了适合皮皮西人体型的构造，这才有了后面的故事…他就是上届球笼赛的冠军，财富学院的罗密欧。
E: Then, he had the training team convert my cockpit to suit a Pepeshi's size, and that's how we got to where we are today... He was actually the champion of the last Spheroid contest, Romeo of Fortune Academy.

C: 我想想，今年同学们的想法相对保守一些，多半都是最小立体迷宫、微观园林之类的创作。
E: Let me think. This year's students' ideas are a little conservative. It will be mostly minimalist 3D mazes and microscopic gardens.

C: 这次也是，把展会需要用的器材都提前买断了，害得我们没法开始筹备！
E: This time is no different. He bought out all of the equipment we were going to need for the exhibition in advance so we couldn't begin our preparations!

C: 我没什么问题了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 我发誓，这样的败类，见一个我就举报一个！
E: I vow that I will personally report each and every one of these degenerates!

C: 唔，稿子刚才念到哪了来着……
E: Ah, where did I just read up to...

C: …归根结底，又有什么区别呢？
E: ...At the end of the day, what's the difference?

C: 啧，尽是些没品的家伙…我就不信真找不到一个…嗯？
E: Tsk, none of them have any taste... Surely I can find at least one... Hm?

C: 神秘信使…
E: The Mysterious Messenger...

C: 但据我所知，前段时间橡木家系好像确实发生了什么不得了的变动…至于为何将此事归为怪谈，姑且算我的私心吧——
E: As far as I know, though, the Oak Family did actually undergo some huge changes a while back... As for why I categorize this as a ghost story... let's just say it's my personal interest.

C: 看来有时间得给你好好补补课…放心吧，我可是专门整理过每个怪谈的详细内容，给你当教材足够了！
E: Looks like I'll have to fill you in when we get time... Fear not, I have organized all of the details on every ghost story. You'll have plenty of materials to learn from!

C: 说到底，喜剧表演还是得扎根在舞台上，有空吵架，还不如多琢磨点段子呢。
E: At the end of the day, comedy lives and dies on the stage. If you have time to argue, why not spend it honing your jokes instead?

C: 我们会定期碰面，聊聊学校的话题，各自的近况，还有未来的规划…哎，不过乱破小姐走了，见面时候总感觉少了点什么。
E: We'll meet regularly and chat about school, update each other on what's going on recently, and discuss future plans... *sigh* But with Miss Rappa's departure, it feels like something is missing whenever we meet.

C: 犹豫片刻后，你将手指轻轻放在了白色绒球上。那柔软的触感使你确信，刚才问出这个失礼问题时的窘迫是值得的，你很愿意为这种体验再次冒险。
E: After a moment's hesitation, you lightly place your finger on the white fluff ball. From that soft touch, you are certain that the awkwardness from that rude question just now was worth it. You are very willing to risk your skin for that experience again.

C: 你尝试用钟表把戏碰触契波的内心，但无论表盘如何转动，听到的都是相同的话语……
E: You attempt to use clockwork to get in touch with Czipo's heart, but no matter how much the clock turns, you hear the same old words...

C: 我谨代表筑梦学院，对你们付出的努力表示感谢。
E: On behalf of Dreamweaver Academy, I extend my gratitude for all the work you've put in.

C: 这你可得相信我，哪有老师会害自己的学生？我是真心实意为艾尔菲着想，要是继续跟你们胡闹，谁知道他还会使出什么手段？
E: You have to believe me on this. Which teacher would wish harm on his students? I really was trying to look out for Arfey. If I continued to make a ruckus with you guys, who knows what horrors he could have committed?

C: 虽然赚的不多，但我也没花太多时间精力进去，毕竟读书要紧。算起来…加上校庆挣的那笔钱，这学期的生活费就不用老爹给我转账了。
E: I'm not earning much, but I didn't invest too much time and energy in it. After all, studying is my top priority now. After running some numbers... including the money I made during the school anniversary, I won't need my old man to send me money for living expenses this month.
