C: 我决定，将您在「派对车厢」的「会员等级」提升至最高级！您或许会问：「这会员等级有什么好处吗？」
E: I've decided to upgrade your Party Car membership level to the highest tier! You might ask, "What are the benefits to the membership tier?"

C: 茫然无措时，再来找我吧。
E: Feel free to talk to me whenever you're feeling lost.

C: 在懵懂中学语的人偶，所作所为皆镜中你我。
E: A puppet learning to speak. All our actions are reflected by it as if a mirror.

C: 某种鸟类的雕像，你依稀记得这似乎是隐夜鸫家系的象征之一。
E: The statue of a certain bird. You still vaguely remember that it is one of the symbols of the Nightingale Family.

C: 你要不要……
E: Do you want...

C: 挥挥手百万起步！
E: I raise my hand and the minimum amount I move would be a million!

C: 啧…效果不好，还是再往下点吧。
E: Tsk... No good. I think it's better to move it lower.

C: 好酷的设计理念！
E: What a cool design concept!

C: 奇怪，没房间了吗？
E: How odd... No available rooms?

C: 一定帮您带回酒店。
E: Please rest assured. I will bring it back to the hotel for you.

C: 我要喝吐了！
E: All these bottles are gonna make me puke!

C: 举办个舞会多好。
E: Why don't they throw a party here?

C: 但我们是最便宜的。
E: We offer the most affordable foods.

C: 我喝不惯苏乐达…
E: Drinking SoulGlad isn't really my thing...

C: 请放心，我能为您提供的服务一定比那些硬邦邦、傻乎乎的广告牌好得多……
E: Trust me, I can provide better service than those stiff and stupid billboards...

C: 还来啊？我都要喝吐了…你有这个运气不去转老虎机，干嘛非得和苏乐达过不去？
E: More!? Drinking this much SoulGlad is making me wanna puke... Why waste your luck on dumb SoulGlad when you could be rocking the slot machines?

C: 回想起来，这里最开始可要荒凉多了。街道两边没有那么多高楼，灯也不总是能亮。
E: This place used to be so deserted. There weren't tall buildings lining the street, and the lights weren't always on.

C: 没事，合同还在这。
E: It's fine, I still have the contract.

C: 要是有一位主角就好了…
E: If only we had a main character...

C: 屏住呼吸，别被发现了。
E: Don't breathe, we don't want to get caught!

C: 真是没救了…
E: You're hopeless...

C: 不然你说是为什么？突然整这么一出，背后绝对有什么惊天大阴谋！
E: Why else do you think then? For this to suddenly happen, there must be some earthshaking conspiracy behind it!

C: 现在是开放宇宙市场的时代，为了家族的未来和神主的荣耀，是时候让咱们苜蓿草站到台前了。
E: This is an age of open cosmic markets. For The Family's future and the Great One's glory, it is time for the Alfalfa Family to take the helm.

C: 我、我可没偷听！
E: I... wasn't eavesdropping!

C: 匹诺康尼发生了什么…
E: What's happening on Penacony...

C: 你看这星空，多美啊！
E: Look at this sky of stars. Magnificent!

C: 啊——？你说啥？
E: Ahhhh? What'd you say?

C: 未来的事，谁说得准呢。
E: Who knows what the future holds.

C: 呃…是的。
E: Er... Yes.

C: 你的目光偶然扫过这两张毫不起眼的桌子，脑中不知为何缓缓浮现一道白光：前有追逐，所以跳跃很有用——可惜你做不到。
E: You cursorily skim across two inconspicuous tables. For some reason, a flash of light gradually appears in your mind: There is pursuit ahead, so jumping is very useful. A pity you can't do that.

C: 不错。格拉克斯校长有自己的雕像，老奥帝的自传都不知道重印了多少版，作为匹诺康尼的大股东、伟大的盛会巨星，折纸大学里存在以你为主题的社团有什么问题吗？
E: That's right. Dean Glaux has his own statue, and Old Oti's biography has been reprinted who-knows how many times. As Penacony's major shareholder and awesome Festive Superstar, Paperfold University shouldn't have a problem with a club themed after yourself, right?

C: 《论忆质原理》…隐夜鸫家系居然把这种基础的理论书籍作为见面礼，可笑。
E: On Memoria Principles ...To think that the Nightingale Family would choose a book with such rudimentary theory as a gift. How laughable.

C: 窥梦电话已拨通——您将会听到：波提欧的梦境。
E: The Dreampeek Call connected. You are about to hear Boothill's dream.

C: 空荡荡的收藏架，静静等待着藏品的入驻。
E: The empty display shelf quietly awaits the arrival of collectibles.

C: 想和你再聊聊…
E: Let's talk about some other topics...

C: 你、你这孩子，怎么和长辈说话呢？！
E: W—Watch your tone when talking to your elder!

C: 你也说过吧，喜欢我的人排起队来都能绕集市一圈啦。要是你再惹我伤心难过了，万一哪个疯狂的追求者因此对你做出一些不好的事情，那可就不是我能阻止的了，你说是吧？
E: Just like you said, I have a queue of admirers eager to do anything just for my attention. If you upset me too much, one of them might do something foolish to you. I can't keep an eye on those men all day, can I?

C: 好啊，那就给我讲讲呗。
E: Not at all. I'm all ears.

C: 好像挺好吃的，又好像有点怪…总之你也说不出个所以然来。
E: The taste is pleasant but slightly weird... although you can't quite figure out why.

C: 你站在名为「法吉娜盲盒」的饮料前。据说欢宴之神要求「宴会上的秘酿不允许标注内容」。从平淡如水到一口晕倒都有可能，以增添宴会的混乱与趣味性。
E: You stand before a beverage known as "Phagousa Blind Box." It's said that the God of Banquets demands that the "ambrosia at the feasts not have their contents labeled." From a drink as mild as water to one that knocks you out cold with a single sip, it's all about adding chaos and fun to the party.
[★★★★] Satisfied

C: 「本我」代表着原始的冲动和欲望，追求满足避免痛苦，不受社会规范和道德约束。
E: "Id" represents primal impulses and desires, seeking to satisfy urges and avoid pain, unrestrained by social norms or morals.

C: 我也很纯粹的，不如说*我们*都很纯粹。
E: I'm very pure too. Or rather, we are all very pure.

C: 这只是个代称，不代表着我真的就是「本我」，你懂吗？不然咱们得叫{NICKNAME}1号，2号，3号了，太蠢了。
E: This is just a placeholder, not that I'm really the "id," you know? Otherwise, we'd have to call ourselves {NICKNAME} No.1, No.2, No.3, which would be stupid.

C: {RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}的神威持续不了多久，问吧。
E: The power of {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#} won't last long, so ask away.

C: *我*的形象早就崩塌过了，但*我*建议你还是再维护一下。
E: My image has already crumbled, but I suggest you try to maintain it a bit more.

C: 看来还是猴子更加适合你现在的精神状态！
E: Seems like a monkey suits your current mental state better!

C: 「扎格列斯之手」会挡住你的去路，是否让它回到原来的位置？
E: Hand of Zagreus will be blocking your path. Return it to its original position?

C: 话虽如此…上个月不是才有个探险队遭遇了黑潮，死伤惨重吗。哎，要不然你给占卜一下？
E: True, but... didn't one of the expeditions get struck by the black tide and suffer heavy losses last month? Hmm, maybe you could do a little divination for me?

C: 别别，谁说我不要的！我这就帮你品鉴品鉴…嗯，味道确实不错…哎？有贵客上门了呀，我就先不打搅了。
E: Oh, wait, wait! I'll never say no to figs! Let me try some for you... Hmm, these do taste great... Oh? Do you have a customer now? I'll leave you to it.

C: 感觉还行吧。
E: It's okay.

C: 虽然…但如果你之后有机会出城的话，可以顺带帮我留意一下他们的消息吗？真的非常感谢！
E: So... if you ever find yourself leaving the city, could you be on the lookout for any information about them? I'd really appreciate it!

C: 因为，我没得选。
E: Because I didn't have a choice.

C: 你说得未免有点夸张了。
E: That's a bit too exaggerated.

C: 老身的事？…嗐，老身能有什么故事，每天悠哉游哉，四世同堂幸福得很。
E: About me...? Oh, my life's simple, enjoying my leisure time and family moments.

C: 「使者自此以往沉默不言，昼夜徘徊冥河岸，可怖疯癫。」
E: "Messenger fell silent, lost in Styx's dark embrace. Madness claimed him, a forlorn, unsettled place."

C: 好的，愿您在云石天宫里洗去疲惫，客人。
E: Understood. May your fatigue be washed away in Marmoreal Palace, good guest.

C: 要是感兴趣，不如去悬锋城转转，说不定能在记忆的尘堆里翻出些有趣的旧史呢。
E: If you're interested, why not take a look around Castrum Kremnos for yourself? Maybe you will be able to dig up some interesting stories from among the dust of memories.

C: 不，在见过黑潮之后，我已经是塞纳托斯的信徒了，我愿用我的余生向塞纳托斯祈祷，只求它能带给我家人永恒的沉眠。
E: No. Ever after I saw the black tide, I have become a disciple of Thanatos. I will spend the rest of my life praying to Thanatos for the eternal peace of my family.

C: 塞纳托斯？你在说什么？
E: Thanatos? What are you talking about?

C: …我记不清了，我真的记不清了… 哦！是你啊！雅努斯保佑，你还愿意来听我说话。
E: ...I can't remember. I really can't... Oh! It's you! May Janus bless you for coming to speak with me again.

C: 还能再不靠谱一点吗…
E: I don't think this could be any more dodgy...

C: 没什么。黑潮真正降临的时候…一切就是会发生得很突然。可能你准备什么都无济于事。一整个移民旅团，因为半道遭遇了袭击，到头来只有少数几家成功抵达了奥赫玛，拿到了难民身份。
E: It's nothing. When the black tide really comes... it'll all happen very quickly. Maybe nothing we could do would be of any use. Out of an entire caravan of migrants, only a few small families reached Okhema and obtained refugee status due to running into attacks along the way.

C: 最近啊，它们好像对某些地方特别敏感…比如说洗澡的沙坑，以前喜欢在里面打滚，现在说什么都不肯靠近。
E: Hmm. They seem to be more sensitive to a few places... Like for example the sandpit for bathing. They used to love rolling around in there before, but now they won't go near it no matter what you say.

C: 我没什么想聊的。
E: I don't have anything to talk about.

C: 哈哈，放心，有我在，你就无需从流血中总结经验了。
E: Haha. Fear not. With my help, you will never have to learn the lessons that come from spilled blood.

C: 先聊这些吧。
E: Let's end our chat here.

C: …你也是来参加试炼的吗？现在不行，我想我应该不用重复一遍。
E: ...Are you here for the trial too? Not now, and I doubt I need to repeat myself.

C: 参赛者有那么多，我可记不住每一张脸。如果你说见过，那就当是见过吧。
E: There are many participants. I can't remember every face. If you say we've met, so be it.

C: 宝贝儿…仙馔秘酿…灌进来…我给你馈赠……
E: My dear... Celestial Ambrosia... Pour some in... I'll give you a present...

C: 对了，我是个醒不来的醉客…不，我是个风流成性的舞者…不不不，我是个耽迷纵欲的君王……
E: Oh yes, I am a drunk that can't sober up... No, I am a dancer frolicking among my loves... No, I am a king indulgent in desires of flesh...

C: 岁月…过去多久了呢？欧洛尼斯，你动的还真快啊……
E: Time... How long has passed? Oronyx, you move fast...

C: 你发现工匠的手中，那块几经淬火的铁胚，似乎泛着异样的光泽。
E: You notice a few pieces of quenched iron billets in his hands, glowing with an apparently unusual sheen.

C: 尝试打断他。
E: Try interrupting him.

C: 但老希我提醒下，我们这在元老院是备了案的…您要是真搞出来什么大动静，啰嗦的可能就是那些人喽…
E: But I do have to remind you that our establishment is filed with the Council of Elders... They might be the ones who'll nag if you're making some major moves...

C: 你捧起瓶身，一饮而尽……
E: You raise the bottle, and down it in one go...

C: 这说明，传统的计时方式，根本不适合现在的奥赫玛！
E: This indicates that the traditional method of timekeeping is utterly unsuitable for modern Okhema!

C: 谢谢，谢谢。新的发现需要探索精神，要感谢，就赞美我这自由自在、无拘无束的灵魂吧！
E: Thank you, thank you. The spirit of exploration deserves praise. Praise my free, unbound soul!

C: …对吉奥里亚的子民，好奇，你是第一个。
E: ...Curious about, Georios' people, you are first.

C: 难道数学家的知识，和那些小孩子是相同的吗？要真是这样的话，修辞学也不存在了，人们直接在集市里便能学到所有的论辩知识。
E: Are you saying that the knowledge of a mathematician is equal to the knowledge of such children? If that is in fact the case, then the study of rhetoric also does not exist. People can learn everything they need with regard to debate at their local market.

C: 我还有事，就聊到这儿吧。
E: I've got to get going, but it was great chatting with you.

C: 你都发明过什么？
E: What have you invented?

C: 喏，那个看上去一点就炸的小伙儿，家里是开杂货店的，主要营生就是给出城的探险队提供物资；
E: Here, that young man who looks like he might explode at any moment — his family runs a general store. Their main business is supplying expedition teams with provisions when they head out of the city.

C: 这才哪到哪，啊？就你们这小体格子，再不加紧锻炼，小心连学院大门都进不去！
E: What, too much to handle already? Ah, if you weaklings don't start taking training seriously, you might never make it into the academy!

C: 我还有事，先走了。
E: I'm busy, so I'll be heading off.

C: 算了，多余的话暂且不提。既然我遇见了你，还是按流程来吧——钥匙与门天然成对，想得到门后的内容，必须拿相应的物件来适配。
E: Forget it, I won't say anything unnecessary for now. Seeing as we've now met, let's just follow due process... Keys and gates are paired up, and if you want what's behind a gate, you'll have to match it with the corresponding object.

C: 能认识雷金实属幸运，我觉得很难再找到第二个如此优秀的朋友了。
E: Knowing Regin is a stroke of luck, hard to find another friend as exceptional as him.

C: 来碗「海的味道」。
E: Would you like a bowl of "Taste of the Sea"?

C: 不过请放心，作为神人之间的纽带与桥梁，我能够为你将其解读为通俗易懂的语句。
E: But, please rest assured. As the bridge that connects the mortal and divine worlds, I will be able to interpret their words into something easier to comprehend.

C: 护卫呢，这里有人诈骗！
E: Guards! There's a scammer!

C: 小心神谕诈骗。
E: Beware of prophecy scammers.

C: 被我盘问，非但没有慌乱，竟还愈发狂妄，你到底是什么人？
E: Not only are you not startled in the face of my interrogation, but you even grow more arrogant!? Just who on earth are you?

C: 这个嘛…我曾被指派为以前某位圣女的侍女，哎，说是圣女，其实不过是个小姑娘。吃点心的时候甚至会偷偷藏一块，我问她为什么，她说想留着跟我分享。
E: Yes, I once served as a maid for a previous Holy Maiden. Despite her title, she was just a young girl. She'd even sneak a piece of dessert away while having snacks, and when I asked her why, she said she wanted to save it to share with me later.

C: 她小时候生活非常困苦，经常饿肚子。有一天实在饿得受不了，就偷偷溜进神殿想找点吃的，结果就被抓现行了。
E: Growing up, my mother faced severe hardships and often went without food. One particularly desperate day, she snuck into the temple hoping to find something to eat but was caught red-handed.

C: 可是，跨越了万千门径、经历过数次分裂与破碎，*我们*也早已不是最初的缇里西庇俄丝了……
E: Yet, after crossing countless gates and enduring splits and fractures, we are no longer the Tribios we once were...

C: 暂时还是别回想了。
E: Let's not dwell on it for now.

C: 我不想工作嗷呜，就逃到这来了。你要好好对待我嗷呜！
E: I don't want to work, awoo, so I escaped here. You'd better treat me nicely, awoo!

C: 我要听旧昏光庭院的历史！
E: I'd like to hear more about the history of the old Twilight Courtyard.

C: 啊，旧昏光庭院的故事…那可就太长、太长啦。下次有机会再和灰宝讲吧！
E: Ah, the story of the old Twilight Courtyard... that would be a very long tale. Way too long, in fact. Let's save it for another time, okay, Grayie?

C: 下次再聊吧！
E: Let's catch up another time!

C: 你坐下，群星般的光芒在你面前荡漾，水波璀璨，空气中仿佛有阵阵回响。
E: As you sit down, the light of the stars begins to ripple before you, the waves shine, and the air seems to resonate with echoes.

C: 工作是工作，生活是生活…
E: Keep your personal life separate from your work...

C: 你说你是贵族…
E: You said you are a nobleman...

C: 这便是贵族的规则。但说白了，因人而异罢了。即使是奥赫玛，也有着严重缺乏身为贵族自知的元老。他们也该被丢到黑潮里洗一洗，说不定就好了。
E: These are the rules of nobility. But in reality, it all depends on the individual. Even in Okhema, there are elders who sorely lack the self-awareness befitting a noble. Perhaps a thorough rinse in the black tide would do them good.

C: 贵客忘了吗？我已经为你揭晓了一只若虫的位置…等找到它之后再来吧。
E: Have you forgotten, honored guest? I've already revealed the location of a nymph... Come back after you've found it.

C: 但我真的不擅长解谜——你看我的名字就知道。所有答案都藏在金织里了，快去找吧~
E: But I'm really not good at solving riddles... just look at my name. All the answers are hidden in the golden weave. Go find them~

C: 他会没事的…
E: He'll be fine...

C: {F#女士}{M#先生}，你喜欢水漫琴的歌声吗？
E: {F#Miss}{M#Mister}, do you like the sound of the Water Lyre?

C: 所以我常常偷溜出来，做点别的事情，好在阿芙罗姐姐对我很宽松，尤其是她知道我在云崖上的经历之后……
E: So I often sneak out to do other things. Luckily, Aphrea's lenient, especially after learning about my time at Dawncloud...

C: 很好，你落进了我问题的陷阱里。
E: Perfect! You've fallen right into my trap.

C: 因为我的答案其实是…无数次。
E: Because my true answer is... countless times.

C: 看你怎么定义「相信」。
E: That depends on what you mean by "believe."

C: 再会。
E: Farewell.

C: 现状如何？
E: How are things going right now?

C: 但这并不是因为我恐惧失败——欧洛尼斯令时间的长河奔流不止，即使你我毁灭，也会浇灌出下一个文明。
E: But it's not because I fear failure — Oronyx keeps the river of time flowing. Even if we fade away, a new civilization will eventually bud again.

C: 比起灵魂，我更在意文明的传承。
E: I care more about the legacy of civilization than the soul.

C: 嗯…有位织者非常嗜睡。金丝带来消息，它正躺在<color=#dbc291ff>你的私人浴宫</color>内，睡得正香呢。可以试着叫醒它。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who is always quite lethargic. The golden thread brings tidings: They now lie <color=#dbc291ff>within your private bath chamber</color>, sleeping soundly like a rock. Feel free to try waking them up.

C: 嗯…有位织者对建筑修筑颇有研究。金丝带来消息，它正躲藏在<color=#dbc291ff>穹顶的石柱上</color>，仰起头或许能发现它的踪迹。
E: Hmm... There was a weaver who studied architecture intently. The golden threads brought news, it's now hiding among <color=#dbc291ff>the pillars of the dome</color>. Look up, you might just spot it.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「击败神机之灵，便可将其驯服。若汝并非巨人，需以神体攥拳。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Defeat the spirit of divine machine, and you shall tame it. If you are no giant, then wield the might of the gods with your fists."</color>

C: 嗯？这么没防备地睡着了…可是会被坏人盯上的，要小心哦。
E: Hm? Dozing off like that without a care in the world... Gotta be careful, you might draw attention from the wrong sort of people!

C: 说好了啊，可不许忘了！
E: It's a deal. Don't you dare forget!

C: 我…其实还没下定决心…
E: I... I haven't made up my mind yet...

C: 你要是有心情，也可以和我们一起迷。
E: If you feel up to it, come along with us, mem!

C: 我、我甚至觉得自己就是为此而生的迷！
E: I—I even think I was born for it, memi!

C: 不过，就算悬赏一颗鹅卵石的重金，找遍整个迷境，恐怕也找不到一位合格的厨师迷……
E: But even if I offered a whole cobble as a reward, I doubt there's a single proper chef left in all the Maze, memi...

C: 我也想不明白，也许是景观计划的一部分嘤~
E: I don't get it either. Maybe it's part of a landscape design, eep~

C: 开！
E: Open!

C: 嗯…有位织者被妖精的景观装饰吸引。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>画着太阳的石壁前</color>，琢磨壁画的含义呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who is attracted by the fairy's scenic decorations. The golden threads bring tidings: It is <color=#dbc291ff>in front of a stone wall with a drawing of a sun</color>, pondering the meaning behind the mural.

C: 叫醒她。
E: Wake her up.

C: 呼…呼…嘻，逗你的，我可没睡哦。
E: Zzz... Zzz... Hehe, gotcha! I'm totally wide awake!

C: 没问题。闲逛之余，也做点什么吧。回忆总在不经意间留下，不是吗？
E: Absolutely. And while we're hanging out, let's do something fun. Memories are often made when we least expect them, aren't they?

C: 唔，一时没什么想法呢…有了，不如随性一些，四处看看找点灵感吧？
E: Hmm, I'm drawing a blank right now... Oh, I know! How about we take a walk and look for some inspiration?

C: 没问题！闲逛之余，也做点什么吧。回忆总在不经意间留下，不是吗？
E: Absolutely! And while we're hanging out, let's do something fun. Memories are often made when we least expect them, aren't they?

C: 我已向凯撒大人臣服，作为她的暗刃匿于阴影，为逐火的征途净除障碍，清洗那些不愿顺从其征程的凡人与黄金裔。
E: I pledged loyalty to the Great Imperator, becoming her shadowed blade to purge obstacles. Cleansing any who defy her quest, mortals and Chrysos Heirs alike.

C: 合理的决定，毕竟——有两类生物最好别去招惹：狮子、以及醉汉。
E: A reasonable decision. After all, there are two beings that you should never provoke: a lion, and a drunk.

C: 从海瑟音大人成为半神算起，截至此时，斯缇科西亚城的宴会总共消耗了<unbreak>535001004</unbreak>瓶蜜酿吼——
E: From the time Lady Hysilens became a demigod up till now, Styxia city has consumed <unbreak>535,001,004</unbreak> bottles of honey brew for their feasts.

C: 吼吼——如何？本狮的故事一定让救世主阁下对蜜酿有了兴趣吼？要不要尝尝本狮的特调吼？
E: Hoho, how was it? This great lion's stories must have piqued our great Deliverer's interest in honey brew, right? Why don't you try my special blend?

C: 嗯…有位织者感慨于美景。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>宴都城门前</color>极目远眺，观看远处倒悬的彩虹呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who's moved by the beautiful view. My golden thread brings tidings: They are at <color=#dbc291ff>the city gates of the City of Revelry</color>, gazing at the upside-down rainbow on the horizon.

C: 谢谢店长关心迷！能成为餐馆的服务员，每天端着热乎乎的菜肴，吃不限量的员工餐，是我从小的梦想迷。
E: Thank you for asking, manager, mem. Being a server here, carrying piping-hot dishes and enjoying unlimited staff meals every day, has been my dream since I was little, mem.

C: 唔，店长，有顾客来了，我该去招呼招呼了迷。
E: Um, manager, a guest just arrived. I should go greet them, mem.

C: 如此一来，仿佛溪流淌过干涸的河床，清泉填补每一个缝隙，每一口咀嚼，都能尝到肉经过提鲜后的滑嫩鲜香迷……
E: Just like a stream trickling through a dry riverbed, fresh spring water fills every crevice. With each bite, the tenderness and rich aroma of the meat unfold in full, mem...

C: 感觉你很眼熟。
E: You look really familiar.

C: 所以结论显而易见——摆盘时需要尽量堆高。越高，代表这道菜越有可能触碰到艾格勒的眼眸。
E: So, the conclusion is obvious... When filling your plate, you need to stack it as high as possible. The higher it is stacked, the more likely it is that your dish will catch the gaze of Aquila.

C: 想象一下，以{RUBY_B#刻法勒的食材}奥赫玛麦{RUBY_E#}作为基底做粥，加入十一位泰坦的对应食材，那道菜该有多么出色啊！
E: Just imagine, using {RUBY_B#Kephalean ingredients}Okheman oats{RUBY_E#} as a base for porridge, then adding in corresponding ingredients for each of the eleven other Titans — how amazing that would taste!

C: 老奶奶，我能理解你的心情…不过世界运转的底层逻辑，有时候就是「浪费」。
E: I understand how you feel... However, the logic that the world operates on is sometimes just "letting things go to waste."

C: 即便您这么说，也……
E: Even so...

C: 等等，这是你求得的神谕吗？
E: Wait, is this the prophecy you asked for?

C: 啊，我好像看到了…是啊，优雅的身姿，柔美的乌黑秀发，那就是我们崇敬的圣女大人啊！
E: Ah, I think I see it now... Yes, that graceful figure, her soft, midnight-black hair — this must be our revered Holy Maiden!

C: 呸，伟大的{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}还得听元老院的意见了？我算是看明白了，你和你儿子都在为元老们工作，所以你才会满嘴胡言。
E: Tsk. The mighty {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} needs to heed the opinion of the Council of Elders? I see clearly now. You and your boy are working for the elders. That's why you're so full of lies.

C: 带孙子可比带儿子费事儿多喽…人又娇气，脾气又大，可真难伺候！
E: Taking care of a grandson is more troublesome than a son... He's sensitive, has a bad temper, and he's so difficult to deal with!

C: 老奶奶，糖吃太多了能有什么好处啊？还是得小心预防糖尿病嘛。
E: Come on now, nobody should eat that much candy. You don't want to undermine your health with sweets.

C: 麻烦新同学了，这是老鸟的一点心意，请收下咕。
E: Thank you for your trouble, new student. This is a token of this old bird's appreciation. Please accept it, hoot.

C: 我还有一些问题想要咨询…
E: I have a few more questions for you...

C: 等之后危机解除，你不妨也试一试？
E: When the crisis passes, would you like to have a try?

C: 希拉脸上保持着永恒不变的笑容，你试图和这位美丽的向导交流。
E: Sheila's smile seems never-changing. You try to talk to this beautiful guide.

C: 古时候的人们不知晓有太阳，但却也知道崇拜太阳神。对他们而言，亲身体会太阳的灼热，是太过热烈的体验。
E: In ancient times, people were not aware of the exact nature of the sun but they still worshiped the Sun God. For them, the idea of approaching the scorching sun is too much for them to handle.

C: 无论如何，请你赶快前往避难。只有见到大家幸福的笑容，我才能安心。
E: Anyway, you should take refuge as soon as possible. I will be relieved when I see the smile on people's faces.

C: 好久不见！要不要看看我的新雕刻？这个石头的材质可是很特殊的！
E: It's been a while! Do you want to see my new carvings? The texture of this rock is very special!

C: 算你识相。以后少来管教我，也不要到处打听关于莱斯莉的消息。
E: That's a wise thing to do. Leave me alone. And stop prying on Lesley.

C: 至于奇物……咳咳，你可别想套世玲的话！我都说过了，那些奇物是根据规定分发的，不会按照科员的喜好来！
E: As for the Curios... Ehem, you think you can fool me into answering this? As I said, the Curios are distributed according to regulations, instead of the researcher's preferences!

C: 我有一些问题想要问你…
E: I've got something to ask you.

C: 就聊到这里吧。
E: That's it for now.

C: 所以…如果你愿伸出援手，我将不胜感激。
E: So... I would be deeply grateful if you could lend me a hand.

C: 提供「记忆残晶」。
E: Provide Memory Crystal Shards.

C: 什么瓜！还不是我家那俩不省心的女儿，突然跟我说要转投曳石学派……
E: No tea! Just those trouble-making daughters of mine, suddenly telling me they want to change to the Helkolithist school...

C: 诸位觉得如何？尤里萨，你来自奥德里西安「门瑟」家，想必在编纂律法上颇有家学渊源，要不要助我一臂之力？
E: What do you all think? Ulysse, you're from the Odressian House of Mentes, so you must have quite the family background in law-making. Care to lend me a hand?

C: 嗨，朋友，没想到还能与你再见。就说我们的缘分连扎格列斯都要保佑！眼下正有趣事发生，你不妨留下来瞧个热闹——只要区区五十利衡币哦~
E: Hello there, my friend! What a pleasant surprise seeing you here! Even Zagreus must be smiling on our continued acquaintance! Something interesting is happening right now. Why not stick around for the show? It'll only cost you <unbreak>50</unbreak> Balance Coins~

C: 就是，在我俩面前讲你们的爱情故事，良心都不会痛的吗？
E: Seriously, yapping all about your love story right in front of us? Don't you have any conscience?

C: 呜嗡。（如果是馋了的话，可以去咬旁边的奇美拉。）
E: Grumph. (If you're just feeling snacky, go chew on that chimera over there.)

C: 如果小小灰以后想我们了，就捏一捏这个娃娃吧。
E: If you ever miss us, just give the doll a little squeeze, Little Gray!

C: 为了让这篇浪漫的故事有始有终，我把所有的墨水都用完了，也许，这就是我们最后一次相见啦。
E: To give this romantic tale a proper beginning and end, I've used up all my ink. Perhaps this is our final meeting.

C: 「多年以后，两人的继任者进一步变成了水火不容的关系。一次碰面，他们互相指责对方不用正眼看自己，险些大打出手。」
E: "Years later, their successors' relationship deteriorated to the point of becoming sworn enemies. During one encounter, they accused each other of not even deigning to look at one another properly, and nearly came to blows."

C: 不知道赛飞儿阁下还用同样的伎俩骗了多少人，还是…不会只有我们两个被骗了吧？
E: I wonder how many others Cipher has tricked with the same ploy... or could we be the only two who fell for it?

C: 嗯…有位织者正为逐火的前路欢欣鼓舞。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>火种的符文前</color>，等待英雄的现身呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who is thrilled about the future of the Flame-Chase. The golden thread brings tidings: They're <color=#dbc291ff>in front of the Coreflame's runes</color>, waiting for the hero to show up.

C: 「云端遗堡」。
E: The Cloudedge Bastion Ruins.

C: 若虫们如灯泡般散发着忽明忽暗的光泽，怪热闹的。
E: The nymphs were glowing like lightbulbs, flickering on and off, quite a lively spectacle.

C: 于命途一题上，我们不过是命运的囚徒……
E: When it comes to the topic of Paths, we're nothing but prisoners of destiny...

C: 谢谢你让我们回家。
E: Thank you for letting us get home.

C: 列车发现她的时候，她被封在一块巨大的六相冰里…瓦尔特好容易才把她带回车厢，没过多久，六相冰就在我们眼前融化，消失了。
E: When the Express found her, she was sealed in an enormous piece of Six-Phased Ice... It took Welt a lot of work to get her back to the Express. Not long after, the Six-Phased Ice melted and vanished before our eyes.

C: 关于帕姆…
E: About Pom-Pom...

C: 银河中围绕着诸星神，有近百个派系。有的忠实践行星神的原动力，有的却把命途曲解到滑稽可笑的地步了。
E: There are almost a hundred factions involved with the Aeons. Some faithfully follow the Primum Mobile of the Aeons, while others have twisted the concept of the Paths to the point of absurdity.

C: 于是我拼命驱车逃跑，直到听到身后震天巨响，仿佛整个世界都翻了个面……
E: So I drove as fast as I could to get out of there, until I heard a loud crash behind me as if the entire world had been flipped upside down...

C: 关于，这个问题…唔…瓦尔特是什么时候来的？
E: About that... Um... When did Welt get here?

C: 这是说书页和谜题都是真实存在的意思吗？我也不知道。
E: Does this mean that the pages and riddles are real? I just couldn't figure it out.

C: 总之，要是有一天还能买到新的《冒险鼹鼠队》的话，我还会去看看的。
E: Anyway, if I can buy new editions of The Adventurous Moles one day, I'll read it.

C: 年轻人就是得有冲劲！臭小子，给我好好学着点！
E: Youngsters should be motivated! You could learn a thing or two kid!

C: 好嘞，你等一下……
E: Okay, just one moment...

C: 宾客，是谁定义的「正常」？又是谁定义的「故障」？为何我们放弃对钟表小子的拙劣模仿，就需要大动干戈地进行「修复」呢？
E: Guest, who defines what is "normal"? And who defines what is "malfunctioned"? Why is it that when we abandon our poor imitations of Clockie, we must be "fixed" en masse?

C: 感觉猜到了结局……
E: I can hazard a guess about how things turned out...

C: 总之，这段时间我会一直待在这儿，试着解决问题的。你如果有兴趣，也可以照她说的试试，说不定真能通关呢…啊！怎么又报错了！？
E: Anyway, I'll just be cooped up in here trying to fix this problem. Give it a go just like she said if you're interested. Maybe you can beat the game? Gawd, another error!?

C: 林中雪地的寂静中，回响着你脚步的乐声——
E: The melody of your footsteps echoes in the silent snowdrift...

C: 既然这样，我们一手交钱、一手交货好了。看在你真诚待人的份上，稿费我给你打八折——就当是你的跑腿费！
E: If that's the case, then we'll keep things transactional. You've been sincere with me, so I'll give you a twenty percent discount — keep it as your tip!

C: 你瞧！穷苦的劳动者，击碎一块坚硬的岩石——
E: Behold! The impoverished laborer, smashing open a solid rock —

C: 哈？你这人怎么回事？天上可不会随便掉馅饼啊！
E: Ha! What's wrong with you? There's no such thing as a free lunch out there!

C: 你来得正好，{NICKNAME}。我刚刚清点了一遍展品储藏室，意外发现了这张旧照片。
E: Just in the nick of time, {NICKNAME}. I've just gone over all the exhibits in the storage room, and stumbled across this old photo.

C: ——如果鲍里斯没有又做什么手脚的话……
E: — unless Boris has pulled another prank of his on us...

C: 现在<color=#dbc291ff>鲍里斯</color>正在<color=#dbc291ff>博物馆修理间</color>尽力抢修，对他一个人应该有些棘手，请去帮帮他吧。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Boris</color> is rushing repairs in the <color=#dbc291ff>museum workshop</color> right now. It's too much for one person to handle. Please, can you help him?

C: 嗯，你拍得很棒，作为模型制作的参考已经够用了，相信大家也都会产生兴趣的。
E: Great shot. This will be a great reference for that modeling. I believe everyone will be interested in this, too.

C: 这就是七百年前入侵我们的怪物吗？
E: Is this the monster that invaded us <unbreak>700</unbreak> years ago?

C: 一幅摄影作品，记录了废弃矿镇现时的风貌。
E: A work of photography that captures the present-day appearance of the abandoned mining town.

C: 一幅摄影作品，记录了贝洛伯格广场上的纪念碑「永冬铭碑」。
E: A work of photography that captures the Everwinter Monument erected on the Belobog Plaza.

C: …结果我发现，这些照片里全都是奇怪的黑影！你快看！
E: ...But I realized that these photos — all of them — have this weird shadow in it! Check it out!

C: 我问过丹恒原因，他满嘴都是「跃迁辐射」、「太空强磁场」、「虚数影尘」这种听不懂的词儿，总之就是说照片数据全都受损了……
E: I asked Dan Heng about it. He went off about all these unintelligible things like "warp jump radiation," "space magnetic fields," "imaginary void dust." Anyway, what it means is that all of the photo data has been damaged...

C: 好，我这就去！
E: Alright, let's go!

C: 不过这些照片的内容都被黑影覆盖了，具体拍的是什么内容，咱也认不太出来了…就靠火眼金睛的{NICKNAME}你自己判别吧，嘿嘿～
E: But the subjects of these photos have all been obscured by the shadows, so I'm not too sure about what exactly each photo's about... So let's just rely on the penetrating insight of {NICKNAME} to judge once and for all, teehee~

C: 唉，你好狠心，真是太让老桑博心寒了……
E: Ouch, that's harsh, friend. You don't have to be so mean to Sampo...

C: 我果然天生丽质！
E: I truly am a natural beauty!

C: 好啊。
E: Seems fair.

C: 咦，真的吗？你都来到了长乐天，却没空闲逛，真是可怜……
E: Really? You didn't have time to look around? What a pity...

C: 那咱们这就走吧？
E: Let the food tour begin.

C: 这次出门想去买些药罐子，就在前面的「清玩斋」，走吧走吧。
E: I wanted to stop by Elegance Pagoda to buy some medicine jars while I'm out. Come on, let's go.

C: 多一事不如少一事。
E: Sounds like trouble...

C: 没想到您还有这样的本事，请您一定得试试。
E: I didn't realize you were such an entrepreneur.

C: 我平时也会收集有关金人巷的各类情报，<color=#dbc291ff>其中包括商铺的情报，以及各种传闻。</color>解决各类事件，也能对复兴有所帮助。
E: I keep tabs on all the goings-on in Aurum Alley, <color=#dbc291ff>including rumors and the latest gossip.</color> If we can solve some of the problems in the community, it could help in rejuvenating Aurum Alley.

C: 你张嘴就是「公司这家伙」，也太不懂礼貌了吧。
E: Calling someone an "IPC goon" isn't very becoming of a Cloud Knight now, is it?

C: 我说，我只是寄个快递，怎么被你们围起来了？
E: Hmph, can't a man come here to deliver a package without being surrounded?

C: 漂亮的博古架。色泽沉穆，线条素雅，造型古朴，整体虚实相宜，空灵有致。文化人喜欢将笔墨纸砚、瓶瓶罐罐放在架子上，获得一番仙逸的快乐。
E: A beautiful antiques display shelf with sober color and an elegant contour. Its classic style lends itself an air of serenity. The shelf provides a suitable home for brushes and inkstones and pulls you away from the mundane hustle.

C: 无所谓，你就当是提前练习吧。道歉这种事，一次可不够呀，哈哈哈哈。
E: For this kind of barbarity, a single apology won't ever be enough. Just think of this as a practice round for later, hahahaha.

C: 公司的业务员代表已经到了，我也叫上了天舶司的夕葵小姐公证。
E: The IPC representative has arrived, and I've called for Miss Xikui from the Sky-Faring Commission to act as a notary.

C: 追问
E: (Continue questioning)

C: 不过话又说回来，继续开发码头和公司真的没有区别吗？
E: Is there really no difference between our strategy and the IPC's?

C: 街道的主人既不是商会，也不是公司…是生活在这里的人。
E: The streets aren't owned by the Merchant Guild or the IPC... but by those who live here.

C: 为金人巷挺身而出，有理有节，真是了不起。
E: You stood up for Aurum Alley with reason and integrity — I'm thankful to you.

C: 怎么有人自称小少爷的？
E: Why would someone call themselves Little Master?

C: 我准备好了。
E: Ready.

C: 追问
E: (Continue questioning)

C: 你的想法很有意思。
E: I'm intrigued.

C: 你这属于是超出配送范围了。
E: That's definitely out of their delivery area.

C: 品牌推广总是需要一个名人嘛，白露大人身为龙尊，又是丹鼎司名医，名气大着呢。她能为金人巷代言，肯定有很多人会慕名而来。
E: We need someone famous for branding! Lady Bailu is the High Elder of the Vidyadhara, and also the most sought-after doctor in the Alchemy Commission. If she can be our ambassador, we'll have queues for miles.

C: 难道不应该拍一些我的美图？
E: Why can't I be in the visiographs? Aren't I {F#pretty}{M#handsome} enough?

C: 我还有别的事儿。
E: I have something else to do first.

C: 欢迎常来金人巷！
E: Welcome to Aurum Alley!

C: 请放心，搬迁的商铺都会拿到合适的赔偿，数字之大，足以让所有人脸上挂着笑容。
E: Rest assured, all the shops that need relocating will receive generous compensation from the IPC. The package we've prepared will make everyone happy.

C: 金人巷商会的各位好啊。
E: Members of Aurum Alley Merchant Guild, I hope you're all keeping well.

C: 那么，你的店在哪里呢？
E: So, where's your store?

C: （总之，还得用机巧鸟把货物送到目标地点。）
E: (Anyway, I still have to use the cycrane to deliver the "goods" to their intended destination.)

C: 我明白了，你擅长举重若轻。我知道你帮我送货的时候，遇到了小小麻烦。
E: I get it. You're a very capable one. I know I put you through the ringer with delivering the goods.

C: 请尽可能遵守法律。
E: Please obey the law as much as possible.

C: 稍等一下，我还有别的事。
E: Wait a minute. I've got something else I need to do.

C: 美馔阁名声没有尚滋味响，要是就这样被收购了，什么都不会留下来，实在太可惜了。所以我想，能不能像燕翠师傅那样做出新菜、赚些名声。
E: Delicacy Pavilion might not be as famous as Spices Supreme, but if I just sold out like that, then nothing would be left at all. And wouldn't that be a shame? So I thought, maybe I could make some new dishes like Master Yancui, and earn a little fame and fortune for myself.

C: 丹鼎司诊断不出我的病，小天老板，你帮我挑个不会露馅的毛病呗？
E: The Alchemy Commission can't diagnose my disease, Little Tian. Can you help me pick out a little ailment that won't spill the beans for me?

C: 你就说你这是懒病，绝不会露馅。
E: Just say that you're lazy, and you'll never have to reveal anything.

C: 万一我们不好呢？
E: And if we're not?

C: 你是能帮我的好心人吗？请你帮我装上这个玉兆。
E: Are you kind enough to help me out? Please help me install this jade abacus.

C: 细说交通事故？
E: Wanna tell me more about the accident?

C: 商会储值金现在还不算「很硬气」，我们还得继续加油。
E: The Merchant Guild's funds are not exactly overflowing right now. We need to work harder.

C: 老哥莫生气！
E: Hey, hey, calm down.

C: 抓走热情的机巧鸟。
E: Catch the Enthusiastic Cycrane.

C: 您好，{NICKNAME}大人，我在这里等候您多时了。
E: Hello, {NICKNAME}. I've been waiting for you here for quite a while.

C: 我们空间站的绩效考核，需要每季度汇总课题实验报告。这段时间你也知道…发生了很多很多事，世玲手头上的课题报告…这个，有那么一丢丢紧张……
E: On the space station, performance review requires a quarterly summary report of research projects. As you know, a lot of stuff has happened recently. And I'm a bit nervous about my research report.

C: 售货机并没有吐出任何的货物，但却显示交易已完成。
E: The vending machine didn't spit out any merchandise but shows the transaction as complete.

C: 雪堆下面似乎露出了衣服的一角，这场面似乎有点眼熟。
E: A piece of clothing sticks out from underneath the Snow Drift. This feels familiar.

C: 一堆杂乱的衣物被埋在雪堆之下，似乎是在伪造某人躲藏在雪地中的假象。
E: A mishmash of clothing articles was buried under the Snow Drift, seemingly to create the illusion that someone was hiding in it.

C: 你分不清它是一个酒壶还是一个罗盘——当然，它也有可能是一个怀表。
E: You can't tell if it's a hip flask or a compass... it could even be a pocket watch.

C: 杰伊特制笑话仍在烹饪中，我还是先给你介绍一下餐厅的活动吧。
E: The Jay's special joke is still in the making, so let me introduce you to the restaurant's activities.

C: 「十二时刻商业区联合举办，年度感恩大酬宾！」——这是一年一次的美食庆典，你准备食材，我们为你加工美味。
E: Twelve Hours Commercial District is joining forces to host the annual celebration as thanks to our customers! It's an annual culinary festival where you provide the ingredients and we'll whip up delicious dishes for you.

C: 我准备了一个关于「酸梦」牌糖果的新故事，你要不要听听看？
E: I've prepared a new story about "Sour Dreams" soft candy. Would you like to hear it?

C: 而你接到的任务，便是用通风口运送一批新交付的苏乐达……
E: You are assigned with the mission of delivering a batch of newly arrived SoulGlad through the vent...

C: 熟悉的走廊已经变成了截然不同的模样，一同奋战的伙伴们此时也都不见踪影。
E: The once-familiar corridors have become completely different, and your companions, who have been fighting alongside you, are nowhere to be found.

C: 一点也不可爱…
E: It's not adorable at all...

C: 需要我帮忙吗？
E: Do you need any help?

C: 节目保留了评判结果的悬念，镜头在职业观众的假笑与愤怒之间来回切换，令你感到不适，你决定——
E: To keep the audience in suspense, the camera alternates between phony smiles and irritated faces of the professional audience. Feeling perturbed, you decide to...

C: 你可算是找对人了。
E: You've picked the right person.

C: 好啦，后面就交给你了。「惊梦酒吧」…新来的调饮师？
E: Now, I'll leave the Dreamjolt Hostelry under your care...

C: 喜悦因分享而加倍，忧伤因倾诉而减半。调饮师的工作，不就是聆听和交流嘛。
E: Sharing is so important. It can double our blessings and cut our burdens in half. The work of a drinksmith is all about listening and chatting.

C: 快去吧。时机这种东西，若是不好好把握，可是会溜走的。
E: Now, go. Seize the opportunity before it slips away.

C: 它们不是道具。
E: No, they're not just objects.

C: 被当作道具对待，随意使唤的感觉，不太好吧？
E: It feels terrible to be treated like lifeless objects and bossed around, doesn't it?

C: 相信我，即便没有「遥祝启程」，开拓经历依然是无名客最重要的宝物。
E: Trust me, even without the Graced Voyager, trailblaze experiences are still the most precious treasure of all Nameless.

C: 非要说的话，应该是玛姬留在「遥祝启程」中的开拓意志吧。
E: If I had to say, it'd probably be the trailblazing will that was left behind in the Graced Voyager by Mag.

C: 太兴奋把这茬给忘了，不该这么快回来的。
E: I was so excited that I forgot about this. We shouldn't have returned so quickly.

C: 这是线索，请仔细阅读。
E: Here's the clue. Please read it carefully.

C: 真的吗？可不要在这种时候跟我开玩笑啊！
E: Really? Now isn't the time to joke around!

C: 不久之后，鸢尾花家系的人就来聊版权收购——要我看啊，这就是家族内部串通好的，就是想打压我们克劳克影业，夺走钟表小子！
E: Shortly after, the Iris Family representative approached us and proposed to acquire our copyrights. If you ask me, those lineages are probably in cahoots with each other to take advantage of us when we're down and claim Clockie as their own!

C: （压抑的心情、恍惚的神态、矛盾的言语…）
E: (Suppressed emotions, dazed expression, conflicted language...)

C: 哎哟，这家伙还挺有本事的……
E: Ugh, {M#he}{F#she}'s a tough one...

C: 唉，你们快走吧，别再给流梦礁丢脸了。
E: You guys should go. Don't embarrass Dreamflux Reef anymore.

C: 你也是钟表匠的孩子？
E: Are you also a child of the Watchmaker?

C: 那么——随着最后一部影片的上映，《美梦往事》的故事也告一段落了，辛苦您了。
E: So, with the release of the last movie, the story of Dreamjoy Memoir has also come to an end for now. Thank you for your hard work.

C: 现在宇宙中的动画技术越来越高超，画面也越来越精细。但那些作品还是无法在梦中打败手工绘制的《钟表小子》，这也是我们剧组的骄傲！
E: As animation technology in the universe continues to advance, the graphics of films nowadays become increasingly sophisticated. Still, none of those works can rival the hand-drawn Clockie in Penacony. We're proud of that!

C: 没问题，开拍！
E: No problem. Action!

C: 好久没去服装秀场大采购了——现在正是折扣季，降价不等人呀！
E: It's been a while since I've been to a fashion show to shop till I drop — it's sale season, and the prices don't wait!

C: 可以尽情玩耍、享受小镇中的一切——最重要的是，尽情购物！
E: Have fun to your heart's content and enjoy everything in the Dreamville — most importantly, shop till you drop!

C: 你也是鸢尾花家系的？
E: You're from the Iris Family too?

C: 粗剪版本已经做出来了，要一起看看吗？
E: The rough cut is done. Wanna take a look together?

C: 鸢尾花家系笔下的折纸小鸟似乎有点不符合鸟设……
E: The origami bird written by the Iris Family doesn't seem to fit the bird persona...

C: 「苏乐达——你居家旅行、打架斗殴的必备好帮手！」
E: "SoulGlad — always your essential helper, whether at home, outside, or in fights!"

C: 开设了汽水工厂。
E: Established a soda factory.

C: 嘿，我的大导演，我的大救星！
E: Hey, my director. My savior!

C: 哦，该死的石头老板是美梦小镇的敌人，一条邪恶又奸诈的大鳄鱼，《钟表小子》里最大的反派。
E: Oh, that blasted Boss Stone is the nemesis of Dreamville. He's this vile and treacherous crocodile who's the main villain in Clockie.

C: 秩序…是啊，橡木家系为美梦增添了诸多律令，才能让这场美梦维系下去。但「钟表匠」先生是个无拘无束的人，任性的他一定不理解家族的苦心。
E: Order... Yes, the Oak Family had added many rules to try and keep the dream alive. But Mr. Watchmaker is an unrestrained man, and someone as stubborn as he is wouldn't understand The Family's hard work.

C: 不如让我渴死算了！
E: Just let me die of thirst instead!

C: 两位同路人揣着梦想来到一无所有的匹诺康尼，他们渴望成功，却屡受挫折。最后，其中一人不愿放弃，债台高筑；另外一人则放弃事业，离开了这里。
E: Two companions arrive on Penacony with nothing but a dream. Their desire for achievement is met with continuous setbacks. Ultimately, one continues on, despite spiraling into debt, while the other concedes defeats and leaves.

C: <size=36>卡！！！</size>
E: <size=36>CUT!</size>

C: 是的，虽然听起来很难以置信，但匹诺康尼现在很危险…我们必须去立刻阻止才行。
E: I know that this may sound like an exaggeration, but Penacony is actually in danger right now... We have to prevent it at all costs, sooner rather than later.

C: 流程越来越复杂了，救命…
E: Ah, the plot thickens. Help!

C: 这边，朋友们！拿出仓鼠球骑士的速度吧！
E: Over here, my friends! Better be fast like Hamster Ball Knight!

C: 那头巨兽痛苦地蜷曲，嘶吼，撞击…那薄如光翼的牢笼越来越脆弱，只要两下…不，一下它就要裂开了！
E: The monster twists painfully as it roars and smashes... The cage, thin like wings made from light, grew weaker and weaker. With but two more... no, one more strike, it is sure to crack!

C: 谁？我好像从没听过这个名字。
E: Who? I don't think I've heard of him.

C: 但唯有用亲历者的视角观测，才能明白这每一个名字背后的意义有多么沉重。
E: However, the true weight and significance behind those names can only be comprehended when experienced firsthand.

C: 这<color=#dbc291ff>十五天内会有三次阶段性的考试</color>，只要你能通过我们的测试，公司那些废铁根本不足为惧。相反，如果你不能通过——
E: We'll have <color=#dbc291ff>three exams during these fifteen days</color>. If you pass our tests, those pieces of IPC scrap won't stand a chance. But if you fail...

C: 剑侠小说里的奇遇吗，可是我能遇到什么呢……
E: Twists? Like the ones in those swordmaster novels? But I wonder what kind of unexpected twists I'll encounter...

C: 毫无疑问，你通过了。
E: Without a doubt, you aced it.

C: 按理来说，师父最明白弟子有什么做得好、又有什么不足。
E: After all, the master should be the one who is most aware of their student's strengths and weaknesses.

C: 考试结束，真正的考验才开始。
E: The tests are all over, but the real trial is just about to begin.

C: 瞧瞧，这不是我们的女侠三月七吗？
E: Well, well, if it isn't our hero, March 7th!

C: 那自然厉害，老子可是抢走了他扭曲的内心！
E: Of course I am. I've stolen his twisted heart!

C: 时间很紧，借个存档倒不错。
E: Time is tight, it's a good idea to borrow a save file.

C: 刚才佩法那的父母来家里了。听说佩法那打飞棍球时被撞断了腿，还是你背他去的医院…一定要来拜访一下「儿子挚友的父亲」。
E: Pephana's parents came by earlier. They heard about Pephana breaking his leg while playing skydart, and they found out that you carried him to the hospital... so they decided to visit the "father of their son's best friend."

C: …没办法。你那个职位实在太令人垂涎了，我只能这样做。
E: ...It couldn't be helped. Your position was so desirable. I had to make a move.

C: 你也逆天。
E: What the heck...

C: 那是一只狼？不对，那是斯科特自己。
E: Is that a wolf? Wait, no, that must be Skott himself.

C: 我快乐吗…我…我真的快乐吗…我……
E: Am I happy...? Am I... truly happy... I...

C: 一段小插曲结束了，而三月七的剑术学习还将继续。
E: This brief interlude has concluded, yet March 7th's pursuit of the art of swordplay shall continue.

C: 动手吧。
E: Go for it.

C: 不是我的主意！是那个粉毛狐狸自作主张的！我这最多只能算是…算是…无限制剑斗流？

C: 另一把剑不用强化吗？
E: Don't you need to enhance the other sword too?

C: 怎么回事？我的机甲…三月七，你对我的机甲做了什么？
E: What's happening? My mech... What did you do to my mech, March?

C: 我以后都不敢惹太卜司了。
E: I'd better not mess with the Divination Commission anymore.

C: 求求你了，说两句吧，不要让我觉得自己很可怜。
E: Come on, just say something. Don't make me feel so miserable about myself.

C: 哼哼，容我提醒三月小姐。想求如此神异丹药，多半会招来「药王秘传」这类别有用心之人。

E: March 7th quickly throws you a glance with anxiety, hoping you will throw out some suggestions.

C: 你问过公输师傅了吗，他怎么说？
E: Have you asked Master Gongshu? What did he say?

E: ...{NICKNAME}, can you understand Master Gongshu? I can't. <color=#dbc291ff>Let's return to the Artisanship Commission and ask him about it again next time.</color>

C: 没错，看来聪明的三月小姐已经发现了——你们来太卜司寻找书，而我在太卜司整理书，太巧了！这简直是送上门来…不是，咱俩简直是全银河最好的工作搭子！
E: That's right. Our smart little March 7th has already figured it out, I see. You have come to the Divination Commission in search of a book, and I am in the process of organizing books here. Isn't that just perfect? It's almost as if I'm getting fre— I mean, we'll be the best partners the Cosmos has ever seen!

C: 三月，活下去——！
E: March! Hang in there!

C: 接下来要做的便是在死线前永无休止的实验和论文了，也许很长一段时间我不能再翻垃圾桶了，真是遗憾啊。
E: From here it's just endless experiments and thesis writing until the deadline. It may be a long time until I can go trashcan diving again, which is a real shame.

C: 你怎么会在这里？
E: What are you doing here?

C: 那件事的真相应该没被报道啊！

E: Luka details the hallucinations he experienced upon arriving in Luofu.

C: 她这样子，和希儿第一次见到活的冰原熊时一模一样……

C: 小东西想得还真美。

E: Long story short, regardless of why the Xianzhou Alliance invited us, joining this Wardance is of august meaning to Belobog.

C: 藿藿朝你挤了挤眼睛，暗示你与她一起进行道德绑架。
E: Huohuo winked at you, hinting at joining her in the guilt tripping.

C: 尾！巴！大！爷！
E: Mis! Ter! Tail!

E: That was the truest voice in my heart when I stared danger in the face. I guess it means I'm not as strong as I thought I was...

C: 好可惜啊…
E: What a shame...

C: 嗯！我们翘首以盼！
E: Yeah! We look forward to it!

C: 下次要让卢卡成为冠军！
E: I'll make sure Luka becomes the champion next time!

C: 还有她带来的那个同伙也不能放跑！
E: And don't let her companion escape!

C: 驭空大人？
E: Madam Yukong?

C: 是，驮那师父。
E: Yes, Master Dhyana.

C: 你们抛弃了祂的赐福，这和把自己摆上餐桌有什么区别？
E: You forsook THEIR blessing. Is that any different from serving yourselves up on a platter?

C: 备注：请加上反有机方程。
E: Note: Please add the Anti-Organic Equation to that.

C: 记录：在花费了<unbreak>0.0019</unbreak>秒的演算时间后，我理解了奢摩的策略。以牺牲自己为代价，为我创造逃离的机会。
E: Record: After spending <unbreak>0.0019</unbreak> seconds of extrapolation, I have understood Samatha's plan. She wants to sacrifice herself to create an opportunity for me to escape.

C: 提问：倘若仙舟愿意接纳丹轮寺，给予步离人改变自己的环境，他们还会走入血火的轮回吗？
E: Question: If the Xianzhou agrees to admit Claretwheel Temple and provide an environment that allows the borisin to change themselves, would they still walk into the cycle of war and bloodshed?

C: 卢卡这一场打得真漂亮，连我都对他的成长感到惊讶。
E: Luka handled that round beautifully. Even I'm shocked at his growth!

C: 赛前很多人预测卢卡会输掉这场比赛，没想到最后卢卡选手作为大黑马赢下了比赛。对于那些赛前没有看好你们的媒体，{NICKNAME}教练，有什么话要说吗？
E: Many predicted that Luka would lose the match, yet Luka clinched the win in the end as the underdog. To those media outlets that didn't favor your odds, Coach {NICKNAME}, do you have anything to say to them?

C: 直接问…你们那么熟的吗？
E: Ask... Are you guys buddies or something?

C: 现在投降还来得及！
E: You've still got time to surrender!

C: 下场比赛的对手是——「扑满战线」。这队名还挺有画面感，怪可爱的。
E: Our next opponent is... the Trotter Battlefront. This team name certainly does evoke an image, pretty cute.

C: 三位真是好身手！我也从这场战斗中学到了很多，感谢你们。
E: You three really have great moves! I've learned a lot from this battle as well. Thank you.

C: 本场比赛对阵的两方，分别是「铁臂」卢卡和「负业磷火」——尾巴——大爷！
E: The two sides in this match are, Luka "Strongarm" and Karmic Hinkypunk — Misterrrrr Tail!

C: 我的猜测果然没错！
E: I knew I was right on the money!

C: 哈？{NICKNAME}教练，这个时候真的就不要演了吧。
E: Eh? Coach {NICKNAME}, this isn't the time to play dumb.

C: 他长得那么帅就挺美的…
E: He's pretty beautiful with how handsome he is...

C: 急眼了急眼了！素材来了！
E: OMG OMG! The coach's mad! Here comes the material!

C: 谁会记这种事情…
E: Who would remember this sort of thing...

C: 美食栏目主持人也不这样工作啊！喂——
E: Even food show hosts don't work like this! Hey...

C: 现在我也是这样的评价！
E: That's my evaluation now too!

C: 这上来的…怎么是裂界造物？我这是…出现幻觉了？
E: This... Why is there a Fragmentum creation? Am I... hallucinating?

C: 手下员工尽数倒下！托帕选手似乎准备亲自上场了！
E: Her subordinate forces have almost been whittled down! It looks like Topaz is preparing to take to the field herself!

C: 打得很好，卢卡选手。
E: That's amazing, Luka.

C: 彦卿大人开始动真格的了！
E: Yanqing's starting taking this more seriously!

C: 我不吃牛肉。
E: I don't eat beef.

C: 是有点吓人。
E: Kinda.

C: 哎呀！管你听没听懂！玩就完了！
E: Bah! Who cares if you got it! Just play the game!

C: 我在幻戏里注入的监测木马显示有人通关了困难模式，就回来祝贺一下。
E: The monitoring trojan that I injected into the immersia notified me that someone had cleared Hard Mode, so I came to offer my congratulations.

C: 这种忍术是初代兼永世社长在课堂上教给我们的，相当好用，好多人争抢着想要入社，我们都没答应呢。
E: This ninjutsu was taught to us by our first generation and eternal society chief. Many are clamoring to gain admission into the society, but none have been approved by us.

C: 所以——你想加入这场音乐派对吗？
E: So... do you wish to participate in the music party?

C: 并且…背后还有些更复杂的缘由。正好快到学院办公室了，请随我过来再说吧。
E: And... there are some more complicated threads behind this matter. We're almost at the academy office, so please come with me so we can talk about this more.

C: 打起来！打起来！
E: Fight! Fight!

C: 我同意，这个校外人士都比你们两个代表要想得清楚！所以为了带来足够精彩的演出，乐队核心理应由我们最懂音乐的学院来……
E: I agree, this outsider thinks more clearly than you two representatives! To bring out an exciting performance, the band leader ought to be entrusted to our academy, which possesses the greatest understanding of music...

C: 学生里谁和谁正在交往，老师里谁最近总挨学院代表的骂，要被裁员，我都一清二楚！
E: Who's dating who among the students, which teacher is being constantly berated by the academy's representative, and who's getting laid off, I've got all that info at my fingertips!

C: 我同意了。
E: Yes, I'll do it.

C: 你这个问题问得很好。
E: That's a very good question.

C: 可以和你聊聊吗？
E: Can we have a chat?

C: 音乐派对和三个学院的关系？
E: The music party is related to the three academies?

C: 拜托了，帮个忙吧，乐队的其余同学都写了，就差你啦——
E: Please help me out. The other band members have also filled it up. It's just you left...

C: 我们是折纸大学的不莱鸟乐队，为伟大的猫头鹰老师献唱，不懂音乐的家伙没资格和我们聊天啾！
E: We are Paperfold University's band, The Chirples! We offer our music to the great Professor Owl. Those who're deaf to music have no right to be talking to us, tweet!

C: 遇到了很厉害的事。
E: I encountered something amazing.

C: 不过，弄清楚了空间站正在发生的怪事，终于能放心了。辛苦你陪我调查啦。
E: But I can finally be at ease, now that I know what's going on in the space station. Thank you for investigating with me.

C: 喂，{NICKNAME}，你看那边——那几个公司员工，是不是有点眼熟？
E: Hey, {NICKNAME}, check it out — it's those IPC thugs again!

C: {NICKNAME}和三月小姐，我们又见面了！能在这里看到两位的身影，看来你们的游戏水平确实提升了不少啊。
E: Ah, {NICKNAME} and Miss March, we cross paths again! It's wonderful to have both of you here. Your gaming skills have certainly improved quite a bit, judging by your presence.

C: …谢谢，{NICKNAME}。
E: ...Thank you, {NICKNAME}.

C: 别灰心嘛，我看好你们！
E: Hey, don't lose heart, I'm rooting for you all the way!

C: 那么，加油——目标是完成这趟特别的旅行！
E: Alright then, let's bring this journey to a close!

C: 多谢，这下我就能专心工作了。
E: Thank you, now I can focus wholly on my work.

C: 佩佩叼起了一枚金光闪闪的以太硬币，摆出了应战的姿态。
E: Peppy picked up a sparkling Aether Coin and took up a battle pose.

C: 我好歹也玩了这么久，可不会轻易输给你！
E: I've been playing this game for so long, I won't be beaten easily!

C: 哎呀，没想到又一次输给你了啊…但别高兴太早，下次再战的结果可就不一定了哦！
E: Oh no, I didn't think I'd lose to you again... But don't get carried away, next time we battle, things will be different!

C: 小娃儿们，就让你们看看老夫的厉害！
E: Behold, young whippersnappers, prepare to witness my unparalleled talents!

C: 嘿，这下大家就都站在我们这边啦！
E: Nice, sounds like we've got a few fans out there too!

C: 本届星际决胜庆典的终极赢家——
E: ...taking the Interastral Tournament Festival by storm...

C: 啊，看来时间已经到了，我们快去比赛场地吧！
E: Ah! Looks like it's about to start. Let's make our way over to the arena!

C: 我听寒鸦小姐说，这坏东西被阵法困在这儿，正和判官僵着呢。它会配合咱们吗？
E: I heard from Miss Hanya that Cirrus is caught in a stalemate — the Evil Binding Matrix has trapped them. Will they really cooperate with us?

C: 没错，以此高台为限，你要击败我身后这四位朋友。
E: That's right. You must defeat my four companions gathered here — then you will have proved yourself a worthy opponent.

C: 听着像是随口编的名字？
E: Sounds like a made-up name to me.

C: 肯定是云吟术。
E: It must be cloudhymn magic.

C: 这个铃铛叫「同心火铃」，是绥园灾异后十王司捣鼓出来对付岁阳的道具。
E: This is the Harmonic Chime. It's an item that the Ten-Lords Commission forged to help deal with the heliobi after the Fyxestroll Garden incident.

C: 嗯，至于进去之后该怎么抓住那个阿灼，就要另想办法了。
E: Exactly... but once we're inside the illusion, we'll still have to figure out a way to catch Luxie.

C: 但在我眼里，这局棋还没到将死的一步呢，十王司无奈我何。棋局尚有翻盘的余地。
E: ...but for me, the game has only just begun. The Ten-Lords Commission doesn't have any moves left... and I still have time to turn the game in my favor.

C: 小女子时常也在想，罗浮欠下无名客如许恩情，该拿什么来回报？
E: I've wondered at times what the Luofu should give the Nameless in return for their great deeds...

C: 待我们赶到，才察觉这团火正是逃逸在外的岁阳。不知为何，「燎原」的分灵碎片中仍有漏网之鱼。
E: It turned out that the fire was none other than a heliobus. The remaining fragments of Ignamar — the heliobi — had found some way to escape from their furnace prison.

C: 你就不怕咱们被打败…
E: Aren't you afraid we'll be defeated by them...

C: 那你…很棒棒哦！但是，可不可以把嘴角的白沫咽回去先。
E: Then... good for you! But you should probably catch your breath first... I could hear you panting from a mile away.

C: 我听工造司的阿伟说了，他们司部里也有个什么玩意儿泄漏了。好几个学徒都开始胡言乱语起来，超吓人…当然，也可能是出不了师毕不了业导致的。
E: I heard from Awei that the Artisanship Commission is also experiencing strange phenomena — several of the apprentices have started babbling nonsensically, it's kinda scary... Of course, it could just be a side-effect of being denied graduation.

C: 卜算毫无意义…
E: Divination is meaningless...

C: 快些…快些将我…收入黑暗中……
E: Hurry... just hurry up and... seal me in the darkness...

C: 我感觉…像是被抽干了力气……
E: I feel... like I've been drained of my strength...

C: 你们快走吧，我就不耽误你们师徒相残啦。
E: Go. I don't wish to delay your deathmatch with your apprentice.

C: 少年，教你用剑的人来了。
E: Young one, your old teacher has arrived.

C: 不过，这一切都不重要了。在引导你的同时，我也对你的一招一式了如指掌了。
E: None of that matters anymore. While teaching you, I studied your every move inside out...

C: 不行，我得给你在罗浮邸报上买个头版广告，好好吹嘘一番。
E: We're gonna need to get you a front page news story for this one. Heck, let's get some billboards!

C: 各位，剑斗须得心诚意正，请全力以赴。
E: A swordfight must be fought with sincerity of heart and mind... Give it your all!

C: 她在挂念尾巴。
E: She was concerned about her Tail.

C: 尾巴消失以后，我本以为自己会被辞退的。但不知为何…寒鸦小姐让我来带领大家，我也很意外。
E: After Tail disappeared, I thought for sure the Commission would ask me to resign... but for some reason, Madam Hanya asked me to be the leader of the ghost-hunting squad.

C: 我还告诉她，如今十王司正在回收岁阳。如果她求助于你们，就算见到尾巴，它也会被镇入牢狱。显然，她信了……
E: I also told her that the Ten-Lords Commission was in the process of recapturing all the heliobi. If she were to turn to you for help, "Mr. Tail" would be imprisoned — even if she managed to find him. Looks like she took the bait...

C: 藿藿！藿藿！
E: Huohuo! Huohuo!

C: 那家伙虽然看似好斗莽撞，但实在是奸猾……
E: Cirrus may come across as hot-headed and impulsive, but under the surface they are actually full of guile...

C: 这家伙无论打倒多少次，总是能复原……尾巴，我们该怎么办？
E: They keep on coming back for more... What should we do, Tail?

C: 现在老子就已经是最自由的，哪里也不去了。
E: I am freer than ever before... I am going nowhere.

C: 这十王司能答应吗？
E: Will the Ten-Lords agree to this?

C: 既然你都这么说了，本大爷可不会愧疚的哦。
E: Well, since you put it like that, I suppose I have nothing to feel guilty about anymore!

C: 按照惯例，在群里同步下情报吧。
E: Let's sync up our intel as per usual.

C: 可恶啊！你们这些有棋品没人品的家伙，就算再擅长解开谜题又有何用！给我记住啊！
E: Damnation! People like you with minds but no manners... What use is solving riddles anyway? You remember this!

C: 我怀疑是因为我们太强了。
E: I suspect we are just too overpowered.

C: …那还是暴力驱邪吧？
E: ...So, we'll have to do this with violence?

C: 为了报答你，我决定给你一次改变人生的机会，跟我来！
E: To repay you, I have decided to give you an opportunity to completely transform your life, come with me!

C: 推琼玉箱子？
E: Jade Tile promotional chests?

C: 新的玩法被熔断了…
E: The new gameplay has been cut...

C: 她真好看。
E: She is beautiful.

C: …保险箱里多半就放着房产证了，拜托了，{NICKNAME}，就靠你了。
E: ...The deed is likely held inside the safe. Please, {NICKNAME}, we're counting on you.

C: 嗯嗯，还是查清楚比较好，我觉得可能不止一个受害者……
E: Mmm-hmm, best to get to the bottom of it. I think there may be more than one victim here...

C: 好好好，我说还不行吗。再说了，我现在压根逃不出来。暴起伤人的事不是我干的。她疯得厉害，我控制不住。
E: Fine! Didn't I already tell you? Besides, there's absolutely no way I can escape right now. I wasn't the one who did all that violent stuff. She's incredibly insane and outside my control.

C: 嗯，那你出来吧。
E: Well, come on out then.

C: 莫非是…那个紧急联系人？
E: Could it be... their emergency contact?

C: {NICKNAME}，你怎么说？
E: What do you think, {NICKNAME}?

C: 我们出发吧。
E: Let's go.

C: 其实，我自己拍照的时候…照片上也拍出过鬼影……
E: Actually, there was once when I was taking a photo... the picture also showed a ghostly figure...

C: 你自己收着吧。
E: You hold onto it.

C: 眼看就到了征集截止的时间，桂乃芬约你前去拍摄提问环节的外景，出发前，你在脑海中选定了一些有意思的提问。
E: As the deadline for submitting questions approaches, Guinaifen asks you to shoot the location for the Q&A segment. You pick out a few interesting questions before you go.

C: 不行，我们的生活需要一些仪式感！
E: Nope. Where's your sense of ceremony when it comes to life!

C: 害得我们广告都没空接！
E: We were so busy that we couldn't even accept any ads!

C: 如果只是哄着她，恐怕她不会明白「小桂子」只是一份职业罢了，她会以为我真是个了不得的捉鬼专家，拿着父母辛苦挣来的钱一点也不心疼地打赏我。
E: If I just placate her, I'm afraid she won't understand that "Little Gui" is actually just a job for me. She'll think that I'm actually this amazing ghost-hunter and donate all of her parents' hard-earned money to me without a care.

C: …它们也有隐藏实力？
E: ...Do they have hidden sides, too?

C: 休眠舱已连接——
E: Cryosleep pod connected...

C: 它们头顶上究竟是什么？
E: What's that on top of their heads?

C: 造物们在这里安静地休息，你舍不得打破这份温馨。
E: The creations are resting peacefully here. You don't dare to interrupt this quietude.

C: 大家围成一圈～
E: Form a circle, everyone~

C: 被虫子吞了？这要怎么救啊？
E: Swallowed? So how are we supposed to save her?

C: 那您有没有遇到什么…特殊情况？
E: So then, have you encountered any... special circumstances?

C: ——那边？可笑！那个酒保不过是我从村口旅馆捡回来的，一介村姑，连父母都找不到，你说她能调出我需要的饮料？哈哈，我倒真要看看！
E: The drinksmith over there? Preposterous! She is naught but a village girl I found from the inn. You believe an ignorant girl, who cannot even trace her lineage, to possess the skill to brew the beverage I require? Ha! How intriguing!

C: 怎么好像有点发困，饮料的后劲太大了，缓不过来？不应该啊…我明明……
E: Wait, why am I feeling a bit sleepy? Is this drink too potent? But this can't be... I'm the...

C: ——开始吧。
E: ...Here we go.

C: 是让你对宾客撒谎，不是让你对我撒谎！**。鞭子拿来，看我不把你抽到听话为止！！
E: I'm asking you to lie to the guests, not to me! You fool! Bring me the whip, and I'll make sure you never forget it!!

C: 我现在就要见你们的负责人！立刻，马上！不过来，你们谁都别想走！
E: I want to see the person in charge right now! No delays, no excuses! Or there will be consequences!

C: 给您造成了困扰，非常抱歉，鸢尾花家系愿意赔……
E: I apologize for all the trouble caused. The Iris Family is willing to compensate you...

C: （大概明白了，我在观看的是舒翁和怪物们相遇、共同建设酒吧的过程，只有最重要的时刻得到了保存。）
E: (I can understand it now. I'm currently watching the process of Siobhan meeting with the monsters and building the lounge together. Only the most important moments were preserved.)

C: 我说啥，就得做啥。明白吗？明白了就乖乖给我…嘻嘻，刷厕所怎么样？
E: Whenever I give an order, you follow it, got it? Now, if you understand, be a good troupe member and... clean the toilets, what do you say?

C: 因为人家以前是给宾客表演节目的大明星呀，去过好多厉害的舞台呢。
E: Well, I used to be a superstar entertaining those guests. I've been on some amazing stages.

C: 行啊，你想怎么称呼都可以。那我们回家咯？
E: Sure, you can call yourself whatever you want. So, shall we head home?

C: 记录「黑桃」的情况。
E: Record information about Spade.

C: …选点数大的。
E: ...Go big.

C: <size=28>在我已经说明，我是这家酒吧的老主顾后，你居然还没有向我表达该有的敬意。这是服务员该有的样子吗？啊？！</size>
E: <size=28>Even after I told you how I was a regular of this lounge, you still didn't show me respect. Is that how a server should act? Huh!?</size>

C: 破地方配上糟透了的调饮师，还有群傻乎乎的怪物。哈，躲在这玩过家家呢。
E: A rundown place with an awful drinksmith and dumb monsters. Ha, are you all hiding here playing house?

C: （只是容易害羞…淑女大概是现在为止，接触过的怪物里最正常的？）
E: (She's probably just easily embarrassed... Lady is probably the most normal among all the monsters that you've come in contact with so far?)

C: 唔，就点这个<color=#dbc291ff>橡皮糖</color>，想喝点冰块多的，好让人家内部的显像管降降温。
E: Hmm. I'll just order this <color=#dbc291ff>Chewing Gum</color>, with a little more ice, so I can cool down my internal cathode-ray tubes.

C: 要<color=#dbc291ff>大杯的，有点苦味的，颜色好看的</color>。你懂什么叫好看吗？就是<color=#dbc291ff>层次给我分的清楚点</color>，别浑浊得像杯脏水！
E: I want something in a <color=#dbc291ff>large glass that is a little bitter and with pretty colors</color>. You know what "pretty" means? It means to <color=#dbc291ff>separate the layers more clearly</color>. Don't make it all cloudy like dishwashing water!

C: 这点小要求，你应该不会拒绝吧？
E: You'll do me this small favor, won't you?

C: <size=28>…你！不知好歹！</size>
E: <size=28>...You! You have no idea what's good for you!</size>

C: …您好？我们又见面啦。
E: ...Hello, there? Here we meet again.

C: 保住工作要紧。
E: Alright. I don't want to risk losing my job.

C: 我们没有地位差别。但通常我会负责照顾它们。
E: There's no status difference here, but it's true that I usually take care of the others.

C: 我骗你的。
E: That's a lie, actually.

C: 你成功了！至此的努力收到了成效！你终于做到了！！！
E: You did it! All your efforts have finally come to fruition! You finally did it!!!

C: …为什么你要骗它？
E: ...Why did you lie to them?

C: 这次先告辞了！祝您的谈话进展顺利！
E: I'll take my leave now! Good luck with your conversation!

C: 它给你讲过它的爱吗？那其实是它在剧院时候的道具盒，里面都是些漂亮的首饰。不算贵重，但是个纪念。
E: Have they ever told you about their love? Well, it's actually a prop box from their time in the theater, filled with beautiful jewelry. Not expensive, but a memento.

C: 好像没什么特别的。
E: There's nothing special about it.

C: 你其实很希望和我聊聊吧？
E: You actually want to talk to me, right?

C: 别问了，我都记得。
E: Don't even ask. I remember it all vividly.

C: 开玩笑的。这么说是因为，只要坐在你的对面，就会感觉特别放松，像是一场温暖舒适的梦。可惜呀，梦终究是没法长久的…就像这间酒店一样。
E: Just kidding. I say that because as long as I sit opposite you, I'd feel super relaxed like I'm in a warm, cozy dream. Unfortunately, dreams don't last forever... just like this hotel.

C: 这不是你的酒吧，花费时间和精力去满足别人的要求，你就是在打工哇！
E: This isn't your lounge. Spending your time and energy to satisfy other people's demands. You're working a job!

C: 谢谢你！但你期待也没用，我根本不在乎你怎么想的哇！
E: Thank you! But no matter how much you look forward to it, it's pointless. I don't care what you think in the slightest!

C: （开始调制）
E: (Start preparing the drink)

C: 汪！荷官先生经常胡言乱语，到处捣蛋，精神不太正常哇。酒吧里的怪物都不喜欢它。
E: Woof! Mr. Dealer is often pulling things out of thin air and causing trouble wherever he goes. He's kind of off, you know. No one at the lounge likes him.

C: （黑桃带着司令出去玩了，它们两个不会闹出事来吧？）
E: (Spade took Mr. Bigwig out to play. I wonder if those two will cause trouble.)

C: 小年轻，你来了……
E: Young 'un, you're here...

C: 鲍勃示意你看向他身旁的这团忆泡。
E: Bob gestures towards the memory bubble next to him.

C: 汪      汪汪
E: Woof      woof woof

C: 汪
E: Woof

C: 汪      汪
E: Woof      Woof

C: 汪  汪  汪汪汪
E: Woof  Woof  WoofWoofWoof

C: 现在，立牌的出现频率将显著提高。
E: Now, the stands will appear at a much higher frequency.

C: 刚才说到哪儿了？噢，梦境酒店，那地方可不太平。
E: What was I saying? Oh, the hotel in the Dreamscape is not safe.

C: 英雄，总算把您给盼来了，您要是再晚会儿，他们非得把脑袋给我削下来不可。
E: You finally made it here! If you didn't show up, they would've had my head.

C: 让我看看！
E: Let me see!

C: 你就这么对我念念不忘？
E: You must think of me all the time.

C: 我觉得这地方还挺有纪念意义的，而且离开梦境之后，大概就很难再有这样相处的机会了……
E: This place makes for a memory worth remembering. Besides, it'll be hard for us to hang out together like this again once we leave the Dreamscape...

C: 那…{NICKNAME}，可以稍稍陪我玩一会儿吗？
E: Um... {NICKNAME}, if it's alright with you, could you play the game with me just a bit?

C: 最次也能留作空间站内部安防训练使用。
E: At worst, it would be kept on the space station for training purposes.

C: 其实也不是不能考虑。
E: It's not entirely off the table.

C: 说实话，面对汹涌的舆论，个人就是没什么特别好的应对方法……
E: Honestly, there's no good way to handle the tidal wave of public opinion.

C: 抱歉，我实在没办法这么乐观……
E: I'm sorry. I can't be as optimistic...

C: 铁拳打肉身，想想都疼…卢卡下手真的太黑了，怎么会有这么恶毒的人啊？
E: Iron fist to flesh, just thinking about it hurts... Luka hits too hard. How can someone be so cruel?

C: 我尊敬无法被收买的人…或者说，贝洛伯格相关的一切是由我负责的项目，我要为它的长远利益考虑。你想选哪个理由说服自己都可以。明天见。
E: I respect those who can't be bought... or rather, everything related to Belobog is under my project, and I have to consider its long-term interests. Pick whichever reason you want to convince yourself. See you tomorrow.

C: 你发现了一台刚开封的游戏机，虽然它并没有长眼睛，但你十分确信，你们的视线交汇在了一起。
E: You find an arcade machine that has just been set up. Though it doesn't have eyes, you are sure that your eyes met for a moment.

C: 喔，不错帕～{NICKNAME}乘客，快把这个枕头放到床上吧。
E: Ho-ho, not bad! {NICKNAME}, hurry and place the pillow on your bed.

C: 哼哼，本姑娘可是「星穹列车泡澡协会」的创始人！
E: Hehe, you're talking to the founder of the Astral Express Bath Association, after all!

C: 嘿嘿，帕姆也这么觉得。刚好塞满了这个角落！
E: Hehe, Pom-Pom think so too. It fits into this corner perfectly!

C: 英雄，听说你来自天外之界，可能有所不知…曾经的圣城远不止现在这么点地盘。
E: I hear you're from a world beyond the sky, so you might not know this... But the holy city used to span across far greater lands than what you see now.

C: 痛快，就爱跟你这样的人合作。
E: Excellent. That's why I like working with people like you.

C: 出于本能，又或是出于不舍，这只初来世间的生物赖住了你。
E: By instinct or attachment, this newborn creature has decided to stick with you.

C: 呜嗡…
E: Grumph...

C: 就叫这个啦！
E: Yep, that's the name!

C: 我再想想。
E: I'm having second thoughts.

C: 它的亲生父母……
E: What about its biological parents?

C: 它还能通灵？
E: So they can communicate with spirits?

C: 他对你寄予厚望。
E: He has high hopes for you.

C: 嗡，呜呜呜嗡！（嘿嘿，我的成果就是{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}的成果！反之亦然！）
E: Grumph, Grumphhhh! (Hehe, my success is {F#Mama}{M#Papa}'s success! And vice versa!)

C: 他对你寄予厚望。
E: He has high hopes for you.

C: 刚刚我们拯救世界去了。
E: We were just out saving the world.

C: 听不懂啦，大家伙。
E: I don't understand you, big guy.

C: 怎么还有危险性的？
E: Wait, this is dangerous?

C: 是不可思议的故事，\n人们说，
E: His tale is an extraordinary one,\nthey say.

C:
从过去到未来，
总有许多透着暖光的门径，
向她们静静敞开，
那门径中的声音传来：
E:
There will always be passageways,
Filled with warm sun rays,
That silently open to them in future and past days.
And from them, a voice says:

C: 「赛法利娅，你又远行了许久。」\n「有趣的见闻…*我们*想听！」
E: "Cifera, you took another long journey."\n"And we want to hear... Your fun stories!"

C: 老妇听罢含笑不语，\n用浸着夜色的绸缎，\n为女孩裁出一只兜帽。
E: The woman smiles and does not reply,\nOnly weaving with night-shaded silk,\nA suave hooded robe for her little spark.

C: 笼外的黄金裔含笑而问：\n「你可想看看，我最珍贵的宝物？」
E: So the Chrysos Heir outside the cage smiles sweet:\n"Would you like to see my most precious, a treasure bright?"

C: 「准备好了吗？」
E: "Are you ready?"

C:
你理解了更多概念，
生发出更多情绪。
你长出毛茸茸的手掌，
试着触碰她的指尖。
E:
You come to understand more,
new thoughts, deeper feelings.
Your palms grow soft with fur,
and you reach, gently, for her fingertips.

C: 「旅行，喜欢。和你，一起？」
E: "Travel, like. With you, together?"

C: 方才借着巨鸟的眼眸，\n看清了自己的全貌。
E: As though seeing themself clearly and in full,\nThrough the eyes of a giant bird.

C: 一柄破浪的剑旗拦住去路，\n一位执棋的统帅仰头问询。
E: A swordmaster who broke the waves stopped its way,\nAnd a ruler, commander of the chess board, looked up with inquiry.

C:
胸中的熔炉仍在鼓动。
在热流的间隙中，
我偶尔也会恍惚，
瞥见那银河之隙的庞然身影——
E:
The furnace in my chest still pulses.
In the gaps between the heated torrents,
I sometimes find myself in a daze,
Catching glimpses of that colossal figure in the cosmos's cracks —

C: 她有着粉霞般的头发，\n和能融化坚冰的笑靥。
E: She had hair like a rosy pink dawn,\nAnd a smile that could thaw the most glacial ice.

C: 「云璃师傅说的没错，\n琼实鸟串确实好好吃啊。」\n——三月七
E: "Master Yunli was right.\nThese berrypheasant skewers are absolutely delicious!"\n— March 7th

C: 「王道是一场孤独的征伐， 终有一日， 我们只能望见她的背影。」 奏浪的剑士也心事重重。
E: "The road of a ruler is a lonely one. One day, We'll only be able to see her retreating form." The swordmaster of singing waves was worried too.

C: <color=#9e5738>谁会赢？</color>\n诸位天外尊神的光辉，\n还是凯撒心中燎原的火种？
E: <color=#9e5738>Who will win?</color>\nThe light of the esteemed gods beyond the sky,\nOr the Coreflame lighting up the world in the Imperator's heart?

C: 「我愿领受最后的君命。」\n「可惜我们的欢宴，终是一番蜃景。」
E: "I'm willing to accept the final imperial command."\n"But it is a pity that our feast was ultimately a mirage."

C:
在那纷争席卷大地，
诡计搅扰人心的往昔。

未成织者的小姐裹着富贵的茧，
不见风雨的侵袭。
E:
In the past when strife swallowed the earth,
And schemes disrupted the hearts of friends,

The maiden who was yet a weaver was wrapped in a cocoon most grand,
Untouched by the storms sweeping through the land.

C: 水声隔绝一切纷扰和吐息。\n如此安眠，如此好梦。
E: The sound of the water repels all disruptions and speech.\nSuch peaceful rest, such sweet dreams.

C: 「不可直视众人的未来，\n因那灼眼的神谕太过烫人…」
E: "Do not stare directly into the future of your people,\nFor that blinding prophecy will burn you all..."

C: 「看清楚了？这位可是海妖的公主、黑潮克星、食骨巨鲨、翁法罗斯第一乐手，而我是她忠诚的棋士。现在，为我们准备房间和餐点吧。」
E: "Do you understand now? This here is the Princess of Sea Sirens, Nemesis of the Black Tide, the Bone-Eating Megashark, First Musician of Amphoreus, and I am her loyal chess master. Now, prepare our rooms and meals."

C: 「为什么？」金发的男人心中充满了疑惑，「难道最终在悬锋祭典中获胜的是他？就凭这副文弱的身板…悬锋竟衰败至此？」
E: "How?" The blonde man was filled with confusion. "Was he the one who won the Kremnos Festival? With such a frail physique... Has Kremnos really fallen this far?"

C: 「哈哈哈哈哈——」似乎能听到他心中所想，绿发的男人转动着手中的手枪，发出狂笑。
E: "Hahaha hahaha—" As if hearing his thoughts, the green-haired man twirled his gun while letting out a maniacal laugh.

C: 塞涅俄丝不善言语，唯一的爱好便是砥砺自身。荒笛见过许多黄金裔，他们之中没有一位像塞涅俄丝这般天赋异禀。几年后，当荒笛与塞涅俄丝角力、彼此势均力敌时，它意识到，这位流淌着黄金血的天空子民必将留名历史。只是，看着塞涅俄丝深埋眼底的执拗，荒笛开始忧虑，这份卓绝的力量给她带来的，除了辉煌，或许更有悲剧。
E: Seliose was a girl of few words. The only hobby she had was to hone her skills. Among all the Chrysos Heirs that Terravox had encountered, none possessed such extraordinary talent as Seliose. Years later, when Terravox sparred with Seliose and found themselves evenly matched, the beast realized that this Skyfolk with golden blood would surely leave her mark in history. However, seeing the stubborn determination buried deep in Seliose's eyes, Terravox began to worry that this exceptional power might bring her not only glory, but perhaps even greater tragedy.

C: 黑衣剑士看着眼前静好的哀丽秘榭，和称呼自己为英雄的白发男人——那双眼眸依然是纯净的矢车菊蓝。
E: The black-clad swordmaster gazed at the tranquil Aedes Elysiae before him, and at the white-haired man who called him a hero — those eyes still held their pure cornflower blue.

C: 「缇宝、缇安、缇宁…你们都在？」
E: "Tribbie, Trianne, Trinnon... you're all here?"

C: 奥赫玛的天空骤然一黯，死龙遮天蔽日的身影在云石市集上盘旋，随后振翼、降落在刻法勒广场，发出震耳的咆哮。居民们慌张地跑回家中，取出早已准备好的物件——这俨然已经成为圣城全新的风俗，人们争先恐后地簇拥在死龙的身边，生怕自己慢人一步。
E: The skies of Okhema suddenly darkened as the Netherwing's massive silhouette circled above the Marmoreal Market, blocking out the sun. With powerful wingbeats, it descended upon Kephale Plaza, unleashing an earth-shattering roar. The residents frantically rushed back to their homes, retrieving items they had prepared in advance. This had clearly become the holy city's newest custom, as people eagerly crowded around the Netherwing, afraid of being left behind.

C: 针对实验中出现的重要成果，阶段性结论与后续检验，进行的专项报告。
E: Special report detailing key findings from the experiment, interim conclusions, and further validation steps.

C: 感觉你在讲相声方面挺有天赋的，要不尝试换个赛道？哈哈哈，不管怎么样，祝你万事顺利！
E: Feels like you got some talent in crosstalk comedy. How about you try a different track in life? Hahaha, I wish you luck, no matter what happens!

C: 一般
E: Neutral

C: 另外，帕姆托我给你带个话：擅自用你的冰箱，的确是列车长不对，但你也太能吃了帕！不要暴饮暴食，注意身体。
E: Also, Pom-Pom has a message for you: It's the Conductor's fault for using your refrigerator without asking you, but you've got a huge appetite! Don't overeat and take care of your health.

C: 命运重渊、奥赫玛、悬锋城…这些年里，我踏足了很多地方。\n我想，你可能会喜欢树庭。那里的人们在一棵古树上生活，它高大、年迈，足以住下一万只小妖精。我在那里经历了一段求学时光，结识了可靠的师长和同窗。\n希望有朝一日，能介绍他们给你认识。
E: Abyss of Fate, Okhema, Castrum Kremnos... I've wandered far these past few years.\nBut I think you'd like the Grove best. The people there live atop an ancient, towering tree — old and grand enough to house ten thousand little fairies. I pursued my studies there for a period of time, and met reliable friends and teachers I'll never forget.\nOne day, I hope I can introduce them to you.

C: 人生体验卡
E: Life Experience Card

C: 「大守护者可可利亚以她的气度与铁腕，唤醒了贝洛伯格每一颗沉睡的灵魂——她为忠诚的铁卫吹响反攻的号角，无愧为七百年来唯一的先驱；」
E: "Supreme Guardian Cocolia, with her magnanimity and firmness, awakened every sleeping soul in Belobog. She sounded the horn of counterattack for the loyal Silvermane Guards, worthy of being the only pioneer in the last seven hundred years."

C: \n\n阿德勒在遭到袭击时被我们救下。我表明了来意，他似乎从我的话语中受到了什么启发。我应该是从艾丝妲之前提到的<color=#dbc291ff>密卷科的某人</color>口中了解到了什么。
E: \n\nAdler was saved by us when he was attacked. I stated our purpose, and he seemed to have an epiphany from my words. I think I understood something from the words of <color=#dbc291ff>someone from the Department of Insight</color> Asta mentioned before.

C: \n\n黑塔委托我调查的是和呜呜伯与岁阳类似的能量生命，发生在科员身上的人体自燃现象也是个棘手的麻烦。但之前阿德勒似乎有一个大胆的猜想，他的直觉很准，似乎可以期待一下。
E: \n\nHerta assigned me to investigate energy lifeforms similar to Wubbaboos and heliobi. The spontaneous human combustion occuring among the researchers is a thorny problem. However, Adler already seems to have a bold conjecture. His intuition is usually very accurate, and we can look forward to how his predictions play out.

C: 他们与芸芸众生并无区别。
E: They are not any different from the masses.

C: 「虚无」的令使，黄泉，令他圆满完成了任务。\n他本可以活用公司的资源——财富、情报，甚至下属的生命——但他选择用自己押注。这是出于善意，还是出于谋略？我们如今已无法得知。
E: Acheron, Emanator of Nihility, helped him to complete his task to perfection.\nHe could have used all the resources the IPC has — Wealth, information, even the lives of his underlings — But he wagered himself instead. Was it out of kindness, or a cunning strategy? We will never know.

C: 一个活生生的卡通形象出现在你面前，还送给了你一项超乎想象的能力。\n很新奇，很强大。可能还伴随着一点…道德层面上的不确定性。幸好你是个品行高尚的人，不会随便拨弄他人的情绪…对吧？
E: A living cartoon character has manifested right before you and has even given you unimaginable powers.\nIt's novel and powerful, and also accompanied by... a bit of moral ambiguity. Thankfully, you're someone with high morals, and won't mess with other people's feelings on a whim... right?

C: 任意<color=#f29e38ff>两件简易装备</color>可以合成一件<color=#f29e38ff>进阶装备</color>。\n可以点击简易装备，查看合成表。
E: Any <color=#f29e38ff>two basic equipment</color> can be synthesized into a piece of <color=#f29e38ff>advanced equipment</color>.\nClick on the basic equipment to view the synthesis chart.

C: 「喜剧人」可以获得<color=#f29e38ff>「憋笑度」</color>，为「惊笑盒」充能。\n「憋笑度」越高，「惊笑盒」的<color=#f29e38ff>效果越强</color>。
E: The Comedian can charge the Surprise Box by gaining <color=#f29e38ff>Giggle Gauge</color>.\nThe higher the Giggle Gauge, the <color=#f29e38ff>stronger the effect</color> of the Surprise Box.

C: 在比赛过程中，玩家可以使用<color=#f29e38ff>赛场道具</color>来影响比赛。使用任意道具后，<color=#f29e38ff>所有道具</color>都会进入冷却。
E: During the match, players can use <color=#f29e38ff>arena items</color> to influence the game. After using any item, <color=#f29e38ff>all items</color> will enter cooldown.

C: 拥有多层韧性的敌人，每层韧性被削减至0时会触发一次击破伤害，最后一层韧性削减至0时会触发弱点击破。
E: Enemies with multiple layers of Toughness will suffer an instance of Break DMG each time a layer of Toughness is reduced. When the last layer is reduced to 0, the Weakness Break effect will trigger.

C: 流水线上放置着若干<color=#f29e38ff>集装箱</color>，通过调整<color=#f29e38ff>集装箱</color>的位置，可填补道路空隙或移开道路障碍，从而完成通行。
E: Various <color=#f29e38ff>freight containers</color> are placed on the assembly line. Adjust the position of the <color=#f29e38ff>freight containers</color> to fill gaps in the road or remove obstacles to open new passages.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>大衍万象</color>是占算航路，问卜未来的大型玉兆算端。移动地面的阵枢，使阵法图案与昭示一致，以启动阵基。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Mutare Magnus</color> is a large-scale jade abacus calculation terminal used to calculate shipping routes and predict future events. To activate the base terminal, simply move the layout on the ground to match the pattern with the shape that is shown.

C: 打戏片段、拾取补给道具都会累积能量，能量充满时将进入<color=#f29e38ff>「哈努时间」</color>，进入一段长时间的无敌状态，并自动开火。
E: Energy can be accumulated by conducting Action Scenes and picking up supplies. When energy is full, you will trigger <color=#f29e38ff>Hanu Time</color> and enter a long period of invulnerability.

C: 据说热砂的球笼地图中隐藏着秘密，当地图的机关形成<color=#f29e38ff>特定状态组合</color>时，隐藏的挑战将会开启。\n关于组合顺序的线索，就藏在挑战场地的<color=#f29e38ff>某本秘籍</color>中，找到线索后将会记录在右下角的「盛会百科」里。
E: It is said that the Spheroid map of Scorchsand hides a secret, and that when the mechanisms on the map form a <color=#f29e38ff>specific combination of states</color>, the hidden challenge will commence.\nThe clues regarding the combination for the secret are hidden within a certain <color=#f29e38ff>secret book</color> in the challenge arena. Once you find the clue, it will be recorded in the Festival Wiki on the lower right.

C: 在命运之路上，被过去束缚是很悲惨的……<color=#f29e38ff>不可以接近黑暗版的自己</color>。
E: While on the road of destiny, it is a tragic thing to be tethered by the past... <color=#f29e38ff>Do not approach the Enshadowed Version of You</color>.

C: 预言算碑是欧洛尼斯的造物，解开谜题将<color=#f29e38ff>使预言成真</color>
E: The Prophecy Tablet is a creation of Oronyx. Solving the puzzle will <color=#f29e38ff>make the prophecy come true</color>

C: 遐蝶释放<color=#f29e38ff>秘技</color>后，可持续<color=#f29e38ff>晕眩</color>沿途范围内敌人。\n再次使用秘技攻击<color=#f29e38ff>范围</color>内敌人，<color=#f29e38ff>召唤死龙进入战斗</color>。
E: After Castorice uses her <color=#f29e38ff>Technique</color>, she can continually <color=#f29e38ff>Daze</color> enemies in her path.\nUse the Technique again will attack enemies in <color=#f29e38ff>a radius</color> and <color=#f29e38ff>summon Netherwing to enter battle</color>.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>战技点</color>为<color=#f29e38ff>全队共享</color>，施放<color=#f29e38ff>战技</color>需要<color=#f29e38ff>消耗战技点</color>，施放<color=#f29e38ff>普攻</color>可以<color=#f29e38ff>恢复战技点</color>。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Skill Points</color> are <color=#f29e38ff>shared among the team</color>. Using a <color=#f29e38ff>Skill</color> will <color=#f29e38ff>consume Skill Points</color>, while using <color=#f29e38ff>Basic ATK</color> can <color=#f29e38ff>recover Skill Points</color>.

C: 已解锁<color=#f29e38ff>表演赛</color>，曾经遭遇的强大对手将会在表演赛中随机登场，可以向他们再次发起挑战。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Exhibition matches</color> have been unlocked. The elite opponents you faced in previous battles will randomly appear in exhibition matches, and you can challenge them again.

C: 我方编队中的<color=#f29e38ff>第一位角色</color>释放<color=#f29e38ff>终结技</color>时，可积累「战意值」。

C: 赌戏情节能在美梦排排乐中抽到不同的结果，可能获得大量观众情绪
E: Lucky Scene allows you to draw different results in Dreamy Slots, potentially granting a large amount of Audience Emotions

C: 敌人在陷入<color=#f29e38ff>负面状态</color>时或行动时，均会获得1层<color=#f29e38ff>终结技易伤</color>。\n集中攻击<color=#f29e38ff>易伤层数最高</color>的敌人，可对全体敌人造成更高伤害。
E: When enemies become <color=#f29e38ff>debuffed</color> or when they take action, they will receive 1 stack of <color=#f29e38ff>Ultimate Vulnerability</color>.\nFocus your attacks on the enemy that has the <color=#f29e38ff>highest Vulnerability stacks</color> to deal more DMG to the whole enemy team.

C: 我方<color=#f29e38ff>单个角色</color>在<color=#f29e38ff>累积施放</color>3次<color=#f29e38ff>终结技</color>后，立即再次<color=#f29e38ff>激活终结技</color>。
E: After <color=#f29e38ff>a single ally</color> has used their <color=#f29e38ff>Ultimate</color> for <color=#f29e38ff>a total of </color> 3 times, they will immediately <color=#f29e38ff>activate their Ultimate</color> again.

C: 三月七的<color=#f29e38ff>剑术进境</color>越高，越容易通过试剑。试剑通过后，会提升属性与恢复心情。

C: 初始拥有<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>点生命值，我方角色生命值<color=#f29e38ff>降低或回复</color>时，小桶回复等额生命值，当生命值回复至上限时，小桶<color=#f29e38ff>进化</color>。小桶进化形态依次为铜/银/金/究极金，进化后伤害倍率提高，并降低生命值至<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>点。进化至<color=#f29e38ff>【究极金】</color>后，我方角色每次攻击时，小桶立即损失生命值上限<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color>的生命值，生命值等于<unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak>时，退化为【金】形态。当我方角色受到致命攻击时，小桶立即为其回复生命值。
E: Starts with <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> HP. When an ally <color=#f29e38ff>loses or restores</color> HP, minicand restore an equal amount of HP. When healed to the maximum capacity, minicans <color=#f29e38ff>evolve</color>. The order in which minicans evolve is Bronze / Silver / Gold / Ultra Gold. After evolution, their DMG multiplier increases and HP is reduced to <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>. After evolving to <color=#f29e38ff>Ultra Gold</color>, each ally attack will cause minicans to immediately lose HP equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of their Max HP. When their health is equal to <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak>, they regress to the Gold form. When an allied character takes a killing blow, the minicans will restore HP immediately.

C: 视角选择
E: Select POV

C:
世间有众繁气象，都曾令那无垠天穹喧闹沸腾。
而当余晖散尽，在那阴晴弥合、晨昏并拢的时刻……
她为彷徨者拥留最后的胧明，
以笑涡为伤疼的宿命点亮虹光。
E:
In the world, countless magnificent phenomena once set the boundless sky buzzing and boiling.
And when the twilight faded, the moment when the overcast mends, and dawn and dusk merge into one...
She bestows upon the wanderers the last, hazy light,
and with a swirling smile, she illuminates their sorrowful fate with rainbow radiance.

C: 「遗落的往昔，隐秘的沉迹，褪色的传奇…那些不应遗忘的故事，已被编缀成书，封入一页又一页记忆。」
E: "Lost yesterdays, hidden traces, faded legends... The stories that should not be forgotten have been woven into books, sealed within pages of memory."

C: 美梦剧团中演奏谐乐的琴师。本应于「谐乐大典」之中献奏，如今却被「秩序」所缚，上演着关于「未来」的剧目。来日是永恒的长歌，幸福的愿景汇于弦上，以琴声呼唤谱曲的君王。
E: A musician responsible for playing the harmonious tune in the Sweet Dreams Troupe. It should be playing in the Charmony Festival, but it is now bound by Order and keeps performing scenes of the "Future." The future is an eternal ballad, a vision of happiness strung together, calling to the composing sovereign with the melody of a harp.

E: Sushang has been calling me "Little Gui" for a long time now, which is fine... But recently I've noticed that even my brothers on the street have started calling me "Little Gui," and even audience members... At this rate, no one's gonna remember my real name!

You defeated The Great Septimus, and the Aeon of Order returned to slumber.

C:
听，海浪卷来了新的回忆：
贝壳，砂砾，曾是城邦的一块废墟。
它们表面刻满了故事，每道划痕都是树木的年轮。
名为塞壬的造物会将它们拾起，用爪子做好标记。
这枚是扎格列斯送来的惊喜，
那枚是欧洛尼斯留下的记叙；
等到巢中杂物积得够多，塞壬便会把它们洒回海里。
只留下一段空灵的诗歌，记录它们背后的密辛。
啊，世人都说塞壬是吃人的海妖。
谁又曾注意，塞壬也是精湛的诗人。
所以，过路的旅者，若你在岸边遇到人面的鸟儿。
不妨别急着逃跑，先坐下来听它分享一曲。
它会为你讲述，人类读不到的记忆。
E:
Listen, the waves have brought new memories:
Shells and grains of sand, once a ruin of the city-state.
Their surfaces are etched with stories, each scratch like the rings of a tree.
Creatures called sirens gather them, marking them with their claws.
This one is a surprise from Zagreus,
and that one carries tales from Oronyx.
When their nests overflow with trinkets, the sirens scatter them back to sea.
Leaving only ethereal poetry to chronicle their hidden secrets.
Ah, people say sirens are man-eating monsters.
Yet who has noticed they are also masterful poets?
So, passing traveler, if you meet a bird with a human face on the shore,
don't rush to flee. Sit down and listen to their song.
They'll tell you of memories that no human has ever read.

E: Alright. Not the best timing, but that's as far as this first try goes.

E: Oh, right on schedule. Gray Hair should be wrapping up soon! Miss Sparkle, time to head to the next scene!

C: 嗯，就像我一样——「未经允许，严禁脱离驾驶舱；存活的骑士应主动归队」，这些不仅仅是军规，也是我们延续生命的条件。
E: Yes, just like me. "Leaving the cockpit without permission is strictly prohibited. Surviving knights must actively return to formation." These aren't just military regulations. They're the terms of our survival.

C: 别着急，有位棘手的陌生人在。
E: Hold on, there's a troublesome stranger here.

E: Besides, Big Brother will help it, right?

C: 我想你也有所察觉。

C: 但在匹诺康尼发现虫群时，她没有袖手旁观。即便她仍在抗争虫群时死去，但那不是命运再次追上了她。
E: But when the Swarm was discovered on Penacony, she didn't just stand idly by. Even though she died while fighting against the Swarm, it wasn't destiny catching up with her again.

C: 可惜，你还是因狂喜而失态了。在梦境中，我暂且不是你的对手。但我想走，你也留不住。
E: Unfortunately, you lost your composure in your euphoria. In the dreamscape, I might not be your match. But if I want to leave, you can't keep me here.

C: 你承认自己是梦主盟友的那一刻，我就开始怀疑你真正的用意了。迄今为止，你背叛过自己加入的每一方势力，从无例外。
E: The moment you admitted to being the Dreammaster's ally, I began to suspect your true intentions. Until now, you've betrayed every single faction you've joined, without exception.

C: 多年之前，他已经完成了这个计划，只等一位格拉默铁骑闯入梦中。可惜，帝国突然覆灭，他的希望似已落空。
E: Years ago, he had already completed this plan, waiting for a Glamoth Knight to enter the dream. Unfortunately, with the sudden fall of the empire, his hopes seemed to have been dashed.

C: 无论如何，星穹列车不能对星核坐视不理。为匹诺康尼「开拓」未来，也是米哈伊尔等前人的夙愿。
E: Anyway, we can't leave the Stellaron unchecked. This is about Trailblazing a bright future for Penacony and fulfilling the long-cherished wishes of Mikhail and our other predecessors.

C: 滴答……
E: Tick-tock...

C: 只局限于梦中，即便星核也不可能真正复兴蝗灾。梦主的作为，只能唤起入梦者的恐惧。
E: It was confined within the dream. Even a Stellaron could not truly revive the Swarm Disaster. The Dreammaster's actions could only evoke fear in those already dreaming.

C: 不同于此刻的集结——太一之梦的消散需要时间，足以引起{RUBY_B#太一}星期日{RUBY_E#}的注意。

C: 是你…我一直都很想见见你。我很好奇，为何她会如此地珍视你的存在？
E: It's you... I've been wanting to meet you. I'm curious. Why does she value your existence so much?

C: 一点萤火，一声惋叹——{RUBY_B#奔赴虚无至暗}正因生命敢于沉睡{RUBY_E#}，{RUBY_B#必将寻获明光}他们才能醒来{RUBY_E#}。
E: A glimmer of fireflies, a sigh of regret... It is because {RUBY_B#rushing towards the darkest void}life dares to slumber{RUBY_E#} that {RUBY_B#will inevitably find bright light}they can awaken{RUBY_E#}.

C: 而他的回答，让我知道了，自己该因何而唱——
E: However, his answer to me made me realize what I should be singing for...

C: 而被迫{RUBY_B#无法醒来}「坠落于地」{RUBY_E#}的，也不需要高高在上的同情。
E: And those forced to {RUBY_B#unable to wake up}"fall back to earth"{RUBY_E#} don't need anyone's condescending sympathy.

E: I guess it's my fault too, always talking about wanting a normal life... As if the past that shaped me is some heavy burden weighing me down.

E: <color=#dbc291ff>Everyone has their own answer as to why life slumbers.</color>

E: Robin, is that you singing...?

C: 人们送别故人，要趁着他们仍能听见时，尽早哭泣——这样他们才能知道，自己被多少人爱着。
E: When you bid farewell to loved ones, you should cry while they can still hear you. That's the only way they'll know just how many people love them.

C: ——艾利欧的原话，也是给你的报酬。

C: 诗人与赴死者们常说，冥河的水流平静又湍急。岸这边散落着死而未渡的亡魂，岸那头通往象征新生的花海。当摆渡人载着死者航向彼岸时，河水平静如镜；若是亡魂试图自渡，便会被湍急的水流淹没。
E: Poets and those facing death often speak of the River of Souls. Its waters were both serene and turbulent. On this shore lie scattered souls of the dead who haven't crossed, while the opposite bank leads to flower fields, symbolizing rebirth. When the ferryman carries the dead toward the other shore, the waters are as calm as a mirror. But should a soul attempt to cross alone, they'd be swallowed by the raging currents.
